title: Exploiting and Guiding User Interaction in Interactive Machine Teaching
title_zh: 在交互式机器教学中利用和指导用户交互
abstract: Humans are talented with the ability to perform diverse interactions in the teaching process. However, when humans want to teach AI, existing interactive systems only allow humans to perform repetitive labeling, causing an unsatisfactory teaching experience. My Ph.D. research studies Interactive Machine Teaching (IMT), an emerging field of HCI research that aims to enhance humans' teaching experience in the AI creation process. My research builds IMT systems that exploit and guide user interaction and shows that such in-depth integration of human interaction can benefit both AI models and user experience.
summary: Humans are talented with the ability to perform diverse interactions in the teaching process. However, when humans want to teach AI, existing interactive systems only allow humans to perform repetitive labeling, causing an unsatisfactory teaching experience. My Ph.D. research studies Interactive Machine Teaching (IMT), an emerging field of HCI research that aims to enhance humans' teaching experience in the AI creation process. My research builds IMT systems that exploit and guide user interaction and shows that such in-depth integration of human interaction can benefit both AI models and user experience.
abstract_zh: 人类具有在教学过程中进行多样化互动的能力。然而，当人类想要教授人工智能时，现有的交互系统只能让人类进行重复的标注，导致教学体验并不理想。我的博士学位研究研究交互式机器教学（IMT），这是人机交互研究的一个新兴领域，旨在增强人类在人工智能创造过程中的教学体验。我的研究构建了利用和指导用户交互的 IMT 系统，并表明这种人类交互的深度集成可以使人工智能模型和用户体验受益。

AI.tldr: 研究交互式机器教学（IMT），开发系统以利用和引导用户交互，提升AI教学效果和用户体验。
AI.motivation: 现有AI教学系统仅支持重复性标签操作，无法发挥人类多样化的教学互动能力，导致体验不佳。
AI.method: 构建交互式机器教学系统，通过深度整合用户交互行为优化教学过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法同时提升了AI模型性能与用户教学体验。
AI.conclusion: IMT通过有效整合用户互动，为AI教学提供了更高效的人机协作范式，具有重要研究价值。

title: What to Prune and What Not to Prune at Initialization
title_zh: 初始化时要修剪什么和不修剪什么
abstract: Post-training dropout based approaches achieve high sparsity and are well established means of deciphering problems relating to computational cost and overfitting in Neural Network architectures. Contrastingly, pruning at initialization is still far behind. Initialization pruning is more efficacious when it comes to scaling computation cost of the network. Furthermore, it handles overfitting just as well as post training dropout. In approbation of the above reasons, the paper presents two approaches to prune at initialization. The goal is to achieve higher sparsity while preserving performance. 1) K-starts, begins with k random p-sparse matrices at initialization. In the first couple of epochs the network then determines the "fittest" of these p-sparse matrices in an attempt to find the "lottery ticket" p-sparse network. The approach is adopted from how evolutionary algorithms find the best individual. Depending on the Neural Network architecture, fitness criteria can be based on magnitude of network weights, magnitude of gradient accumulation over an epoch or a combination of both. 2) Dissipating gradients approach, aims at eliminating weights that remain within a fraction of their initial value during the first couple of epochs. Removing weights in this manner despite their magnitude best preserves performance of the network. Contrarily, the approach also takes the most epochs to achieve higher sparsity. 3) Combination of dissipating gradients and kstarts outperforms either methods and random dropout consistently. The benefits of using the provided pertaining approaches are: 1) They do not require specific knowledge of the classification task, fixing of dropout threshold or regularization parameters 2) Retraining of the model is neither necessary nor affects the performance of the p-sparse network.
summary: Post-training dropout based approaches achieve high sparsity and are well established means of deciphering problems relating to computational cost and overfitting in Neural Network architectures. Contrastingly, pruning at initialization is still far behind. Initialization pruning is more efficacious when it comes to scaling computation cost of the network. Furthermore, it handles overfitting just as well as post training dropout. In approbation of the above reasons, the paper presents two approaches to prune at initialization. The goal is to achieve higher sparsity while preserving performance. 1) K-starts, begins with k random p-sparse matrices at initialization. In the first couple of epochs the network then determines the "fittest" of these p-sparse matrices in an attempt to find the "lottery ticket" p-sparse network. The approach is adopted from how evolutionary algorithms find the best individual. Depending on the Neural Network architecture, fitness criteria can be based on magnitude of network weights, magnitude of gradient accumulation over an epoch or a combination of both. 2) Dissipating gradients approach, aims at eliminating weights that remain within a fraction of their initial value during the first couple of epochs. Removing weights in this manner despite their magnitude best preserves performance of the network. Contrarily, the approach also takes the most epochs to achieve higher sparsity. 3) Combination of dissipating gradients and kstarts outperforms either methods and random dropout consistently. The benefits of using the provided pertaining approaches are: 1) They do not require specific knowledge of the classification task, fixing of dropout threshold or regularization parameters 2) Retraining of the model is neither necessary nor affects the performance of the p-sparse network.
abstract_zh: 基于训练后 dropout 的方法实现了高度稀疏性，并且是解决神经网络架构中与计算成本和过度拟合相关问题的成熟方法。相比之下，初始化时的剪枝还远远落后。当涉及到扩展网络的计算成本时，初始化修剪更加有效。此外，它还可以处理过度拟合以及训练后丢失。鉴于上述原因，本文提出了两种初始化剪枝方法。目标是在保持性能的同时实现更高的稀疏性。 1) K-starts，初始化时以 k 个随机 p-稀疏矩阵开始。在前几个时期中，网络确定这些 p 稀疏矩阵的“最适合”，以尝试找到“彩票”p 稀疏网络。该方法借鉴了进化算法如何寻找最佳个体的原理。根据神经网络架构，适应度标准可以基于网络权重的大小、一个时期内梯度累积的大小或两者的组合。 2）耗散梯度方法，旨在消除在前几个时期内保持在初始值一小部分内的权重。尽管权重大小不同，但以这种方式删除权重可以最好地保持网络的性能。相反，该方法也需要最多的时期才能实现更高的稀疏性。 3) 耗散梯度和 kstart 的组合始终优于任一方法和随机 dropout。使用所提供的相关方法的好处是：1）它们不需要分类任务的具体知识、固定丢失阈值或正则化参数2）模型的重新训练既不必要也不影响p稀疏网络的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种初始化阶段的网络剪枝方法，旨在实现高稀疏性同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统后训练dropout方法虽有效，但初始化剪枝在计算成本和过拟合处理上潜力未被充分挖掘，且无需重新训练或调整超参数。
AI.method: 1) K-starts：初始化时生成k个随机稀疏矩阵，通过进化算法选择最优子网络；2) 消散梯度法：移除前几轮训练中梯度变化小的权重；3) 两种方法结合使用效果更优。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种方法均能实现与后训练dropout相当的性能，且无需重新训练。组合方法在稀疏性和性能上均优于单独方法及随机dropout。
AI.conclusion: 初始化剪枝可通过进化算法与梯度分析有效实现，为高效模型压缩提供了无需任务特定参数的通用解决方案。

authors_text: Zhanchao Huang,Wei Li,Xiang-Gen Xia,Hao Wang,Ran Tao
title: Task-wise Sampling Convolutions for Arbitrary-Oriented Object Detection in Aerial Images
title_zh: 用于航空图像中任意方向目标检测的任务式采样卷积
abstract: Arbitrary-oriented object detection (AOOD) has been widely applied to locate and classify objects with diverse orientations in remote sensing images. However, the inconsistent features for the localization and classification tasks in AOOD models may lead to ambiguity and low-quality object predictions, which constrains the detection performance. In this article, an AOOD method called task-wise sampling convolutions (TS-Conv) is proposed. TS-Conv adaptively samples task-wise features from respective sensitive regions and maps these features together in alignment to guide a dynamic label assignment for better predictions. Specifically, sampling positions of the localization convolution in TS-Conv are supervised by the oriented bounding box (OBB) prediction associated with spatial coordinates, while sampling positions and convolutional kernel of the classification convolution are designed to be adaptively adjusted according to different orientations for improving the orientation robustness of features. Furthermore, a dynamic task-consistent-aware label assignment (DTLA) strategy is developed to select optimal candidate positions and assign labels dynamically according to ranked task-aware scores obtained from TS-Conv. Extensive experiments on several public datasets covering multiple scenes, multimodal images, and multiple categories of objects demonstrate the effectiveness, scalability, and superior performance of the proposed TS-Conv.
summary: Arbitrary-oriented object detection (AOOD) has been widely applied to locate and classify objects with diverse orientations in remote sensing images. However, the inconsistent features for the localization and classification tasks in AOOD models may lead to ambiguity and low-quality object predictions, which constrains the detection performance. In this article, an AOOD method called task-wise sampling convolutions (TS-Conv) is proposed. TS-Conv adaptively samples task-wise features from respective sensitive regions and maps these features together in alignment to guide a dynamic label assignment for better predictions. Specifically, sampling positions of the localization convolution in TS-Conv are supervised by the oriented bounding box (OBB) prediction associated with spatial coordinates, while sampling positions and convolutional kernel of the classification convolution are designed to be adaptively adjusted according to different orientations for improving the orientation robustness of features. Furthermore, a dynamic task-consistent-aware label assignment (DTLA) strategy is developed to select optimal candidate positions and assign labels dynamically according to ranked task-aware scores obtained from TS-Conv. Extensive experiments on several public datasets covering multiple scenes, multimodal images, and multiple categories of objects demonstrate the effectiveness, scalability, and superior performance of the proposed TS-Conv.
abstract_zh: 任意方向的目标检测（AOOD）已广泛应用于遥感图像中不同方向的目标定位和分类。然而，AOOD 模型中定位和分类任务的不一致特征可能会导致模糊性和低质量的目标预测，从而限制了检测性能。在本文中，提出了一种称为任务明智采样卷积（TS-Conv）的 AOOD 方法。 TS-Conv 自适应地从各个敏感区域采样任务特征，并将这些特征对齐映射在一起，以指导动态标签分配以实现更好的预测。具体来说，TS-Conv中定位卷积的采样位置由与空间坐标相关的定向边界框（OBB）预测来监督，而分类卷积的采样位置和卷积核被设计为根据不同的方向自适应调整，以提高特征的方向鲁棒性。此外，还开发了动态任务一致感知标签分配（DTLA）策略来选择最佳候选位置，并根据从 TS-Conv 获得的排名任务感知分数动态分配标签。在涵盖多个场景、多模态图像和多个对象类别的多个公共数据集上进行的广泛实验证明了所提出的 TS-Conv 的有效性、可扩展性和卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TS-Conv的方法，通过任务感知的特征采样和动态标签分配策略，提升遥感图像中任意方向目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有任意方向目标检测模型中定位与分类任务的特征不一致，导致预测模糊性和检测性能受限。
AI.method: TS-Conv通过分别采样定位卷积（基于OBB预测）和分类卷积（自适应调整核参数）的敏感区域特征，并设计动态任务一致感知标签分配策略（DTLA）实现特征对齐与标签动态分配。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上的实验表明，TS-Conv在多场景、多模态和多类别目标检测中均表现出优越性能和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: TS-Conv通过任务分离特征采样与动态标签分配机制，有效解决了任意方向目标检测中的特征不一致性问题，验证了方法的普适性与有效性。

search_text: Task-wise Sampling Convolutions for Arbitrary-Oriented Object Detection in Aerial Images 用于航空图像中任意方向目标检测的任务式采样卷积 Arbitrary-oriented object detection (AOOD) has been widely applied to locate and classify objects with diverse orientations in remote sensing images. However, the inconsistent features for the localization and classification tasks in AOOD models may lead to ambiguity and low-quality object predictions, which constrains the detection performance. In this article, an AOOD method called task-wise sampling convolutions (TS-Conv) is proposed. TS-Conv adaptively samples task-wise features from respective sensitive regions and maps these features together in alignment to guide a dynamic label assignment for better predictions. Specifically, sampling positions of the localization convolution in TS-Conv are supervised by the oriented bounding box (OBB) prediction associated with spatial coordinates, while sampling positions and convolutional kernel of the classification convolution are designed to be adaptively adjusted according to different orientations for improving the orientation robustness of features. Furthermore, a dynamic task-consistent-aware label assignment (DTLA) strategy is developed to select optimal candidate positions and assign labels dynamically according to ranked task-aware scores obtained from TS-Conv. Extensive experiments on several public datasets covering multiple scenes, multimodal images, and multiple categories of objects demonstrate the effectiveness, scalability, and superior performance of the proposed TS-Conv. 任意方向的目标检测（AOOD）已广泛应用于遥感图像中不同方向的目标定位和分类。然而，AOOD 模型中定位和分类任务的不一致特征可能会导致模糊性和低质量的目标预测，从而限制了检测性能。在本文中，提出了一种称为任务明智采样卷积（TS-Conv）的 AOOD 方法。 TS-Conv 自适应地从各个敏感区域采样任务特征，并将这些特征对齐映射在一起，以指导动态标签分配以实现更好的预测。具体来说，TS-Conv中定位卷积的采样位置由与空间坐标相关的定向边界框（OBB）预测来监督，而分类卷积的采样位置和卷积核被设计为根据不同的方向自适应调整，以提高特征的方向鲁棒性。此外，还开发了动态任务一致感知标签分配（DTLA）策略来选择最佳候选位置，并根据从 TS-Conv 获得的排名任务感知分数动态分配标签。在涵盖多个场景、多模态图像和多个对象类别的多个公共数据集上进行的广泛实验证明了所提出的 TS-Conv 的有效性、可扩展性和卓越性能。 本文提出一种名为TS-Conv的方法，通过任务感知的特征采样和动态标签分配策略，提升遥感图像中任意方向目标检测的性能。 Zhanchao Huang,Wei Li,Xiang-Gen Xia,Hao Wang,Ran Tao cs.CV

title: LRT: An Efficient Low-Light Restoration Transformer for Dark Light Field Images
title_zh: LRT：一种用于暗光场图像的高效低光恢复变压器
abstract: Light field (LF) images containing information for multiple views have numerous applications, which can be severely affected by low-light imaging. Recent learning-based methods for low-light enhancement have some disadvantages, such as a lack of noise suppression, complex training process and poor performance in extremely low-light conditions. To tackle these deficiencies while fully utilizing the multi-view information, we propose an efficient Low-light Restoration Transformer (LRT) for LF images, with multiple heads to perform intermediate tasks within a single network, including denoising, luminance adjustment, refinement and detail enhancement, achieving progressive restoration from small scale to full scale. Moreover, we design an angular transformer block with an efficient view-token scheme to model the global angular dependencies, and a multi-scale spatial transformer block to encode the multi-scale local and global information within each view. To address the issue of insufficient training data, we formulate a synthesis pipeline by simulating the major noise sources with the estimated noise parameters of LF camera. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on low-light LF restoration with high efficiency.
summary: Light field (LF) images containing information for multiple views have numerous applications, which can be severely affected by low-light imaging. Recent learning-based methods for low-light enhancement have some disadvantages, such as a lack of noise suppression, complex training process and poor performance in extremely low-light conditions. To tackle these deficiencies while fully utilizing the multi-view information, we propose an efficient Low-light Restoration Transformer (LRT) for LF images, with multiple heads to perform intermediate tasks within a single network, including denoising, luminance adjustment, refinement and detail enhancement, achieving progressive restoration from small scale to full scale. Moreover, we design an angular transformer block with an efficient view-token scheme to model the global angular dependencies, and a multi-scale spatial transformer block to encode the multi-scale local and global information within each view. To address the issue of insufficient training data, we formulate a synthesis pipeline by simulating the major noise sources with the estimated noise parameters of LF camera. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on low-light LF restoration with high efficiency.
abstract_zh: 包含多视图信息的光场 (LF) 图像具有多种应用，但这些应用可能会受到低光成像的严重影响。最近基于学习的低光增强方法存在一些缺点，例如缺乏噪声抑制、训练过程复杂以及在极低光条件下性能较差。为了解决这些缺陷，同时充分利用多视图信息，我们提出了一种高效的低频图像低光恢复变换器（LRT），用多个头在单个网络内执行中间任务，包括去噪、亮度调整、细化和细节增强，实现从小尺度到全尺度的渐进恢复。此外，我们设计了一个具有有效视图令牌方案的角度变换器块来建模全局角度依赖性，以及一个多尺度空间变换器块来编码每个视图内的多尺度局部和全局信息。为了解决训练数据不足的问题，我们通过使用 LF 相机的估计噪声参数来模拟主要噪声源，从而制定了合成管道。实验结果表明，我们的方法在低光低频恢复方面实现了最先进的性能，效率很高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的低光照光场图像恢复Transformer（LRT），通过多任务处理和多尺度信息建模解决低光照条件下的光场图像增强问题。
AI.motivation: 现有低光照增强方法存在噪声抑制不足、训练复杂且在极端低光条件下性能较差的问题，同时未能充分利用光场图像的多视角信息。
AI.method: 设计包含多任务头的LRT网络，集成去噪、亮度调整等功能；引入角向Transformer块建模全局视角依赖，多尺度空间Transformer块编码局部与全局信息，并构建合成管道解决训练数据不足问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，LRT在低光照光场恢复任务中达到最先进的性能，且计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: LRT通过有效整合多视角信息与多尺度特征，结合高效的Transformer架构，在低光照光场图像恢复中实现了性能与效率的平衡。

title: Solving the Maximum Popular Matching Problem with Matroid Constraints
title_zh: 用拟阵约束求解最大流行匹配问题
abstract: We consider the problem of finding a maximum popular matching in a many-to-many matching setting with two-sided preferences and matroid constraints. This problem was proposed by Kamiyama (2020) and solved in the special case where matroids are base orderable. Utilizing a newly shown matroid exchange property, we show that the problem is tractable for arbitrary matroids. We further investigate a different notion of popularity, where the agents vote with respect to lexicographic preferences, and show that both existence and verification problems become coNP-hard, even in the $b$-matching case.
summary: We consider the problem of finding a maximum popular matching in a many-to-many matching setting with two-sided preferences and matroid constraints. This problem was proposed by Kamiyama (2020) and solved in the special case where matroids are base orderable. Utilizing a newly shown matroid exchange property, we show that the problem is tractable for arbitrary matroids. We further investigate a different notion of popularity, where the agents vote with respect to lexicographic preferences, and show that both existence and verification problems become coNP-hard, even in the $b$-matching case.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在具有两侧偏好和拟阵约束的多对多匹配设置中找到最大流行匹配的问题。这个问题由 Kamiyama (2020) 提出，并在拟阵是基可排序的特殊情况下得到解决。利用新显示的拟阵交换属性，我们表明该问题对于任意拟阵都是易于处理的。我们进一步研究了不同的流行度概念，其中代理根据词典编排偏好进行投票，并表明即使在 $b$ 匹配的情况下，存在问题和验证问题都变得 coNP 困难。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在双方面偏好和拟阵约束下的许多对许多匹配场景中最大流行匹配问题的求解方法，并扩展了原有结果至任意拟阵。
AI.motivation: 原有研究仅解决了基可排序拟阵的特殊情况，本文旨在突破该限制并探讨另一种流行定义下的计算复杂性。
AI.method: 利用新发现的拟阵交换性质设计算法，并通过复杂性理论分析字典序偏好下的问题难度。
AI.result: 证明任意拟阵约束下问题可解，同时揭示字典序偏好下的存在性与验证问题在b-匹配场景中为coNP难。
AI.conclusion: 扩展了最大流行匹配问题的求解范围，同时明确了另一种流行定义的计算界限，为后续研究提供方向。

authors_text: Shaoshan Liu,Xiaoming Li,Tongsheng Geng,Stephane Zuckerman,Jean-Luc Gaudiot
title: Programming Autonomous Machines
title_zh: 自主机器编程
abstract: One key technical challenge in the age of autonomous machines is the programming of autonomous machines, which demands the synergy across multiple domains, including fundamental computer science, computer architecture, and robotics, and requires expertise from both academia and industry. This paper discusses the programming theory and practices tied to producing real-life autonomous machines, and covers aspects from high-level concepts down to low-level code generation in the context of specific functional requirements, performance expectation, and implementation constraints of autonomous machines.
summary: One key technical challenge in the age of autonomous machines is the programming of autonomous machines, which demands the synergy across multiple domains, including fundamental computer science, computer architecture, and robotics, and requires expertise from both academia and industry. This paper discusses the programming theory and practices tied to producing real-life autonomous machines, and covers aspects from high-level concepts down to low-level code generation in the context of specific functional requirements, performance expectation, and implementation constraints of autonomous machines.
abstract_zh: 自主机器时代的一项关键技术挑战是自主机器的编程，这需要跨多个领域的协同作用，包括基础计算机科学、计算机体系结构和机器人技术，并且需要学术界和工业界的专业知识。本文讨论了与生产现实生活中的自主机器相关的编程理论和实践，并涵盖了在自主机器的特定功能需求、性能期望和实现约束的背景下从高级概念到低级代码生成的各个方面。

AI.tldr: 探讨自主机器的编程理论与实践，涵盖多领域协同及从高层概念到低层代码生成的实现
AI.motivation: 自主机器的编程面临跨学科协作与复杂约束的挑战，需整合学术与工业界 expertise 以实现实际应用
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实例研究，结合功能需求、性能指标及实现限制，探讨编程理论与实践
AI.result: 总结了自主机器编程的关键理论与实践方法，强调多领域协同与约束条件下优化的必要性
AI.conclusion: 自主机器编程需学术界与工业界深度协作，未来研究应聚焦跨学科方法与实际约束下的优化策略

title: A Multitask Deep Learning Model for Parsing Bridge Elements and Segmenting Defect in Bridge Inspection Images
title_zh: 用于解析桥梁元素和分割桥梁检测图像中的缺陷的多任务深度学习模型
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 TRB Annual Meeting and publication in the Transportation Research Record: Journal of the Transportation Research Board (TRR)
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 TRB Annual Meeting and publication in the Transportation Research Record: Journal of the Transportation Research Board (TRR)
abstract: The vast network of bridges in the United States raises a high requirement for maintenance and rehabilitation. The massive cost of manual visual inspection to assess bridge conditions is a burden to some extent. Advanced robots have been leveraged to automate inspection data collection. Automating the segmentations of multiclass elements and surface defects on the elements in the large volume of inspection image data would facilitate an efficient and effective assessment of the bridge condition. Training separate single-task networks for element parsing (i.e., semantic segmentation of multiclass elements) and defect segmentation fails to incorporate the close connection between these two tasks. Both recognizable structural elements and apparent surface defects are present in the inspection images. This paper is motivated to develop a multitask deep learning model that fully utilizes such interdependence between bridge elements and defects to boost the model's task performance and generalization. Furthermore, the study investigated the effectiveness of the proposed model designs for improving task performance, including feature decomposition, cross-talk sharing, and multi-objective loss function. A dataset with pixel-level labels of bridge elements and corrosion was developed for model training and testing. Quantitative and qualitative results from evaluating the developed multitask deep model demonstrate its advantages over the single-task-based model not only in performance (2.59% higher mIoU on bridge parsing and 1.65% on corrosion segmentation) but also in computational time and implementation capability.

abstract_zh: 美国庞大的桥梁网络对维护和修复提出了很高的要求。评估桥梁状况的人工目视检查的巨额成本在某种程度上是一种负担。先进的机器人已被用来自动收集检查数据。在大量检查图像数据中自动分割多类元素和元素上的表面缺陷将有助于对桥梁状况进行高效且有效的评估。为元素解析（即多类元素的语义分割）和缺陷分割训练单独的单任务网络无法整合这两个任务之间的紧密联系。检查图像中同时存在可识别的结构元素和明显的表面缺陷。本文的动机是开发一种多任务深度学习模型，充分利用桥梁元素和缺陷之间的相互依赖关系来提高模型的任务性能和泛化能力。此外，该研究还调查了所提出的模型设计对于提高任务性能的有效性，包括特征分解、串扰共享和多目标损失函数。开发了具有桥梁元素和腐蚀的像素级标签的数据集，用于模型训练和测试。评估所开发的多任务深度模型的定量和定性结果表明，它比基于单任务的模型不仅在性能方面具有优势（桥梁解析的 mIoU 高 2.59%，腐蚀分割高 1.65%），而且在计算时间和实现能力方面也具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务深度学习模型，用于同时解析桥梁元素和分割桥梁检测图像中的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统单任务模型未能充分利用桥梁元素与缺陷之间的关联性，导致性能受限，且人工检测成本高昂，亟需高效自动化方案。
AI.method: 设计多任务网络架构，结合特征分解、跨任务共享机制及多目标损失函数，并构建包含像素级标签的桥梁数据集进行训练与测试。
AI.result: 多任务模型在桥梁解析任务上mIoU提升2.59%，腐蚀分割任务提升1.65%，且计算时间与实现效率优于单任务模型。
AI.conclusion: 多任务深度学习模型通过挖掘元素与缺陷的关联性，显著提升了检测性能与效率，为桥梁自动化检测提供了有效解决方案。

title: Being Automated or Not? Risk Identification of Occupations with Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 是否自动化？图神经网络职业风险识别
abstract: The rapid advances in automation technologies, such as artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics, pose an increasing risk of automation for occupations, with a likely significant impact on the labour market. Recent social-economic studies suggest that nearly 50\% of occupations are at high risk of being automated in the next decade. However, the lack of granular data and empirically informed models have limited the accuracy of these studies and made it challenging to predict which jobs will be automated. In this paper, we study the automation risk of occupations by performing a classification task between automated and non-automated occupations. The available information is 910 occupations' task statements, skills and interactions categorised by Standard Occupational Classification (SOC). To fully utilize this information, we propose a graph-based semi-supervised classification method named \textbf{A}utomated \textbf{O}ccupation \textbf{C}lassification based on \textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}onvolutional \textbf{N}etworks (\textbf{AOC-GCN}) to identify the automated risk for occupations. This model integrates a heterogeneous graph to capture occupations' local and global contexts. The results show that our proposed method outperforms the baseline models by considering the information of both internal features of occupations and their external interactions. This study could help policymakers identify potential automated occupations and support individuals' decision-making before entering the job market.
summary: The rapid advances in automation technologies, such as artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics, pose an increasing risk of automation for occupations, with a likely significant impact on the labour market. Recent social-economic studies suggest that nearly 50\% of occupations are at high risk of being automated in the next decade. However, the lack of granular data and empirically informed models have limited the accuracy of these studies and made it challenging to predict which jobs will be automated. In this paper, we study the automation risk of occupations by performing a classification task between automated and non-automated occupations. The available information is 910 occupations' task statements, skills and interactions categorised by Standard Occupational Classification (SOC). To fully utilize this information, we propose a graph-based semi-supervised classification method named \textbf{A}utomated \textbf{O}ccupation \textbf{C}lassification based on \textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}onvolutional \textbf{N}etworks (\textbf{AOC-GCN}) to identify the automated risk for occupations. This model integrates a heterogeneous graph to capture occupations' local and global contexts. The results show that our proposed method outperforms the baseline models by considering the information of both internal features of occupations and their external interactions. This study could help policymakers identify potential automated occupations and support individuals' decision-making before entering the job market.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）和机器人技术等自动化技术的快速进步，给职业带来了越来越大的自动化风险，可能对劳动力市场产生重大影响。最近的社会经济研究表明，近 50% 的职业在未来十年面临自动化的高风险。然而，缺乏精细数据和经验丰富的模型限制了这些研究的准确性，并且使得预测哪些工作将被自动化变得具有挑战性。在本文中，我们通过执行自动化和非自动化职业之间的分类任务来研究职业的自动化风险。可用信息是按标准职业分类 (SOC) 分类的 910 种职业的任务说明、技能和交互。为了充分利用这些信息，我们提出了一种基于图的半监督分类方法，名为 \textbf{A}utomated \textbf{O}ccupation \textbf{C}classification，基于 \textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}onvolutional \textbf{N}etworks (\textbf{AOC-GCN}) 来识别职业的自动化风险。该模型集成了异构图来捕获职业的本地和全球背景。结果表明，通过考虑职业的内部特征及其外部相互作用的信息，我们提出的方法优于基线模型。这项研究可以帮助政策制定者识别潜在的自动化职业，并支持个人在进入就业市场之前的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文利用图神经网络对职业的自动化风险进行分类识别，提出基于图卷积网络的半监督分类方法AOC-GCN。
AI.motivation: 现有研究因缺乏细粒度数据和实证模型，难以准确预测哪些职业面临自动化风险，亟需更精确的分析方法。
AI.method: 构建异构图捕捉职业的局部与全局上下文，设计基于图卷积网络的半监督分类模型AOC-GCN，融合职业内部特征与外部交互信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法通过整合职业内部特征与外部交互信息，显著优于基线模型，在自动化风险识别任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为政策制定者识别潜在自动化职业提供支持，助力个人在就业市场中做出更科学的决策。

search_text: Being Automated or Not? Risk Identification of Occupations with Graph Neural Networks 是否自动化？图神经网络职业风险识别 The rapid advances in automation technologies, such as artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics, pose an increasing risk of automation for occupations, with a likely significant impact on the labour market. Recent social-economic studies suggest that nearly 50\% of occupations are at high risk of being automated in the next decade. However, the lack of granular data and empirically informed models have limited the accuracy of these studies and made it challenging to predict which jobs will be automated. In this paper, we study the automation risk of occupations by performing a classification task between automated and non-automated occupations. The available information is 910 occupations' task statements, skills and interactions categorised by Standard Occupational Classification (SOC). To fully utilize this information, we propose a graph-based semi-supervised classification method named \textbf{A}utomated \textbf{O}ccupation \textbf{C}lassification based on \textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}onvolutional \textbf{N}etworks (\textbf{AOC-GCN}) to identify the automated risk for occupations. This model integrates a heterogeneous graph to capture occupations' local and global contexts. The results show that our proposed method outperforms the baseline models by considering the information of both internal features of occupations and their external interactions. This study could help policymakers identify potential automated occupations and support individuals' decision-making before entering the job market. 人工智能（AI）和机器人技术等自动化技术的快速进步，给职业带来了越来越大的自动化风险，可能对劳动力市场产生重大影响。最近的社会经济研究表明，近 50% 的职业在未来十年面临自动化的高风险。然而，缺乏精细数据和经验丰富的模型限制了这些研究的准确性，并且使得预测哪些工作将被自动化变得具有挑战性。在本文中，我们通过执行自动化和非自动化职业之间的分类任务来研究职业的自动化风险。可用信息是按标准职业分类 (SOC) 分类的 910 种职业的任务说明、技能和交互。为了充分利用这些信息，我们提出了一种基于图的半监督分类方法，名为 \textbf{A}utomated \textbf{O}ccupation \textbf{C}classification，基于 \textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}onvolutional \textbf{N}etworks (\textbf{AOC-GCN}) 来识别职业的自动化风险。该模型集成了异构图来捕获职业的本地和全球背景。结果表明，通过考虑职业的内部特征及其外部相互作用的信息，我们提出的方法优于基线模型。这项研究可以帮助政策制定者识别潜在的自动化职业，并支持个人在进入就业市场之前的决策。 本文利用图神经网络对职业的自动化风险进行分类识别，提出基于图卷积网络的半监督分类方法AOC-GCN。 Dawei Xu,Haoran Yang,Marian-Andrei Rizoiu,Guandong Xu cs.CY,cs.NE

authors_text: Xu Zheng,Yunhao Luo,Chong Fu,Kangcheng Liu,Lin Wang
title: Transformer-CNN Cohort: Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation by the Best of Both Students
title_zh: Transformer-CNN 队列：两名学生中最优秀的人进行半监督语义分割
abstract: The popular methods for semi-supervised semantic segmentation mostly adopt a unitary network model using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and enforce consistency of the model's predictions over perturbations applied to the inputs or model. However, such a learning paradigm suffers from two critical limitations: a) learning the discriminative features for the unlabeled data; b) learning both global and local information from the whole image. In this paper, we propose a novel Semi-supervised Learning (SSL) approach, called Transformer-CNN Cohort (TCC), that consists of two students with one based on the vision transformer (ViT) and the other based on the CNN. Our method subtly incorporates the multi-level consistency regularization on the predictions and the heterogeneous feature spaces via pseudo-labeling for the unlabeled data. First, as the inputs of the ViT student are image patches, the feature maps extracted encode crucial class-wise statistics. To this end, we propose class-aware feature consistency distillation (CFCD) that first leverages the outputs of each student as the pseudo labels and generates class-aware feature (CF) maps for knowledge transfer between the two students. Second, as the ViT student has more uniform representations for all layers, we propose consistency-aware cross distillation (CCD) to transfer knowledge between the pixel-wise predictions from the cohort. We validate the TCC framework on Cityscapes and Pascal VOC 2012 datasets, which outperforms existing SSL methods by a large margin.
summary: The popular methods for semi-supervised semantic segmentation mostly adopt a unitary network model using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and enforce consistency of the model's predictions over perturbations applied to the inputs or model. However, such a learning paradigm suffers from two critical limitations: a) learning the discriminative features for the unlabeled data; b) learning both global and local information from the whole image. In this paper, we propose a novel Semi-supervised Learning (SSL) approach, called Transformer-CNN Cohort (TCC), that consists of two students with one based on the vision transformer (ViT) and the other based on the CNN. Our method subtly incorporates the multi-level consistency regularization on the predictions and the heterogeneous feature spaces via pseudo-labeling for the unlabeled data. First, as the inputs of the ViT student are image patches, the feature maps extracted encode crucial class-wise statistics. To this end, we propose class-aware feature consistency distillation (CFCD) that first leverages the outputs of each student as the pseudo labels and generates class-aware feature (CF) maps for knowledge transfer between the two students. Second, as the ViT student has more uniform representations for all layers, we propose consistency-aware cross distillation (CCD) to transfer knowledge between the pixel-wise predictions from the cohort. We validate the TCC framework on Cityscapes and Pascal VOC 2012 datasets, which outperforms existing SSL methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 半监督语义分割的流行方法大多采用使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的单一网络模型，并强制模型对应用于输入或模型的扰动的预测的一致性。然而，这种学习范式存在两个关键限制：a）学习未标记数据的判别特征； b）从整个图像中学习全局和局部信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的半监督学习（SSL）方法，称为 Transformer-CNN Cohort（TCC），由两名学生组成，其中一名基于视觉变压器（ViT），另一名基于 CNN。我们的方法通过对未标记数据的伪标记巧妙地结合了预测和异构特征空间的多级一致性正则化。首先，由于 ViT 学生的输入是图像块，因此提取的特征图对关键的类统计数据进行编码。为此，我们提出了类感知特征一致性蒸馏（CFCD），它首先利用每个学生的输出作为伪标签，并生成类感知特征（CF）图，用于两个学生之间的知识转移。其次，由于 ViT 学生对所有层都有更统一的表示，因此我们提出了一致性感知交叉蒸馏（CCD），以在队列的像素预测之间转移知识。我们在 Cityscapes 和 Pascal VOC 2012 数据集上验证了 TCC 框架，该框架大大优于现有的 SSL 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督语义分割方法TCC，结合Transformer与CNN的优势，通过多级一致性正则化提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督分割方法依赖单一网络模型，难以有效学习未标记数据的判别特征及图像的全局局部信息。
AI.method: 设计包含ViT与CNN双学生的TCC框架，通过伪标签生成类感知特征图（CFCD）及跨像素预测的一致性交叉蒸馏（CCD）实现异构特征空间知识传递。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和Pascal VOC 2012数据集上显著优于现有半监督分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合Transformer与CNN的双模型协同学习机制，能有效提升半监督语义分割的准确率与鲁棒性。

title: CNSNet: A Cleanness-Navigated-Shadow Network for Shadow Removal
title_zh: CNSNet：用于阴影去除的清洁导航阴影网络
abstract: The key to shadow removal is recovering the contents of the shadow regions with the guidance of the non-shadow regions. Due to the inadequate long-range modeling, the CNN-based approaches cannot thoroughly investigate the information from the non-shadow regions. To solve this problem, we propose a novel cleanness-navigated-shadow network (CNSNet), with a shadow-oriented adaptive normalization (SOAN) module and a shadow-aware aggregation with transformer (SAAT) module based on the shadow mask. Under the guidance of the shadow mask, the SOAN module formulates the statistics from the non-shadow region and adaptively applies them to the shadow region for region-wise restoration. The SAAT module utilizes the shadow mask to precisely guide the restoration of each shadowed pixel by considering the highly relevant pixels from the shadow-free regions for global pixel-wise restoration. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets (ISTD, ISTD+, and SRD) show that our method achieves superior de-shadowing performance.
summary: The key to shadow removal is recovering the contents of the shadow regions with the guidance of the non-shadow regions. Due to the inadequate long-range modeling, the CNN-based approaches cannot thoroughly investigate the information from the non-shadow regions. To solve this problem, we propose a novel cleanness-navigated-shadow network (CNSNet), with a shadow-oriented adaptive normalization (SOAN) module and a shadow-aware aggregation with transformer (SAAT) module based on the shadow mask. Under the guidance of the shadow mask, the SOAN module formulates the statistics from the non-shadow region and adaptively applies them to the shadow region for region-wise restoration. The SAAT module utilizes the shadow mask to precisely guide the restoration of each shadowed pixel by considering the highly relevant pixels from the shadow-free regions for global pixel-wise restoration. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets (ISTD, ISTD+, and SRD) show that our method achieves superior de-shadowing performance.
abstract_zh: 阴影去除的关键是在非阴影区域的指导下恢复阴影区域的内容。由于远程建模不充分，基于 CNN 的方法无法彻底研究非阴影区域的信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的清洁导航阴影网络（CNSNet），具有面向阴影的自适应归一化（SOAN）模块和基于阴影掩模的阴影感知聚合变压器（SAAT）模块。在阴影掩模的指导下，SOAN 模块制定非阴影区域的统计数据，并将其自适应地应用于阴影区域以进行区域级恢复。 SAAT 模块利用阴影掩模通过考虑无阴影区域中高度相关的像素来精确指导每个阴影像素的恢复，以进行全局像素级恢复。对三个基准数据集（ISTD、ISTD+ 和 SRD）的大量实验表明，我们的方法实现了卓越的去阴影性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CNSNet的阴影去除网络，通过结合阴影掩码和两种新型模块提升阴影区域的恢复效果。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法因长程建模能力不足，无法充分挖掘非阴影区域的信息指导阴影修复，导致去阴影效果有限。
AI.method: 设计了基于阴影掩码的阴影导向自适应归一化(SOAN)模块和阴影感知聚合变换器(SAAT)模块，通过非阴影区域统计信息自适应修复阴影区域，并利用变换器实现全局像素级精确恢复。
AI.result: 在ISTD、ISTD+和SRD三个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在去阴影任务中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: CNSNet通过阴影掩码引导的模块化设计，有效解决了阴影区域恢复中的长程信息建模问题，为阴影去除任务提供了新思路。

Under the guidance of the shadow mask, the SOAN module formulates the statistics from the non-shadow region and adaptively applies them to the shadow region for region-wise restoration. The SAAT module utilizes the shadow mask to precisely guide the restoration of each shadowed pixel by considering the highly relevant pixels from the shadow-free regions for global pixel-wise restoration. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets (ISTD, ISTD+, and SRD) show that our method achieves superior de-shadowing performance. 阴影去除的关键是在非阴影区域的指导下恢复阴影区域的内容。由于远程建模不充分，基于 CNN 的方法无法彻底研究非阴影区域的信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的清洁导航阴影网络（CNSNet），具有面向阴影的自适应归一化（SOAN）模块和基于阴影掩模的阴影感知聚合变压器（SAAT）模块。在阴影掩模的指导下，SOAN 模块制定非阴影区域的统计数据，并将其自适应地应用于阴影区域以进行区域级恢复。 SAAT 模块利用阴影掩模通过考虑无阴影区域中高度相关的像素来精确指导每个阴影像素的恢复，以进行全局像素级恢复。对三个基准数据集（ISTD、ISTD+ 和 SRD）的大量实验表明，我们的方法实现了卓越的去阴影性能。 本文提出了一种名为CNSNet的阴影去除网络，通过结合阴影掩码和两种新型模块提升阴影区域的恢复效果。 Qianhao Yu,Naishan Zheng,Jie Huang,Feng Zhao cs.CV

title: Impact analysis of recovery cases due to COVID19 using LSTM deep learning model
title_zh: 使用 LSTM 深度学习模型对新冠肺炎康复案例的影响进行分析
abstract: The present world is badly affected by novel coronavirus (COVID-19). Using medical kits to identify the coronavirus affected persons are very slow. What happens in the next, nobody knows. The world is facing erratic problem and do not know what will happen in near future. This paper is trying to make prognosis of the coronavirus recovery cases using LSTM (Long Short Term Memory). This work exploited data of 258 regions, their latitude and longitude and the number of death of 403 days ranging from 22-01-2020 to 27-02-2021. Specifically, advanced deep learning-based algorithms known as the LSTM, play a great effect on extracting highly essential features for time series data (TSD) analysis.There are lots of methods which already use to analyze propagation prediction. The main task of this paper culminates in analyzing the spreading of Coronavirus across worldwide recovery cases using LSTM deep learning-based architectures.

The world is facing erratic problem and do not know what will happen in near future. This paper is trying to make prognosis of the coronavirus recovery cases using LSTM (Long Short Term Memory). This work exploited data of 258 regions, their latitude and longitude and the number of death of 403 days ranging from 22-01-2020 to 27-02-2021. Specifically, advanced deep learning-based algorithms known as the LSTM, play a great effect on extracting highly essential features for time series data (TSD) analysis.There are lots of methods which already use to analyze propagation prediction. The main task of this paper culminates in analyzing the spreading of Coronavirus across worldwide recovery cases using LSTM deep learning-based architectures.
abstract_zh: 当今世界受到新型冠状病毒（COVID-19）的严重影响。使用医疗包来识别冠状病毒感染者的速度非常慢。接下来会发生什么，没人知道。世界正面临着不稳定的问题，不知道不久的将来会发生什么。本文试图利用 LSTM（长短期记忆）对冠状病毒康复病例进行预测。这项工作利用了 258 个地区的数据、其纬度和经度以及 2020 年 1 月 22 日至 2021 年 2 月 27 日期间 403 天的死亡人数。具体来说，基于深度学习的先进算法（称为 LSTM）在提取时间序列数据（TSD）分析的高度必要特征方面发挥着巨大作用。已经有很多方法用于分析传播预测。本文的主要任务最终是使用基于 LSTM 深度学习的架构来分析冠状病毒在全球康复病例中的传播情况。

AI.tldr: 本文利用LSTM深度学习模型对全球258个地区403天的COVID-19康复病例进行预测分析。
AI.motivation: 传统医疗检测手段效率低下且难以预测疫情未来走势，亟需借助先进算法对病毒传播规律进行建模分析。
AI.method: 基于LSTM神经网络架构，采用时间序列分析方法，结合258个地区的经纬度坐标及403天的死亡病例数据进行建模预测。
AI.result: 成功构建了能够捕捉时间序列特征的LSTM模型，实现了对全球范围COVID-19康复病例的动态预测分析。
AI.conclusion: LSTM深度学习模型在疫情传播预测领域展现出显著优势，为公共卫生决策提供了数据支撑。

title: Red Teaming with Mind Reading: White-Box Adversarial Policies Against RL Agents
title_zh: 红队与读心术：针对 RL 代理的白盒对抗策略
abstract: Adversarial examples can be useful for identifying vulnerabilities in AI systems before they are deployed. In reinforcement learning (RL), adversarial policies can be developed by training an adversarial agent to minimize a target agent's rewards. Prior work has studied black-box versions of these attacks where the adversary only observes the world state and treats the target agent as any other part of the environment. However, this does not take into account additional structure in the problem. In this work, we study white-box adversarial policies and show that having access to a target agent's internal state can be useful for identifying its vulnerabilities. We make two contributions. (1) We introduce white-box adversarial policies where an attacker observes both a target's internal state and the world state at each timestep. We formulate ways of using these policies to attack agents in 2-player games and text-generating language models. (2) We demonstrate that these policies can achieve higher initial and asymptotic performance against a target agent than black-box controls. Code is available at https://github.com/thestephencasper/lm_white_box_attacks
summary: Adversarial examples can be useful for identifying vulnerabilities in AI systems before they are deployed. In reinforcement learning (RL), adversarial policies can be developed by training an adversarial agent to minimize a target agent's rewards. Prior work has studied black-box versions of these attacks where the adversary only observes the world state and treats the target agent as any other part of the environment. However, this does not take into account additional structure in the problem. In this work, we study white-box adversarial policies and show that having access to a target agent's internal state can be useful for identifying its vulnerabilities. We make two contributions. (1) We introduce white-box adversarial policies where an attacker observes both a target's internal state and the world state at each timestep. We formulate ways of using these policies to attack agents in 2-player games and text-generating language models. (2) We demonstrate that these policies can achieve higher initial and asymptotic performance against a target agent than black-box controls. Code is available at https://github.com/thestephencasper/lm_white_box_attacks
abstract_zh: 对抗性示例对于在部署人工智能系统之前识别其漏洞非常有用。在强化学习（RL）中，可以通过训练对抗代理来开发对抗策略，以最小化目标代理的奖励。之前的工作研究了这些攻击的黑盒版本，其中对手仅观察世界状态并将目标代理视为环境的任何其他部分。然而，这没有考虑问题中的附加结构。在这项工作中，我们研究了白盒对抗策略，并表明访问目标代理的内部状态对于识别其漏洞非常有用。我们做出了两项贡献。 (1) 我们引入白盒对抗策略，攻击者在每个时间步观察目标的内部状态和世界状态。我们制定了使用这些策略来攻击两人游戏和文本生成语言模型中的代理的方法。 (2) 我们证明，与黑盒控制相比，这些策略可以针对目标代理实现更高的初始和渐近性能。代码可在 https://github.com/thestephencasper/lm_white_box_attacks 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究了白盒对抗策略，通过访问目标智能体的内部状态来提高对抗攻击的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒攻击方法仅观察环境状态，忽略了目标智能体内部结构信息，难以有效识别漏洞。
AI.method: 提出白盒对抗策略框架，同时利用目标智能体的内部状态与环境状态，应用于双人游戏和文本生成模型的攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明白盒策略在初始和长期表现上均优于黑盒控制方法，攻击效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 白盒访问内部状态能更有效地暴露智能体漏洞，为强化学习系统的安全性评估提供新方法。

title: To Compute or not to Compute? Adaptive Smart Sensing in Resource-Constrained Edge Computing
title_zh: 计算还是不计算？资源受限边缘计算中的自适应智能传感
comment: 16 pages, 17 figures; submitted to IEEE TNSE; final accepted version
comments: 16 pages, 17 figures; submitted to IEEE TNSE; final accepted version
abstract: We consider a network of smart sensors for an edge computing application that sample a time-varying signal and send updates to a base station for remote global monitoring. Sensors are equipped with sensing and compute, and can either send raw data or process them on-board before transmission. Limited hardware resources at the edge generate a fundamental latency-accuracy trade-off: raw measurements are inaccurate but timely, whereas accurate processed updates are available after processing delay. Hence, one needs to decide when sensors should transmit raw measurements or rely on local processing to maximize network monitoring performance. To tackle this sensing design problem, we model an estimation-theoretic optimization framework that embeds both computation and communication latency, and propose a Reinforcement Learning-based approach that dynamically allocates computational resources at each sensor. Effectiveness of our proposed approach is validated through numerical experiments motivated by smart sensing for the Internet of Drones and self-driving vehicles. In particular, we show that, under constrained computation at the base station, monitoring performance can be further improved by an online sensor selection.
summary: We consider a network of smart sensors for an edge computing application that sample a time-varying signal and send updates to a base station for remote global monitoring. Sensors are equipped with sensing and compute, and can either send raw data or process them on-board before transmission. Limited hardware resources at the edge generate a fundamental latency-accuracy trade-off: raw measurements are inaccurate but timely, whereas accurate processed updates are available after processing delay. Hence, one needs to decide when sensors should transmit raw measurements or rely on local processing to maximize network monitoring performance. To tackle this sensing design problem, we model an estimation-theoretic optimization framework that embeds both computation and communication latency, and propose a Reinforcement Learning-based approach that dynamically allocates computational resources at each sensor. Effectiveness of our proposed approach is validated through numerical experiments motivated by smart sensing for the Internet of Drones and self-driving vehicles. In particular, we show that, under constrained computation at the base station, monitoring performance can be further improved by an online sensor selection.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑用于边缘计算应用程序的智能传感器网络，该网络对时变信号进行采样并将更新发送到基站以进行远程全球监控。传感器配备了传感和计算功能，可以发送原始数据或在传输前在船上对其进行处理。边缘的有限硬件资源会产生基本的延迟精度权衡：原始测量不准确但及时，而在处理延迟后可以获得准确的处理更新。因此，需要决定传感器何时应传输原始测量结果或依靠本地处理来最大限度地提高网络监控性能。为了解决这个传感设计问题，我们建立了一个嵌入计算和通信延迟的估计理论优化框架，并提出了一种基于强化学习的方法，可以在每个传感器上动态分配计算资源。我们提出的方法的有效性通过无人机和自动驾驶车辆智能传感驱动的数值实验得到验证。特别是，我们表明，在基站计算受限的情况下，可以通过在线传感器选择进一步提高监测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在资源受限的边缘计算环境中，智能传感器如何决定是传输原始数据还是进行本地处理以优化网络监控性能。
AI.motivation: 由于边缘设备的硬件资源有限，传感器在传输原始数据和本地处理之间面临延迟与精度的权衡，因此需要一种动态资源分配方法以提高网络监控性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个基于强化学习的方法，通过建立一个包含计算和通信延迟的估计理论优化框架，动态分配每个传感器的计算资源。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，在基站计算资源受限的情况下，通过在线传感器选择可以进一步提高监控性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法有效解决了边缘计算中计算与通信的权衡问题，为智能传感应用提供了优化方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了在资源受限的边缘计算环境中，智能传感器如何决定是传输原始数据还是进行本地处理以优化网络监控性能。
ai_content.motivation: 由于边缘设备的硬件资源有限，传感器在传输原始数据和本地处理之间面临延迟与精度的权衡，因此需要一种动态资源分配方法以提高网络监控性能。
ai_content.method: 本文提出了一个基于强化学习的方法，通过建立一个包含计算和通信延迟的估计理论优化框架，动态分配每个传感器的计算资源。
ai_content.result: 数值实验表明，在基站计算资源受限的情况下，通过在线传感器选择可以进一步提高监控性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文的方法有效解决了边缘计算中计算与通信的权衡问题，为智能传感应用提供了优化方案。

search_text: To Compute or not to Compute? Adaptive Smart Sensing in Resource-Constrained Edge Computing 计算还是不计算？资源受限边缘计算中的自适应智能传感 We consider a network of smart sensors for an edge computing application that sample a time-varying signal and send updates to a base station for remote global monitoring. Sensors are equipped with sensing and compute, and can either send raw data or process them on-board before transmission. Limited hardware resources at the edge generate a fundamental latency-accuracy trade-off: raw measurements are inaccurate but timely, whereas accurate processed updates are available after processing delay. Hence, one needs to decide when sensors should transmit raw measurements or rely on local processing to maximize network monitoring performance. To tackle this sensing design problem, we model an estimation-theoretic optimization framework that embeds both computation and communication latency, and propose a Reinforcement Learning-based approach that dynamically allocates computational resources at each sensor. Effectiveness of our proposed approach is validated through numerical experiments motivated by smart sensing for the Internet of Drones and self-driving vehicles. In particular, we show that, under constrained computation at the base station, monitoring performance can be further improved by an online sensor selection. 我们考虑用于边缘计算应用程序的智能传感器网络，该网络对时变信号进行采样并将更新发送到基站以进行远程全球监控。传感器配备了传感和计算功能，可以发送原始数据或在传输前在船上对其进行处理。边缘的有限硬件资源会产生基本的延迟精度权衡：原始测量不准确但及时，而在处理延迟后可以获得准确的处理更新。因此，需要决定传感器何时应传输原始测量结果或依靠本地处理来最大限度地提高网络监控性能。为了解决这个传感设计问题，我们建立了一个嵌入计算和通信延迟的估计理论优化框架，并提出了一种基于强化学习的方法，可以在每个传感器上动态分配计算资源。我们提出的方法的有效性通过无人机和自动驾驶车辆智能传感驱动的数值实验得到验证。特别是，我们表明，在基站计算受限的情况下，可以通过在线传感器选择进一步提高监测性能。 本文研究了在资源受限的边缘计算环境中，智能传感器如何决定是传输原始数据还是进行本地处理以优化网络监控性能。 Luca Ballotta,Giovanni Peserico,Francesco Zanini,Paolo Dini cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.RO

title: Comparative Study of AR Versus Image and Video for Exercise Learning
title_zh: AR 与图像和视频在运动学习中的比较研究
abstract: There is inadequate attention to using mobile Augmented Reality (AR) in fitness, despite mobile AR being easy to use, requiring no extra cost, and can be a powerful learning tool. In this work, we present a mobile AR application that can help users learn exercises with a virtual personal trainer. We conduct a user study with 10 participants to investigate the learning quality of the ARFit (i.e., the proposed mobile AR application) in comparison to traditional methods such as Image-based learning and Video-based learning. Our results indicate that participants have a higher learning quality of exercise with mobile AR than (1) Image-based learning among all exercises selected and (2) video-based learning with exercise that requires greater spatial knowledge, with the performance evaluated by a qualified personal trainer. In addition, ARFit has an excellent rating in usability, is deemed to be highly acceptable, and is the preferred exercise learning method by most participants (N=9)
summary: There is inadequate attention to using mobile Augmented Reality (AR) in fitness, despite mobile AR being easy to use, requiring no extra cost, and can be a powerful learning tool. In this work, we present a mobile AR application that can help users learn exercises with a virtual personal trainer. We conduct a user study with 10 participants to investigate the learning quality of the ARFit (i.e., the proposed mobile AR application) in comparison to traditional methods such as Image-based learning and Video-based learning. Our results indicate that participants have a higher learning quality of exercise with mobile AR than (1) Image-based learning among all exercises selected and (2) video-based learning with exercise that requires greater spatial knowledge, with the performance evaluated by a qualified personal trainer. In addition, ARFit has an excellent rating in usability, is deemed to be highly acceptable, and is the preferred exercise learning method by most participants (N=9)
abstract_zh: 尽管移动增强现实 (AR) 易于使用、无需额外成本并且可以成为强大的学习工具，但对在健身中使用移动增强现实 (AR) 的关注还不够。在这项工作中，我们展示了一款移动 AR 应用程序，可以帮助用户通过虚拟私人教练学习锻炼。我们对 10 名参与者进行了一项用户研究，以调查 ARFit（即提出的移动 AR 应用程序）与基于图像的学习和基于视频的学习等传统方法的学习质量。我们的结果表明，与（1）所有所选练习中基于图像的学习和（2）需要更多空间知识的基于视频的运动学习相比，参与者通过移动 AR 进行的运动学习质量更高，并由合格的私人教练评估表现。此外，ARFit在可用性方面具有出色的评级，被认为具有很高的接受度，并且是大多数参与者首选的运动学习方法（N=9）

AI.tldr: 开发并评估ARFit移动应用在运动学习中的效果，与传统图像和视频学习方法进行比较
AI.motivation: 移动AR在健身领域应用不足，需探索其作为学习工具的有效性
AI.method: 通过用户研究，对比ARFit与图像和视频学习方法在运动学习中的效果，由专业教练评估表现
AI.result: ARFit在所有运动中学习质量优于图像学习，在需空间知识的运动中优于视频，且用户对其可用性和接受度评价高，多数参与者偏好ARFit
AI.conclusion: 移动AR在运动学习中表现优异，尤其在空间认知需求高的情况下，ARFit作为学习工具具有高可用性和用户接受度，可作为传统方法的有效替代

title: Improving Assistive Robotics with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习改进辅助机器人
comment: Accepted to the 2022 NeurIPS Deep RL Workshop
comments: Accepted to the 2022 NeurIPS Deep RL Workshop
abstract: Assistive Robotics is a class of robotics concerned with aiding humans in daily care tasks that they may be inhibited from doing due to disabilities or age. While research has demonstrated that classical control methods can be used to design policies to complete these tasks, these methods can be difficult to generalize to a variety of instantiations of a task. Reinforcement learning can provide a solution to this issue, wherein robots are trained in simulation and their policies are transferred to real-world machines. In this work, we replicate a published baseline for training robots on three tasks in the Assistive Gym environment, and we explore the usage of a Recurrent Neural Network and Phasic Policy Gradient learning to augment the original work. Our baseline implementation meets or exceeds the baseline of the original work, however, we found that our explorations into the new methods was not as effective as we anticipated. We discuss the results of our baseline and some thoughts on why our new methods were not as successful.
summary: Assistive Robotics is a class of robotics concerned with aiding humans in daily care tasks that they may be inhibited from doing due to disabilities or age. While research has demonstrated that classical control methods can be used to design policies to complete these tasks, these methods can be difficult to generalize to a variety of instantiations of a task. Reinforcement learning can provide a solution to this issue, wherein robots are trained in simulation and their policies are transferred to real-world machines. In this work, we replicate a published baseline for training robots on three tasks in the Assistive Gym environment, and we explore the usage of a Recurrent Neural Network and Phasic Policy Gradient learning to augment the original work. Our baseline implementation meets or exceeds the baseline of the original work, however, we found that our explorations into the new methods was not as effective as we anticipated. We discuss the results of our baseline and some thoughts on why our new methods were not as successful.
abstract_zh: 辅助机器人是一类机器人，旨在帮助人类完成因残疾或年龄而无法完成的日常护理任务。虽然研究表明经典控制方法可用于设计策略来完成这些任务，但这些方法可能很难推广到任务的各种实例。强化学习可以为这个问题提供解决方案，其中机器人接受模拟训练，并将其策略转移到现实世界的机器上。在这项工作中，我们复制了已发布的基线，用于在辅助健身房环境中训练机器人完成三项任务，并探索使用循环神经网络和阶段策略梯度学习来增强原始工作。我们的基线实现达到或超过了原始工作的基线，然而，我们发现我们对新方法的探索并没有我们预期的那么有效。我们讨论了基线的结果以及关于为什么我们的新方法不那么成功的一些想法。

AI.tldr: 本文在Assistive Gym环境中复现了助人机器人任务的基准方法，并尝试使用循环神经网络和阶段策略梯度算法改进原有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法难以适应不同任务场景，而强化学习可通过模拟训练提升机器人泛化能力，但现有方法效果有限。
AI.method: 复现基准方法并引入RNN与Phasic Policy Gradient算法，通过模拟训练优化机器人策略。
AI.result: 基准实现达到或超越原工作水平，但新方法效果未达预期，可能与算法适配性或参数设置相关。
AI.conclusion: 基准方法有效，但新方法需进一步调整以提升性能，未来需探索更合适的模型架构与训练策略。

title: Recommender Systems and Algorithmic Hate
title_zh: 推荐系统和算法仇恨
comment: Late Breaking Results. In Sixteenth ACM Conference on Recommender Systems 2022
comments: Late Breaking Results. In Sixteenth ACM Conference on Recommender Systems 2022
abstract: Despite increasing reliance on personalization in digital platforms, many algorithms that curate content or information for users have been met with resistance. When users feel dissatisfied or harmed by recommendations, this can lead users to hate, or feel negatively towards these personalized systems. Algorithmic hate detrimentally impacts both users and the system, and can result in various forms of algorithmic harm, or in extreme cases can lead to public protests against ''the algorithm'' in question. In this work, we summarize some of the most common causes of algorithmic hate and their negative consequences through various case studies of personalized recommender systems. We explore promising future directions for the RecSys research community that could help alleviate algorithmic hate and improve the relationship between recommender systems and their users.
summary: Despite increasing reliance on personalization in digital platforms, many algorithms that curate content or information for users have been met with resistance. When users feel dissatisfied or harmed by recommendations, this can lead users to hate, or feel negatively towards these personalized systems. Algorithmic hate detrimentally impacts both users and the system, and can result in various forms of algorithmic harm, or in extreme cases can lead to public protests against ''the algorithm'' in question. In this work, we summarize some of the most common causes of algorithmic hate and their negative consequences through various case studies of personalized recommender systems. We explore promising future directions for the RecSys research community that could help alleviate algorithmic hate and improve the relationship between recommender systems and their users.
abstract_zh: 尽管数字平台越来越依赖个性化，但许多为用户策划内容或信息的算法都遇到了阻力。当用户对推荐感到不满意或受到伤害时，可能会导致用户讨厌或对这些个性化系统产生负面感觉。算法仇恨会对用户和系统产生不利影响，并可能导致各种形式的算法损害，或者在极端情况下可能导致公众对相关“算法”的抗议。在这项工作中，我们通过个性化推荐系统的各种案例研究总结了算法仇恨的一些最常见原因及其负面后果。我们为 RecSys 研究社区探索有希望的未来方向，这有助于减轻算法仇恨并改善推荐系统与其用户之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 分析个性化推荐系统引发算法仇恨的原因及影响，并提出缓解策略
AI.motivation: 探讨用户对推荐系统的负面情绪（如算法仇恨）的成因及后果，以改善系统与用户的关系并减少算法伤害
AI.method: 通过多个个性化推荐系统的案例研究，总结算法仇恨的常见原因及其负面影响
AI.result: 识别出算法仇恨的主要诱因（如信息茧房、偏见放大等），并指出当前研究在缓解措施上的不足
AI.conclusion: 建议推荐系统研究社区重视算法仇恨问题，未来需在算法透明度和用户控制方面进行改进

search_text: Recommender Systems and Algorithmic Hate 推荐系统和算法仇恨 Despite increasing reliance on personalization in digital platforms, many algorithms that curate content or information for users have been met with resistance. When users feel dissatisfied or harmed by recommendations, this can lead users to hate, or feel negatively towards these personalized systems. Algorithmic hate detrimentally impacts both users and the system, and can result in various forms of algorithmic harm, or in extreme cases can lead to public protests against ''the algorithm'' in question. In this work, we summarize some of the most common causes of algorithmic hate and their negative consequences through various case studies of personalized recommender systems. We explore promising future directions for the RecSys research community that could help alleviate algorithmic hate and improve the relationship between recommender systems and their users. 尽管数字平台越来越依赖个性化，但许多为用户策划内容或信息的算法都遇到了阻力。当用户对推荐感到不满意或受到伤害时，可能会导致用户讨厌或对这些个性化系统产生负面感觉。算法仇恨会对用户和系统产生不利影响，并可能导致各种形式的算法损害，或者在极端情况下可能导致公众对相关“算法”的抗议。在这项工作中，我们通过个性化推荐系统的各种案例研究总结了算法仇恨的一些最常见原因及其负面后果。我们为 RecSys 研究社区探索有希望的未来方向，这有助于减轻算法仇恨并改善推荐系统与其用户之间的关系。 分析个性化推荐系统引发算法仇恨的原因及影响，并提出缓解策略 Jessie J. Smith,Lucia Jayne,Robin Burke cs.HC

title: A New Approach to Training Multiple Cooperative Agents for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 训练自动驾驶多个合作智能体的新方法
abstract: Training multiple agents to perform safe and cooperative control in the complex scenarios of autonomous driving has been a challenge. For a small fleet of cars moving together, this paper proposes Lepus, a new approach to training multiple agents. Lepus adopts a pure cooperative manner for training multiple agents, featured with the shared parameters of policy networks and the shared reward function of multiple agents. In particular, Lepus pre-trains the policy networks via an adversarial process, improving its collaborative decision-making capability and further the stability of car driving. Moreover, for alleviating the problem of sparse rewards, Lepus learns an approximate reward function from expert trajectories by combining a random network and a distillation network. We conduct extensive experiments on the MADRaS simulation platform. The experimental results show that multiple agents trained by Lepus can avoid collisions as many as possible while driving simultaneously and outperform the other four methods, that is, DDPG-FDE, PSDDPG, MADDPG, and MAGAIL(DDPG) in terms of stability.
summary: Training multiple agents to perform safe and cooperative control in the complex scenarios of autonomous driving has been a challenge. For a small fleet of cars moving together, this paper proposes Lepus, a new approach to training multiple agents. Lepus adopts a pure cooperative manner for training multiple agents, featured with the shared parameters of policy networks and the shared reward function of multiple agents. In particular, Lepus pre-trains the policy networks via an adversarial process, improving its collaborative decision-making capability and further the stability of car driving. Moreover, for alleviating the problem of sparse rewards, Lepus learns an approximate reward function from expert trajectories by combining a random network and a distillation network. We conduct extensive experiments on the MADRaS simulation platform. The experimental results show that multiple agents trained by Lepus can avoid collisions as many as possible while driving simultaneously and outperform the other four methods, that is, DDPG-FDE, PSDDPG, MADDPG, and MAGAIL(DDPG) in terms of stability.
abstract_zh: 训练多个智能体在复杂的自动驾驶场景中执行安全协作控制一直是一个挑战。对于一起行驶的小车队，本文提出了 Lepus，一种训练多个智能体的新方法。 Lepus采用纯合作的方式来训练多个智能体，具有共享策略网络参数和多个智能体共享奖励函数的特点。特别是，Lepus通过对抗过程对策略网络进行预训练，提高其协同决策能力，进一步提高汽车驾驶的稳定性。此外，为了缓解奖励稀疏的问题，Lepus 通过结合随机网络和蒸馏网络，从专家轨迹中学习近似奖励函数。我们在 MADRaS 仿真平台上进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，Lepus训练的多个智能体可以在同时驾驶时尽可能避免碰撞，并且在稳定性方面优于其他四种方法，即DDPG-FDE、PSDDPG、MADDPG和MAGAIL(DDPG)。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的训练多智能体协作控制的方法，以提高自动驾驶场景中的安全性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景下难以实现多智能体间的安全协作，且存在奖励稀疏、稳定性不足等问题。
AI.method: Lepus方法通过共享策略网络参数和奖励函数实现纯协作训练，结合对抗预训练与专家轨迹蒸馏网络学习近似奖励函数。
AI.result: 在MADRaS平台实验中，Lepus在避撞率和稳定性上优于DDPG-FDE、PSDDPG、MADDPG和MAGAIL(DDPG)等四种方法。
AI.conclusion: Lepus通过参数共享和奖励函数优化有效提升了多智能体协作的稳定性与安全性，为自动驾驶提供新思路。

title: Adaptive Visual Servo Control for Autonomous Robots
title_zh: 自主机器人的自适应视觉伺服控制
abstract: This paper focuses on an adaptive and fault-tolerant vision-guided robotic system that enables to choose the most appropriate control action if partial or complete failure of the vision system in the short term occurs. Moreover, the autonomous robotic system takes physical and operational constraints into account to perform the demands of a specific visual servoing task in a way to minimize a cost function. A hierarchical control architecture is developed based on interwoven integration of a variant of the iterative closest point (ICP) image registration, a constrained noise-adaptive Kalman filter, a fault detection logic and recovery, together with a constrained optimal path planner. The dynamic estimator estimates unknown states and uncertain parameters required for motion prediction while imposing a set of inequality constraints for consistency of the estimation process and adjusting adaptively the Kalman filter parameters in the face of unexpected vision errors. It is followed by the implementation of a fault recovery strategy based on a fault detection logic that monitors the health of the visual feedback using the metric fit error of the image registration. Subsequently, the estimated/predicted pose and parameters are passed to an optimal path planner in order to bring the robot end-effector to the grasping point of a moving target as quickly as possible subject to multiple constraints such as acceleration limit, smooth capture, and line-of-sight angle of the target.
summary: This paper focuses on an adaptive and fault-tolerant vision-guided robotic system that enables to choose the most appropriate control action if partial or complete failure of the vision system in the short term occurs. Moreover, the autonomous robotic system takes physical and operational constraints into account to perform the demands of a specific visual servoing task in a way to minimize a cost function. A hierarchical control architecture is developed based on interwoven integration of a variant of the iterative closest point (ICP) image registration, a constrained noise-adaptive Kalman filter, a fault detection logic and recovery, together with a constrained optimal path planner. The dynamic estimator estimates unknown states and uncertain parameters required for motion prediction while imposing a set of inequality constraints for consistency of the estimation process and adjusting adaptively the Kalman filter parameters in the face of unexpected vision errors. It is followed by the implementation of a fault recovery strategy based on a fault detection logic that monitors the health of the visual feedback using the metric fit error of the image registration. Subsequently, the estimated/predicted pose and parameters are passed to an optimal path planner in order to bring the robot end-effector to the grasping point of a moving target as quickly as possible subject to multiple constraints such as acceleration limit, smooth capture, and line-of-sight angle of the target.
abstract_zh: 本文重点研究一种自适应且容错的视觉引导机器人系统，如果视觉系统在短期内发生部分或完全故障，该系统能够选择最合适的控制动作。此外，自主机器人系统考虑物理和操作约束，以最小化成本函数的方式执行特定视觉伺服任务的需求。基于迭代最近点（ICP）图像配准的变体、受约束的噪声自适应卡尔曼滤波器、故障检测逻辑和恢复以及受约束的最佳路径规划器的交织集成，开发了分层控制架构。动态估计器估计运动预测所需的未知状态和不确定参数，同时施加一组不等式约束以保证估计过程的一致性，并在面对意外视觉误差时自适应调整卡尔曼滤波器参数。接下来是基于故障检测逻辑的故障恢复策略的实施，该故障检测逻辑使用图像配准的度量拟合误差来监控视觉反馈的健康状况。随后，估计/预测的位姿和参数被传递给最佳路径规划器，以便在受到加速度限制、平滑捕获和目标视线角度等多重约束的情况下，尽快将机器人末端执行器带到移动目标的抓取点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应视觉伺服控制系统，使自主机器人在视觉系统部分或完全失效时仍能选择最佳控制动作，并考虑物理和操作约束以最小化成本函数。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉伺服系统在面对短期视觉故障或噪声干扰时缺乏鲁棒性，且难以在复杂约束下实现高效路径规划。
AI.method: 构建分层控制架构，融合改进的ICP图像配准、约束噪声自适应卡尔曼滤波器、故障检测与恢复逻辑及约束最优路径规划器，通过动态估计器处理未知状态和参数并调整滤波器参数。
AI.result: 实现视觉故障自适应补偿与快速路径规划，满足加速度限制、平滑捕捉及目标视线角等多约束条件下的抓取任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了自主机器人在视觉系统故障场景下的任务执行可靠性与动态环境适应能力。

result: 实现视觉故障自适应补偿与快速路径规划，满足加速度限制、平滑捕捉及目标视线角等多约束条件下的抓取任务。
conclusion: 该方法提升了自主机器人在视觉系统故障场景下的任务执行可靠性与动态环境适应能力。
search_text: Adaptive Visual Servo Control for Autonomous Robots 自主机器人的自适应视觉伺服控制 This paper focuses on an adaptive and fault-tolerant vision-guided robotic system that enables to choose the most appropriate control action if partial or complete failure of the vision system in the short term occurs. Moreover, the autonomous robotic system takes physical and operational constraints into account to perform the demands of a specific visual servoing task in a way to minimize a cost function. A hierarchical control architecture is developed based on interwoven integration of a variant of the iterative closest point (ICP) image registration, a constrained noise-adaptive Kalman filter, a fault detection logic and recovery, together with a constrained optimal path planner. The dynamic estimator estimates unknown states and uncertain parameters required for motion prediction while imposing a set of inequality constraints for consistency of the estimation process and adjusting adaptively the Kalman filter parameters in the face of unexpected vision errors. It is followed by the implementation of a fault recovery strategy based on a fault detection logic that monitors the health of the visual feedback using the metric fit error of the image registration. Subsequently, the estimated/predicted pose and parameters are passed to an optimal path planner in order to bring the robot end-effector to the grasping point of a moving target as quickly as possible subject to multiple constraints such as acceleration limit, smooth capture, and line-of-sight angle of the target. 本文重点研究一种自适应且容错的视觉引导机器人系统，如果视觉系统在短期内发生部分或完全故障，该系统能够选择最合适的控制动作。此外，自主机器人系统考虑物理和操作约束，以最小化成本函数的方式执行特定视觉伺服任务的需求。基于迭代最近点（ICP）图像配准的变体、受约束的噪声自适应卡尔曼滤波器、故障检测逻辑和恢复以及受约束的最佳路径规划器的交织集成，开发了分层控制架构。动态估计器估计运动预测所需的未知状态和不确定参数，同时施加一组不等式约束以保证估计过程的一致性，并在面对意外视觉误差时自适应调整卡尔曼滤波器参数。接下来是基于故障检测逻辑的故障恢复策略的实施，该故障检测逻辑使用图像配准的度量拟合误差来监控视觉反馈的健康状况。随后，估计/预测的位姿和参数被传递给最佳路径规划器，以便在受到加速度限制、平滑捕获和目标视线角度等多重约束的情况下，尽快将机器人末端执行器带到移动目标的抓取点。 本文提出一种自适应视觉伺服控制系统，使自主机器人在视觉系统部分或完全失效时仍能选择最佳控制动作，并考虑物理和操作约束以最小化成本函数。 Farhad Aghili cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Learning Canonical Embeddings for Unsupervised Shape Correspondence with Locally Linear Transformations
title_zh: 学习规范嵌入以实现具有局部线性变换的无监督形状对应
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
abstract: We present a new approach to unsupervised shape correspondence learning between pairs of point clouds. We make the first attempt to adapt the classical locally linear embedding algorithm (LLE) -- originally designed for nonlinear dimensionality reduction -- for shape correspondence. The key idea is to find dense correspondences between shapes by first obtaining high-dimensional neighborhood-preserving embeddings of low-dimensional point clouds and subsequently aligning the source and target embeddings using locally linear transformations. We demonstrate that learning the embedding using a new LLE-inspired point cloud reconstruction objective results in accurate shape correspondences. More specifically, the approach comprises an end-to-end learnable framework of extracting high-dimensional neighborhood-preserving embeddings, estimating locally linear transformations in the embedding space, and reconstructing shapes via divergence measure-based alignment of probabilistic density functions built over reconstructed and target shapes. Our approach enforces embeddings of shapes in correspondence to lie in the same universal/canonical embedding space, which eventually helps regularize the learning process and leads to a simple nearest neighbors approach between shape embeddings for finding reliable correspondences. Comprehensive experiments show that the new method makes noticeable improvements over state-of-the-art approaches on standard shape correspondence benchmark datasets covering both human and nonhuman shapes.
summary: We present a new approach to unsupervised shape correspondence learning between pairs of point clouds. We make the first attempt to adapt the classical locally linear embedding algorithm (LLE) -- originally designed for nonlinear dimensionality reduction -- for shape correspondence. The key idea is to find dense correspondences between shapes by first obtaining high-dimensional neighborhood-preserving embeddings of low-dimensional point clouds and subsequently aligning the source and target embeddings using locally linear transformations. We demonstrate that learning the embedding using a new LLE-inspired point cloud reconstruction objective results in accurate shape correspondences. More specifically, the approach comprises an end-to-end learnable framework of extracting high-dimensional neighborhood-preserving embeddings, estimating locally linear transformations in the embedding space, and reconstructing shapes via divergence measure-based alignment of probabilistic density functions built over reconstructed and target shapes. Our approach enforces embeddings of shapes in correspondence to lie in the same universal/canonical embedding space, which eventually helps regularize the learning process and leads to a simple nearest neighbors approach between shape embeddings for finding reliable correspondences. Comprehensive experiments show that the new method makes noticeable improvements over state-of-the-art approaches on standard shape correspondence benchmark datasets covering both human and nonhuman shapes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在点云对之间进行无监督形状对应学习的新方法。我们首次尝试采用经典的局部线性嵌入算法（LLE）（最初是为非线性降维而设计的）来实现形状对应。关键思想是通过首先获得低维点云的高维邻域保留嵌入，然后使用局部线性变换对齐源嵌入和目标嵌入，来找到形状之间的密集对应关系。我们证明，使用受 LLE 启发的新点云重建目标来学习嵌入可以产生准确的形状对应。更具体地说，该方法包括一个端到端的可学习框架，用于提取高维邻域保留嵌入，估计嵌入空间中的局部线性变换，以及通过在重建形状和目标形状上构建的概率密度函数的基于散度测量的对齐来重建形状。我们的方法强制对应的形状嵌入位于相同的通用/规范嵌入空间中，这最终有助于规范学习过程，并导致形状嵌入之间采用简单的最近邻方法来查找可靠的对应关系。综合实验表明，新方法在涵盖人类和非人类形状的标准形状对应基准数据集上比最先进的方法有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部线性嵌入（LLE）的无监督形状对应学习方法，通过构建统一的规范嵌入空间实现点云间的密集对应。
AI.motivation: 现有形状对应方法在无监督场景下难以有效对齐复杂形状，需探索能保持局部几何结构且适用于不同形状的通用嵌入表示。
AI.method: 采用LLE思想构建高维邻域保持嵌入，通过局部线性变换对齐源目标嵌入空间，并利用概率密度函数散度度量重建形状与目标形状的对齐效果。
AI.result: 在包含人体与非人体形状的标准基准数据集上，该方法较现有最佳方法在形状对应精度上取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 规范嵌入空间约束有效正则化学习过程，使简单最近邻策略即可获得可靠对应关系，为无监督形状分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Ruikang Shi,Alvin Grissom II,Duc Minh Trinh
title: Rare but Severe Neural Machine Translation Errors Induced by Minimal Deletion: An Empirical Study on Chinese and English
title_zh: 最小删除引起的罕见但严重的神经机器翻译错误：汉英实证研究
abstract: We examine the inducement of rare but severe errors in English-Chinese and Chinese-English in-domain neural machine translation by minimal deletion of the source text with character-based models. By deleting a single character, we can induce severe translation errors. We categorize these errors and compare the results of deleting single characters and single words. We also examine the effect of training data size on the number and types of pathological cases induced by these minimal perturbations, finding significant variation. We find that deleting a word hurts overall translation score more than deleting a character, but certain errors are more likely to occur when deleting characters, with language direction also influencing the effect.
summary: We examine the inducement of rare but severe errors in English-Chinese and Chinese-English in-domain neural machine translation by minimal deletion of the source text with character-based models. By deleting a single character, we can induce severe translation errors. We categorize these errors and compare the results of deleting single characters and single words. We also examine the effect of training data size on the number and types of pathological cases induced by these minimal perturbations, finding significant variation. We find that deleting a word hurts overall translation score more than deleting a character, but certain errors are more likely to occur when deleting characters, with language direction also influencing the effect.
abstract_zh: 我们通过使用基于字符的模型最小化源文本删除来研究英汉和汉英域内神经机器翻译中罕见但严重错误的诱发。通过删除单个字符，我们可能会导致严重的翻译错误。我们对这些错误进行分类，并比较删除单个字符和单个单词的结果。我们还检查了训练数据大小对这些最小扰动引起的病理病例的数量和类型的影响，发现了显着的变化。我们发现删除单词比删除字符对整体翻译得分的影响更大，但删除字符时更容易出现某些错误，语言方向也会影响效果。

AI.tldr: 研究通过删除源文本单个字符引发中英神经机器翻译中罕见但严重错误的现象，并分析其影响因素。
AI.motivation: 现有神经机器翻译模型对微小输入变化的鲁棒性不足，但针对字符级模型中单字符删除导致严重错误的系统性研究较少。
AI.method: 基于字符级模型，在中英翻译任务中对源文本进行单字符或单词删除，统计错误类型并对比不同训练数据规模下的差异。
AI.result: 单字符删除比单词删除更易引发特定类型严重错误，且语言方向影响效果；训练数据量显著影响错误数量及类型分布。
AI.conclusion: 字符级模型对输入微小扰动高度敏感，需关注其鲁棒性优化，尤其在跨语言翻译场景中需防范此类极端错误。

authors_text: Chenyu Zhang,Muhammad Monjurul Karim,Zhaozheng Yin,Ruwen Qin
title: A Deep Neural Network for Multiclass Bridge Element Parsing in Inspection Image Analysis
title_zh: 检查图像分析中多类桥元解析的深度神经网络
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, presented at the 8th World Conference on Structural Control and Monitoring (8WCSCM)
comments: 8 pages, 2 figures, presented at the 8th World Conference on Structural Control and Monitoring (8WCSCM)
abstract: Aerial robots such as drones have been leveraged to perform bridge inspections. Inspection images with both recognizable structural elements and apparent surface defects can be collected by onboard cameras to provide valuable information for the condition assessment. This article aims to determine a suitable deep neural network (DNN) for parsing multiclass bridge elements in inspection images. An extensive set of quantitative evaluations along with qualitative examples show that High-Resolution Net (HRNet) possesses the desired ability. With data augmentation and a training sample of 130 images, a pre-trained HRNet is efficiently transferred to the task of structural element parsing and has achieved a 92.67% mean F1-score and 86.33% mean IoU.
summary: Aerial robots such as drones have been leveraged to perform bridge inspections. Inspection images with both recognizable structural elements and apparent surface defects can be collected by onboard cameras to provide valuable information for the condition assessment. This article aims to determine a suitable deep neural network (DNN) for parsing multiclass bridge elements in inspection images. An extensive set of quantitative evaluations along with qualitative examples show that High-Resolution Net (HRNet) possesses the desired ability. With data augmentation and a training sample of 130 images, a pre-trained HRNet is efficiently transferred to the task of structural element parsing and has achieved a 92.67% mean F1-score and 86.33% mean IoU.
abstract_zh: 无人机等空中机器人已被用来执行桥梁检查。机载摄像头可以收集具有可识别结构元素和明显表面缺陷的检查图像，为状态评估提供有价值的信息。本文旨在确定一种合适的深度神经网络（DNN）来解析检查图像中的多类桥梁元素。大量的定量评估和定性示例表明高分辨率网络（HRNet）具有所需的能力。通过数据增强和 130 张图像的训练样本，预训练的 HRNet 可以有效地转移到结构元素解析任务，并实现了 92.67% 的平均 F1 分数和 86.33% 的平均 IoU。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种深度神经网络（DNN）用于解析桥梁检测图像中的多类结构元素。
AI.motivation: 无人机采集的桥梁检测图像包含大量结构元素和表面缺陷信息，需要高效准确的自动解析方法辅助评估。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率网络（HRNet）结合数据增强技术，通过迁移学习在130张图像样本上训练模型。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到92.67%的平均F1分数和86.33%的平均IoU，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: HRNet通过迁移学习可高效完成桥梁元素解析任务，为结构健康监测提供可靠技术方案。

title: Facial Expression Translation using Landmark Guided GANs
title_zh: 使用 Landmark Guided GAN 进行面部表情翻译
abstract: We propose a simple yet powerful Landmark guided Generative Adversarial Network (LandmarkGAN) for the facial expression-to-expression translation using a single image, which is an important and challenging task in computer vision since the expression-to-expression translation is a non-linear and non-aligned problem. Moreover, it requires a high-level semantic understanding between the input and output images since the objects in images can have arbitrary poses, sizes, locations, backgrounds, and self-occlusions. To tackle this problem, we propose utilizing facial landmark information explicitly. Since it is a challenging problem, we split it into two sub-tasks, (i) category-guided landmark generation, and (ii) landmark-guided expression-to-expression translation. Two sub-tasks are trained in an end-to-end fashion that aims to enjoy the mutually improved benefits from the generated landmarks and expressions. Compared with current keypoint-guided approaches, the proposed LandmarkGAN only needs a single facial image to generate various expressions. Extensive experimental results on four public datasets demonstrate that the proposed LandmarkGAN achieves better results compared with state-of-the-art approaches only using a single image. The code is available at https://github.com/Ha0Tang/LandmarkGAN.
summary: We propose a simple yet powerful Landmark guided Generative Adversarial Network (LandmarkGAN) for the facial expression-to-expression translation using a single image, which is an important and challenging task in computer vision since the expression-to-expression translation is a non-linear and non-aligned problem. Moreover, it requires a high-level semantic understanding between the input and output images since the objects in images can have arbitrary poses, sizes, locations, backgrounds, and self-occlusions. To tackle this problem, we propose utilizing facial landmark information explicitly. Since it is a challenging problem, we split it into two sub-tasks, (i) category-guided landmark generation, and (ii) landmark-guided expression-to-expression translation. Two sub-tasks are trained in an end-to-end fashion that aims to enjoy the mutually improved benefits from the generated landmarks and expressions. Compared with current keypoint-guided approaches, the proposed LandmarkGAN only needs a single facial image to generate various expressions. Extensive experimental results on four public datasets demonstrate that the proposed LandmarkGAN achieves better results compared with state-of-the-art approaches only using a single image. The code is available at https://github.com/Ha0Tang/LandmarkGAN.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单而强大的地标引导生成对抗网络（LandmarkGAN），用于使用单个图像进行面部表情到表情的翻译，这是计算机视觉中的一项重要且具有挑战性的任务，因为表情到表情的翻译是一个非线性和非对齐的问题。此外，它需要输入和输出图像之间的高级语义理解，因为图像中的对象可以具有任意姿势、大小、位置、背景和自遮挡。为了解决这个问题，我们建议明确地利用面部标志信息。由于这是一个具有挑战性的问题，我们将其分为两个子任务，（i）类别引导的地标生成，以及（ii）地标引导的表达式到表达式的翻译。两个子任务以端到端的方式进行训练，旨在从生成的地标和表达中获得相互改进的好处。与当前的关键点引导方法相比，所提出的 LandmarkGAN 仅需要单个面部图像即可生成各种表情。在四个公共数据集上的大量实验结果表明，与仅使用单个图像的最先进方法相比，所提出的 LandmarkGAN 取得了更好的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/Ha0Tang/LandmarkGAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于关键点引导的生成对抗网络（LandmarkGAN），实现单张图像的表情到表情转换。
AI.motivation: 表情到表情转换是计算机视觉中具有挑战性的非线性问题，需处理姿态、遮挡等复杂因素，现有方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 将任务拆分为两阶段：类别引导的关键点生成与关键点引导的表情转换，通过端到端训练实现单图多表情生成。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上验证，LandmarkGAN在仅使用单张图像时优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: LandmarkGAN通过显式利用面部关键点信息，有效解决了表情转换的对齐与语义理解难题。
