title: Impact of Scaled Image on Robustness of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 缩放图像对深度神经网络鲁棒性的影响
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely used in computer vision tasks like image classification, object detection and segmentation. Whereas recent studies have shown their vulnerability to manual digital perturbations or distortion in the input images. The accuracy of the networks is remarkably influenced by the data distribution of their training dataset. Scaling the raw images creates out-of-distribution data, which makes it a possible adversarial attack to fool the networks. In this work, we propose a Scaling-distortion dataset ImageNet-CS by Scaling a subset of the ImageNet Challenge dataset by different multiples. The aim of our work is to study the impact of scaled images on the performance of advanced DNNs. We perform experiments on several state-of-the-art deep neural network architectures on the proposed ImageNet-CS, and the results show a significant positive correlation between scaling size and accuracy decline. Moreover, based on ResNet50 architecture, we demonstrate some tests on the performance of recent proposed robust training techniques and strategies like Augmix, Revisiting and Normalizer Free on our proposed ImageNet-CS. Experiment results have shown that these robust training techniques can improve networks' robustness to scaling transformation.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely used in computer vision tasks like image classification, object detection and segmentation. Whereas recent studies have shown their vulnerability to manual digital perturbations or distortion in the input images. The accuracy of the networks is remarkably influenced by the data distribution of their training dataset. Scaling the raw images creates out-of-distribution data, which makes it a possible adversarial attack to fool the networks. In this work, we propose a Scaling-distortion dataset ImageNet-CS by Scaling a subset of the ImageNet Challenge dataset by different multiples. The aim of our work is to study the impact of scaled images on the performance of advanced DNNs. We perform experiments on several state-of-the-art deep neural network architectures on the proposed ImageNet-CS, and the results show a significant positive correlation between scaling size and accuracy decline. Moreover, based on ResNet50 architecture, we demonstrate some tests on the performance of recent proposed robust training techniques and strategies like Augmix, Revisiting and Normalizer Free on our proposed ImageNet-CS. Experiment results have shown that these robust training techniques can improve networks' robustness to scaling transformation.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛应用于图像分类、目标检测和分割等计算机视觉任务。然而最近的研究表明，它们容易受到输入图像中的手动数字扰动或失真的影响。网络的准确性很大程度上受到训练数据集的数据分布的影响。缩放原始图像会产生分布外的数据，这使得可能成为欺骗网络的对抗性攻击。在这项工作中，我们通过按不同倍数缩放 ImageNet Challenge 数据集的子集，提出了缩放失真数据集 ImageNet-CS。我们工作的目的是研究缩放图像对高级 DNN 性能的影响。我们在所提出的 ImageNet-CS 上对几种最先进的深度神经网络架构进行了实验，结果显示缩放大小和精度下降之间存在显着的正相关性。此外，基于 ResNet50 架构，我们在我们提出的 ImageNet-CS 上展示了对最近提出的鲁棒训练技术和策略（例如 Augmix、Revisiting 和 Normalizer Free）的性能的一些测试。实验结果表明，这些鲁棒训练技术可以提高网络对缩放变换的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 研究缩放图像对深度神经网络鲁棒性的影响
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明DNN对输入扰动敏感，缩放图像可能成为对抗攻击手段，需评估其影响并寻找增强鲁棒性的方法
AI.method: 构建缩放失真数据集ImageNet-CS，使用不同倍数缩放ImageNet子集，并在多个先进DNN架构上进行实验，评估鲁棒训练技术效果
AI.result: 实验显示缩放尺寸与准确率下降呈显著正相关，且Augmix等方法能提升网络鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 缩放图像显著影响DNN性能，但鲁棒训练技术可有效增强其对缩放变换的抵抗能力

We perform experiments on several state-of-the-art deep neural network architectures on the proposed ImageNet-CS, and the results show a significant positive correlation between scaling size and accuracy decline. Moreover, based on ResNet50 architecture, we demonstrate some tests on the performance of recent proposed robust training techniques and strategies like Augmix, Revisiting and Normalizer Free on our proposed ImageNet-CS. Experiment results have shown that these robust training techniques can improve networks' robustness to scaling transformation. 深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛应用于图像分类、目标检测和分割等计算机视觉任务。然而最近的研究表明，它们容易受到输入图像中的手动数字扰动或失真的影响。网络的准确性很大程度上受到训练数据集的数据分布的影响。缩放原始图像会产生分布外的数据，这使得可能成为欺骗网络的对抗性攻击。在这项工作中，我们通过按不同倍数缩放 ImageNet Challenge 数据集的子集，提出了缩放失真数据集 ImageNet-CS。我们工作的目的是研究缩放图像对高级 DNN 性能的影响。我们在所提出的 ImageNet-CS 上对几种最先进的深度神经网络架构进行了实验，结果显示缩放大小和精度下降之间存在显着的正相关性。此外，基于 ResNet50 架构，我们在我们提出的 ImageNet-CS 上展示了对最近提出的鲁棒训练技术和策略（例如 Augmix、Revisiting 和 Normalizer Free）的性能的一些测试。实验结果表明，这些鲁棒训练技术可以提高网络对缩放变换的鲁棒性。 研究缩放图像对深度神经网络鲁棒性的影响 Chengyin Hu,Weiwen Shi cs.CV

title: Hypersphere Optimization: Approximated Gradient-Based Binary Optimization on Smooth Manifold for Photonic Inverse Design
title_zh: 超球面优化：用于光子逆设计的光滑流形上基于近似梯度的二元优化
abstract: Photonic inverse design typically seeks designs parameterized by binary arrays, where the values of each element correspond to the presence or absence of material at a particular point in space. Gradient-based approaches to photonic inverse design often include thresholding of non-binary optimization arrays; when the thresholding is sufficiently sharp, binary designs are obtained. However, difficulty can arise due to vanishing gradients for sharp thresholds, which cause optimization to stall. Here, we present hypersphere optimization, a new method of carrying out binarized photonic optimization on a high dimensional manifold. We numerically show that, on the manifold, upstream gradients from the objective function can smoothly transition a design from one nearly-binary array to another with minimal pixel flips. Our method is an approximate gradient-based optimization method for binary arrays that can be applied to various photonic inverse design problems and beyond.
summary: Photonic inverse design typically seeks designs parameterized by binary arrays, where the values of each element correspond to the presence or absence of material at a particular point in space. Gradient-based approaches to photonic inverse design often include thresholding of non-binary optimization arrays; when the thresholding is sufficiently sharp, binary designs are obtained. However, difficulty can arise due to vanishing gradients for sharp thresholds, which cause optimization to stall. Here, we present hypersphere optimization, a new method of carrying out binarized photonic optimization on a high dimensional manifold. We numerically show that, on the manifold, upstream gradients from the objective function can smoothly transition a design from one nearly-binary array to another with minimal pixel flips. Our method is an approximate gradient-based optimization method for binary arrays that can be applied to various photonic inverse design problems and beyond.
abstract_zh: 光子逆设计通常寻求由二进制阵列参数化的设计，其中每个元素的值对应于空间中特定点处材料的存在或不存在。基于梯度的光子逆设计方法通常包括非二元优化阵列的阈值化；当阈值足够尖锐时，获得二元设计。然而，由于尖锐阈值的梯度消失，可能会出现困难，从而导致优化停滞。在这里，我们提出了超球面优化，这是一种在高维流形上进行二值化光子优化的新方法。我们以数值方式表明，在流形上，目标函数的上游梯度可以以最小的像素翻转将设计从一个近二进制阵列平滑地过渡到另一个阵列。我们的方法是一种基于近似梯度的二元阵列优化方法，可应用于各种光子逆设计问题及其他问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高维流形的近似梯度二值优化方法，用于解决光子逆向设计中的二值化优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度下降法在处理尖锐阈值时易出现梯度消失问题，导致优化过程停滞，亟需一种更高效的二值化优化方法。
AI.method: 通过在高维流形上构建超球面优化框架，利用目标函数的上游梯度实现二值数组间的平滑过渡，仅需少量像素翻转即可完成设计迭代。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法能在流形上实现二值化设计的平滑转换，有效避免梯度消失问题，适用于多种光子逆向设计场景。
AI.conclusion: 超球面优化方法为二值化光子逆向设计提供了新的解决方案，其近似梯度机制具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Design of the topology for contrastive visual-textual alignment
title_zh: 对比视觉文本对齐的拓扑设计
abstract: Cosine similarity is the common choice for measuring the distance between the feature representations in contrastive visual-textual alignment learning. However, empirically a learnable softmax temperature parameter is required when learning on large-scale noisy training data. In this work, we first discuss the role of softmax temperature from the embedding space's topological properties. We argue that the softmax temperature is the key mechanism for contrastive learning on noisy training data. It acts as a scaling factor of the distance range (e.g. [-1, 1] for the cosine similarity), and its learned value indicates the level of noise in the training data. Then, we propose an alternative design of the topology for the embedding alignment. We make use of multiple class tokens in the transformer architecture; then map the feature representations onto an oblique manifold endowed with the negative inner product as the distance function. With this configuration, we largely improve the zero-shot classification performance of baseline CLIP models pre-trained on large-scale datasets by an average of 6.1\%.
summary: Cosine similarity is the common choice for measuring the distance between the feature representations in contrastive visual-textual alignment learning. However, empirically a learnable softmax temperature parameter is required when learning on large-scale noisy training data. In this work, we first discuss the role of softmax temperature from the embedding space's topological properties. We argue that the softmax temperature is the key mechanism for contrastive learning on noisy training data. It acts as a scaling factor of the distance range (e.g. [-1, 1] for the cosine similarity), and its learned value indicates the level of noise in the training data. Then, we propose an alternative design of the topology for the embedding alignment. We make use of multiple class tokens in the transformer architecture; then map the feature representations onto an oblique manifold endowed with the negative inner product as the distance function. With this configuration, we largely improve the zero-shot classification performance of baseline CLIP models pre-trained on large-scale datasets by an average of 6.1\%.
abstract_zh: 余弦相似度是对比视觉文本对齐学习中测量特征表示之间距离的常见选择。然而，根据经验，在大规模噪声训练数据上学习时需要可学习的 softmax 温度参数。在这项工作中，我们首先从嵌入空间的拓扑特性讨论 softmax 温度的作用。我们认为，softmax 温度是对噪声训练数据进行对比学习的关键机制。它充当距离范围的缩放因子（例如，余弦相似度为 [-1, 1]），其学习值表示训练数据中的噪声水平。然后，我们提出了一种用于嵌入对齐的拓扑的替代设计。我们在 Transformer 架构中使用了多个类标记；然后将特征表示映射到斜流形上，并赋予负内积作为距离函数。通过这种配置，我们将在大规模数据集上预训练的基线 CLIP 模型的零样本分类性能平均提高了 6.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨对比视觉-文本对齐学习中嵌入空间拓扑结构的设计，提出通过负内积距离函数改进对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 传统余弦相似度在噪声数据下需依赖可学习温度参数，但其机制缺乏理论解释，且难以有效处理大规模噪声数据的对齐问题。
AI.method: 分析softmax温度参数对嵌入空间距离范围的缩放作用，提出基于多类标记符的Transformer架构，将特征映射到负内积定义的斜流形空间。
AI.result: 在零样本分类任务中，改进后的模型相比CLIP基线平均提升6.1%性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过重新设计嵌入空间拓扑结构，可有效提升对比学习在噪声数据下的对齐质量与模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Sulaiman Vesal,Iani Gayo,Indrani Bhattacharya,Shyam Natarajan,Leonard S. Marks,Dean C Barratt,Richard E. Fan,Yipeng Hu,Geoffrey A. Sonn,Mirabela Rusu
title: Domain Generalization for Prostate Segmentation in Transrectal Ultrasound Images: A Multi-center Study
title_zh: 经直肠超声图像中前列腺分割的域概括：一项多中心研究
comment: Accepted to the journal of Medical Image Analysis (MedIA)
comments: Accepted to the journal of Medical Image Analysis (MedIA)
abstract: Prostate biopsy and image-guided treatment procedures are often performed under the guidance of ultrasound fused with magnetic resonance images (MRI). Accurate image fusion relies on accurate segmentation of the prostate on ultrasound images. Yet, the reduced signal-to-noise ratio and artifacts (e.g., speckle and shadowing) in ultrasound images limit the performance of automated prostate segmentation techniques and generalizing these methods to new image domains is inherently difficult. In this study, we address these challenges by introducing a novel 2.5D deep neural network for prostate segmentation on ultrasound images. Our approach addresses the limitations of transfer learning and finetuning methods (i.e., drop in performance on the original training data when the model weights are updated) by combining a supervised domain adaptation technique and a knowledge distillation loss. The knowledge distillation loss allows the preservation of previously learned knowledge and reduces the performance drop after model finetuning on new datasets. Furthermore, our approach relies on an attention module that considers model feature positioning information to improve the segmentation accuracy. We trained our model on 764 subjects from one institution and finetuned our model using only ten subjects from subsequent institutions. We analyzed the performance of our method on three large datasets encompassing 2067 subjects from three different institutions. Our method achieved an average Dice Similarity Coefficient (Dice) of $94.0\pm0.03$ and Hausdorff Distance (HD95) of 2.28 $mm$ in an independent set of subjects from the first institution. Moreover, our model generalized well in the studies from the other two institutions (Dice: $91.0\pm0.03$; HD95: 3.7$mm$ and Dice: $82.0\pm0.03$; HD95: 7.1 $mm$).

Our method achieved an average Dice Similarity Coefficient (Dice) of $94.0\pm0.03$ and Hausdorff Distance (HD95) of 2.28 $mm$ in an independent set of subjects from the first institution. Moreover, our model generalized well in the studies from the other two institutions (Dice: $91.0\pm0.03$; HD95: 3.7$mm$ and Dice: $82.0\pm0.03$; HD95: 7.1 $mm$).
abstract_zh: 前列腺活检和图像引导治疗程序通常在超声波与磁共振图像 (MRI) 融合的指导下进行。准确的图像融合依赖于超声图像上前列腺的准确分割。然而，超声图像中信噪比的降低和伪影（例如斑点和阴影）限制了自动前列腺分割技术的性能，并且将这些方法推广到新的图像领域本质上是困难的。在这项研究中，我们通过引入一种新颖的 2.5D 深度神经网络来解决这些挑战，用于超声图像上的前列腺分割。我们的方法通过结合监督域适应技术和知识蒸馏损失来解决迁移学习和微调方法的局限性（即，更新模型权重时原始训练数据的性能下降）。知识蒸馏损失可以保留以前学到的知识，并减少在新数据集上进行模型微调后的性能下降。此外，我们的方法依赖于一个注意模块，该模块考虑模型特征定位信息来提高分割精度。我们在一个机构的 764 名受试者上训练了我们的模型，并仅使用后续机构的 10 名受试者对我们的模型进行了微调。我们分析了我们的方法在包含来自三个不同机构的 2067 名受试者的三个大型数据集上的性能。我们的方法在来自第一机构的一组独立受试者中实现了平均骰子相似系数 (Dice) $94.0\pm0.03$ 和豪斯多夫距离 (HD95) 2.28 $mm$。此外，我们的模型在其他两家机构的研究中得到了很好的推广（Dice：$91.0\pm0.03$；HD95：3.7$mm$ 和 Dice：$82.0\pm0.03$；HD95：7.1 $mm$）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于2.5D深度神经网络的前列腺分割方法，解决跨中心超声图像领域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 超声图像因信噪比低和伪影导致前列腺分割困难，且现有方法难以泛化到新领域，传统迁移学习存在性能下降问题。
AI.method: 结合监督域适应与知识蒸馏损失，通过注意力模块利用特征定位信息提升分割精度，仅用少量新数据微调模型。
AI.result: 在三个独立机构数据集上分别达到Dice 94.0±0.03/91.0±0.03/82.0±0.03和HD95 2.28mm/3.7mm/7.1mm的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解领域偏移问题，以少量新数据实现跨中心前列腺分割的高精度泛化。

search_text: Domain Generalization for Prostate Segmentation in Transrectal Ultrasound Images: A Multi-center Study 经直肠超声图像中前列腺分割的域概括：一项多中心研究 Prostate biopsy and image-guided treatment procedures are often performed under the guidance of ultrasound fused with magnetic resonance images (MRI). Accurate image fusion relies on accurate segmentation of the prostate on ultrasound images. Yet, the reduced signal-to-noise ratio and artifacts (e.g., speckle and shadowing) in ultrasound images limit the performance of automated prostate segmentation techniques and generalizing these methods to new image domains is inherently difficult. In this study, we address these challenges by introducing a novel 2.5D deep neural network for prostate segmentation on ultrasound images. Our approach addresses the limitations of transfer learning and finetuning methods (i.e., drop in performance on the original training data when the model weights are updated) by combining a supervised domain adaptation technique and a knowledge distillation loss. The knowledge distillation loss allows the preservation of previously learned knowledge and reduces the performance drop after model finetuning on new datasets. Furthermore, our approach relies on an attention module that considers model feature positioning information to improve the segmentation accuracy. We trained our model on 764 subjects from one institution and finetuned our model using only ten subjects from subsequent institutions. We analyzed the performance of our method on three large datasets encompassing 2067 subjects from three different institutions. Our method achieved an average Dice Similarity Coefficient (Dice) of $94.0\pm0.03$ and Hausdorff Distance (HD95) of 2.28 $mm$ in an independent set of subjects from the first institution. Moreover, our model generalized well in the studies from the other two institutions (Dice: $91.0\pm0.03$; HD95: 3.7$mm$ and Dice: $82.0\pm0.03$; HD95: 7.1 $mm$). 前列腺活检和图像引导治疗程序通常在超声波与磁共振图像 (MRI) 融合的指导下进行。准确的图像融合依赖于超声图像上前列腺的准确分割。然而，超声图像中信噪比的降低和伪影（例如斑点和阴影）限制了自动前列腺分割技术的性能，并且将这些方法推广到新的图像领域本质上是困难的。在这项研究中，我们通过引入一种新颖的 2.5D 深度神经网络来解决这些挑战，用于超声图像上的前列腺分割。我们的方法通过结合监督域适应技术和知识蒸馏损失来解决迁移学习和微调方法的局限性（即，更新模型权重时原始训练数据的性能下降）。知识蒸馏损失可以保留以前学到的知识，并减少在新数据集上进行模型微调后的性能下降。此外，我们的方法依赖于一个注意模块，该模块考虑模型特征定位信息来提高分割精度。我们在一个机构的 764 名受试者上训练了我们的模型，并仅使用后续机构的 10 名受试者对我们的模型进行了微调。我们分析了我们的方法在包含来自三个不同机构的 2067 名受试者的三个大型数据集上的性能。我们的方法在来自第一机构的一组独立受试者中实现了平均骰子相似系数 (Dice) $94.0\pm0.03$ 和豪斯多夫距离 (HD95) 2.28 $mm$。此外，我们的模型在其他两家机构的研究中得到了很好的推广（Dice：$91.0\pm0.03$；HD95：3.7$mm$ 和 Dice：$82.0\pm0.03$；HD95：7.1 $mm$）。 本文提出一种基于2.5D深度神经网络的前列腺分割方法，解决跨中心超声图像领域泛化问题。 Sulaiman Vesal,Iani Gayo,Indrani Bhattacharya,Shyam Natarajan,Leonard S. title: Utilizing Post-Hurricane Satellite Imagery to Identify Flooding Damage with Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 利用飓风后卫星图像通过卷积神经网络识别洪水损害
comment: 18 pages without figures/references, 12 figures. Patrick Emedom-Nnamdi is the Editor
comments: 18 pages without figures/references, 12 figures. Patrick Emedom-Nnamdi is the Editor
abstract: Post-hurricane damage assessment is crucial towards managing resource allocations and executing an effective response. Traditionally, this evaluation is performed through field reconnaissance, which is slow, hazardous, and arduous. Instead, in this paper we furthered the idea of implementing deep learning through convolutional neural networks in order to classify post-hurricane satellite imagery of buildings as Flooded/Damaged or Undamaged. The experimentation was conducted employing a dataset containing post-hurricane satellite imagery from the Greater Houston area after Hurricane Harvey in 2017. This paper implemented three convolutional neural network model architectures paired with additional model considerations in order to achieve high accuracies (over 99%), reinforcing the effective use of machine learning in post-hurricane disaster assessment.
summary: Post-hurricane damage assessment is crucial towards managing resource allocations and executing an effective response. Traditionally, this evaluation is performed through field reconnaissance, which is slow, hazardous, and arduous. Instead, in this paper we furthered the idea of implementing deep learning through convolutional neural networks in order to classify post-hurricane satellite imagery of buildings as Flooded/Damaged or Undamaged. The experimentation was conducted employing a dataset containing post-hurricane satellite imagery from the Greater Houston area after Hurricane Harvey in 2017. This paper implemented three convolutional neural network model architectures paired with additional model considerations in order to achieve high accuracies (over 99%), reinforcing the effective use of machine learning in post-hurricane disaster assessment.
abstract_zh: 飓风后损失评估对于管理资源分配和执行有效的应对措施至关重要。传统上，这种评估是通过现场勘察来进行的，这是缓慢、危险且艰巨的。相反，在本文中，我们进一步提出了通过卷积神经网络实施深度学习的想法，以便将飓风后的建筑物卫星图像分类为被淹没/损坏或未损坏。该实验使用包含 2017 年哈维飓风后大休斯顿地区飓风后卫星图像的数据集进行。本文实现了三种卷积神经网络模型架构，并结合其他模型考虑因素，以实现高精度（超过 99%），从而加强机器学习在飓风后灾害评估中的有效使用。

AI.tldr: 本文利用卷积神经网络对飓风后的卫星图像进行分类，以识别建筑物的洪水损害情况。
AI.motivation: 传统灾后评估依赖人工实地勘察，存在效率低、危险性高的问题，需自动化手段提升响应速度。
AI.method: 采用三种卷积神经网络模型架构，结合优化策略，使用2017年飓风哈维后休斯顿地区的卫星图像数据集进行训练与测试。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到超过99%的分类准确率，验证了深度学习在灾后评估中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 卷积神经网络能高效准确地识别洪水损害，为灾后资源分配和应急响应提供可靠技术支撑。

authors_text: Marcus de Carvalho,Mahardhika Pratama,Jie Zhang,Yajuan San
title: Class-Incremental Learning via Knowledge Amalgamation
title_zh: 通过知识融合进行课堂增量学习
abstract: Catastrophic forgetting has been a significant problem hindering the deployment of deep learning algorithms in the continual learning setting. Numerous methods have been proposed to address the catastrophic forgetting problem where an agent loses its generalization power of old tasks while learning new tasks. We put forward an alternative strategy to handle the catastrophic forgetting with knowledge amalgamation (CFA), which learns a student network from multiple heterogeneous teacher models specializing in previous tasks and can be applied to current offline methods. The knowledge amalgamation process is carried out in a single-head manner with only a selected number of memorized samples and no annotations. The teachers and students do not need to share the same network structure, allowing heterogeneous tasks to be adapted to a compact or sparse data representation. We compare our method with competitive baselines from different strategies, demonstrating our approach's advantages.
summary: Catastrophic forgetting has been a significant problem hindering the deployment of deep learning algorithms in the continual learning setting. Numerous methods have been proposed to address the catastrophic forgetting problem where an agent loses its generalization power of old tasks while learning new tasks. We put forward an alternative strategy to handle the catastrophic forgetting with knowledge amalgamation (CFA), which learns a student network from multiple heterogeneous teacher models specializing in previous tasks and can be applied to current offline methods. The knowledge amalgamation process is carried out in a single-head manner with only a selected number of memorized samples and no annotations. The teachers and students do not need to share the same network structure, allowing heterogeneous tasks to be adapted to a compact or sparse data representation. We compare our method with competitive baselines from different strategies, demonstrating our approach's advantages.
abstract_zh: 灾难性遗忘一直是阻碍深度学习算法在持续学习环境中部署的一个重大问题。人们提出了许多方法来解决灾难性遗忘问题，即代理在学习新任务时失去旧任务的泛化能力。我们提出了一种通过知识融合（CFA）来处理灾难性遗忘的替代策略，该策略从专门从事先前任务的多个异构教师模型中学习学生网络，并且可以应用于当前的离线方法。知识融合过程以单头方式进行，仅选择数量的记忆样本并且没有注释。教师和学生不需要共享相同的网络结构，允许异构任务适应紧凑或稀疏的数据表示。我们将我们的方法与不同策略的竞争基线进行比较，展示我们方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过知识融合解决持续学习中灾难性遗忘问题的类别增量学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解决灾难性遗忘时存在结构复杂或依赖大量标注数据的局限性，需更高效适应异构任务的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计知识融合策略（CFA），让学生网络从多个异构教师模型（专精旧任务）中学习，仅需少量记忆样本且无需标注，允许师生结构异构。
AI.result: 实验表明CFA方法在多个基准任务中优于现有基线，尤其在保持旧任务性能和适应新任务方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: CFA通过异构知识蒸馏有效缓解灾难性遗忘，为资源受限场景下的持续学习提供了灵活高效的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种通过知识融合解决持续学习中灾难性遗忘问题的类别增量学习方法。
motivation: 现有方法在解决灾难性遗忘时存在结构复杂或依赖大量标注数据的局限性，需更高效适应异构任务的解决方案。
method: 设计知识融合策略（CFA），让学生网络从多个异构教师模型（专精旧任务）中学习，仅需少量记忆样本且无需标注，允许师生结构异构。
result: 实验表明CFA方法在多个基准任务中优于现有基线，尤其在保持旧任务性能和适应新任务方面表现突出。
conclusion: CFA通过异构知识蒸馏有效缓解灾难性遗忘，为资源受限场景下的持续学习提供了灵活高效的解决方案。
search_text: Class-Incremental Learning via Knowledge Amalgamation 通过知识融合进行课堂增量学习 Catastrophic forgetting has been a significant problem hindering the deployment of deep learning algorithms in the continual learning setting. Numerous methods have been proposed to address the catastrophic forgetting problem where an agent loses its generalization power of old tasks while learning new tasks. We put forward an alternative strategy to handle the catastrophic forgetting with knowledge amalgamation (CFA), which learns a student network from multiple heterogeneous teacher models specializing in previous tasks and can be applied to current offline methods. The knowledge amalgamation process is carried out in a single-head manner with only a selected number of memorized samples and no annotations. The teachers and students do not need to share the same network structure, allowing heterogeneous tasks to be adapted to a compact or sparse data representation. We compare our method with competitive baselines from different strategies, demonstrating our approach's advantages. 灾难性遗忘一直是阻碍深度学习算法在持续学习环境中部署的一个重大问题。人们提出了许多方法来解决灾难性遗忘问题，即代理在学习新任务时失去旧任务的泛化能力。我们提出了一种通过知识融合（CFA）来处理灾难性遗忘的替代策略，该策略从专门从事先前任务的多个异构教师模型中学习学生网络，并且可以应用于当前的离线方法。知识融合过程以单头方式进行，仅选择数量的记忆样本并且没有注释。教师和学生不需要共享相同的网络结构，允许异构任务适应紧凑或稀疏的数据表示。我们将我们的方法与不同策略的竞争基线进行比较，展示我们方法的优势。 本文提出一种通过知识融合解决持续学习中灾难性遗忘问题的类别增量学习方法。 Marcus de Carvalho,Mahardhika Pratama,Jie Zhang,Yajuan San cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Asish Bera,Zachary Wharton,Yonghuai Liu,Nik Bessis,Ardhendu Behera
title: SR-GNN: Spatial Relation-aware Graph Neural Network for Fine-Grained Image Categorization
title_zh: SR-GNN：用于细粒度图像分类的空间关系感知图神经网络
comment: Accepted manuscript - IEEE Transaction on Image Processing
comments: Accepted manuscript - IEEE Transaction on Image Processing
abstract: Over the past few years, a significant progress has been made in deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs)-based image recognition. This is mainly due to the strong ability of such networks in mining discriminative object pose and parts information from texture and shape. This is often inappropriate for fine-grained visual classification (FGVC) since it exhibits high intra-class and low inter-class variances due to occlusions, deformation, illuminations, etc. Thus, an expressive feature representation describing global structural information is a key to characterize an object/ scene. To this end, we propose a method that effectively captures subtle changes by aggregating context-aware features from most relevant image-regions and their importance in discriminating fine-grained categories avoiding the bounding-box and/or distinguishable part annotations. Our approach is inspired by the recent advancement in self-attention and graph neural networks (GNNs) approaches to include a simple yet effective relation-aware feature transformation and its refinement using a context-aware attention mechanism to boost the discriminability of the transformed feature in an end-to-end learning process. Our model is evaluated on eight benchmark datasets consisting of fine-grained objects and human-object interactions. It outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches by a significant margin in recognition accuracy.
summary: Over the past few years, a significant progress has been made in deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs)-based image recognition. This is mainly due to the strong ability of such networks in mining discriminative object pose and parts information from texture and shape. This is often inappropriate for fine-grained visual classification (FGVC) since it exhibits high intra-class and low inter-class variances due to occlusions, deformation, illuminations, etc. Thus, an expressive feature representation describing global structural information is a key to characterize an object/ scene. To this end, we propose a method that effectively captures subtle changes by aggregating context-aware features from most relevant image-regions and their importance in discriminating fine-grained categories avoiding the bounding-box and/or distinguishable part annotations. Our approach is inspired by the recent advancement in self-attention and graph neural networks (GNNs) approaches to include a simple yet effective relation-aware feature transformation and its refinement using a context-aware attention mechanism to boost the discriminability of the transformed feature in an end-to-end learning process. Our model is evaluated on eight benchmark datasets consisting of fine-grained objects and human-object interactions. It outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches by a significant margin in recognition accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的图像识别取得了重大进展。这主要是由于此类网络从纹理和形状中挖掘有判别性的物体姿态和部位信息的强大能力。这通常不适合细粒度视觉分类（FGVC），因为它由于遮挡、变形、照明等而表现出较高的类内差异和较低的类间差异。因此，描述全局结构信息的表达特征表示是表征对象/场景的关键。为此，我们提出了一种方法，通过聚合来自最相关图像区域的上下文感知特征及其在区分细粒度类别中的重要性，避免边界框和/或可区分的部分注释，有效地捕获微妙的变化。我们的方法受到自注意力和图神经网络（GNN）方法最近进展的启发，包括简单而有效的关系感知特征转换，并使用上下文感知注意机制对其进行细化，以提高端到端学习过程中转换特征的可辨别性。我们的模型在由细粒度对象和人与对象交互组成的八个基准数据集上进行评估。它在识别准确性方面明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间关系感知的图神经网络（SR-GNN），用于细粒度图像分类任务，通过捕捉图像区域间的上下文信息提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在细粒度分类中因类内差异小、易受遮挡等因素表现不足，而依赖标注边界框或可区分部分的方法存在灵活性和准确性限制，需更鲁棒的特征表示方法。
AI.method: 设计SR-GNN模型，结合自注意力机制与图神经网络，通过聚合关键图像区域的上下文感知特征并动态调整其重要性权重，无需依赖人工标注的边界框或部分信息。
AI.result: 在包含细粒度物体及人-物交互的8个基准数据集上，该方法在识别准确率上显著超越现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: SR-GNN通过空间关系建模与上下文注意力机制有效提升了细粒度分类的判别能力，验证了其方法在复杂场景下的优越性。

authors_text: Mustafa Yildirim,Sajjad Mozaffari,Luc McCutcheon,Mehrdad Dianati,Alireza Tamaddoni-Nezhad Saber Fallah
title: Prediction Based Decision Making for Autonomous Highway Driving
title_zh: 基于预测的高速公路自动驾驶决策
abstract: Autonomous driving decision-making is a challenging task due to the inherent complexity and uncertainty in traffic. For example, adjacent vehicles may change their lane or overtake at any time to pass a slow vehicle or to help traffic flow. Anticipating the intention of surrounding vehicles, estimating their future states and integrating them into the decision-making process of an automated vehicle can enhance the reliability of autonomous driving in complex driving scenarios. This paper proposes a Prediction-based Deep Reinforcement Learning (PDRL) decision-making model that considers the manoeuvre intentions of surrounding vehicles in the decision-making process for highway driving. The model is trained using real traffic data and tested in various traffic conditions through a simulation platform. The results show that the proposed PDRL model improves the decision-making performance compared to a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) model by decreasing collision numbers, resulting in safer driving.
summary: Autonomous driving decision-making is a challenging task due to the inherent complexity and uncertainty in traffic. For example, adjacent vehicles may change their lane or overtake at any time to pass a slow vehicle or to help traffic flow. Anticipating the intention of surrounding vehicles, estimating their future states and integrating them into the decision-making process of an automated vehicle can enhance the reliability of autonomous driving in complex driving scenarios. This paper proposes a Prediction-based Deep Reinforcement Learning (PDRL) decision-making model that considers the manoeuvre intentions of surrounding vehicles in the decision-making process for highway driving. The model is trained using real traffic data and tested in various traffic conditions through a simulation platform. The results show that the proposed PDRL model improves the decision-making performance compared to a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) model by decreasing collision numbers, resulting in safer driving.
abstract_zh: 由于交通固有的复杂性和不确定性，自动驾驶决策是一项具有挑战性的任务。例如，相邻车辆可以随时改变车道或超车以超越缓慢的车辆或帮助交通畅通。预测周围车辆的意图，估计其未来状态并将其整合到自动驾驶车辆的决策过程中，可以提高复杂驾驶场景下自动驾驶的可靠性。本文提出了一种基于预测的深度强化学习（PDRL）决策模型，在高速公路驾驶决策过程中考虑周围车辆的操纵意图。该模型使用真实交通数据进行训练，并通过模拟平台在各种交通条件下进行测试。结果表明，与深度强化学习（DRL）模型相比，所提出的 PDRL 模型通过减少碰撞次数提高了决策性能，从而实现更安全的驾驶。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预测的深度强化学习（PDRL）决策模型，用于高速公路自动驾驶中的决策制定，通过考虑周围车辆的行驶意图来提升自动驾驶的安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶决策面临交通环境复杂性和不确定性带来的挑战，例如周围车辆可能随时变道或超车。现有方法难以有效预测和应对这些动态变化，导致决策可靠性不足。
AI.method: 提出PDRL模型，结合周围车辆的行驶意图预测与深度强化学习框架，利用真实交通数据训练模型，并通过仿真平台在多种交通场景中进行测试。
AI.result: 实验表明，PDRL模型相比传统深度强化学习（DRL）模型显著减少了碰撞次数，提升了高速公路驾驶场景中的决策性能与安全性。
AI.conclusion: 将周围车辆意图预测融入深度强化学习框架，能够有效增强自动驾驶系统在复杂交通环境中的决策能力，为安全驾驶提供可行方案。

The results show that the proposed PDRL model improves the decision-making performance compared to a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) model by decreasing collision numbers, resulting in safer driving. 由于交通固有的复杂性和不确定性，自动驾驶决策是一项具有挑战性的任务。例如，相邻车辆可以随时改变车道或超车以超越缓慢的车辆或帮助交通畅通。预测周围车辆的意图，估计其未来状态并将其整合到自动驾驶车辆的决策过程中，可以提高复杂驾驶场景下自动驾驶的可靠性。本文提出了一种基于预测的深度强化学习（PDRL）决策模型，在高速公路驾驶决策过程中考虑周围车辆的操纵意图。该模型使用真实交通数据进行训练，并通过模拟平台在各种交通条件下进行测试。结果表明，与深度强化学习（DRL）模型相比，所提出的 PDRL 模型通过减少碰撞次数提高了决策性能，从而实现更安全的驾驶。 本文提出了一种基于预测的深度强化学习（PDRL）决策模型，用于高速公路自动驾驶中的决策制定，通过考虑周围车辆的行驶意图来提升自动驾驶的安全性。 Mustafa Yildirim,Sajjad Mozaffari,Luc McCutcheon,Mehrdad Dianati,Alireza Tamaddoni-Nezhad Saber Fallah cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Digvijay Wadekar,Leander Thiele,J. Colin Hill,Shivam Pandey,Francisco Villaescusa-Navarro,David N. Spergel,Miles Cranmer,Daisuke Nagai,Daniel Anglés-Alcázar,Shirley Ho,Lars Hernquist
title: The SZ flux-mass ($Y$-$M$) relation at low halo masses: improvements with symbolic regression and strong constraints on baryonic feedback
title_zh: 低晕质量下的 SZ 通量-质量 ($Y$-$M$) 关系：符号回归的改进和重子反馈的强约束
comment: Version appearing in MNRAS. Minor change to Fig.6 and added Fig. A5 compared to the previous version. 7+5 pages. The code and data associated with this paper are available at https://github.com/JayWadekar/ScalingRelations_ML
comments: Version appearing in MNRAS. Minor change to Fig.6 and added Fig. A5 compared to the previous version. 7+5 pages. The code and data associated with this paper are available at https://github.com/JayWadekar/ScalingRelations_ML
abstract: Feedback from active galactic nuclei (AGN) and supernovae can affect measurements of integrated SZ flux of halos ($Y_\mathrm{SZ}$) from CMB surveys, and cause its relation with the halo mass ($Y_\mathrm{SZ}-M$) to deviate from the self-similar power-law prediction of the virial theorem. We perform a comprehensive study of such deviations using CAMELS, a suite of hydrodynamic simulations with extensive variations in feedback prescriptions. We use a combination of two machine learning tools (random forest and symbolic regression) to search for analogues of the $Y-M$ relation which are more robust to feedback processes for low masses ($M\lesssim 10^{14}\, h^{-1} \, M_\odot$); we find that simply replacing $Y\rightarrow Y(1+M_*/M_\mathrm{gas})$ in the relation makes it remarkably self-similar. This could serve as a robust multiwavelength mass proxy for low-mass clusters and galaxy groups. Our methodology can also be generally useful to improve the domain of validity of other astrophysical scaling relations. We also forecast that measurements of the $Y-M$ relation could provide percent-level constraints on certain combinations of feedback parameters and/or rule out a major part of the parameter space of supernova and AGN feedback models used in current state-of-the-art hydrodynamic simulations. Our results can be useful for using upcoming SZ surveys (e.g., SO, CMB-S4) and galaxy surveys (e.g., DESI and Rubin) to constrain the nature of baryonic feedback. Finally, we find that the an alternative relation, $Y-M_*$, provides complementary information on feedback than $Y-M$
summary: Feedback from active galactic nuclei (AGN) and supernovae can affect measurements of integrated SZ flux of halos ($Y_\mathrm{SZ}$) from CMB surveys, and cause its relation with the halo mass ($Y_\mathrm{SZ}-M$) to deviate from the self-similar power-law prediction of the virial theorem. We perform a comprehensive study of such deviations using CAMELS, a suite of hydrodynamic simulations with extensive variations in feedback prescriptions. We use a combination of two machine learning tools (random forest and symbolic regression) to search for analogues of the $Y-M$ relation which are more robust to feedback processes for low masses ($M\lesssim 10^{14}\, h^{-1} \, M_\odot$); we find that simply replacing $Y\rightarrow Y(1+M_*/M_\mathrm{gas})$ in the relation makes it remarkably self-similar. This could serve as a robust multiwavelength mass proxy for low-mass clusters and galaxy groups. Our methodology can also be generally useful to improve the domain of validity of other astrophysical scaling relations. We also forecast that measurements of the $Y-M$ relation could provide percent-level constraints on certain combinations of feedback parameters and/or rule out a major part of the parameter space of supernova and AGN feedback models used in current state-of-the-art hydrodynamic simulations. Our results can be useful for using upcoming SZ surveys (e.g., SO, CMB-S4) and galaxy surveys (e.g., DESI and Rubin) to constrain the nature of baryonic feedback. Finally, we find that the an alternative relation, $Y-M_*$, provides complementary information on feedback than $Y-M$
abstract_zh: 来自活动星系核 (AGN) 和超新星的反馈会影响 CMB 巡天对光晕积分 SZ 通量 ($Y_\mathrm{SZ}$) 的测量，并导致其与光晕质量 ($Y_\mathrm{SZ}-M$) 的关系偏离维里定理的自相似幂律预测。我们使用 CAMELS 对此类偏差进行了全面研究，CAMELS 是一套流体动力学模拟，反馈处方存在广泛变化。我们使用两种机器学习工具（随机森林和符号回归）的组合来搜索 $Y-M$ 关系的类似物，这些类似物对于低质量的反馈过程更稳健（$M\lesssim 10^{14}\, h^{-1} \, M_\odot$）；我们发现，简单地替换关系中的 $Y\rightarrow Y(1+M_*/M_\mathrm{gas})$ 就可以使其非常自相似。这可以作为低质量星团和星系团的强大的多波长质量代理。我们的方法通常也可用于改善其他天体物理标度关系的有效性范围。我们还预测，$Y-M$ 关系的测量可以为反馈参数的某些组合提供百分比水平约束和/或排除当前最先进的流体动力学模拟中使用的超新星和 AGN 反馈模型的参数空间的主要部分。我们的结果对于使用即将到来的 SZ 巡天（例如，SO、CMB-S4）和星系巡天（例如，DESI 和 Rubin）来限制重子反馈的性质很有用。最后，我们发现另一种关系 $Y-M_*$ 提供了比 $Y-M$ 更补充的反馈信息

AI.tldr: 研究低质量星系团的SZ通量-质量(Y-M)关系，利用符号回归等方法改进该关系并约束重子反馈效应。
AI.motivation: 现有Y-M关系在低质量星系团中受重子反馈影响显著，需寻找更稳健的参数化形式以提高质量估算精度并限制反馈模型参数。
AI.method: 基于CAMELS模拟套件，结合随机森林和符号回归算法，分析不同反馈机制下Y-M关系的偏差，提出修正公式并验证其稳健性。
AI.result: 发现将Y替换为Y(1+M*/M_gas)可使Y-M关系恢复自相似性，该修正关系可作为低质量系统的稳健质量代理，并能提供百分级精度的反馈参数约束。
AI.conclusion: 提出的修正方法可提升SZ巡天与光谱巡天对重子反馈的约束能力，Y-M*关系可与Y-M关系互补揭示反馈过程特征。

title: A Study on Representation Transfer for Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 小样本学习的表示迁移研究
abstract: Few-shot classification aims to learn to classify new object categories well using only a few labeled examples. Transferring feature representations from other models is a popular approach for solving few-shot classification problems. In this work we perform a systematic study of various feature representations for few-shot classification, including representations learned from MAML, supervised classification, and several common self-supervised tasks. We find that learning from more complex tasks tend to give better representations for few-shot classification, and thus we propose the use of representations learned from multiple tasks for few-shot classification. Coupled with new tricks on feature selection and voting to handle the issue of small sample size, our direct transfer learning method offers performance comparable to state-of-art on several benchmark datasets.
summary: Few-shot classification aims to learn to classify new object categories well using only a few labeled examples. Transferring feature representations from other models is a popular approach for solving few-shot classification problems. In this work we perform a systematic study of various feature representations for few-shot classification, including representations learned from MAML, supervised classification, and several common self-supervised tasks. We find that learning from more complex tasks tend to give better representations for few-shot classification, and thus we propose the use of representations learned from multiple tasks for few-shot classification. Coupled with new tricks on feature selection and voting to handle the issue of small sample size, our direct transfer learning method offers performance comparable to state-of-art on several benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 少样本分类的目的是学习仅使用少量标记的示例来很好地对新的对象类别进行分类。从其他模型转移特征表示是解决小样本分类问题的一种流行方法。在这项工作中，我们对小样本分类的各种特征表示进行了系统研究，包括从 MAML 学习的表示、监督分类和一些常见的自监督任务。我们发现，从更复杂的任务中学习往往可以为少样本分类提供更好的表示，因此我们建议使用从多个任务中学习到的表示来进行少样本分类。结合特征选择和投票的新技巧来处理小样本量的问题，我们的直接迁移学习方法在几个基准数据集上提供了与最新技术相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何通过迁移不同任务的特征表示来提升小样本学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 小样本分类需要有效利用有限的标记数据，而迁移其他模型的特征表示是解决该问题的流行方法，但需系统研究不同表示的效果。
AI.method: 系统分析MAML、监督分类及自监督任务的特征表示，提出使用多任务学习的表示并结合特征选择与投票策略。
AI.result: 直接迁移学习方法在多个基准数据集上表现与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 多任务表示结合特征选择和投票策略能有效提升小样本分类性能，直接迁移方法具有竞争力。

title: Trust in Language Grounding: a new AI challenge for human-robot teams
title_zh: 对语言基础的信任：人类机器人团队面临的新人工智能挑战
abstract: The challenge of language grounding is to fully understand natural language by grounding language in real-world referents. While AI techniques are available, the widespread adoption and effectiveness of such technologies for human-robot teams relies critically on user trust. This survey provides three contributions relating to the newly emerging field of trust in language grounding, including a) an overview of language grounding research in terms of AI technologies, data sets, and user interfaces; b) six hypothesised trust factors relevant to language grounding, which are tested empirically on a human-robot cleaning team; and c) future research directions for trust in language grounding.
summary: The challenge of language grounding is to fully understand natural language by grounding language in real-world referents. While AI techniques are available, the widespread adoption and effectiveness of such technologies for human-robot teams relies critically on user trust. This survey provides three contributions relating to the newly emerging field of trust in language grounding, including a) an overview of language grounding research in terms of AI technologies, data sets, and user interfaces; b) six hypothesised trust factors relevant to language grounding, which are tested empirically on a human-robot cleaning team; and c) future research directions for trust in language grounding.
abstract_zh: 语言基础的挑战是通过将语言扎根于现实世界的所指对象来充分理解自然语言。虽然人工智能技术是可用的，但此类技术在人类机器人团队中的广泛采用和有效性很大程度上取决于用户的信任。这项调查提供了与新兴的语言基础信任领域相关的三项贡献，包括：a）人工智能技术、数据集和用户界面方面的语言基础研究概述； b) 六个与语言基础相关的假设信任因素，这些因素在人机清洁团队中进行了实证测试； c) 语言基础信任的未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在人机团队中，语言grounding技术的有效性依赖于用户信任这一新挑战，提出六个信任因素并验证其影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI语言grounding技术已取得进展，但其在实际人机协作中的应用效果受用户信任制约，而信任相关研究尚未充分展开。
AI.method: 通过文献综述梳理现有技术与数据集，设计六项信任相关假设，并在人机清洁团队中进行实证测试。
AI.result: 验证了六个信任因素对用户信任水平的影响，明确了技术可靠性、透明度等因素的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 信任是语言grounding技术落地的核心障碍，需从系统设计和人机交互层面加强信任机制研究。

search_text: Trust in Language Grounding: a new AI challenge for human-robot teams 对语言基础的信任：人类机器人团队面临的新人工智能挑战 The challenge of language grounding is to fully understand natural language by grounding language in real-world referents. While AI techniques are available, the widespread adoption and effectiveness of such technologies for human-robot teams relies critically on user trust. This survey provides three contributions relating to the newly emerging field of trust in language grounding, including a) an overview of language grounding research in terms of AI technologies, data sets, and user interfaces; b) six hypothesised trust factors relevant to language grounding, which are tested empirically on a human-robot cleaning team; and c) future research directions for trust in language grounding. 语言基础的挑战是通过将语言扎根于现实世界的所指对象来充分理解自然语言。虽然人工智能技术是可用的，但此类技术在人类机器人团队中的广泛采用和有效性很大程度上取决于用户的信任。这项调查提供了与新兴的语言基础信任领域相关的三项贡献，包括：a）人工智能技术、数据集和用户界面方面的语言基础研究概述； b) 六个与语言基础相关的假设信任因素，这些因素在人机清洁团队中进行了实证测试； c) 语言基础信任的未来研究方向。 本文探讨了在人机团队中，语言grounding技术的有效性依赖于用户信任这一新挑战，提出六个信任因素并验证其影响。 David M. authors_text: Chathurika S. Wickramasinghe,Daniel L. Marino,Harindra S. Mavikumbure,Victor Cobilean,Timothy D. Pennington,Benny J. Varghese,Craig Rieger,Milos Manic
title: RX-ADS: Interpretable Anomaly Detection using Adversarial ML for Electric Vehicle CAN data
title_zh: RX-ADS：使用对抗性机器学习对电动汽车 CAN 数据进行可解释的异常检测
abstract: Recent year has brought considerable advancements in Electric Vehicles (EVs) and associated infrastructures/communications. Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) are widely deployed for anomaly detection in such critical infrastructures. This paper presents an Interpretable Anomaly Detection System (RX-ADS) for intrusion detection in CAN protocol communication in EVs. Contributions include: 1) window based feature extraction method; 2) deep Autoencoder based anomaly detection method; and 3) adversarial machine learning based explanation generation methodology. The presented approach was tested on two benchmark CAN datasets: OTIDS and Car Hacking. The anomaly detection performance of RX-ADS was compared against the state-of-the-art approaches on these datasets: HIDS and GIDS. The RX-ADS approach presented performance comparable to the HIDS approach (OTIDS dataset) and has outperformed HIDS and GIDS approaches (Car Hacking dataset). Further, the proposed approach was able to generate explanations for detected abnormal behaviors arising from various intrusions. These explanations were later validated by information used by domain experts to detect anomalies. Other advantages of RX-ADS include: 1) the method can be trained on unlabeled data; 2) explanations help experts in understanding anomalies and root course analysis, and also help with AI model debugging and diagnostics, ultimately improving user trust in AI systems.

abstract_zh: 近年来，电动汽车 (EV) 和相关基础设施/通信取得了长足进步。入侵检测系统 (IDS) 被广泛部署用于此类关键基础设施中的异常检测。本文提出了一种可解释的异常检测系统 (RX-ADS)，用于电动汽车 CAN 协议通信中的入侵检测。贡献包括：1）基于窗口的特征提取方法； 2）基于深度自动编码器的异常检测方法； 3）基于对抗性机器学习的解释生成方法。所提出的方法在两个基准 CAN 数据集上进行了测试：OTIDS 和 Car Hacking。将 RX-ADS 的异常检测性能与这些数据集上最先进的方法进行了比较：HIDS 和 GIDS。 RX-ADS 方法的性能与 HIDS 方法（OTIDS 数据集）相当，并且优于 HIDS 和 GIDS 方法（汽车黑客数据集）。此外，所提出的方法能够为检测到的各种入侵引起的异常行为生成解释。这些解释后来被领域专家用来检测异常的信息所验证。 RX-ADS 的其他优点包括：1）该方法可以在未标记的数据上进行训练； 2）解释帮助专家理解异常和根源分析，也有助于AI模型调试和诊断，最终提高用户对AI系统的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗机器学习的可解释异常检测系统RX-ADS，用于电动汽车CAN总线通信中的入侵检测。
AI.motivation: 随着电动汽车发展，现有入侵检测系统在CAN协议通信中存在可解释性不足的问题，需开发兼具高检测性能与可解释性的方法以提升专家信任度。
AI.method: 采用窗口特征提取、深度自编码器异常检测及对抗机器学习生成解释的三阶段方法，支持无标签数据训练并生成专家可验证的异常解释。
AI.result: 在OTIDS和Car Hacking数据集上，RX-ADS性能与HIDS相当且优于GIDS，在Car Hacking数据集上表现更优，生成的解释经领域专家验证有效。
AI.conclusion: RX-ADS通过可解释性增强提升了AI系统的可信度，为电动汽车通信安全检测提供了有效且透明的解决方案。

authors_text: Yang Nan,Javier Del Ser,Zeyu Tang,Peng Tang,Xiaodan Xing,Yingying Fang,Francisco Herrera,Witold Pedrycz,Simon Walsh,Guang Yang
title: Fuzzy Attention Neural Network to Tackle Discontinuity in Airway Segmentation
title_zh: 模糊注意力神经网络解决气道分割中的不连续性
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, Submitted to IEEE TNNLS
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, Submitted to IEEE TNNLS
abstract: Airway segmentation is crucial for the examination, diagnosis, and prognosis of lung diseases, while its manual delineation is unduly burdensome. To alleviate this time-consuming and potentially subjective manual procedure, researchers have proposed methods to automatically segment airways from computerized tomography (CT) images. However, some small-sized airway branches (e.g., bronchus and terminal bronchioles) significantly aggravate the difficulty of automatic segmentation by machine learning models. In particular, the variance of voxel values and the severe data imbalance in airway branches make the computational module prone to discontinuous and false-negative predictions. especially for cohorts with different lung diseases. Attention mechanism has shown the capacity to segment complex structures, while fuzzy logic can reduce the uncertainty in feature representations. Therefore, the integration of deep attention networks and fuzzy theory, given by the fuzzy attention layer, should be an escalated solution for better generalization and robustness. This paper presents an efficient method for airway segmentation, comprising a novel fuzzy attention neural network and a comprehensive loss function to enhance the spatial continuity of airway segmentation. The deep fuzzy set is formulated by a set of voxels in the feature map and a learnable Gaussian membership function. Different from the existing attention mechanism, the proposed channel-specific fuzzy attention addresses the issue of heterogeneous features in different channels. Furthermore, a novel evaluation metric is proposed to assess both the continuity and completeness of airway structures. The efficiency, generalization and robustness of the proposed method have been proved by training on normal lung disease while testing on datasets of lung cancer, COVID-19 and pulmonary fibrosis.
summary: Airway segmentation is crucial for the examination, diagnosis, and prognosis of lung diseases, while its manual delineation is unduly burdensome. To alleviate this time-consuming and potentially subjective manual procedure, researchers have proposed methods to automatically segment airways from computerized tomography (CT) images. However, some small-sized airway branches (e.g., bronchus and terminal bronchioles) significantly aggravate the difficulty of automatic segmentation by machine learning models. In particular, the variance of voxel values and the severe data imbalance in airway branches make the computational module prone to discontinuous and false-negative predictions. especially for cohorts with different lung diseases. Attention mechanism has shown the capacity to segment complex structures, while fuzzy logic can reduce the uncertainty in feature representations. Therefore, the integration of deep attention networks and fuzzy theory, given by the fuzzy attention layer, should be an escalated solution for better generalization and robustness. This paper presents an efficient method for airway segmentation, comprising a novel fuzzy attention neural network and a comprehensive loss function to enhance the spatial continuity of airway segmentation. The deep fuzzy set is formulated by a set of voxels in the feature map and a learnable Gaussian membership function. Different from the existing attention mechanism, the proposed channel-specific fuzzy attention addresses the issue of heterogeneous features in different channels. Furthermore, a novel evaluation metric is proposed to assess both the continuity and completeness of airway structures. The efficiency, generalization and robustness of the proposed method have been proved by training on normal lung disease while testing on datasets of lung cancer, COVID-19 and pulmonary fibrosis.
abstract_zh: 气道分割对于肺部疾病的检查、诊断和预后至关重要，而其手动勾画过于繁琐。为了减轻这种耗时且可能主观的手动过程，研究人员提出了从计算机断层扫描（CT）图像中自动分割气道的方法。然而，一些小型气道分支（例如支气管和终末细支气管）显着加剧了机器学习模型自动分割的难度。特别是，体素值的方差和气道分支中严重的数据不平衡使得计算模块容易出现不连续和假阴性的预测。特别是对于患有不同肺部疾病的人群。注意力机制已显示出分割复杂结构的能力，而模糊逻辑可以减少特征表示的不确定性。因此，由模糊注意力层给出的深度注意力网络和模糊理论的集成应该是一种升级的解决方案，以获得更好的泛化性和鲁棒性。本文提出了一种有效的气道分割方法，包括新颖的模糊注意神经网络和综合损失函数，以增强气道分割的空间连续性。深度模糊集由特征图中的一组体素和可学习的高斯隶属函数表示。与现有的注意力机制不同，所提出的特定于通道的模糊注意解决了不同通道中异构特征的问题。此外，提出了一种新颖的评估指标来评估气道结构的连续性和完整性。通过对正常肺部疾病的训练以及对肺癌、COVID-19和肺纤维化数据集的测试，证明了所提出方法的效率、泛化性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模糊注意力神经网络，用于解决CT图像中支气管分割的不连续性问题。
AI.motivation: 手动标注支气管结构耗时且主观，现有方法在处理小尺寸支气管分支时易出现不连续和假阴性预测，尤其在不同肺部疾病数据集上表现不稳定。
AI.method: 融合模糊逻辑与注意力机制，设计模糊注意力层和可学习的高斯隶属函数，结合通道特异性特征处理异质性，并引入综合损失函数与新型评估指标。
AI.result: 方法在正常肺部数据集训练后，对肺癌、新冠及肺纤维化数据集的分割任务均表现出高效性、泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 模糊注意力网络有效提升了支气管分割的连续性与完整性，为复杂医学图像分割提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种模糊注意力神经网络，用于解决CT图像中支气管分割的不连续性问题。
ai_content.motivation: 手动标注支气管结构耗时且主观，现有方法在处理小尺寸支气管分支时易出现不连续和假阴性预测，尤其在不同肺部疾病数据集上表现不稳定。
ai_content.method: 融合模糊逻辑与注意力机制，设计模糊注意力层和可学习的高斯隶属函数，结合通道特异性特征处理异质性，并引入综合损失函数与新型评估指标。
ai_content.result: 方法在正常肺部数据集训练后，对肺癌、新冠及肺纤维化数据集的分割任务均表现出高效性、泛化性和鲁棒性。
ai_content.conclusion: 模糊注意力网络有效提升了支气管分割的连续性与完整性，为复杂医学图像分割提供了新思路。

search_text: Fuzzy Attention Neural Network to Tackle Discontinuity in Airway Segmentation 模糊注意力神经网络解决气道分割中的不连续性 Airway segmentation is crucial for the examination, diagnosis, and prognosis of lung diseases, while its manual delineation is unduly burdensome. To alleviate this time-consuming and potentially subjective manual procedure, researchers have proposed methods to automatically segment airways from computerized tomography (CT) images. However, some small-sized airway branches (e.g., bronchus and terminal bronchioles) significantly aggravate the difficulty of automatic segmentation by machine learning models. In particular, the variance of voxel values and the severe data imbalance in airway branches make the computational module prone to discontinuous and false-negative predictions. especially for cohorts with different lung diseases. Attention mechanism has shown the capacity to segment complex structures, while fuzzy logic can reduce the uncertainty in feature representations. Therefore, the integration of deep attention networks and fuzzy theory, given by the fuzzy attention layer, should be an escalated solution for better generalization and robustness. This paper presents an efficient method for airway segmentation, comprising a novel fuzzy attention neural network and a comprehensive loss function to enhance the spatial continuity of airway segmentation. The deep fuzzy set is formulated by a set of voxels in the feature map and a learnable Gaussian membership function. Different from the existing attention mechanism, the proposed channel-specific fuzzy attention addresses the issue of heterogeneous features in different channels. Furthermore, a novel evaluation metric is proposed to assess both the continuity and completeness of airway structures. The efficiency, generalization and robustness of the proposed method have been proved by training on normal lung disease while testing on datasets of lung cancer, COVID-19 and pulmonary fibrosis. 气道分割对于肺部疾病的检查、诊断和预后至关重要，而其手动勾画过于繁琐。为了减轻这种耗时且可能主观的手动过程，研究人员提出了从计算机断层扫描（CT）图像中自动分割气道的方法。然而，一些小型气道分支（例如支气管和终末细支气管）显着加剧了机器学习模型自动分割的难度。特别是，体素值的方差和气道分支中严重的数据不平衡使得计算模块容易出现不连续和假阴性的预测。特别是对于患有不同肺部疾病的人群。注意力机制已显示出分割复杂结构的能力，而模糊逻辑可以减少特征表示的不确定性。因此，由模糊注意力层给出的深度注意力网络和模糊理论的集成应该是一种升级的解决方案，以获得更好的泛化性和鲁棒性。本文提出了一种有效的气道分割方法，包括新颖的模糊注意神经网络和综合损失函数，以增强气道分割的空间连续性。深度模糊集由特征图中的一组体素和可学习的高斯隶属函数表示。与现有的注意力机制不同，所提出的特定于通道的模糊注意解决了不同通道中异构特征的问题。此外，提出了一种新颖的评估指标来评估气道结构的连续性和完整性。通过对正常肺部疾病的训练以及对肺癌、COVID-19和肺纤维化数据集的测试，证明了所提出方法的效率、泛化性和鲁棒性。 本文提出一种模糊注意力神经网络，用于解决CT图像中支气管分割的不连续性问题。 Yang Nan,Javier Del Ser,Zeyu Tang,Peng Tang,Xiaodan Xing,Yingying Fang,Francisco Herrera,Witold Pedrycz,Simon Walsh,Guang Yang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Igor Cherepanov,Alex Ulmer,Jonathan Geraldi Joewono,Jörn Kohlhammer
title: Visualization Of Class Activation Maps To Explain AI Classification Of Network Packet Captures
title_zh: 类激活图的可视化解释网络数据包捕获的 AI 分类
abstract: The classification of internet traffic has become increasingly important due to the rapid growth of today's networks and applications. The number of connections and the addition of new applications in our networks causes a vast amount of log data and complicates the search for common patterns by experts. Finding such patterns among specific classes of applications is necessary to fulfill various requirements in network analytics. Deep learning methods provide both feature extraction and classification from data in a single system. However, these networks are very complex and are used as black-box models, which weakens the experts' trust in the classifications. Moreover, by using them as a black-box, new knowledge cannot be obtained from the model predictions despite their excellent performance. Therefore, the explainability of the classifications is crucial. Besides increasing trust, the explanation can be used for model evaluation gaining new insights from the data and improving the model. In this paper, we present a visual interactive tool that combines the classification of network data with an explanation technique to form an interface between experts, algorithms, and data.
summary: The classification of internet traffic has become increasingly important due to the rapid growth of today's networks and applications. The number of connections and the addition of new applications in our networks causes a vast amount of log data and complicates the search for common patterns by experts. Finding such patterns among specific classes of applications is necessary to fulfill various requirements in network analytics. Deep learning methods provide both feature extraction and classification from data in a single system. However, these networks are very complex and are used as black-box models, which weakens the experts' trust in the classifications. Moreover, by using them as a black-box, new knowledge cannot be obtained from the model predictions despite their excellent performance. Therefore, the explainability of the classifications is crucial. Besides increasing trust, the explanation can be used for model evaluation gaining new insights from the data and improving the model. In this paper, we present a visual interactive tool that combines the classification of network data with an explanation technique to form an interface between experts, algorithms, and data.
abstract_zh: 由于当今网络和应用程序的快速增长，互联网流量的分类变得越来越重要。我们网络中的连接数量和新应用程序的添加导致了大量的日志数据，并使专家对常见模式的搜索变得复杂。为了满足网络分析中的各种要求，有必要在特定类别的应用程序中找到此类模式。深度学习方法在单个系统中提供数据的特征提取和分类。然而，这些网络非常复杂，并且被用作黑盒模型，这削弱了专家对分类的信任。此外，通过将它们用作黑匣子，尽管它们具有出色的性能，但无法从模型预测中获得新知识。因此，分类的可解释性至关重要。除了增加信任之外，该解释还可用于模型评估，从数据中获得新的见解并改进模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种可视化交互工具，它将网络数据的分类与解释技术相结合，以形成专家、算法和数据之间的界面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可视化交互工具，通过类激活映射技术解释AI对网络数据包分类的决策过程，帮助专家理解模型分类依据。
AI.motivation: 网络流量分类面临数据量庞大、模式复杂的问题，而深度学习模型作为黑箱缺乏可解释性，导致专家难以信任结果并获取新知识。
AI.method: 开发结合网络数据分类结果与类激活映射的可视化交互工具，通过高亮关键特征区域实现模型决策过程的可视化解释。
AI.result: 工具使专家能够直观分析AI分类依据，发现数据模式，提升模型可信度并为优化提供新洞察。
AI.conclusion: 可视化解释技术有效增强深度学习模型在网络安全领域的可解释性，促进人机协作实现更精准的网络流量分析。

title: 4Ward: a Relayering Strategy for Efficient Training of Arbitrarily Complex Directed Acyclic Graphs
title_zh: 4Ward：一种高效训练任意复杂有向无环图的中继策略
abstract: Thanks to their ease of implementation, multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) have become ubiquitous in deep learning applications. The graph underlying an MLP is indeed multipartite, i.e. each layer of neurons only connects to neurons belonging to the adjacent layer. In contrast, in vivo brain connectomes at the level of individual synapses suggest that biological neuronal networks are characterized by scale-free degree distributions or exponentially truncated power law strength distributions, hinting at potentially novel avenues for the exploitation of evolution-derived neuronal networks. In this paper, we present ``4Ward'', a method and Python library capable of generating flexible and efficient neural networks (NNs) from arbitrarily complex directed acyclic graphs. 4Ward is inspired by layering algorithms drawn from the graph drawing discipline to implement efficient forward passes, and provides significant time gains in computational experiments with various Erdős-Rényi graphs. 4Ward not only overcomes the sequential nature of the learning matrix method, by parallelizing the computation of activations, but also addresses the scalability issues encountered in the current state-of-the-art and provides the designer with freedom to customize weight initialization and activation functions. Our algorithm can be of aid for any investigator seeking to exploit complex topologies in a NN design framework at the microscale.
summary: Thanks to their ease of implementation, multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) have become ubiquitous in deep learning applications. The graph underlying an MLP is indeed multipartite, i.e. each layer of neurons only connects to neurons belonging to the adjacent layer. In contrast, in vivo brain connectomes at the level of individual synapses suggest that biological neuronal networks are characterized by scale-free degree distributions or exponentially truncated power law strength distributions, hinting at potentially novel avenues for the exploitation of evolution-derived neuronal networks. In this paper, we present ``4Ward'', a method and Python library capable of generating flexible and efficient neural networks (NNs) from arbitrarily complex directed acyclic graphs. 4Ward is inspired by layering algorithms drawn from the graph drawing discipline to implement efficient forward passes, and provides significant time gains in computational experiments with various Erdős-Rényi graphs. 4Ward not only overcomes the sequential nature of the learning matrix method, by parallelizing the computation of activations, but also addresses the scalability issues encountered in the current state-of-the-art and provides the designer with freedom to customize weight initialization and activation functions. Our algorithm can be of aid for any investigator seeking to exploit complex topologies in a NN design framework at the microscale.
abstract_zh: 由于易于实现，多层感知器 (MLP) 在深度学习应用中已变得无处不在。 MLP 背后的图确实是多部分的，即每层神经元仅连接到属于相邻层的神经元。相比之下，个体突触水平的体内大脑连接组表明生物神经元网络具有无标度度分布或指数截断幂律强度分布的特征，暗示了利用进化衍生的神经元网络的潜在新途径。在本文中，我们提出了“4Ward”，一种方法和 Python 库，能够从任意复杂的有向无环图生成灵活高效的神经网络 (NN)。 4Ward 的灵感来自于图形绘制学科中的分层算法，用于实现高效的前向传递，并在各种 Erdős-Rényi 图的计算实验中提供了显着的时间增益。 4Ward 不仅通过并行计算激活来克服学习矩阵方法的顺序性质，而且还解决了当前最先进技术中遇到的可扩展性问题，并为设计者提供了定制权重初始化和激活函数的自由。我们的算法可以为任何寻求在微观尺度的神经网络设计框架中利用复杂拓扑的研究人员提供帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为4Ward的方法和Python库，用于从任意复杂的有向无环图（DAG）中生成高效神经网络。
AI.motivation: 传统多层感知机（MLP）的分层结构与生物神经网络的复杂拓扑存在差异，现有方法难以高效处理复杂DAG结构，需探索更灵活的神经网络设计框架。
AI.method: 基于图绘制领域的分层算法，4Ward通过并行计算激活值、自定义权重初始化和激活函数，实现高效前向传播与可扩展性优化。
AI.result: 在多种Erdős-Rényi图的计算实验中，4Ward显著提升了计算效率，并解决了现有方法的可扩展性问题。
AI.conclusion: 4Ward为微尺度复杂拓扑神经网络设计提供了灵活工具，有助于研究者探索生物启发的网络结构。

conclusion: 4Ward为微尺度复杂拓扑神经网络设计提供了灵活工具，有助于研究者探索生物启发的网络结构。
search_text: 4Ward: a Relayering Strategy for Efficient Training of Arbitrarily Complex Directed Acyclic Graphs 4Ward：一种高效训练任意复杂有向无环图的中继策略 Thanks to their ease of implementation, multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) have become ubiquitous in deep learning applications. The graph underlying an MLP is indeed multipartite, i.e. each layer of neurons only connects to neurons belonging to the adjacent layer. In contrast, in vivo brain connectomes at the level of individual synapses suggest that biological neuronal networks are characterized by scale-free degree distributions or exponentially truncated power law strength distributions, hinting at potentially novel avenues for the exploitation of evolution-derived neuronal networks. In this paper, we present ``4Ward'', a method and Python library capable of generating flexible and efficient neural networks (NNs) from arbitrarily complex directed acyclic graphs. 4Ward is inspired by layering algorithms drawn from the graph drawing discipline to implement efficient forward passes, and provides significant time gains in computational experiments with various Erdős-Rényi graphs. 4Ward not only overcomes the sequential nature of the learning matrix method, by parallelizing the computation of activations, but also addresses the scalability issues encountered in the current state-of-the-art and provides the designer with freedom to customize weight initialization and activation functions. Our algorithm can be of aid for any investigator seeking to exploit complex topologies in a NN design framework at the microscale. 由于易于实现，多层感知器 (MLP) 在深度学习应用中已变得无处不在。 MLP 背后的图确实是多部分的，即每层神经元仅连接到属于相邻层的神经元。相比之下，个体突触水平的体内大脑连接组表明生物神经元网络具有无标度度分布或指数截断幂律强度分布的特征，暗示了利用进化衍生的神经元网络的潜在新途径。在本文中，我们提出了“4Ward”，一种方法和 Python 库，能够从任意复杂的有向无环图生成灵活高效的神经网络 (NN)。 4Ward 的灵感来自于图形绘制学科中的分层算法，用于实现高效的前向传递，并在各种 Erdős-Rényi 图的计算实验中提供了显着的时间增益。 4Ward 不仅通过并行计算激活来克服学习矩阵方法的顺序性质，而且还解决了当前最先进技术中遇到的可扩展性问题，并为设计者提供了定制权重初始化和激活函数的自由。我们的算法可以为任何寻求在微观尺度的神经网络设计框架中利用复杂拓扑的研究人员提供帮助。 本文提出一种名为4Ward的方法和Python库，用于从任意复杂的有向无环图（DAG）中生成高效神经网络。 Tommaso Boccato,Matteo Ferrante,Andrea Duggento,Nicola Toschi cs.NE,cond-mat.dis-nn

title: Fast geometric trim fitting using partial incremental sorting and accumulation
title_zh: 使用部分增量排序和累积的快速几何修剪拟合
abstract: We present an algorithmic contribution to improve the efficiency of robust trim-fitting in outlier affected geometric regression problems. The method heavily relies on the quick sort algorithm, and we present two important insights. First, partial sorting is sufficient for the incremental calculation of the x-th percentile value. Second, the normal equations in linear fitting problems may be updated incrementally by logging swap operations across the x-th percentile boundary during sorting. Besides linear fitting problems, we demonstrate how the technique can be additionally applied to closed-form, non-linear energy minimization problems, thus enabling efficient trim fitting under geometrically optimal objectives. We apply our method to two distinct camera resectioning algorithms, and demonstrate highly efficient and reliable, geometric trim fitting.
summary: We present an algorithmic contribution to improve the efficiency of robust trim-fitting in outlier affected geometric regression problems. The method heavily relies on the quick sort algorithm, and we present two important insights. First, partial sorting is sufficient for the incremental calculation of the x-th percentile value. Second, the normal equations in linear fitting problems may be updated incrementally by logging swap operations across the x-th percentile boundary during sorting. Besides linear fitting problems, we demonstrate how the technique can be additionally applied to closed-form, non-linear energy minimization problems, thus enabling efficient trim fitting under geometrically optimal objectives. We apply our method to two distinct camera resectioning algorithms, and demonstrate highly efficient and reliable, geometric trim fitting.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法贡献，以提高受异常值影响的几何回归问题中鲁棒修剪拟合的效率。该方法在很大程度上依赖于快速排序算法，我们提出了两个重要的见解。首先，部分排序足以增量计算第 x 个百分位值。其次，线性拟合问题中的正规方程可以通过在排序期间记录跨第 x 个百分位数边界的交换操作来增量更新。除了线性拟合问题之外，我们还演示了如何将该技术另外应用于封闭形式的非线性能量最小化问题，从而在几何最佳目标下实现高效的修剪拟合。我们将我们的方法应用于两种不同的相机切除算法，并展示了高效可靠的几何修剪拟合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于部分增量排序和累积的快速几何修剪拟合算法，以提高存在异常值的几何回归问题的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统几何修剪拟合方法在处理异常值时计算效率低，且完全排序操作消耗大量资源，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用快速排序算法，通过部分排序计算百分位数，并在排序过程中记录交换操作以增量更新线性拟合的正规方程，同时扩展至非线性能量最小化问题。
AI.result: 将该方法应用于两种相机重新定位算法，验证了其高效性和可靠性，实现了几何最优目标下的快速修剪拟合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过部分排序和增量更新机制显著提升了几何修剪拟合效率，为线性和非线性优化问题提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Benjamin Billot,Colin Magdamo,You Cheng,Steven E. Arnold,Sudeshna Das,Juan. E. Iglesias
title: Robust machine learning segmentation for large-scale analysis of heterogeneous clinical brain MRI datasets
title_zh: 用于大规模分析异构临床脑部 MRI 数据集的稳健机器学习分割
comment: under review, extension of MICCAI 2022 paper
comments: under review, extension of MICCAI 2022 paper
abstract: Every year, millions of brain MRI scans are acquired in hospitals, which is a figure considerably larger than the size of any research dataset. Therefore, the ability to analyse such scans could transform neuroimaging research. Yet, their potential remains untapped, since no automated algorithm is robust enough to cope with the high variability in clinical acquisitions (MR contrasts, resolutions, orientations, artefacts, subject populations). Here we present SynthSeg+, an AI segmentation suite that enables, for the first time, robust analysis of heterogeneous clinical datasets. In addition to whole-brain segmentation, SynthSeg+ also performs cortical parcellation, intracranial volume estimation, and automated detection of faulty segmentations (mainly caused by scans of very low quality). We demonstrate SynthSeg+ in seven experiments, including an ageing study on 14,000 scans, where it accurately replicates atrophy patterns observed on data of much higher quality. SynthSeg+ is publicly released as a ready-to-use tool to unlock the potential of quantitative morphometry.
summary: Every year, millions of brain MRI scans are acquired in hospitals, which is a figure considerably larger than the size of any research dataset. Therefore, the ability to analyse such scans could transform neuroimaging research. Yet, their potential remains untapped, since no automated algorithm is robust enough to cope with the high variability in clinical acquisitions (MR contrasts, resolutions, orientations, artefacts, subject populations). Here we present SynthSeg+, an AI segmentation suite that enables, for the first time, robust analysis of heterogeneous clinical datasets. In addition to whole-brain segmentation, SynthSeg+ also performs cortical parcellation, intracranial volume estimation, and automated detection of faulty segmentations (mainly caused by scans of very low quality). We demonstrate SynthSeg+ in seven experiments, including an ageing study on 14,000 scans, where it accurately replicates atrophy patterns observed on data of much higher quality. SynthSeg+ is publicly released as a ready-to-use tool to unlock the potential of quantitative morphometry.
abstract_zh: 每年，医院都会采集数百万张脑部 MRI 扫描图像，这个数字远远大于任何研究数据集的大小。因此，分析此类扫描的能力可能会改变神经影像学研究。然而，它们的潜力仍未得到开发，因为没有足够强大的自动化算法来应对临床采集中的高变异性（MR 对比度、分辨率、方向、伪影、受试者群体）。在这里，我们推出 SynthSeg+，这是一款人工智能分割套件，首次能够对异构临床数据集进行稳健分析。除了全脑分割之外，SynthSeg+ 还执行皮质分割、颅内体积估计和错误分割的自动检测（主要是由质量非常低的扫描引起的）。我们在七个实验中展示了 SynthSeg+，其中包括对 14,000 次扫描进行的老化研究，它准确地复制了在更高质量的数据上观察到的萎缩模式。 SynthSeg+ 作为即用型工具公开发布，以释放定量形态测量的潜力。

AI.tldr: 开发SynthSeg+ AI分割工具，用于处理大规模异构临床脑MRI数据集的鲁棒分割分析。
AI.motivation: 临床脑MRI数据存在高变异性（如对比度、分辨率、伪影等），现有算法无法有效处理，限制了其在神经影像研究中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 提出SynthSeg+套件，整合全脑分割、皮层分区、颅内体积估计及低质量扫描检测，通过七组实验验证其鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在14,000例扫描的衰老研究中，SynthSeg+准确复现高质量数据的萎缩模式，证明其对异构数据的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: SynthSeg+作为开源工具释放，可推动大规模临床MRI数据的定量形态学分析，加速神经科学研究进展。

authors_text: Hayato Futami,Hirofumi Inaguma,Masato Mimura,Shinsuke Sakai,Tatsuya Kawahara
title: Distilling the Knowledge of BERT for CTC-based ASR
title_zh: 为基于 CTC 的 ASR 提炼 BERT 知识
abstract: Connectionist temporal classification (CTC) -based models are attractive because of their fast inference in automatic speech recognition (ASR). Language model (LM) integration approaches such as shallow fusion and rescoring can improve the recognition accuracy of CTC-based ASR by taking advantage of the knowledge in text corpora. However, they significantly slow down the inference of CTC. In this study, we propose to distill the knowledge of BERT for CTC-based ASR, extending our previous study for attention-based ASR. CTC-based ASR learns the knowledge of BERT during training and does not use BERT during testing, which maintains the fast inference of CTC. Different from attention-based models, CTC-based models make frame-level predictions, so they need to be aligned with token-level predictions of BERT for distillation. We propose to obtain alignments by calculating the most plausible CTC paths. Experimental evaluations on the Corpus of Spontaneous Japanese (CSJ) and TED-LIUM2 show that our method improves the performance of CTC-based ASR without the cost of inference speed.
summary: Connectionist temporal classification (CTC) -based models are attractive because of their fast inference in automatic speech recognition (ASR). Language model (LM) integration approaches such as shallow fusion and rescoring can improve the recognition accuracy of CTC-based ASR by taking advantage of the knowledge in text corpora. However, they significantly slow down the inference of CTC. In this study, we propose to distill the knowledge of BERT for CTC-based ASR, extending our previous study for attention-based ASR. CTC-based ASR learns the knowledge of BERT during training and does not use BERT during testing, which maintains the fast inference of CTC. Different from attention-based models, CTC-based models make frame-level predictions, so they need to be aligned with token-level predictions of BERT for distillation. We propose to obtain alignments by calculating the most plausible CTC paths. Experimental evaluations on the Corpus of Spontaneous Japanese (CSJ) and TED-LIUM2 show that our method improves the performance of CTC-based ASR without the cost of inference speed.
abstract_zh: 基于联结时间分类 (CTC) 的模型因其在自动语音识别 (ASR) 中的快速推理而颇具吸引力。浅层融合和重新评分等语言模型（LM）集成方法可以利用文本语料库中的知识来提高基于 CTC 的 ASR 的识别精度。然而，它们显着减慢了 CTC 的推理速度。在这项研究中，我们建议将 BERT 的知识提炼为基于 CTC 的 ASR，扩展我们之前针对基于注意力的 ASR 的研究。基于CTC的ASR在训练时学习BERT的知识，在测试时不使用BERT，保持了CTC的快速推理能力。与基于注意力的模型不同，基于CTC的模型进行帧级预测，因此需要与BERT的token级预测对齐进行蒸馏。我们建议通过计算最合理的 CTC 路径来获得对齐。对自发日语语料库（CSJ）和 TED-LIUM2 的实验评估表明，我们的方法在不牺牲推理速度的情况下提高了基于 CTC 的 ASR 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过知识蒸馏将BERT的语言模型知识融入CTC-based ASR系统，以提升识别准确率同时保持快速推理能力。
AI.motivation: CTC-based ASR虽推理速度快，但集成语言模型（如浅层融合或重打分）会显著降低推理速度，而现有方法无法在保持速度的同时提升准确率。
AI.method: 在训练阶段让CTC模型学习BERT的知识，测试时无需BERT；通过计算最可能的CTC路径实现帧级预测与BERT词级预测的对齐，完成知识蒸馏。
AI.result: 在CSJ和TED-LIUM2数据集上实验表明，该方法在不牺牲推理速度的前提下有效提升了CTC-based ASR的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏方法成功将BERT的语言知识迁移至CTC模型，为高效ASR系统提供了兼顾准确率与速度的解决方案。

search_text: Distilling the Knowledge of BERT for CTC-based ASR 为基于 CTC 的 ASR 提炼 BERT 知识 Connectionist temporal classification (CTC) -based models are attractive because of their fast inference in automatic speech recognition (ASR). Language model (LM) integration approaches such as shallow fusion and rescoring can improve the recognition accuracy of CTC-based ASR by taking advantage of the knowledge in text corpora. However, they significantly slow down the inference of CTC. In this study, we propose to distill the knowledge of BERT for CTC-based ASR, extending our previous study for attention-based ASR. CTC-based ASR learns the knowledge of BERT during training and does not use BERT during testing, which maintains the fast inference of CTC. Different from attention-based models, CTC-based models make frame-level predictions, so they need to be aligned with token-level predictions of BERT for distillation. We propose to obtain alignments by calculating the most plausible CTC paths. Experimental evaluations on the Corpus of Spontaneous Japanese (CSJ) and TED-LIUM2 show that our method improves the performance of CTC-based ASR without the cost of inference speed. 基于联结时间分类 (CTC) 的模型因其在自动语音识别 (ASR) 中的快速推理而颇具吸引力。浅层融合和重新评分等语言模型（LM）集成方法可以利用文本语料库中的知识来提高基于 CTC 的 ASR 的识别精度。然而，它们显着减慢了 CTC 的推理速度。在这项研究中，我们建议将 BERT 的知识提炼为基于 CTC 的 ASR，扩展我们之前针对基于注意力的 ASR 的研究。基于CTC的ASR在训练时学习BERT的知识，在测试时不使用BERT，保持了CTC的快速推理能力。与基于注意力的模型不同，基于CTC的模型进行帧级预测，因此需要与BERT的token级预测对齐进行蒸馏。我们建议通过计算最合理的 CTC 路径来获得对齐。对自发日语语料库（CSJ）和 TED-LIUM2 的实验评估表明，我们的方法在不牺牲推理速度的情况下提高了基于 CTC 的 ASR 的性能。 本文提出通过知识蒸馏将BERT的语言模型知识融入CTC-based ASR系统，以提升识别准确率同时保持快速推理能力。 Hayato Futami,Hirofumi Inaguma,Masato Mimura,Shinsuke Sakai,Tatsuya Kawahara cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: When Robotics Meets Wireless Communications: An Introductory Tutorial
title_zh: 当机器人技术遇上无线通信：入门教程
abstract: The importance of ground Mobile Robots (MRs) and Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) within the research community, industry, and society is growing fast. Many of these agents are nowadays equipped with communication systems that are, in some cases, essential to successfully achieve certain tasks. In this context, we have begun to witness the development of a new interdisciplinary research field at the intersection of robotics and communications. This research field has been boosted by the intention of integrating UAVs within the 5G and 6G communication networks. This research will undoubtedly lead to many important applications in the near future. Nevertheless, one of the main obstacles to the development of this research area is that most researchers address these problems by oversimplifying either the robotics or the communications aspect. This impedes the ability of reaching the full potential of this new interdisciplinary research area. In this tutorial, we present some of the modelling tools necessary to address problems involving both robotics and communication from an interdisciplinary perspective. As an illustrative example of such problems, we focus in this tutorial on the issue of communication-aware trajectory planning.
summary: The importance of ground Mobile Robots (MRs) and Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) within the research community, industry, and society is growing fast. Many of these agents are nowadays equipped with communication systems that are, in some cases, essential to successfully achieve certain tasks. In this context, we have begun to witness the development of a new interdisciplinary research field at the intersection of robotics and communications. This research field has been boosted by the intention of integrating UAVs within the 5G and 6G communication networks. This research will undoubtedly lead to many important applications in the near future. Nevertheless, one of the main obstacles to the development of this research area is that most researchers address these problems by oversimplifying either the robotics or the communications aspect. This impedes the ability of reaching the full potential of this new interdisciplinary research area. In this tutorial, we present some of the modelling tools necessary to address problems involving both robotics and communication from an interdisciplinary perspective. As an illustrative example of such problems, we focus in this tutorial on the issue of communication-aware trajectory planning.
abstract_zh: 地面移动机器人 (MR) 和无人机 (UAV) 在研究界、工业界和社会中的重要性正在快速增长。如今，许多代理都配备了通信系统，在某些情况下，这些通信系统对于成功完成某些任务至关重要。在此背景下，我们开始见证机器人与通信交叉领域新的跨学科研究领域的发展。将无人机集成到 5G 和 6G 通信网络中的意图推动了这一研究领域的发展。这项研究无疑将在不久的将来带来许多重要的应用。然而，该研究领域发展的主要障碍之一是大多数研究人员通过过度简化机器人技术或通信方面来解决这些问题。这阻碍了这一新的跨学科研究领域充分发挥潜力的能力。在本教程中，我们从跨学科的角度介绍了一些解决涉及机器人和通信问题所需的建模工具。作为此类问题的说明性示例，我们在本教程中重点关注通信感知轨迹规划问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在介绍机器人与无线通信交叉领域所需的建模工具，重点以通信感知轨迹规划为例，推动跨学科研究发展。
AI.motivation: 当前研究常过度简化机器人或通信某一维度，阻碍了该交叉领域潜力的充分发挥，亟需系统性跨学科方法论支撑。
AI.method: 通过构建跨学科建模框架，整合机器人运动学与通信网络特性，以无人机轨迹规划为案例演示联合优化方法。
AI.result: 提出了面向机器人通信协同问题的分析模型，验证了通信感知轨迹规划在5G/6G网络中的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科融合是突破技术瓶颈的关键，未来需加强通信协议与机器人控制的深度耦合研究以实现实际应用落地。

authors_text: Kristóf Bérczi,Alexander Göke,Lydia Mirabel Mendoza-Cadena,Matthias Mnich
title: Resolving Infeasibility of Linear Systems: A Parameterized Approach
title_zh: 解决线性系统的不可行性：参数化方法
abstract: Deciding feasibility of large systems of linear equations and inequalities is one of the most fundamental algorithmic tasks. However, due to data inaccuracies or modeling errors, in practical applications one often faces linear systems that are infeasible. Extensive theoretical and practical methods have been proposed for post-infeasibility analysis of linear systems. This generally amounts to detecting a feasibility blocker of small size $k$, which is a set of equations and inequalities whose removal or perturbation from the large system of size $m$ yields a feasible system. This motivates a parameterized approach towards post-infeasibility analysis, where we aim to find a feasibility blocker of size at most $k$ in fixed-parameter time $f(k) \cdot m^{O(1)}$. We establish parameterized intractability ($W[1]$- and $NP$-hardness) results already in very restricted settings for different choices of the parameters maximum size of a deletion set, number of positive/negative right-hand sides, treewidth, pathwidth and treedepth. Additionally, we rule out a polynomial compression for MinFB parameterized by the size of a deletion set and the number of negative right-hand sides. Furthermore, we develop fixed-parameter algorithms parameterized by various combinations of these parameters when every row of the system corresponds to a difference constraint. Our algorithms capture the case of Directed Feedback Arc Set, a fundamental parameterized problem whose fixed-parameter tractability was shown by Chen et al. (STOC 2008).
summary: Deciding feasibility of large systems of linear equations and inequalities is one of the most fundamental algorithmic tasks. However, due to data inaccuracies or modeling errors, in practical applications one often faces linear systems that are infeasible. Extensive theoretical and practical methods have been proposed for post-infeasibility analysis of linear systems. This generally amounts to detecting a feasibility blocker of small size $k$, which is a set of equations and inequalities whose removal or perturbation from the large system of size $m$ yields a feasible system. This motivates a parameterized approach towards post-infeasibility analysis, where we aim to find a feasibility blocker of size at most $k$ in fixed-parameter time $f(k) \cdot m^{O(1)}$. We establish parameterized intractability ($W[1]$- and $NP$-hardness) results already in very restricted settings for different choices of the parameters maximum size of a deletion set, number of positive/negative right-hand sides, treewidth, pathwidth and treedepth. Additionally, we rule out a polynomial compression for MinFB parameterized by the size of a deletion set and the number of negative right-hand sides. Furthermore, we develop fixed-parameter algorithms parameterized by various combinations of these parameters when every row of the system corresponds to a difference constraint. Our algorithms capture the case of Directed Feedback Arc Set, a fundamental parameterized problem whose fixed-parameter tractability was shown by Chen et al. (STOC 2008).
abstract_zh: 确定大型线性方程组和不等式组的可行性是最基本的算法任务之一。然而，由于数据不准确或建模错误，在实际应用中常常面临线性系统不可行的情况。对于线性系统的后不可行性分析，人们提出了广泛的理论和实践方法。这通常相当于检测小尺寸 $k$ 的可行性阻碍因素，它是一组方程和不等式，将其从尺寸 $m$ 的大型系统中移除或扰动会产生一个可行的系统。这激发了对后不可行性分析的参数化方法，我们的目标是在固定参数时间 $f(k) \cdot m^{O(1)}$ 内找到大小最多为 $k$ 的可行性阻碍因素。我们建立了参数化的难处理性（$W[1]$- 和 $NP$-hardness）结果，这些结果已经在非常有限的设置中针对删除集的参数最大大小、正/负右侧的数量、树宽、路径宽度和树深的不同选择。此外，我们排除了 MinFB 的多项式压缩，该多项式压缩由删除集的大小和负右侧的数量来参数化。此外，当系统的每一行对应于差异约束时，我们开发了由这些参数的各种组合参数化的固定参数算法。我们的算法捕获了定向反馈弧集的情况，这是一个基本的参数化问题，其固定参数的易处理性已由 Chen 等人证明。 （STOC 2008）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过参数化方法解决线性系统不可行性问题，旨在找到使系统可行的小规模约束删除集。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中线性系统常因数据误差或建模错误而不可行，需检测并移除少量约束以恢复可行性，这对参数化算法设计具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用参数化复杂度分析，结合树宽、路径宽等参数，证明问题的理论难度，并针对差分约束系统设计固定参数算法。
AI.result: 证明了在多种参数设置下问题的W[1]和NP难性，排除了多项式压缩可能性，并为差分约束系统开发了固定参数算法。
AI.conclusion: 尽管问题在一般情况下难以处理，但通过参数化方法在特定约束条件下（如差分约束）可实现固定参数可解性，拓展了参数化算法的应用边界。
