search_text: Resolving Infeasibility of Linear Systems: A Parameterized Approach 解决线性系统的不可行性：参数化方法 Deciding feasibility of large systems of linear equations and inequalities is one of the most fundamental algorithmic tasks. However, due to data inaccuracies or modeling errors, in practical applications one often faces linear systems that are infeasible. Extensive theoretical and practical methods have been proposed for post-infeasibility analysis of linear systems. This generally amounts to detecting a feasibility blocker of small size $k$, which is a set of equations and inequalities whose removal or perturbation from the large system of size $m$ yields a feasible system. This motivates a parameterized approach towards post-infeasibility analysis, where we aim to find a feasibility blocker of size at most $k$ in fixed-parameter time $f(k) \cdot m^{O(1)}$. We establish parameterized intractability ($W[1]$- and $NP$-hardness) results already in very restricted settings for different choices of the parameters maximum size of a deletion set, number of positive/negative right-hand sides, treewidth, pathwidth and treedepth. Additionally, we rule out a polynomial compression for MinFB parameterized by the size of a deletion set and the number of negative right-hand sides. Furthermore, we develop fixed-parameter algorithms parameterized by various combinations of these parameters when every row of the system corresponds to a difference constraint. Our algorithms capture the case of Directed Feedback Arc Set, a fundamental parameterized problem whose fixed-parameter tractability was shown by Chen et al. (STOC 2008). 确定大型线性方程组和不等式组的可行性是最基本的算法任务之一。然而，由于数据不准确或建模错误，在实际应用中常常面临线性系统不可行的情况。对于线性系统的后不可行性分析，人们提出了广泛的理论和实践方法。这通常相当于检测小尺寸 $k$ 的可行性阻碍因素，它是一组方程和不等式，将其从尺寸 $m$ 的大型系统中移除或扰动会产生一个可行的系统。这激发了对后不可行性分析的参数化方法，我们的目标是在固定参数时间 $f(k) \cdot m^{O(1)}$ 内找到大小最多为 $k$ 的可行性阻碍因素。我们建立了参数化的难处理性（$W[1]$- 和 $NP$-hardness）结果，这些结果已经在非常有限的设置中针对删除集的参数最大大小、正/负右侧的数量、树宽、路径宽度和树深的不同选择。此外，我们排除了 MinFB 的多项式压缩，该多项式压缩由删除集的大小和负右侧的数量来参数化。此外，当系统的每一行对应于差异约束时，我们开发了由这些参数的各种组合参数化的固定参数算法。我们的算法捕获了定向反馈弧集的情况，这是一个基本的参数化问题，其固定参数的易处理性已由 Chen 等人证明。 （STOC 2008）。 本文研究了通过参数化方法解决线性系统不可行性问题，旨在找到使系统可行的小规模约束删除集。 Kristóf Bérczi,Alexander Göke,Lydia Mirabel Mendoza-Cadena,Matthias Mnich cs.DS

title: On the Origins of Self-Modeling
title_zh: 论自我塑造的起源
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1910.01994
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1910.01994
abstract: Self-Modeling is the process by which an agent, such as an animal or machine, learns to create a predictive model of its own dynamics. Once captured, this self-model can then allow the agent to plan and evaluate various potential behaviors internally using the self-model, rather than using costly physical experimentation. Here, we quantify the benefits of such self-modeling against the complexity of the robot. We find a R2 =0.90 correlation between the number of degrees of freedom a robot has, and the added value of self-modeling as compared to a direct learning baseline. This result may help motivate self modeling in increasingly complex robotic systems, as well as shed light on the origins of self-modeling, and ultimately self-awareness, in animals and humans.
summary: Self-Modeling is the process by which an agent, such as an animal or machine, learns to create a predictive model of its own dynamics. Once captured, this self-model can then allow the agent to plan and evaluate various potential behaviors internally using the self-model, rather than using costly physical experimentation. Here, we quantify the benefits of such self-modeling against the complexity of the robot. We find a R2 =0.90 correlation between the number of degrees of freedom a robot has, and the added value of self-modeling as compared to a direct learning baseline. This result may help motivate self modeling in increasingly complex robotic systems, as well as shed light on the origins of self-modeling, and ultimately self-awareness, in animals and humans.
abstract_zh: 自我建模是一个代理（例如动物或机器）学习创建其自身动态的预测模型的过程。一旦捕获，该自我模型就可以允许代理使用自我模型在内部规划和评估各种潜在行为，而不是使用昂贵的物理实验。在这里，我们根据机器人的复杂性量化了这种自我建模的好处。我们发现，与直接学习基线相比，机器人的自由度数与自我建模的附加值之间存在 R2 = 0.90 的相关性。这一结果可能有助于激发日益复杂的机器人系统中的自我建模，并揭示动物和人类自我建模以及最终自我意识的起源。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自建模在机器人系统中的作用，并量化了其与系统复杂度之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 探讨自建模对复杂机器人系统的潜在价值，并揭示其在生物体中可能的演化起源。
AI.method: 通过比较不同自由度机器人的实验数据，量化自建模相对于直接学习方法的性能提升并计算相关性。
AI.result: 发现机器人自由度数量与自建模附加值之间存在R²=0.90的强相关性。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持在复杂机器人系统中采用自建模技术，并为理解生物体自我意识的起源提供理论依据。

authors_text: Qingjie Meng,Wenjia Bai,Tianrui Liu,Declan P O'Regan,Daniel Rueckert
title: Mesh-based 3D Motion Tracking in Cardiac MRI using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习在心脏 MRI 中进行基于网格的 3D 运动跟踪
abstract: 3D motion estimation from cine cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) images is important for the assessment of cardiac function and diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. Most of the previous methods focus on estimating pixel-/voxel-wise motion fields in the full image space, which ignore the fact that motion estimation is mainly relevant and useful within the object of interest, e.g., the heart. In this work, we model the heart as a 3D geometric mesh and propose a novel deep learning-based method that can estimate 3D motion of the heart mesh from 2D short- and long-axis CMR images. By developing a differentiable mesh-to-image rasterizer, the method is able to leverage the anatomical shape information from 2D multi-view CMR images for 3D motion estimation. The differentiability of the rasterizer enables us to train the method end-to-end. One advantage of the proposed method is that by tracking the motion of each vertex, it is able to keep the vertex correspondence of 3D meshes between time frames, which is important for quantitative assessment of the cardiac function on the mesh. We evaluate the proposed method on CMR images acquired from the UK Biobank study. Experimental results show that the proposed method quantitatively and qualitatively outperforms both conventional and learning-based cardiac motion tracking methods.
summary: 3D motion estimation from cine cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) images is important for the assessment of cardiac function and diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. Most of the previous methods focus on estimating pixel-/voxel-wise motion fields in the full image space, which ignore the fact that motion estimation is mainly relevant and useful within the object of interest, e.g., the heart. In this work, we model the heart as a 3D geometric mesh and propose a novel deep learning-based method that can estimate 3D motion of the heart mesh from 2D short- and long-axis CMR images. By developing a differentiable mesh-to-image rasterizer, the method is able to leverage the anatomical shape information from 2D multi-view CMR images for 3D motion estimation. The differentiability of the rasterizer enables us to train the method end-to-end. One advantage of the proposed method is that by tracking the motion of each vertex, it is able to keep the vertex correspondence of 3D meshes between time frames, which is important for quantitative assessment of the cardiac function on the mesh. We evaluate the proposed method on CMR images acquired from the UK Biobank study. Experimental results show that the proposed method quantitatively and qualitatively outperforms both conventional and learning-based cardiac motion tracking methods.
abstract_zh: 电影心脏磁共振 (CMR) 图像的 3D 运动估计对于评估心脏功能和诊断心血管疾病非常重要。以前的大多数方法都集中于估计整个图像空间中的像素/体素运动场，而忽略了运动估计主要在感兴趣的对象（例如心脏）内相关和有用的事实。在这项工作中，我们将心脏建模为 3D 几何网格，并提出了一种基于深度学习的新颖方法，可以根据 2D 短轴和长轴 CMR 图像估计心脏网格的 3D 运动。通过开发可微的网格到图像光栅化器，该方法能够利用 2D 多视图 CMR 图像的解剖形状信息进行 3D 运动估计。光栅化器的可微性使我们能够端到端地训练该方法。该方法的优点之一是通过跟踪每个顶点的运动，能够保持时间帧之间 3D 网格的顶点对应关系，这对于定量评估网格上的心脏功能非常重要。我们对从英国生物银行研究中获取的 CMR 图像评估了所提出的方法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在数量和质量上都优于传统的和基于学习的心脏运动跟踪方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的网格模型方法，用于从2D心脏MRI图像中估计心脏的3D运动。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在全图像空间估计像素/体素级运动场，忽略了心脏作为目标物体的运动相关性，导致跟踪精度不足。
AI.method: 将心脏建模为3D网格，开发可微分的网格到图像光栅化器，通过端到端训练利用多视角2D CMR图像的解剖形状信息估计网格顶点运动。
AI.result: 在UK Biobank数据集上的实验表明，该方法在定量和定性评估中均优于传统及现有基于学习的心脏运动跟踪方法。
AI.conclusion: 网格顶点对应关系保持能力提升了心脏功能的定量评估，证明了基于网格的3D运动估计在心脏MRI中的有效性。

authors_text: Alpha Renner,Lazar Supic,Andreea Danielescu,Giacomo Indiveri,E. Paxon Frady,Friedrich T. Sommer,Yulia Sandamirskaya
title: Visual Odometry with Neuromorphic Resonator Networks
title_zh: 使用神经形态谐振器网络的视觉里程计
comment: 19 pages, 5 figures, minor revisions, added results for shapes_translation dataset
comments: 19 pages, 5 figures, minor revisions, added results for shapes_translation dataset
abstract: Visual Odometry (VO) is a method to estimate self-motion of a mobile robot using visual sensors. Unlike odometry based on integrating differential measurements that can accumulate errors, such as inertial sensors or wheel encoders, visual odometry is not compromised by drift. However, image-based VO is computationally demanding, limiting its application in use cases with low-latency, -memory, and -energy requirements. Neuromorphic hardware offers low-power solutions to many vision and AI problems, but designing such solutions is complicated and often has to be assembled from scratch. Here we propose to use Vector Symbolic Architecture (VSA) as an abstraction layer to design algorithms compatible with neuromorphic hardware. Building from a VSA model for scene analysis, described in our companion paper, we present a modular neuromorphic algorithm that achieves state-of-the-art performance on two-dimensional VO tasks. Specifically, the proposed algorithm stores and updates a working memory of the presented visual environment. Based on this working memory, a resonator network estimates the changing location and orientation of the camera. We experimentally validate the neuromorphic VSA-based approach to VO with two benchmarks: one based on an event camera dataset and the other in a dynamic scene with a robotic task.
summary: Visual Odometry (VO) is a method to estimate self-motion of a mobile robot using visual sensors. Unlike odometry based on integrating differential measurements that can accumulate errors, such as inertial sensors or wheel encoders, visual odometry is not compromised by drift. However, image-based VO is computationally demanding, limiting its application in use cases with low-latency, -memory, and -energy requirements. Neuromorphic hardware offers low-power solutions to many vision and AI problems, but designing such solutions is complicated and often has to be assembled from scratch. Here we propose to use Vector Symbolic Architecture (VSA) as an abstraction layer to design algorithms compatible with neuromorphic hardware. Building from a VSA model for scene analysis, described in our companion paper, we present a modular neuromorphic algorithm that achieves state-of-the-art performance on two-dimensional VO tasks. Specifically, the proposed algorithm stores and updates a working memory of the presented visual environment. Based on this working memory, a resonator network estimates the changing location and orientation of the camera. We experimentally validate the neuromorphic VSA-based approach to VO with two benchmarks: one based on an event camera dataset and the other in a dynamic scene with a robotic task.
abstract_zh: 视觉里程计（VO）是一种使用视觉传感器估计移动机器人自身运动的方法。与基于集成差分测量的里程计（例如惯性传感器或车轮编码器）不同，视觉里程计不会因漂移而受到影响。然而，基于图像的 VO 计算要求较高，限制了其在低延迟、内存和能量需求的用例中的应用。神经形态硬件为许多视觉和人工智能问题提供了低功耗解决方案，但设计此类解决方案很复杂，并且通常必须从头开始组装。在这里，我们建议使用矢量符号架构（VSA）作为抽象层来设计与神经形态硬件兼容的算法。根据我们的配套论文中描述的用于场景分析的 VSA 模型构建，我们提出了一种模块化神经形态算法，该算法在二维 VO 任务上实现了最先进的性能。具体来说，所提出的算法存储并更新所呈现的视觉环境的工作记忆。根据该工作记忆，谐振器网络估计相机不断变化的位置和方向。我们通过两个基准实验验证基于神经拟态 VSA 的 VO 方法：一个基于事件相机数据集，另一个基于机器人任务的动态场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经形态共振网络的视觉里程计方法，以实现低功耗、低延迟的视觉里程计任务。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉里程计计算复杂，难以满足低延迟、低内存和低能耗需求，而神经形态硬件虽具潜力，但设计复杂，缺乏通用框架。
AI.method: 本文采用向量符号架构（VSA）作为抽象层，设计与神经形态硬件兼容的算法，利用工作记忆存储和更新视觉环境信息，并通过共振网络估计相机的位置和方向。
AI.result: 该方法在两个基准测试中均达到最先进的性能，包括基于事件相机数据集和动态场景中的机器人任务。
AI.conclusion: 基于VSA的神经形态视觉里程计方法在低功耗和高性能方面具有显著优势，为未来视觉里程计应用提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: F. Meng,S. -Y. Lee,O. Zografos,M. Gupta,V. D. Nguyen,G. De Micheli,S. Cotofana,I. Asselberghs,C. Adelmann,G. Sankar Kar,S. Couet,F. Ciubotaru
title: Perspectives and Challenges of Scaled Boolean Spintronic Circuits Based on Magnetic Tunnel Junction Transducers
title_zh: 基于磁隧道结传感器的缩放布尔自旋电子电路的前景和挑战
comment: This work was supported by imec Industrial Affiliation Program on Exploratory Logic Devices. It has also received funding from the European Union Horizon Europe research and innovation programme within the project SPIDER under grant agreement No 101070417
comments: This work was supported by imec Industrial Affiliation Program on Exploratory Logic Devices. It has also received funding from the European Union Horizon Europe research and innovation programme within the project SPIDER under grant agreement No 101070417
abstract: This paper addresses the question: Can spintronic circuits based on Magnetic Tunnel Junction (MTJ) transducers outperform their state-of-the-art CMOS counterparts? To this end, we use the EPFL combinational benchmark sets, synthesize them in 7 nm CMOS and in MTJ-based spintronic technologies, and compare the two implementation methods in terms of Energy-Delay-Product (EDP). To fully utilize the technologies potential, CMOS and spintronic implementations are built upon standard Boolean and Majority Gates, respectively. For the spintronic circuits, we assumed that domain conversion (electric/magnetic to magnetic/electric) is performed by means of MTJs and the computation is accomplished by domain wall based majority gates, and considered two EDP estimation scenarios: (i) Uniform Benchmarking, which ignores the circuit's internal structure and only includes domain transducers power and delay contributions into the calculations, and (ii) Majority-Inverter-Graph Benchmarking, which also embeds the circuit structure, the associated critical path delay and energy consumption by DW propagation. Our results indicate that for the uniform case, the spintronic route is better suited for the implementation of complex circuits with few inputs and outputs. On the other hand, when the circuit structure is also considered via majority and inverter synthesis, our analysis clearly indicates that in order to match and eventually outperform CMOS performance, MTJ efficiency has to be improved by 3-4 orders of magnitude. While it is clear that for the time being the MTJ-based-spintronic way cannot compete with CMOS, further transducer developments may tip the balance, which, when combined with information non-volatility, may make spintronic implementation for certain applications that require a large number of calculations and have a rather limited amount of interaction with the environment.
summary: This paper addresses the question: Can spintronic circuits based on Magnetic Tunnel Junction (MTJ) transducers outperform their state-of-the-art CMOS counterparts? To this end, we use the EPFL combinational benchmark sets, synthesize them in 7 nm CMOS and in MTJ-based spintronic technologies, and compare the two implementation methods in terms of Energy-Delay-Product (EDP). To fully utilize the technologies potential, CMOS and spintronic implementations are built upon standard Boolean and Majority Gates, respectively. For the spintronic circuits, we assumed that domain conversion (electric/magnetic to magnetic/electric) is performed by means of MTJs and the computation is accomplished by domain wall based majority gates, and considered two EDP estimation scenarios: (i) Uniform Benchmarking, which ignores the circuit's internal structure and only includes domain transducers power and delay contributions into the calculations, and (ii) Majority-Inverter-Graph Benchmarking, which also embeds the circuit structure, the associated critical path delay and energy consumption by DW propagation. Our results indicate that for the uniform case, the spintronic route is better suited for the implementation of complex circuits with few inputs and outputs. On the other hand, when the circuit structure is also considered via majority and inverter synthesis, our analysis clearly indicates that in order to match and eventually outperform CMOS performance, MTJ efficiency has to be improved by 3-4 orders of magnitude. While it is clear that for the time being the MTJ-based-spintronic way cannot compete with CMOS, further transducer developments may tip the balance, which, when combined with information non-volatility, may make spintronic implementation for certain applications that require a large number of calculations and have a rather limited amount of interaction with the environment.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了以下问题：基于磁隧道结 (MTJ) 传感器的自旋电子电路能否超越最先进的 CMOS 同类器件？为此，我们使用 EPFL 组合基准集，在 7 nm CMOS 和基于 MTJ 的自旋电子技术中综合它们，并在能量延迟积 (EDP) 方面比较两种实现方法。为了充分利用技术潜力，CMOS 和自旋电子实现分别基于标准布尔门和多数门。对于自旋电子电路，我们假设域转换（电/磁到磁/电）是通过 MTJ 执行的，计算是通过基于畴壁的多数门完成的，并考虑了两种 EDP 估计场景：(i) 统一基准，它忽略电路的内部结构，只包括域传感器功率和延迟贡献到计算中，以及 (ii) 多数逆变器图基准，它还嵌入电路结构、相关的关键路径延迟和能量DW 传播的消耗。我们的结果表明，对于均匀情况，自旋电子路线更适合于实现具有少量输入和输出的复杂电路。另一方面，当电路结构也通过多数和反相器综合来考虑时，我们的分析清楚地表明，为了匹配并最终超越 CMOS 性能，MTJ 效率必须提高 3-4 个数量级。虽然目前基于 MTJ 的自旋电子方式显然无法与 CMOS 竞争，但传感器的进一步发展可能会打破平衡，当与信息非易失性相结合时，可能会使自旋电子方式适用于需要大量计算且与环境交互量相当有限的某些应用。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了基于磁隧道结（MTJ）的自旋电子电路与7纳米CMOS技术在能延积（EDP）方面的性能，探讨其能否超越现有CMOS技术。
AI.motivation: 随着计算需求的增长，传统CMOS面临能效瓶颈，而自旋电子器件（如MTJ）因其非易失性和潜在低功耗特性成为研究热点，需验证其实际应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用EPFL组合逻辑基准电路集，分别在7纳米CMOS和MTJ自旋电子技术中实现并对比EDP。通过两种基准场景：忽略内部结构的均匀基准法和考虑多数门/反相器结构的路径延迟与能耗的 Majority-Inverter-Graph 基准法。
AI.result: 均匀基准下，自旋电子电路适合实现复杂但输入输出较少的电路；而考虑结构后，需将MTJ效率提升3-4个数量级才能匹配CMOS性能。当前MTJ技术尚无法超越CMOS。
AI.conclusion: 尽管当前MTJ自旋电子技术无法替代CMOS，但若实现高效能MTJ并结合非易失性优势，可能在需要大量计算且环境交互有限的应用中具备竞争力。

Our results indicate that for the uniform case, the spintronic route is better suited for the implementation of complex circuits with few inputs and outputs. On the other hand, when the circuit structure is also considered via majority and inverter synthesis, our analysis clearly indicates that in order to match and eventually outperform CMOS performance, MTJ efficiency has to be improved by 3-4 orders of magnitude. While it is clear that for the time being the MTJ-based-spintronic way cannot compete with CMOS, further transducer developments may tip the balance, which, when combined with information non-volatility, may make spintronic implementation for certain applications that require a large number of calculations and have a rather limited amount of interaction with the environment. 本文解决了以下问题：基于磁隧道结 (MTJ) 传感器的自旋电子电路能否超越最先进的 CMOS 同类器件？为此，我们使用 EPFL 组合基准集，在 7 nm CMOS 和基于 MTJ 的自旋电子技术中综合它们，并在能量延迟积 (EDP) 方面比较两种实现方法。为了充分利用技术潜力，CMOS 和自旋电子实现分别基于标准布尔门和多数门。对于自旋电子电路，我们假设域转换（电/磁到磁/电）是通过 MTJ 执行的，计算是通过基于畴壁的多数门完成的，并考虑了两种 EDP 估计场景：(i) 统一基准，它忽略电路的内部结构，只包括域传感器功率和延迟贡献到计算中，以及 (ii) 多数逆变器图基准，它还嵌入电路结构、相关的关键路径延迟和能量DW 传播的消耗。我们的结果表明，对于均匀情况，自旋电子路线更适合于实现具有少量输入和输出的复杂电路。另一方面，当电路结构也通过多数和反相器综合来考虑时，我们的分析清楚地表明，为了匹配并最终超越 CMOS 性能，MTJ 效率必须提高 3-4 个数量级。虽然目前基于 MTJ 的自旋电子方式显然无法与 CMOS 竞争，但传感器的进一步发展可能会打破平衡，当与信息非易失性相结合时，可能会使自旋电子方式适用于需要大量计算且与环境交互量相当有限的某些应用。 本文比较了基于磁隧道结（MTJ）的自旋电子电路与7纳米CMOS技术在能延积（EDP）方面的性能，探讨其能否超越现有CMOS技术。 F. Meng,S. -Y. Lee,O. Zografos,M. Gupta,V. D. Nguyen,G. De Micheli,S. Cotofana,I. Asselberghs,C. Adelmann,G. Sankar Kar,S. Couet,F. Ciubotaru physics.app-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Peining Zhang,Junliang Guo,Linli Xu,Mu You,Junming Yin
title: Bridging Music and Text with Crowdsourced Music Comments: A Sequence-to-Sequence Framework for Thematic Music Comments Generation
title_zh: 通过众包音乐评论连接音乐和文本：主题音乐评论生成的序列到序列框架
abstract: We consider a novel task of automatically generating text descriptions of music. Compared with other well-established text generation tasks such as image caption, the scarcity of well-paired music and text datasets makes it a much more challenging task. In this paper, we exploit the crowd-sourced music comments to construct a new dataset and propose a sequence-to-sequence model to generate text descriptions of music. More concretely, we use the dilated convolutional layer as the basic component of the encoder and a memory based recurrent neural network as the decoder. To enhance the authenticity and thematicity of generated texts, we further propose to fine-tune the model with a discriminator as well as a novel topic evaluator. To measure the quality of generated texts, we also propose two new evaluation metrics, which are more aligned with human evaluation than traditional metrics such as BLEU. Experimental results verify that our model is capable of generating fluent and meaningful comments while containing thematic and content information of the original music.
summary: We consider a novel task of automatically generating text descriptions of music. Compared with other well-established text generation tasks such as image caption, the scarcity of well-paired music and text datasets makes it a much more challenging task. In this paper, we exploit the crowd-sourced music comments to construct a new dataset and propose a sequence-to-sequence model to generate text descriptions of music. More concretely, we use the dilated convolutional layer as the basic component of the encoder and a memory based recurrent neural network as the decoder. To enhance the authenticity and thematicity of generated texts, we further propose to fine-tune the model with a discriminator as well as a novel topic evaluator. To measure the quality of generated texts, we also propose two new evaluation metrics, which are more aligned with human evaluation than traditional metrics such as BLEU. Experimental results verify that our model is capable of generating fluent and meaningful comments while containing thematic and content information of the original music.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一项自动生成音乐文本描述的新颖任务。与其他成熟的文本生成任务（例如图像标题）相比，缺乏匹配的音乐和文本数据集使其成为一项更具挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们利用众包音乐评论来构建新的数据集，并提出一种序列到序列模型来生成音乐的文本描述。更具体地说，我们使用扩张卷积层作为编码器的基本组件，使用基于记忆的循环神经网络作为解码器。为了增强生成文本的真实性和主题性，我们进一步建议使用鉴别器和新颖的主题评估器对模型进行微调。为了衡量生成文本的质量，我们还提出了两个新的评估指标，它们比 BLEU 等传统指标更符合人类评估。实验结果验证了我们的模型能够生成流畅且有意义的评论，同时包含原始音乐的主题和内容信息。

AI.tldr: 自动为音乐生成具有主题性和内容信息的文本描述
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏高质量的音乐-文本配对数据集，自动音乐描述生成任务更具挑战性
AI.method: 采用扩张卷积编码器、基于记忆的RNN解码器，并结合判别器和主题评估器进行微调，提出两种新评估指标
AI.result: 模型能够生成流畅、有意义且包含原始音乐主题和内容信息的评论
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型和评估指标在生成质量和主题相关性上优于传统方法

authors_text: Zhi Chen,Yadan Luo,Sen Wang,Jingjing Li,Zi Huang
title: Federated Zero-Shot Learning for Visual Recognition
title_zh: 用于视觉识别的联合零样本学习
abstract: Zero-shot learning is a learning regime that recognizes unseen classes by generalizing the visual-semantic relationship learned from the seen classes. To obtain an effective ZSL model, one may resort to curating training samples from multiple sources, which may inevitably raise the privacy concerns about data sharing across different organizations. In this paper, we propose a novel Federated Zero-Shot Learning FedZSL framework, which learns a central model from the decentralized data residing on edge devices. To better generalize to previously unseen classes, FedZSL allows the training data on each device sampled from the non-overlapping classes, which are far from the i.i.d. that traditional federated learning commonly assumes. We identify two key challenges in our FedZSL protocol: 1) the trained models are prone to be biased to the locally observed classes, thus failing to generalize to the unseen classes and/or seen classes appeared on other devices; 2) as each category in the training data comes from a single source, the central model is highly vulnerable to model replacement (backdoor) attacks. To address these issues, we propose three local objectives for visual-semantic alignment and cross-device alignment through relation distillation, which leverages the normalized class-wise covariance to regularize the consistency of the prediction logits across devices. To defend against the backdoor attacks, a feature magnitude defending technique is proposed. As malicious samples are less correlated to the given semantic attributes, the visual features of low magnitude will be discarded to stabilize model updates. The effectiveness and robustness of FedZSL are demonstrated by extensive experiments conducted on three zero-shot benchmark datasets.
summary: Zero-shot learning is a learning regime that recognizes unseen classes by generalizing the visual-semantic relationship learned from the seen classes. To obtain an effective ZSL model, one may resort to curating training samples from multiple sources, which may inevitably raise the privacy concerns about data sharing across different organizations. In this paper, we propose a novel Federated Zero-Shot Learning FedZSL framework, which learns a central model from the decentralized data residing on edge devices. To better generalize to previously unseen classes, FedZSL allows the training data on each device sampled from the non-overlapping classes, which are far from the i.i.d. that traditional federated learning commonly assumes. We identify two key challenges in our FedZSL protocol: 1) the trained models are prone to be biased to the locally observed classes, thus failing to generalize to the unseen classes and/or seen classes appeared on other devices; 2) as each category in the training data comes from a single source, the central model is highly vulnerable to model replacement (backdoor) attacks. To address these issues, we propose three local objectives for visual-semantic alignment and cross-device alignment through relation distillation, which leverages the normalized class-wise covariance to regularize the consistency of the prediction logits across devices. To defend against the backdoor attacks, a feature magnitude defending technique is proposed. As malicious samples are less correlated to the given semantic attributes, the visual features of low magnitude will be discarded to stabilize model updates. The effectiveness and robustness of FedZSL are demonstrated by extensive experiments conducted on three zero-shot benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习是一种通过概括从已见类别中学到的视觉语义关系来识别未见类别的学习机制。为了获得有效的 ZSL 模型，人们可能会从多个来源收集训练样本，这可能不可避免地会引起对不同组织之间数据共享的隐私问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的联邦零样本学习 FedZSL 框架，该框架从边缘设备上的分散数据中学习中心模型。为了更好地推广到以前未见过的类，FedZSL 允许从非重叠类中采样每个设备上的训练数据，这些数据与独立同分布相距甚远。传统联邦学习通常假设的。我们在 FedZSL 协议中发现了两个关键挑战：1）训练后的模型容易偏向于本地观察到的类，因此无法泛化到其他设备上出现的未见类和/或已见类； 2）由于训练数据中的每个类别都来自单一来源，因此中心模型非常容易受到模型替换（后门）攻击。为了解决这些问题，我们通过关系蒸馏提出了视觉语义对齐和跨设备对齐的三个局部目标，它利用归一化的类间协方差来规范跨设备的预测逻辑的一致性。为了防御后门攻击，提出了特征量防御技术。由于恶意样本与给定语义属性的相关性较低，因此将丢弃低量级的视觉特征以稳定模型更新。 FedZSL 的有效性和稳健性通过在三个零样本基准数据集上进行的大量实验得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联邦零样本学习框架FedZSL，通过在边缘设备上分散数据训练中央模型，解决跨组织数据共享中的隐私问题，并提升对未见类别的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统零样本学习依赖多源数据训练，但数据共享引发隐私问题；联邦学习中非独立同分布的数据和模型替换攻击进一步加剧了挑战。
AI.method: 设计三种本地目标函数通过关系蒸馏实现视觉-语义对齐与跨设备对齐，利用归一化类别协方差正则化预测结果的一致性，并提出特征幅度防御技术抵御后门攻击。
AI.result: 在三个零样本基准数据集上的实验验证了FedZSL在有效性与鲁棒性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: FedZSL通过协同对齐机制和防御策略，有效解决了联邦零样本学习中的非独立同分布数据与安全攻击问题。

authors_text: Qian Chen,Xingjian Dong,Guowei Tu,Dong Wang,Baoxuan Zhao,Zhike Peng
title: TFN: An Interpretable Neural Network with Time-Frequency Transform Embedded for Intelligent Fault Diagnosis
title_zh: TFN：嵌入时频变换的可解释神经网络，用于智能故障诊断
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are widely used in fault diagnosis of mechanical systems due to their powerful feature extraction and classification capabilities. However, the CNN is a typical black-box model, and the mechanism of CNN's decision-making are not clear, which limits its application in high-reliability-required fault diagnosis scenarios. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel interpretable neural network termed as Time-Frequency Network (TFN), where the physically meaningful time-frequency transform (TFT) method is embedded into the traditional convolutional layer as an adaptive preprocessing layer. This preprocessing layer named as time-frequency convolutional (TFconv) layer, is constrained by a well-designed kernel function to extract fault-related time-frequency information. It not only improves the diagnostic performance but also reveals the logical foundation of the CNN prediction in the frequency domain. Different TFT methods correspond to different kernel functions of the TFconv layer. In this study, four typical TFT methods are considered to formulate the TFNs and their effectiveness and interpretability are proved through three mechanical fault diagnosis experiments. Experimental results also show that the proposed TFconv layer can be easily generalized to other CNNs with different depths. The code of TFN is available on https://github.com/ChenQian0618/TFN.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are widely used in fault diagnosis of mechanical systems due to their powerful feature extraction and classification capabilities. However, the CNN is a typical black-box model, and the mechanism of CNN's decision-making are not clear, which limits its application in high-reliability-required fault diagnosis scenarios. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel interpretable neural network termed as Time-Frequency Network (TFN), where the physically meaningful time-frequency transform (TFT) method is embedded into the traditional convolutional layer as an adaptive preprocessing layer. This preprocessing layer named as time-frequency convolutional (TFconv) layer, is constrained by a well-designed kernel function to extract fault-related time-frequency information. It not only improves the diagnostic performance but also reveals the logical foundation of the CNN prediction in the frequency domain. Different TFT methods correspond to different kernel functions of the TFconv layer. In this study, four typical TFT methods are considered to formulate the TFNs and their effectiveness and interpretability are proved through three mechanical fault diagnosis experiments. Experimental results also show that the proposed TFconv layer can be easily generalized to other CNNs with different depths. The code of TFN is available on https://github.com/ChenQian0618/TFN.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）因其强大的特征提取和分类能力而广泛应用于机械系统的故障诊断。然而CNN是典型的黑盒模型，CNN的决策机制尚不明确，限制了其在高可靠性要求的故障诊断场景中的应用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为时频网络（TFN）的新型可解释神经网络，其中物理有意义的时频变换（TFT）方法作为自适应预处理层嵌入到传统的卷积层中。这个预处理层被称为时频卷积（TFconv）层，受到精心设计的核函数的约束，以提取与故障相关的时频信息。它不仅提高了诊断性能，而且揭示了 CNN 频域预测的逻辑基础。不同的TFT方法对应于TFconv层的不同核函数。在本研究中，考虑了四种典型的TFT方法来制定TFN，并通过三个机械故障诊断实验证明了它们的有效性和可解释性。实验结果还表明，所提出的 TFconv 层可以轻松推广到其他不同深度的 CNN。 TFN的代码可以在https://github.com/ChenQian0618/TFN上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的神经网络TFN，通过嵌入时间-频率变换提升机械系统故障诊断的性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在故障诊断中作为黑箱模型，决策机制不透明，难以满足高可靠性场景需求。
AI.method: 设计时间-频率卷积层（TFconv），将物理意义明确的时间-频率变换（TFT）作为自适应预处理层，通过约束核函数提取故障特征，并基于四种TFT方法构建TFN模型。
AI.result: 通过三个机械故障诊断实验验证TFN的有效性和可解释性，且TFconv层可泛化至不同深度的CNN中。
AI.conclusion: TFN通过嵌入TFT提升了诊断性能与可解释性，且具有良好的模型泛化能力。

search_text: TFN: An Interpretable Neural Network with Time-Frequency Transform Embedded for Intelligent Fault Diagnosis TFN：嵌入时频变换的可解释神经网络，用于智能故障诊断 Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are widely used in fault diagnosis of mechanical systems due to their powerful feature extraction and classification capabilities. However, the CNN is a typical black-box model, and the mechanism of CNN's decision-making are not clear, which limits its application in high-reliability-required fault diagnosis scenarios. To tackle this issue, we propose a novel interpretable neural network termed as Time-Frequency Network (TFN), where the physically meaningful time-frequency transform (TFT) method is embedded into the traditional convolutional layer as an adaptive preprocessing layer. This preprocessing layer named as time-frequency convolutional (TFconv) layer, is constrained by a well-designed kernel function to extract fault-related time-frequency information. It not only improves the diagnostic performance but also reveals the logical foundation of the CNN prediction in the frequency domain. Different TFT methods correspond to different kernel functions of the TFconv layer. In this study, four typical TFT methods are considered to formulate the TFNs and their effectiveness and interpretability are proved through three mechanical fault diagnosis experiments. Experimental results also show that the proposed TFconv layer can be easily generalized to other CNNs with different depths. authors_text: Haoqin Ji,Haozhe Liu,Yuexiang Li,Jinheng Xie,Nanjun He,Yawen Huang,Dong Wei,Xinrong Chen,Linlin Shen,Yefeng Zheng
title: A Benchmark for Weakly Semi-Supervised Abnormality Localization in Chest X-Rays
title_zh: 胸部 X 射线弱半监督异常定位的基准
abstract: Accurate abnormality localization in chest X-rays (CXR) can benefit the clinical diagnosis of various thoracic diseases. However, the lesion-level annotation can only be performed by experienced radiologists, and it is tedious and time-consuming, thus difficult to acquire. Such a situation results in a difficulty to develop a fully-supervised abnormality localization system for CXR. In this regard, we propose to train the CXR abnormality localization framework via a weakly semi-supervised strategy, termed Point Beyond Class (PBC), which utilizes a small number of fully annotated CXRs with lesion-level bounding boxes and extensive weakly annotated samples by points. Such a point annotation setting can provide weakly instance-level information for abnormality localization with a marginal annotation cost. Particularly, the core idea behind our PBC is to learn a robust and accurate mapping from the point annotations to the bounding boxes against the variance of annotated points. To achieve that, a regularization term, namely multi-point consistency, is proposed, which drives the model to generate the consistent bounding box from different point annotations inside the same abnormality. Furthermore, a self-supervision, termed symmetric consistency, is also proposed to deeply exploit the useful information from the weakly annotated data for abnormality localization. Experimental results on RSNA and VinDr-CXR datasets justify the effectiveness of the proposed method. When less than 20% box-level labels are used for training, an improvement of ~5 in mAP can be achieved by our PBC, compared to the current state-of-the-art method (i.e., Point DETR). Code is available at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/Point-Beyond-Class.
summary: Accurate abnormality localization in chest X-rays (CXR) can benefit the clinical diagnosis of various thoracic diseases. However, the lesion-level annotation can only be performed by experienced radiologists, and it is tedious and time-consuming, thus difficult to acquire. Such a situation results in a difficulty to develop a fully-supervised abnormality localization system for CXR. In this regard, we propose to train the CXR abnormality localization framework via a weakly semi-supervised strategy, termed Point Beyond Class (PBC), which utilizes a small number of fully annotated CXRs with lesion-level bounding boxes and extensive weakly annotated samples by points. Such a point annotation setting can provide weakly instance-level information for abnormality localization with a marginal annotation cost. Particularly, the core idea behind our PBC is to learn a robust and accurate mapping from the point annotations to the bounding boxes against the variance of annotated points. To achieve that, a regularization term, namely multi-point consistency, is proposed, which drives the model to generate the consistent bounding box from different point annotations inside the same abnormality. Furthermore, a self-supervision, termed symmetric consistency, is also proposed to deeply exploit the useful information from the weakly annotated data for abnormality localization. Experimental results on RSNA and VinDr-CXR datasets justify the effectiveness of the proposed method. When less than 20% box-level labels are used for training, an improvement of ~5 in mAP can be achieved by our PBC, compared to the current state-of-the-art method (i.e., Point DETR). Code is available at https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/Point-Beyond-Class.
abstract_zh: 胸部X线（CXR）异常的准确定位有利于各种胸部疾病的临床诊断。然而，病灶级注释只能由经验丰富的放射科医生进行，且繁琐且耗时，因此难以获取。这种情况导致开发全监督的CXR异常定位系统变得困难。在这方面，我们建议通过一种弱半监督策略来训练 CXR 异常定位框架，称为 Point Beyond Class (PBC)，该策略利用少量带有病变级别边界框的完全注释的 CXR 和按点进行的大量弱注释样本。这样的点注释设置可以以边际注释成本为异常定位提供弱实例级信息。特别是，我们的 PBC 背后的核心思想是根据注释点的方差学习从点注释到边界框的稳健且准确的映射。为了实现这一目标，提出了正则化项，即多点一致性，它驱动模型从同一异常内的不同点注释生成一致的边界框。此外，还提出了一种称为对称一致性的自我监督，以深入利用弱注释数据中的有用信息来进行异常定位。 RSNA 和 VinDr-CXR 数据集上的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性。当使用少于 20% 的框级标签进行训练时，与当前最先进的方法（即 Point DETR）相比，我们的 PBC 可以将 mAP 提高约 5 倍。代码可在 https://github.com/HaozheLiu-ST/Point-Beyond-Class 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱半监督方法Point Beyond Class (PBC)，用于在胸部X光片中实现异常定位，通过结合少量全标注样本和大量点标注样本降低标注成本。
AI.motivation: 由于病变级别的标注需要经验丰富的放射科医生进行且耗时耗力，导致难以构建完全监督的异常定位系统。现有方法在标注数据有限时表现不足，需探索更高效的弱监督策略。
AI.method: PBC方法利用少量全标注样本（含病变级边界框）和大量点标注样本，通过多点一致性正则化项确保不同点标注生成一致的边界框，并引入对称一致性自监督机制挖掘弱标注数据的信息。
AI.result: 在RSNA和VinDr-CXR数据集上实验表明，当训练时使用少于20%的边界框标注时，PBC方法较当前最先进的Point DETR方法在mAP指标上提升约5。
AI.conclusion: PBC通过弱半监督策略有效解决了胸部X光异常定位中标注数据不足的问题，为实际医疗场景中有限标注资源下的模型训练提供了可行方案。

title: Volumetric video streaming: Current approaches and implementations
title_zh: 体积视频流：当前的方法和实现
comment: ef:Valenzise, G., Alain, M., Zerman, E., and Ozcinar, C., Immersive media technologies. 2022, Elsevier
comments: ef:Valenzise, G., Alain, M., Zerman, E., and Ozcinar, C., Immersive media technologies. 2022, Elsevier
abstract: The rise of capturing systems for objects and scenes in 3D with increased fidelity and immersion has led to the popularity of volumetric video contents that can be seen from any position and angle in 6 degrees of freedom navigation. Such contents need large volumes of data to accurately represent the real world. Thus, novel optimization solutions and delivery systems are needed to enable volumetric video streaming over bandwidth-limited networks. In this chapter, we discuss theoretical approaches to volumetric video streaming optimization, through compression solutions, as well as network and user adaptation, for high-end and low-powered devices. Moreover, we present an overview of existing end-to-end systems, and we point to the future of volumetric video streaming.
summary: The rise of capturing systems for objects and scenes in 3D with increased fidelity and immersion has led to the popularity of volumetric video contents that can be seen from any position and angle in 6 degrees of freedom navigation. Such contents need large volumes of data to accurately represent the real world. Thus, novel optimization solutions and delivery systems are needed to enable volumetric video streaming over bandwidth-limited networks. In this chapter, we discuss theoretical approaches to volumetric video streaming optimization, through compression solutions, as well as network and user adaptation, for high-end and low-powered devices. Moreover, we present an overview of existing end-to-end systems, and we point to the future of volumetric video streaming.
abstract_zh: 随着保真度和沉浸度的提高，3D 对象和场景捕捉系统的兴起导致了体积视频内容的流行，这些内容可以在 6 自由度导航中从任何位置和角度观看。此类内容需要大量数据才能准确再现现实世界。因此，需要新颖的优化解决方案和传输系统来在带宽有限的网络上实现体积视频流。在本章中，我们将讨论通过压缩解决方案以及针对高端和低功耗设备的网络和用户适应来优化体积视频流的理论方法。此外，我们概述了现有的端到端系统，并指出了体积视频流的未来。

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了体素视频流的优化方法及现有系统实现，涵盖压缩技术、网络适配和设备兼容性方案。
AI.motivation: 体素视频需大量数据存储与传输，现有网络带宽限制难以支撑其高质量实时传输，亟需优化方案。
AI.method: 通过压缩算法优化、网络传输协议改进及终端设备适配策略，结合现有端到端系统案例进行分析。
AI.result: 总结了当前主流优化技术与系统架构，指出多模态压缩与智能传输调度是未来研究重点。
AI.conclusion: 体素视频流需持续优化编码效率与传输协议，同时需平衡高精度呈现与终端设备性能限制。

authors_text: Han Wu,Syed Yunas,Sareh Rowlands,Wenjie Ruan,Johan Wahlstrom
title: Adversarial Detection: Attacking Object Detection in Real Time
title_zh: 对抗性检测：实时攻击对象检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE Intelligent Vehicle Symposium, 2023
comments: Accepted by IEEE Intelligent Vehicle Symposium, 2023
abstract: Intelligent robots rely on object detection models to perceive the environment. Following advances in deep learning security it has been revealed that object detection models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, prior research primarily focuses on attacking static images or offline videos. Therefore, it is still unclear if such attacks could jeopardize real-world robotic applications in dynamic environments. This paper bridges this gap by presenting the first real-time online attack against object detection models. We devise three attacks that fabricate bounding boxes for nonexistent objects at desired locations. The attacks achieve a success rate of about 90% within about 20 iterations. The demo video is available at https://youtu.be/zJZ1aNlXsMU.
summary: Intelligent robots rely on object detection models to perceive the environment. Following advances in deep learning security it has been revealed that object detection models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, prior research primarily focuses on attacking static images or offline videos. Therefore, it is still unclear if such attacks could jeopardize real-world robotic applications in dynamic environments. This paper bridges this gap by presenting the first real-time online attack against object detection models. We devise three attacks that fabricate bounding boxes for nonexistent objects at desired locations. The attacks achieve a success rate of about 90% within about 20 iterations. The demo video is available at https://youtu.be/zJZ1aNlXsMU.
abstract_zh: 智能机器人依靠物体检测模型来感知环境。随着深度学习安全性的进步，人们发现对象检测模型很容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，先前的研究主要集中在攻击静态图像或离线视频。因此，目前尚不清楚此类攻击是否会危及动态环境中的现实机器人应用。本文通过提出第一个针对对象检测模型的实时在线攻击来弥补这一差距。我们设计了三种攻击，在所需位置为不存在的物体制造边界框。这些攻击在大约 20 次迭代内实现了大约 90% 的成功率。演示视频可从 https://youtu.be/zJZ1aNlXsMU 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时在线攻击方法，针对目标检测模型生成虚假边界框以攻击智能机器人。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击研究主要针对静态图像或离线视频，而智能机器人在动态环境中的目标检测模型安全性尚未明确。
AI.method: 设计三种实时攻击方法，在目标检测模型中伪造指定位置的不存在物体边界框。
AI.result: 攻击在约20次迭代内达到约90%的成功率，演示视频已公开。
AI.conclusion: 实时对抗攻击可有效威胁动态环境中的机器人目标检测系统，揭示了实际应用中的安全风险。

authors_text: Yiyan Huang,Cheuk Hang Leung,Shumin Ma,Qi Wu,Dongdong Wang,Zhixiang Huang
title: Moderately-Balanced Representation Learning for Treatment Effects with Orthogonality Information
title_zh: 具有正交信息的治疗效果的适度平衡表示学习
comment: This paper was accepted and will be published at the 19th Pacific Rim International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (PRICAI2022)
comments: This paper was accepted and will be published at the 19th Pacific Rim International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (PRICAI2022)
abstract: Estimating the average treatment effect (ATE) from observational data is challenging due to selection bias. Existing works mainly tackle this challenge in two ways. Some researchers propose constructing a score function that satisfies the orthogonal condition, which guarantees that the established ATE estimator is "orthogonal" to be more robust. The others explore representation learning models to achieve a balanced representation between the treated and the controlled groups. However, existing studies fail to 1) discriminate treated units from controlled ones in the representation space to avoid the over-balanced issue; 2) fully utilize the "orthogonality information". In this paper, we propose a moderately-balanced representation learning (MBRL) framework based on recent covariates balanced representation learning methods and orthogonal machine learning theory. This framework protects the representation from being over-balanced via multi-task learning. Simultaneously, MBRL incorporates the noise orthogonality information in the training and validation stages to achieve a better ATE estimation. The comprehensive experiments on benchmark and simulated datasets show the superiority and robustness of our method on treatment effect estimations compared with existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Estimating the average treatment effect (ATE) from observational data is challenging due to selection bias. Existing works mainly tackle this challenge in two ways. Some researchers propose constructing a score function that satisfies the orthogonal condition, which guarantees that the established ATE estimator is "orthogonal" to be more robust. The others explore representation learning models to achieve a balanced representation between the treated and the controlled groups. However, existing studies fail to 1) discriminate treated units from controlled ones in the representation space to avoid the over-balanced issue; 2) fully utilize the "orthogonality information". In this paper, we propose a moderately-balanced representation learning (MBRL) framework based on recent covariates balanced representation learning methods and orthogonal machine learning theory. This framework protects the representation from being over-balanced via multi-task learning. Simultaneously, MBRL incorporates the noise orthogonality information in the training and validation stages to achieve a better ATE estimation. The comprehensive experiments on benchmark and simulated datasets show the superiority and robustness of our method on treatment effect estimations compared with existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于选择偏差，根据观察数据估计平均治疗效果 (ATE) 具有挑战性。现有的作品主要通过两种方式应对这一挑战。一些研究人员提出构建一个满足正交条件的评分函数，这保证了建立的ATE估计器是“正交的”，从而更加鲁棒。其他人则探索表征学习模型，以实现治疗组和对照组之间的平衡表征。然而，现有的研究未能：1）在表示空间中区分处理单元和受控单元以避免过度平衡问题； 2）充分利用“正交信息”。在本文中，我们基于最近的协变量平衡表示学习方法和正交机器学习理论，提出了一种适度平衡表示学习（MBRL）框架。该框架通过多任务学习防止表示过度平衡。同时，MBRL 在训练和验证阶段结合了噪声正交性信息，以实现更好的 ATE 估计。对基准和模拟数据集的综合实验表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在治疗效果估计方面具有优越性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于正交信息的适度平衡表示学习框架，以更准确地估计观察数据中的平均处理效应（ATE），解决现有方法在平衡表示和利用正交性信息方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在平衡处理组与对照组表示时易导致过度平衡，且未能充分利用正交性信息，影响ATE估计的准确性。
AI.method: 提出MBRL框架，结合多任务学习避免过度平衡，并在训练和验证阶段整合噪声正交性信息，以提升ATE估计效果。
AI.result: 在多个基准和模拟数据集上的实验表明，该方法在处理效应估计上优于现有最先进方法，具有更高的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MBRL框架有效解决了过度平衡和正交性信息利用不足的问题，为处理效应估计提供了更可靠的方法。

This framework protects the representation from being over-balanced via multi-task learning. Simultaneously, MBRL incorporates the noise orthogonality information in the training and validation stages to achieve a better ATE estimation. The comprehensive experiments on benchmark and simulated datasets show the superiority and robustness of our method on treatment effect estimations compared with existing state-of-the-art methods. 由于选择偏差，根据观察数据估计平均治疗效果 (ATE) 具有挑战性。现有的作品主要通过两种方式应对这一挑战。一些研究人员提出构建一个满足正交条件的评分函数，这保证了建立的ATE估计器是“正交的”，从而更加鲁棒。其他人则探索表征学习模型，以实现治疗组和对照组之间的平衡表征。然而，现有的研究未能：1）在表示空间中区分处理单元和受控单元以避免过度平衡问题； 2）充分利用“正交信息”。在本文中，我们基于最近的协变量平衡表示学习方法和正交机器学习理论，提出了一种适度平衡表示学习（MBRL）框架。该框架通过多任务学习防止表示过度平衡。同时，MBRL 在训练和验证阶段结合了噪声正交性信息，以实现更好的 ATE 估计。对基准和模拟数据集的综合实验表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在治疗效果估计方面具有优越性和鲁棒性。 提出一种基于正交信息的适度平衡表示学习框架，以更准确地估计观察数据中的平均处理效应（ATE），解决现有方法在平衡表示和利用正交性信息方面的不足。 Yiyan Huang,Cheuk Hang Leung,Shumin Ma,Qi Wu,Dongdong Wang,Zhixiang Huang cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: Bálint Z. Téglásy,Emil Wengle,John R. Potter,Sokratis Katsikas
title: Authentication of Underwater Assets
title_zh: 水下资产认证
abstract: Secure digital wireless communication underwater has become a key issue as maritime operations shift towards employing a heterogeneous mix of robotic assets and as the security of digital systems becomes challenged across all domains. At the same time, a proliferation of underwater signal coding and physical layer options are delivering greater bandwidth and flexibility, but mostly without the standards necessary for interoperability. We address here an essential requirement for security, namely a confirmation of asset identities also known as authentication. We propose, implement, verify and validate an authentication protocol based on the first digital underwater communications standard. Our scheme is applicable primarily to AUVs operating around offshore oil and gas facilities, but also to other underwater devices that may in the future have acoustic modems. It makes communication including command and control significantly more secure and provides a foundation for the development of more sophisticated security mechanisms.
summary: Secure digital wireless communication underwater has become a key issue as maritime operations shift towards employing a heterogeneous mix of robotic assets and as the security of digital systems becomes challenged across all domains. At the same time, a proliferation of underwater signal coding and physical layer options are delivering greater bandwidth and flexibility, but mostly without the standards necessary for interoperability. We address here an essential requirement for security, namely a confirmation of asset identities also known as authentication. We propose, implement, verify and validate an authentication protocol based on the first digital underwater communications standard. Our scheme is applicable primarily to AUVs operating around offshore oil and gas facilities, but also to other underwater devices that may in the future have acoustic modems. It makes communication including command and control significantly more secure and provides a foundation for the development of more sophisticated security mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 随着海上作业转向使用异构的机器人资产组合，并且数字系统的安全性在所有领域都受到挑战，水下安全数字无线通信已成为一个关键问题。与此同时，水下信号编码和物理层选项的激增正在提供更大的带宽和灵活性，但大多没有互操作性所需的标准。我们在这里解决安全的基本要求，即资产身份的确认，也称为身份验证。我们提出、实施、验证和验证基于第一个数字水下通信标准的身份验证协议。我们的方案主要适用于在海上石油和天然气设施周围运行的 AUV，但也适用于未来可能配备声学调制解调器的其他水下设备。它使包括命令和控制在内的通信更加安全，并为开发更复杂的安全机制奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种基于首个数字水下通信标准的水下资产身份认证协议，以增强水下通信安全性。
AI.motivation: 随着海上作业对异构机器人资产的依赖增加，水下数字通信安全需求提升，但现有技术缺乏互操作性标准，亟需解决身份认证问题。
AI.method: 基于首个数字水下通信标准设计并实现一种身份认证协议，适用于水下自主航行器及其他配备声学调制解调器的设备。
AI.result: 验证表明该协议显著提升了命令与控制通信的安全性，并为更复杂的水下安全机制提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方案有效解决了水下资产认证难题，为未来水下通信系统的安全发展提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Sasha Salter,Markus Wulfmeier,Dhruva Tirumala,Nicolas Heess,Martin Riedmiller,Raia Hadsell,Dushyant Rao
title: MO2: Model-Based Offline Options
title_zh: MO2：基于模型的离线选项
comment: Accepted at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs) Conference Track, 2022
comments: Accepted at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs) Conference Track, 2022
abstract: The ability to discover useful behaviours from past experience and transfer them to new tasks is considered a core component of natural embodied intelligence. Inspired by neuroscience, discovering behaviours that switch at bottleneck states have been long sought after for inducing plans of minimum description length across tasks. Prior approaches have either only supported online, on-policy, bottleneck state discovery, limiting sample-efficiency, or discrete state-action domains, restricting applicability. To address this, we introduce Model-Based Offline Options (MO2), an offline hindsight framework supporting sample-efficient bottleneck option discovery over continuous state-action spaces. Once bottleneck options are learnt offline over source domains, they are transferred online to improve exploration and value estimation on the transfer domain. Our experiments show that on complex long-horizon continuous control tasks with sparse, delayed rewards, MO2's properties are essential and lead to performance exceeding recent option learning methods. Additional ablations further demonstrate the impact on option predictability and credit assignment.
summary: The ability to discover useful behaviours from past experience and transfer them to new tasks is considered a core component of natural embodied intelligence. Inspired by neuroscience, discovering behaviours that switch at bottleneck states have been long sought after for inducing plans of minimum description length across tasks. Prior approaches have either only supported online, on-policy, bottleneck state discovery, limiting sample-efficiency, or discrete state-action domains, restricting applicability. To address this, we introduce Model-Based Offline Options (MO2), an offline hindsight framework supporting sample-efficient bottleneck option discovery over continuous state-action spaces. Once bottleneck options are learnt offline over source domains, they are transferred online to improve exploration and value estimation on the transfer domain. Our experiments show that on complex long-horizon continuous control tasks with sparse, delayed rewards, MO2's properties are essential and lead to performance exceeding recent option learning methods. Additional ablations further demonstrate the impact on option predictability and credit assignment.
abstract_zh: 从过去的经验中发现有用的行为并将其转移到新任务的能力被认为是自然体现智能的核心组成部分。受神经科学的启发，长期以来一直寻求发现在瓶颈状态下切换的行为，以诱导跨任务的最小描述长度的计划。先前的方法要么仅支持在线、策略内、瓶颈状态发现，限制样本效率，要么支持离散状态动作域，限制适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了基于模型的离线选项（MO2），这是一个离线后见之明框架，支持在连续状态动作空间上发现样本有效的瓶颈选项。一旦在源域上离线学习了瓶颈选项，它们就会被在线转移以改进转移域上的探索和价值估计。我们的实验表明，在具有稀疏、延迟奖励的复杂长期连续控制任务中，MO2 的特性至关重要，并且其性能超过了最近的选项学习方法。额外的消融进一步证明了对期权可预测性和信用分配的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MO2方法，通过离线学习连续状态动作空间中的瓶颈选项，并将其转移到新任务以提高样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或局限于在线策略导致样本效率低，或仅适用于离散状态动作空间，难以处理复杂连续控制任务。
AI.method: 基于模型的离线框架MO2，在源域离线学习瓶颈选项后，通过在线转移优化目标域的探索与价值估计。
AI.result: 在长时域稀疏奖励任务中，MO2性能优于最新选项学习方法，消融实验证明其对选项可预测性与信用分配的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MO2通过离线瓶颈选项学习与在线转移，有效提升了连续控制任务的样本效率与性能，具有广泛适用性。

title: Incremental Permutation Feature Importance (iPFI): Towards Online Explanations on Data Streams
title_zh: 增量排列特征重要性（iPFI）：走向数据流的在线解释
abstract: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) has mainly focused on static learning scenarios so far. We are interested in dynamic scenarios where data is sampled progressively, and learning is done in an incremental rather than a batch mode. We seek efficient incremental algorithms for computing feature importance (FI) measures, specifically, an incremental FI measure based on feature marginalization of absent features similar to permutation feature importance (PFI). We propose an efficient, model-agnostic algorithm called iPFI to estimate this measure incrementally and under dynamic modeling conditions including concept drift. We prove theoretical guarantees on the approximation quality in terms of expectation and variance. To validate our theoretical findings and the efficacy of our approaches compared to traditional batch PFI, we conduct multiple experimental studies on benchmark data with and without concept drift.
summary: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) has mainly focused on static learning scenarios so far. We are interested in dynamic scenarios where data is sampled progressively, and learning is done in an incremental rather than a batch mode. We seek efficient incremental algorithms for computing feature importance (FI) measures, specifically, an incremental FI measure based on feature marginalization of absent features similar to permutation feature importance (PFI). We propose an efficient, model-agnostic algorithm called iPFI to estimate this measure incrementally and under dynamic modeling conditions including concept drift. We prove theoretical guarantees on the approximation quality in terms of expectation and variance. To validate our theoretical findings and the efficacy of our approaches compared to traditional batch PFI, we conduct multiple experimental studies on benchmark data with and without concept drift.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，可解释人工智能（XAI）主要关注静态学习场景。我们对动态场景感兴趣，其中数据是逐步采样的，并且学习是以增量而不是批处理模式完成的。我们寻求有效的增量算法来计算特征重要性（FI）度量，特别是基于类似于排列特征重要性（PFI）的缺失特征的特征边缘化的增量FI度量。我们提出了一种名为 iPFI 的高效、与模型无关的算法，可以在包括概念漂移在内的动态建模条件下增量地估计此测量值。我们在期望和方差方面证明了近似质量的理论保证。为了验证我们的理论发现以及我们的方法与传统批量 PFI 相比的有效性，我们对有或没有概念漂移的基准数据进行了多项实验研究。

AI.tldr: 提出增量排列特征重要性（iPFI）算法，用于数据流场景下的在线特征重要性分析。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法主要针对静态数据，难以应对数据流中的动态变化和概念漂移，需开发增量算法以实现实时解释。
AI.method: 提出iPFI算法，通过增量计算特征边际化重要性，适应动态数据流和概念漂移，并提供期望和方差的理论保证。
AI.result: 实验表明iPFI在动态数据流中有效，理论分析与实验结果一致，优于传统批量PFI。
AI.conclusion: iPFI成功实现了动态数据流的增量特征重要性分析，为在线解释提供了有效方法。

ai_content.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法主要针对静态数据，难以应对数据流中的动态变化和概念漂移，需开发增量算法以实现实时解释。

search_text: Incremental Permutation Feature Importance (iPFI): Towards Online Explanations on Data Streams 增量排列特征重要性（iPFI）：走向数据流的在线解释 Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) has mainly focused on static learning scenarios so far. We are interested in dynamic scenarios where data is sampled progressively, and learning is done in an incremental rather than a batch mode. We seek efficient incremental algorithms for computing feature importance (FI) measures, specifically, an incremental FI measure based on feature marginalization of absent features similar to permutation feature importance (PFI). We propose an efficient, model-agnostic algorithm called iPFI to estimate this measure incrementally and under dynamic modeling conditions including concept drift. We prove theoretical guarantees on the approximation quality in terms of expectation and variance. To validate our theoretical findings and the efficacy of our approaches compared to traditional batch PFI, we conduct multiple experimental studies on benchmark data with and without concept drift. 迄今为止，可解释人工智能（XAI）主要关注静态学习场景。我们对动态场景感兴趣，其中数据是逐步采样的，并且学习是以增量而不是批处理模式完成的。我们寻求有效的增量算法来计算特征重要性（FI）度量，特别是基于类似于排列特征重要性（PFI）的缺失特征的特征边缘化的增量FI度量。我们提出了一种名为 iPFI 的高效、与模型无关的算法，可以在包括概念漂移在内的动态建模条件下增量地估计此测量值。我们在期望和方差方面证明了近似质量的理论保证。为了验证我们的理论发现以及我们的方法与传统批量 PFI 相比的有效性，我们对有或没有概念漂移的基准数据进行了多项实验研究。 提出增量排列特征重要性（iPFI）算法，用于数据流场景下的在线特征重要性分析。 Fabian Fumagalli,Maximilian Muschalik,Eyke Hüllermeier,Barbara Hammer cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Debayan Bhattacharya,Benjamin Tobias Becker,Finn Behrendt,Marcel Bengs,Dirk Beyersdorff,Dennis Eggert,Elina Petersen,Florian Jansen,Marvin Petersen,Bastian Cheng,Christian Betz,Alexander Schlaefer,Anna Sophie Hoffmann
title: Supervised Contrastive Learning to Classify Paranasal Anomalies in the Maxillary Sinus
title_zh: 监督对比学习对上颌窦鼻旁异常进行分类
abstract: Using deep learning techniques, anomalies in the paranasal sinus system can be detected automatically in MRI images and can be further analyzed and classified based on their volume, shape and other parameters like local contrast. However due to limited training data, traditional supervised learning methods often fail to generalize. Existing deep learning methods in paranasal anomaly classification have been used to diagnose at most one anomaly. In our work, we consider three anomalies. Specifically, we employ a 3D CNN to separate maxillary sinus volumes without anomalies from maxillary sinus volumes with anomalies. To learn robust representations from a small labelled dataset, we propose a novel learning paradigm that combines contrastive loss and cross-entropy loss. Particularly, we use a supervised contrastive loss that encourages embeddings of maxillary sinus volumes with and without anomaly to form two distinct clusters while the cross-entropy loss encourages the 3D CNN to maintain its discriminative ability. We report that optimising with both losses is advantageous over optimising with only one loss. We also find that our training strategy leads to label efficiency. With our method, a 3D CNN classifier achieves an AUROC of 0.85 while a 3D CNN classifier optimised with cross-entropy loss achieves an AUROC of 0.66.
summary: Using deep learning techniques, anomalies in the paranasal sinus system can be detected automatically in MRI images and can be further analyzed and classified based on their volume, shape and other parameters like local contrast. However due to limited training data, traditional supervised learning methods often fail to generalize. Existing deep learning methods in paranasal anomaly classification have been used to diagnose at most one anomaly. In our work, we consider three anomalies. Specifically, we employ a 3D CNN to separate maxillary sinus volumes without anomalies from maxillary sinus volumes with anomalies. To learn robust representations from a small labelled dataset, we propose a novel learning paradigm that combines contrastive loss and cross-entropy loss. Particularly, we use a supervised contrastive loss that encourages embeddings of maxillary sinus volumes with and without anomaly to form two distinct clusters while the cross-entropy loss encourages the 3D CNN to maintain its discriminative ability. We report that optimising with both losses is advantageous over optimising with only one loss. We also find that our training strategy leads to label efficiency. With our method, a 3D CNN classifier achieves an AUROC of 0.85 while a 3D CNN classifier optimised with cross-entropy loss achieves an AUROC of 0.66.
abstract_zh: 利用深度学习技术，可以在 MRI 图像中自动检测鼻旁窦系统的异常情况，并可以根据其体积、形状和局部对比度等其他参数进行进一步分析和分类。然而，由于训练数据有限，传统的监督学习方法往往无法泛化。现有的鼻旁异常分类深度学习方法最多只能诊断一种异常。在我们的工作中，我们考虑了三个异常现象。具体来说，我们采用 3D CNN 将没有异常的上颌窦体积与有异常的上颌窦体积分开。为了从小标记数据集中学习鲁棒的表示，我们提出了一种结合了对比损失和交叉熵损失的新颖的学习范式。特别是，我们使用监督对比损失，鼓励嵌入有异常和无异常的上颌窦体积，形成两个不同的簇，而交叉熵损失则鼓励 3D CNN 保持其辨别能力。我们报告说，使用两种损失进行优化比仅使用一种损失进行优化更有优势。我们还发现我们的训练策略可以提高标签效率。使用我们的方法，3D CNN 分类器的 AUROC 为 0.85，而使用交叉熵损失优化的 3D CNN 分类器的 AUROC 为 0.66。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合对比损失和交叉熵损失的监督对比学习方法，用于在有限标注数据下分类上颌窦的三种鼻旁窦异常。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习在标注数据有限时难以泛化，且现有方法仅能诊断单一异常，无法有效处理多类别鼻旁窦异常分类问题。
AI.method: 采用3D CNN提取上颌窦体积特征，设计融合监督对比损失（促使正常/异常样本形成独立聚类）与交叉熵损失（保持分类判别性）的联合优化框架。
AI.result: 在相同数据量下，所提方法实现AUROC 0.85，显著优于仅用交叉熵损失的0.66，且表现出更高的标签效率。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化对比损失与交叉熵损失可有效提升小样本下多类别鼻旁窦异常分类性能，为医学影像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Pavel Karpyshev,Evgeny Kruzhkov,Evgeny Yudin,Alena Savinykh,Andrei Potapov,Mikhail Kurenkov,Anton Kolomeytsev,Ivan Kalinov,Dzmitry Tsetserukou
title: MuCaSLAM: CNN-Based Frame Quality Assessment for Mobile Robot with Omnidirectional Visual SLAM
title_zh: MuCaSLAM：基于 CNN 的全向视觉 SLAM 移动机器人帧质量评估
comment: This paper has been accepted to the 2022 IEEE 18th Conference on Automation Science and Engineering
comments: This paper has been accepted to the 2022 IEEE 18th Conference on Automation Science and Engineering
abstract: In the proposed study, we describe an approach to improving the computational efficiency and robustness of visual SLAM algorithms on mobile robots with multiple cameras and limited computational power by implementing an intermediate layer between the cameras and the SLAM pipeline. In this layer, the images are classified using a ResNet18-based neural network regarding their applicability to the robot localization. The network is trained on a six-camera dataset collected in the campus of the Skolkovo Institute of Science and Technology (Skoltech). For training, we use the images and ORB features that were successfully matched with subsequent frame of the same camera ("good" keypoints or features). The results have shown that the network is able to accurately determine the optimal images for ORB-SLAM2, and implementing the proposed approach in the SLAM pipeline can help significantly increase the number of images the SLAM algorithm can localize on, and improve the overall robustness of visual SLAM. The experiments on operation time state that the proposed approach is at least 6 times faster compared to using ORB extractor and feature matcher when operated on CPU, and more than 30 times faster when run on GPU. The network evaluation has shown at least 90% accuracy in recognizing images with a big number of "good" ORB keypoints. The use of the proposed approach allowed to maintain a high number of features throughout the dataset by robustly switching from cameras with feature-poor streams.
summary: In the proposed study, we describe an approach to improving the computational efficiency and robustness of visual SLAM algorithms on mobile robots with multiple cameras and limited computational power by implementing an intermediate layer between the cameras and the SLAM pipeline. In this layer, the images are classified using a ResNet18-based neural network regarding their applicability to the robot localization. The network is trained on a six-camera dataset collected in the campus of the Skolkovo Institute of Science and Technology (Skoltech). For training, we use the images and ORB features that were successfully matched with subsequent frame of the same camera ("good" keypoints or features). The results have shown that the network is able to accurately determine the optimal images for ORB-SLAM2, and implementing the proposed approach in the SLAM pipeline can help significantly increase the number of images the SLAM algorithm can localize on, and improve the overall robustness of visual SLAM. The experiments on operation time state that the proposed approach is at least 6 times faster compared to using ORB extractor and feature matcher when operated on CPU, and more than 30 times faster when run on GPU. The network evaluation has shown at least 90% accuracy in recognizing images with a big number of "good" ORB keypoints. The use of the proposed approach allowed to maintain a high number of features throughout the dataset by robustly switching from cameras with feature-poor streams.
abstract_zh: 在所提出的研究中，我们描述了一种通过在相机和 SLAM 管道之间实现中间层来提高具有多个相机和有限计算能力的移动机器人上视觉 SLAM 算法的计算效率和鲁棒性的方法。在这一层中，使用基于 ResNet18 的神经网络对图像对机器人定位的适用性进行分类。该网络在斯科尔科沃科技学院 (Skoltech) 校园收集的六摄像头数据集上进行训练。对于训练，我们使用与同一相机的后续帧成功匹配的图像和 ORB 特征（“良好”关键点或特征）。结果表明，该网络能够准确地确定 ORB-SLAM2 的最佳图像，并且在 SLAM 管道中实施所提出的方法可以帮助显着增加 SLAM 算法可以定位的图像数量，并提高视觉 SLAM 的整体鲁棒性。运行时间实验表明，在 CPU 上运行时，与使用 ORB 提取器和特征匹配器相比，所提出的方法至少快 6 倍，在 GPU 上运行时快 30 倍以上。网络评估显示，识别具有大量“好”ORB 关键点的图像的准确率至少为 90%。使用所提出的方法可以通过从具有特征贫乏流的相机进行稳健切换，从而在整个数据集中保持大量特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CNN的帧质量评估方法，用于提升移动机器人全方位视觉SLAM的计算效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉SLAM在多摄像头移动机器人上面临计算负担重、鲁棒性不足的问题，需高效筛选高质量图像以优化定位性能。
AI.method: 在摄像头与SLAM流水线间插入基于ResNet18的神经网络层，通过六摄像头数据集训练模型，利用成功匹配的ORB特征分类图像质量。
AI.result: CPU上比传统方法快6倍，GPU上快30倍以上；图像识别准确率超90%，有效保持特征数量并提升定位图像数量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过智能筛选高质量图像显著提升SLAM效率与鲁棒性，适用于计算资源受限的移动机器人场景。

In this layer, the images are classified using a ResNet18-based neural network regarding their applicability to the robot localization. The network is trained on a six-camera dataset collected in the campus of the Skolkovo Institute of Science and Technology (Skoltech). For training, we use the images and ORB features that were successfully matched with subsequent frame of the same camera ("good" keypoints or features). The results have shown that the network is able to accurately determine the optimal images for ORB-SLAM2, and implementing the proposed approach in the SLAM pipeline can help significantly increase the number of images the SLAM algorithm can localize on, and improve the overall robustness of visual SLAM. The experiments on operation time state that the proposed approach is at least 6 times faster compared to using ORB extractor and feature matcher when operated on CPU, and more than 30 times faster when run on GPU. The network evaluation has shown at least 90% accuracy in recognizing images with a big number of "good" ORB keypoints. The use of the proposed approach allowed to maintain a high number of features throughout the dataset by robustly switching from cameras with feature-poor streams. 在所提出的研究中，我们描述了一种通过在相机和 SLAM 管道之间实现中间层来提高具有多个相机和有限计算能力的移动机器人上视觉 SLAM 算法的计算效率和鲁棒性的方法。在这一层中，使用基于 ResNet18 的神经网络对图像对机器人定位的适用性进行分类。该网络在斯科尔科沃科技学院 (Skoltech) 校园收集的六摄像头数据集上进行训练。对于训练，我们使用与同一相机的后续帧成功匹配的图像和 ORB 特征（“良好”关键点或特征）。结果表明，该网络能够准确地确定 ORB-SLAM2 的最佳图像，并且在 SLAM 管道中实施所提出的方法可以帮助显着增加 SLAM 算法可以定位的图像数量，并提高视觉 SLAM 的整体鲁棒性。运行时间实验表明，在 CPU 上运行时，与使用 ORB 提取器和特征匹配器相比，所提出的方法至少快 6 倍，在 GPU 上运行时快 30 倍以上。网络评估显示，识别具有大量“好”ORB 关键点的图像的准确率至少为 90%。使用所提出的方法可以通过从具有特征贫乏流的相机进行稳健切换，从而在整个数据集中保持大量特征。 本文提出一种基于CNN的帧质量评估方法，用于提升移动机器人全方位视觉SLAM的计算效率和鲁棒性。 Pavel Karpyshev,Evgeny Kruzhkov,Evgeny Yudin,Alena Savinykh,Andrei Potapov,Mikhail Kurenkov,Anton Kolomeytsev,Ivan Kalinov,Dzmitry Tsetserukou cs.RO

authors_text: Changsheng Chen,Lin Zhao,Rizhao Cai,Zitong Yu,Jiwu Huang,Alex C. Kot
title: Forensicability Assessment of Questioned Images in Recapturing Detection
title_zh: 重新捕获检测中可疑图像的可取证性评估
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables (Submitted to TIFS July-2022)
comments: 12 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables (Submitted to TIFS July-2022)
abstract: Recapture detection of face and document images is an important forensic task. With deep learning, the performances of face anti-spoofing (FAS) and recaptured document detection have been improved significantly. However, the performances are not yet satisfactory on samples with weak forensic cues. The amount of forensic cues can be quantified to allow a reliable forensic result. In this work, we propose a forensicability assessment network to quantify the forensicability of the questioned samples. The low-forensicability samples are rejected before the actual recapturing detection process to improve the efficiency of recapturing detection systems. We first extract forensicability features related to both image quality assessment and forensic tasks. By exploiting domain knowledge of the forensic application in image quality and forensic features, we define three task-specific forensicability classes and the initialized locations in the feature space. Based on the extracted features and the defined centers, we train the proposed forensic assessment network (FANet) with cross-entropy loss and update the centers with a momentum-based update method. We integrate the trained FANet with practical recapturing detection schemes in face anti-spoofing and recaptured document detection tasks. Experimental results show that, for a generic CNN-based FAS scheme, FANet reduces the EERs from 33.75% to 19.23% under ROSE to IDIAP protocol by rejecting samples with the lowest 30% forensicability scores. The performance of FAS schemes is poor in the rejected samples, with EER as high as 56.48%. Similar performances in rejecting low-forensicability samples have been observed for the state-of-the-art approaches in FAS and recaptured document detection tasks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that assesses the forensicability of recaptured document images and improves the system efficiency.

We first extract forensicability features related to both image quality assessment and forensic tasks. By exploiting domain knowledge of the forensic application in image quality and forensic features, we define three task-specific forensicability classes and the initialized locations in the feature space. Based on the extracted features and the defined centers, we train the proposed forensic assessment network (FANet) with cross-entropy loss and update the centers with a momentum-based update method. We integrate the trained FANet with practical recapturing detection schemes in face anti-spoofing and recaptured document detection tasks. Experimental results show that, for a generic CNN-based FAS scheme, FANet reduces the EERs from 33.75% to 19.23% under ROSE to IDIAP protocol by rejecting samples with the lowest 30% forensicability scores. The performance of FAS schemes is poor in the rejected samples, with EER as high as 56.48%. Similar performances in rejecting low-forensicability samples have been observed for the state-of-the-art approaches in FAS and recaptured document detection tasks. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that assesses the forensicability of recaptured document images and improves the system efficiency.
abstract_zh: 人脸和文档图像的重新捕获检测是一项重要的取证任务。通过深度学习，人脸反欺骗（FAS）和重新捕获文档检测的性能得到了显着提高。然而，对于法医线索较弱的样本，其性能尚不令人满意。可以量化取证线索的数量，以得出可靠的取证结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个可取证性评估网络来量化受质疑样本的可取证性。在实际重新捕获检测过程之前拒绝低可取证性样本，以提高重新捕获检测系统的效率。我们首先提取与图像质量评估和取证任务相关的取证特征。通过利用图像质量和取证特征方面取证应用的领域知识，我们定义了三个特定于任务的取证类别和特征空间中的初始化位置。基于提取的特征和定义的中心，我们使用交叉熵损失训练所提出的取证评估网络（FANet），并使用基于动量的更新方法更新中心。我们将经过训练的 FANet 与实际的重新捕获检测方案集成到人脸反欺骗和重新捕获的文档检测任务中。实验结果表明，对于基于 CNN 的通用 FAS 方案，FANet 通过拒绝可取证性分数最低 30% 的样本，将 ROSE 到 IDIAP 协议下的 EER 从 33.75% 降低到 19.23%。 FAS方案在被拒绝的样本中表现较差，EER高达56.48%。在 FAS 和重新捕获的文档检测任务中，最先进的方法在拒绝低可取证性样本方面也观察到了类似的性能。据我们所知，这是第一个评估重新捕获的文档图像的可取证性并提高系统效率的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种评估图像可鉴真性的方法，通过量化图像中的鉴真线索来提升人脸识别和文档重拍摄检测系统的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理弱鉴真线索样本时性能不足，需通过预判样本可鉴真性以优化系统效率。
AI.method: 提取与图像质量及鉴真任务相关的特征，定义三类任务特定可鉴真性类别，并通过交叉熵损失训练FANet网络，结合动量更新方法优化特征空间中心。
AI.result: 在ROSE到IDIAP协议下，FANet将EER从33.75%降至19.23%，被拒样本EER高达56.48%，且效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现对重拍摄文档图像的可鉴真性评估，通过过滤低可鉴真性样本显著提升系统效率。

authors_text: Muhammad Ahmed Humais,Mohamad Chehadeh,Igor Boiko,Yahya Zweiri
title: Analysis of the Effect of Time Delay for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles with Applications to Vision Based Navigation
title_zh: 无人机时滞效应分析及其在视觉导航中的应用
abstract: In this paper, we analyze the effect of time delay dynamics on controller design for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) with vision based navigation. Time delay is an inevitable phenomenon in cyber-physical systems, and has important implications on controller design and trajectory generation for UAVs. The impact of time delay on UAV dynamics increases with the use of the slower vision based navigation stack. We show that the existing models in the literature, which exclude time delay, are unsuitable for controller tuning since a trivial solution for minimizing an error cost functional always exists. The trivial solution that we identify suggests use of infinite controller gains to achieve optimal performance, which contradicts practical findings. We avoid such shortcomings by introducing a novel nonlinear time delay model for UAVs, and then obtain a set of linear decoupled models corresponding to each of the UAV control loops. The cost functional of the linearized time delay model of angular and altitude dynamics is analyzed, and in contrast to the delay-free models, we show the existence of finite optimal controller parameters. Due to the use of time delay models, we experimentally show that the proposed model accurately represents system stability limits. Due to time delay consideration, we achieved a tracking results of RMSE 5.01 cm when tracking a lemniscate trajectory with a peak velocity of 2.09 m/s using visual odometry (VO) based UAV navigation, which is on par with the state-of-the-art.
summary: In this paper, we analyze the effect of time delay dynamics on controller design for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) with vision based navigation. Time delay is an inevitable phenomenon in cyber-physical systems, and has important implications on controller design and trajectory generation for UAVs. The impact of time delay on UAV dynamics increases with the use of the slower vision based navigation stack. We show that the existing models in the literature, which exclude time delay, are unsuitable for controller tuning since a trivial solution for minimizing an error cost functional always exists. The trivial solution that we identify suggests use of infinite controller gains to achieve optimal performance, which contradicts practical findings. We avoid such shortcomings by introducing a novel nonlinear time delay model for UAVs, and then obtain a set of linear decoupled models corresponding to each of the UAV control loops. The cost functional of the linearized time delay model of angular and altitude dynamics is analyzed, and in contrast to the delay-free models, we show the existence of finite optimal controller parameters. Due to the use of time delay models, we experimentally show that the proposed model accurately represents system stability limits. Due to time delay consideration, we achieved a tracking results of RMSE 5.01 cm when tracking a lemniscate trajectory with a peak velocity of 2.09 m/s using visual odometry (VO) based UAV navigation, which is on par with the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们分析了时滞动力学对基于视觉导航的无人机（UAV）控制器设计的影响。时滞是信息物理系统中不可避免的现象，对无人机控制器设计和轨迹生成具有重要影响。随着使用较慢的基于视觉的导航堆栈，时间延迟对无人机动力学的影响会增加。我们表明，文献中的现有模型（不包括时间延迟）不适合控制器调整，因为始终存在最小化误差成本函数的简单解决方案。我们确定的简单解决方案建议使用无限控制器增益来实现最佳性能，这与实际发现相矛盾。我们通过引入一种新颖的无人机非线性时滞模型来避免这些缺点，然后获得与每个无人机控制回路相对应的一组线性解耦模型。分析了角度和高度动态的线性化时滞模型的成本函数，并与无时滞模型对比，证明了有限最优控制器参数的存在性。由于使用时滞模型，我们通过实验证明所提出的模型准确地代表了系统稳定性极限。出于时间延迟的考虑，我们使用基于视觉里程计（VO）的无人机导航跟踪峰值速度为 2.09 m/s 的双纽线轨迹时，获得了 RMSE 5.01 cm 的跟踪结果，这与最先进的水平相当。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了时间延迟对采用视觉导航的无人机控制器设计的影响，并提出了一种新的非线性时间延迟模型。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机控制模型未考虑时间延迟，导致控制器调优存在缺陷，无法准确反映系统稳定性极限。
AI.method: 引入非线性时间延迟模型，推导线性解耦控制回路模型，并分析延迟对角动量和高度动态的成本函数。
AI.result: 实验表明，考虑时间延迟的模型在跟踪轨迹时达到5.01厘米的RMSE，性能与最新技术相当。
AI.conclusion: 时间延迟建模显著提升了无人机控制系统的稳定性与跟踪精度，为实际应用提供了理论支持。

The trivial solution that we identify suggests use of infinite controller gains to achieve optimal performance, which contradicts practical findings. We avoid such shortcomings by introducing a novel nonlinear time delay model for UAVs, and then obtain a set of linear decoupled models corresponding to each of the UAV control loops. The cost functional of the linearized time delay model of angular and altitude dynamics is analyzed, and in contrast to the delay-free models, we show the existence of finite optimal controller parameters. Due to the use of time delay models, we experimentally show that the proposed model accurately represents system stability limits. Due to time delay consideration, we achieved a tracking results of RMSE 5.01 cm when tracking a lemniscate trajectory with a peak velocity of 2.09 m/s using visual odometry (VO) based UAV navigation, which is on par with the state-of-the-art. 在本文中，我们分析了时滞动力学对基于视觉导航的无人机（UAV）控制器设计的影响。时滞是信息物理系统中不可避免的现象，对无人机控制器设计和轨迹生成具有重要影响。随着使用较慢的基于视觉的导航堆栈，时间延迟对无人机动力学的影响会增加。我们表明，文献中的现有模型（不包括时间延迟）不适合控制器调整，因为始终存在最小化误差成本函数的简单解决方案。我们确定的简单解决方案建议使用无限控制器增益来实现最佳性能，这与实际发现相矛盾。我们通过引入一种新颖的无人机非线性时滞模型来避免这些缺点，然后获得与每个无人机控制回路相对应的一组线性解耦模型。分析了角度和高度动态的线性化时滞模型的成本函数，并与无时滞模型对比，证明了有限最优控制器参数的存在性。由于使用时滞模型，我们通过实验证明所提出的模型准确地代表了系统稳定性极限。出于时间延迟的考虑，我们使用基于视觉里程计（VO）的无人机导航跟踪峰值速度为 2.09 m/s 的双纽线轨迹时，获得了 RMSE 5.01 cm 的跟踪结果，这与最先进的水平相当。 本文分析了时间延迟对采用视觉导航的无人机控制器设计的影响，并提出了一种新的非线性时间延迟模型。 Muhammad Ahmed Humais,Mohamad Chehadeh,Igor Boiko,Yahya Zweiri cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Rika Kobayashi,Sarah Jaffa,Jiachen Dong,Roger D. Amos,Jeremy Cohen,Emily F. Kerrison
title: Gather -- a better way to codehack online
title_zh: 收集——一种更好的在线密码破解方式
abstract: A virtual hands-on computer laboratory has been designed within the Gather online meeting platform. Gather's features such as spatial audio, private spaces and interactable objects offer scope for great improvements over currently used platforms, especially for small-group based teaching. We describe our experience using this virtual computer laboratory for a recent 'Python for Beginners' workshop held as part of the Software Sustainability Institute's 2022 Research Software Camp.
summary: A virtual hands-on computer laboratory has been designed within the Gather online meeting platform. Gather's features such as spatial audio, private spaces and interactable objects offer scope for great improvements over currently used platforms, especially for small-group based teaching. We describe our experience using this virtual computer laboratory for a recent 'Python for Beginners' workshop held as part of the Software Sustainability Institute's 2022 Research Software Camp.
abstract_zh: Gather 在线会议平台内设计了一个虚拟的计算机实践实验室。 Gather 的空间音频、私人空间和可交互对象等功能为当前使用的平台提供了巨大的改进空间，特别是对于基于小组的教学。我们描述了我们在最近举办的“Python 初学者”研讨会中使用这个虚拟计算机实验室的经验，该研讨会是软件可持续性研究所 2022 年研究软件营的一部分。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于Gather平台的虚拟计算机实验室设计，用于改进在线编程教学体验。
AI.motivation: 现有在线平台在小规模小组教学中存在不足，需利用Gather的空间音频、私有房间和交互对象等特性提升教学效果。
AI.method: 在Gather平台构建虚拟计算机实验室，并应用于Software Sustainability Institute 2022年研究软件营的'Python入门'工作坊。
AI.result: 通过实践验证了该虚拟实验室在小规模编程教学中的可行性与互动性优势。
AI.conclusion: Gather平台的特性为在线编程教学提供了更沉浸和高效的环境，值得进一步推广使用。
