authors_text: Lei Chen,Haibo Qin,Shi-Xue Zhang,Chun Yang,Xucheng Yin
title: Scene Text Recognition with Single-Point Decoding Network
title_zh: 使用单点解码网络的场景文本识别
abstract: In recent years, attention-based scene text recognition methods have been very popular and attracted the interest of many researchers. Attention-based methods can adaptively focus attention on a small area or even single point during decoding, in which the attention matrix is nearly one-hot distribution. Furthermore, the whole feature maps will be weighted and summed by all attention matrices during inference, causing huge redundant computations. In this paper, we propose an efficient attention-free Single-Point Decoding Network (dubbed SPDN) for scene text recognition, which can replace the traditional attention-based decoding network. Specifically, we propose Single-Point Sampling Module (SPSM) to efficiently sample one key point on the feature map for decoding one character. In this way, our method can not only precisely locate the key point of each character but also remove redundant computations. Based on SPSM, we design an efficient and novel single-point decoding network to replace the attention-based decoding network. Extensive experiments on publicly available benchmarks verify that our SPDN can greatly improve decoding efficiency without sacrificing performance.
summary: In recent years, attention-based scene text recognition methods have been very popular and attracted the interest of many researchers. Attention-based methods can adaptively focus attention on a small area or even single point during decoding, in which the attention matrix is nearly one-hot distribution. Furthermore, the whole feature maps will be weighted and summed by all attention matrices during inference, causing huge redundant computations. In this paper, we propose an efficient attention-free Single-Point Decoding Network (dubbed SPDN) for scene text recognition, which can replace the traditional attention-based decoding network. Specifically, we propose Single-Point Sampling Module (SPSM) to efficiently sample one key point on the feature map for decoding one character. In this way, our method can not only precisely locate the key point of each character but also remove redundant computations. Based on SPSM, we design an efficient and novel single-point decoding network to replace the attention-based decoding network. Extensive experiments on publicly available benchmarks verify that our SPDN can greatly improve decoding efficiency without sacrificing performance.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于注意力的场景文本识别方法非常流行，引起了许多研究人员的兴趣。基于注意力的方法可以在解码过程中自适应地将注意力集中在一个小区域甚至单个点上，其中注意力矩阵几乎是单热分布。此外，在推理过程中，整个特征图将由所有注意力矩阵进行加权和求和，导致巨大的冗余计算。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于场景文本识别的高效无注意力单点解码网络（称为 SPDN），它可以取代传统的基于注意力的解码网络。具体来说，我们提出单点采样模块（SPSM）来有效地采样特征图上的一个关键点以解码一个字符。这样，我们的方法不仅可以精确定位每个字符的关键点，而且可以消除冗余计算。基于SPSM，我们设计了一种高效且新颖的单点解码网络来替代基于注意力的解码网络。对公开可用基准的大量实验验证了我们的 SPDN 可以在不牺牲性能的情况下极大地提高解码效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需注意力机制的单点解码网络（SPDN），用于提升场景文本识别的效率。
AI.motivation: 基于注意力的场景文本识别方法在推理时需对全局特征图进行加权计算，导致冗余计算问题，亟需更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计单点采样模块（SPSM），通过在特征图上高效采样关键点实现字符解码，构建无需注意力机制的单点解码网络。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上验证了SPDN在保持性能的同时显著提升了解码效率。
AI.conclusion: SPDN为场景文本识别提供了高效且性能稳定的注意力机制替代方案。

authors_text: Arun Baskaran,Yulin Lin,Jianguo Wen,Maria K. Y. Chan
title: Ensemble of Pre-Trained Neural Networks for Segmentation and Quality Detection of Transmission Electron Microscopy Images
title_zh: 用于透射电子显微镜图像分割和质量检测的预训练神经网络集合
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. Published as part of the Workshop on Machine Learning for Materials Science in conjunction with 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures. Published as part of the Workshop on Machine Learning for Materials Science in conjunction with 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining
abstract: Automated analysis of electron microscopy datasets poses multiple challenges, such as limitation in the size of the training dataset, variation in data distribution induced by variation in sample quality and experiment conditions, etc. It is crucial for the trained model to continue to provide acceptable segmentation/classification performance on new data, and quantify the uncertainty associated with its predictions. Among the broad applications of machine learning, various approaches have been adopted to quantify uncertainty, such as Bayesian modeling, Monte Carlo dropout, ensembles, etc. With the aim of addressing the challenges specific to the data domain of electron microscopy, two different types of ensembles of pre-trained neural networks were implemented in this work. The ensembles performed semantic segmentation of ice crystal within a two-phase mixture, thereby tracking its phase transformation to water. The first ensemble (EA) is composed of U-net style networks having different underlying architectures, whereas the second series of ensembles (ER-i) are composed of randomly initialized U-net style networks, wherein each base learner has the same underlying architecture 'i'. The encoders of the base learners were pre-trained on the Imagenet dataset. The performance of EA and ER were evaluated on three different metrics: accuracy, calibration, and uncertainty. It is seen that EA exhibits a greater classification accuracy and is better calibrated, as compared to ER. While the uncertainty quantification of these two types of ensembles are comparable, the uncertainty scores exhibited by ER were found to be dependent on the specific architecture of its base member ('i') and not consistently better than EA. Thus, the challenges posed for the analysis of electron microscopy datasets appear to be better addressed by an ensemble design like EA, as compared to an ensemble design like ER.
summary: Automated analysis of electron microscopy datasets poses multiple challenges, such as limitation in the size of the training dataset, variation in data distribution induced by variation in sample quality and experiment conditions, etc. It is crucial for the trained model to continue to provide acceptable segmentation/classification performance on new data, and quantify the uncertainty associated with its predictions. Among the broad applications of machine learning, various approaches have been adopted to quantify uncertainty, such as Bayesian modeling, Monte Carlo dropout, ensembles, etc. With the aim of addressing the challenges specific to the data domain of electron microscopy, two different types of ensembles of pre-trained neural networks were implemented in this work. The ensembles performed semantic segmentation of ice crystal within a two-phase mixture, thereby tracking its phase transformation to water. The first ensemble (EA) is composed of U-net style networks having different underlying architectures, whereas the second series of ensembles (ER-i) are composed of randomly initialized U-net style networks, wherein each base learner has the same underlying architecture 'i'. The encoders of the base learners were pre-trained on the Imagenet dataset. The performance of EA and ER were evaluated on three different metrics: accuracy, calibration, and uncertainty. It is seen that EA exhibits a greater classification accuracy and is better calibrated, as compared to ER. While the uncertainty quantification of these two types of ensembles are comparable, the uncertainty scores exhibited by ER were found to be dependent on the specific architecture of its base member ('i') and not consistently better than EA. Thus, the challenges posed for the analysis of electron microscopy datasets appear to be better addressed by an ensemble design like EA, as compared to an ensemble design like ER.
abstract_zh: 电子显微镜数据集的自动分析带来了多种挑战，例如训练数据集大小的限制、样本质量和实验条件变化引起的数据分布变化等。训练模型继续对新数据提供可接受的分割/分类性能，并量化与其预测相关的不确定性至关重要。在机器学习的广泛应用中，人们采用了各种方法来量化不确定性，例如贝叶斯建模、蒙特卡洛丢失、集成等。为了解决电子显微镜数据领域特有的挑战，本工作实现了两种不同类型的预训练神经网络集成。该团队对两相混合物中的冰晶进行了语义分割，从而跟踪其向水的相变。第一个集成（EA）由具有不同底层架构的 U-net 型网络组成，而第二系列集成（ER-i）由随机初始化的 U-net 型网络组成，其中每个基学习器具有相同的底层架构“i”。基础学习器的编码器在 Imagenet 数据集上进行了预训练。 EA 和 ER 的性能根据三个不同的指标进行评估：准确性、校准和不确定性。可以看出，与 ER 相比，EA 表现出更高的分类精度并且更好的校准。虽然这两种类型的集成的不确定性量化具有可比性，但发现 ER 表现出的不确定性分数取决于其基本成员 (“i”) 的特定架构，并且并不总是优于 EA。因此，与 ER 等集成设计相比，EA 等集成设计似乎可以更好地解决电子显微镜数据集分析带来的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过集成预训练神经网络来解决透射电子显微镜图像的分割和质量检测问题。
AI.motivation: 电子显微镜数据集分析面临训练数据量有限、样本质量和实验条件导致的数据分布变化等挑战，需提升模型泛化能力并量化预测不确定性。
AI.method: 设计两种集成方法：EA（基于不同架构的U-Net变体）和ER-i（相同架构但随机初始化的U-Net），均使用ImageNet预训练编码器，评估指标包括准确率、校准度和不确定性。
AI.result: EA在分类准确率和校准度上优于ER，而ER的不确定性评分依赖于基础模型架构，且整体表现不优于EA。
AI.conclusion: 针对电子显微镜数据的挑战，EA类集成设计比ER类更有效，应优先采用异构架构集成方案。

search_text: Ensemble of Pre-Trained Neural Networks for Segmentation and Quality Detection of Transmission Electron Microscopy Images 用于透射电子显微镜图像分割和质量检测的预训练神经网络集合 Automated analysis of electron microscopy datasets poses multiple challenges, such as limitation in the size of the training dataset, variation in data distribution induced by variation in sample quality and experiment conditions, etc. It is crucial for the trained model to continue to provide acceptable segmentation/classification performance on new data, and quantify the uncertainty associated with its predictions. Among the broad applications of machine learning, various approaches have been adopted to quantify uncertainty, such as Bayesian modeling, Monte Carlo dropout, ensembles, etc. With the aim of addressing the challenges specific to the data domain of electron microscopy, two different types of ensembles of pre-trained neural networks were implemented in this work. The ensembles performed semantic segmentation of ice crystal within a two-phase mixture, thereby tracking its phase transformation to water. The first ensemble (EA) is composed of U-net style networks having different underlying architectures, whereas the second series of ensembles (ER-i) are composed of randomly initialized U-net style networks, wherein each base learner has the same underlying architecture 'i'. The encoders of the base learners were pre-trained on the Imagenet dataset. The performance of EA and ER were evaluated on three different metrics: accuracy, calibration, and uncertainty. It is seen that EA exhibits a greater classification accuracy and is better calibrated, as compared to ER. While the uncertainty quantification of these two types of ensembles are comparable, the uncertainty scores exhibited by ER were found to be dependent on the specific architecture of its base member ('i') and not consistently better than EA. Thus, the challenges posed for the analysis of electron microscopy datasets appear to be better addressed by an ensemble design like EA, as compared to an ensemble design like ER. 电子显微镜数据集的自动分析带来了多种挑战，例如训练数据集大小的限制、样本质量和实验条件变化引起的数据分布变化等。训练模型继续对新数据提供可接受的分割/分类性能，并量化与其预测相关的不确定性至关重要。在机器学习的广泛应用中，人们采用了各种方法来量化不确定性，例如贝叶斯建模、蒙特卡洛丢失、集成等。为了解决电子显微镜数据领域特有的挑战，本工作实现了两种不同类型的预训练神经网络集成。该团队对两相混合物中的冰晶进行了语义分割，从而跟踪其向水的相变。第一个集成（EA）由具有不同底层架构的 U-net 型网络组成，而第二系列集成（ER-i）由随机初始化的 U-net 型网络组成，其中每个基学习器具有相同的底层架构“i”。基础学习器的编码器在 Imagenet 数据集上进行了预训练。 EA 和 ER 的性能根据三个不同的指标进行评估：准确性、校准和不确定性。可以看出，与 ER 相比，EA 表现出更高的分类精度并且更好的校准。虽然这两种类型的集成的不确定性量化具有可比性，但发现 ER 表现出的不确定性分数取决于其基本成员 (“i”) 的特定架构，并且并不总是优于 EA。因此，与 ER 等集成设计相比，EA 等集成设计似乎可以更好地解决电子显微镜数据集分析带来的挑战。 本文提出通过集成预训练神经网络来解决透射电子显微镜图像的分割和质量检测问题。 Arun Baskaran,Yulin Lin,Jianguo Wen,Maria K. Y. Chan cond-mat.mtrl-sci,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Taisuke Izumi,Kazuki Kakizawa,Yuya Kawabata,Naoki Kitamura,Toshimitsu Masuzawa
title: Deciding a Graph Property by a Single Mobile Agent: One-Bit Memory Suffices
title_zh: 由单个移动代理决定图属性：一位内存就足够了
abstract: We investigate the computational power of the deterministic single-agent model where the agent and each node are equipped with a limited amount of persistent memory. Tasks are formalized as decision problems on properties of input graphs, i.e., the task is defined as a subset $\mathcal{T}$ of all possible input graphs, and the agent must decide if the network belongs to $\mathcal{T}$ or not. We focus on the class of the decision problems which are solvable in a polynomial number of movements, and polynomial-time local computation. The contribution of this paper is the computational power of the very weak system with one-bit agent memory and $O(1)$-bit storage (i.e. node memory) is equivalent to the one with $O(n)$-bit agent memory and $O(1)$-bit storage. We also show that the one-bit agent memory is crucial to lead this equivalence: There exists a decision task which can be solved by the one-bit memory agent but cannot be solved by the zero-bit memory (i.e., oblivious) agent. Our result is deduced by the algorithm of simulating the $O(n)$-bit memory agent by the one-bit memory agent with polynomial-time overhead, which is developed by two novel technical tools. The first one is a dynamic $s$-$t$ path maintenance mechanism which uses only $O(1)$-bit storage per node. The second one is a new lexicographically-ordered DFS algorithm for the mobile agent system with $O(1)$-bit memory and $O(1)$-bit storage per node. These tools are of independent interest.
summary: We investigate the computational power of the deterministic single-agent model where the agent and each node are equipped with a limited amount of persistent memory. Tasks are formalized as decision problems on properties of input graphs, i.e., the task is defined as a subset $\mathcal{T}$ of all possible input graphs, and the agent must decide if the network belongs to $\mathcal{T}$ or not. We focus on the class of the decision problems which are solvable in a polynomial number of movements, and polynomial-time local computation. The contribution of this paper is the computational power of the very weak system with one-bit agent memory and $O(1)$-bit storage (i.e. node memory) is equivalent to the one with $O(n)$-bit agent memory and $O(1)$-bit storage. We also show that the one-bit agent memory is crucial to lead this equivalence: There exists a decision task which can be solved by the one-bit memory agent but cannot be solved by the zero-bit memory (i.e., oblivious) agent. Our result is deduced by the algorithm of simulating the $O(n)$-bit memory agent by the one-bit memory agent with polynomial-time overhead, which is developed by two novel technical tools. The first one is a dynamic $s$-$t$ path maintenance mechanism which uses only $O(1)$-bit storage per node. The second one is a new lexicographically-ordered DFS algorithm for the mobile agent system with $O(1)$-bit memory and $O(1)$-bit storage per node. These tools are of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了确定性单代理模型的计算能力，其中代理和每个节点都配备了有限数量的持久内存。任务被形式化为输入图属性的决策问题，即任务被定义为所有可能输入图的子集 $\mathcal{T}$，并且代理必须决定网络是否属于 $\mathcal{T}$。我们重点关注可在多项式运动和多项式时间局部计算中解决的决策问题。本文的贡献在于，具有一位代理内存和 $O(1)$ 位存储（即节点内存）的非常弱的系统的计算能力相当于具有 $O(n)$ 位代理内存和 $O(1)$ 位存储的系统。我们还表明，一位智能体记忆对于引导这种等价性至关重要：存在一个可以由一位记忆智能体解决但不能由零位记忆（即遗忘）智能体解决的决策任务。我们的结果是通过用多项式时间开销的一位内存代理来模拟$O(n)$位内存代理的算法推导出来的，该算法是由两种新颖的技术工具开发的。第一个是动态 $s$-$t$ 路径维护机制，每个节点仅使用 $O(1)$ 位存储。第二个是一种新的按字典顺序排列的 DFS 算法，适用于移动代理系统，每个节点具有 $O(1)$ 位内存和 $O(1)$ 位存储。这些工具具有独立的利益。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了单个移动代理在有限内存下决定图属性的计算能力，证明了一位内存代理与O(n)内存代理的计算能力等价。
AI.motivation: 探索移动代理在解决图决策问题时的最小内存需求，分析不同内存配置下的计算能力边界。
AI.method: 开发了动态s-t路径维护机制和字典序DFS算法，通过多项式时间模拟实现低内存代理对高内存代理的等价计算。
AI.result: 一位代理内存与O(n)代理内存系统计算能力等价，且存在仅一位内存可解而零位内存不可解的任务。
AI.conclusion: 一位内存足以实现复杂图决策任务，揭示了移动代理计算中内存需求的临界点及其重要性。

authors_text: Vladimir Braverman,Vincent Cohen-Addad,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Robert Krauthgamer,Chris Schwiegelshohn,Mads Bech Toftrup,Xuan Wu
title: The Power of Uniform Sampling for Coresets
title_zh: 核心集统一采样的力量
abstract: Motivated by practical generalizations of the classic $k$-median and $k$-means objectives, such as clustering with size constraints, fair clustering, and Wasserstein barycenter, we introduce a meta-theorem for designing coresets for constrained-clustering problems. The meta-theorem reduces the task of coreset construction to one on a bounded number of ring instances with a much-relaxed additive error. This reduction enables us to construct coresets using uniform sampling, in contrast to the widely-used importance sampling, and consequently we can easily handle constrained objectives. Notably and perhaps surprisingly, this simpler sampling scheme can yield coresets whose size is independent of $n$, the number of input points. Our technique yields smaller coresets, and sometimes the first coresets, for a large number of constrained clustering problems, including capacitated clustering, fair clustering, Euclidean Wasserstein barycenter, clustering in minor-excluded graph, and polygon clustering under Fréchet and Hausdorff distance. Finally, our technique yields also smaller coresets for $1$-median in low-dimensional Euclidean spaces, specifically of size $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.5})$ in $\mathbb{R}^2$ and $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.6})$ in $\mathbb{R}^3$.
summary: Motivated by practical generalizations of the classic $k$-median and $k$-means objectives, such as clustering with size constraints, fair clustering, and Wasserstein barycenter, we introduce a meta-theorem for designing coresets for constrained-clustering problems. The meta-theorem reduces the task of coreset construction to one on a bounded number of ring instances with a much-relaxed additive error. This reduction enables us to construct coresets using uniform sampling, in contrast to the widely-used importance sampling, and consequently we can easily handle constrained objectives. Notably and perhaps surprisingly, this simpler sampling scheme can yield coresets whose size is independent of $n$, the number of input points. Our technique yields smaller coresets, and sometimes the first coresets, for a large number of constrained clustering problems, including capacitated clustering, fair clustering, Euclidean Wasserstein barycenter, clustering in minor-excluded graph, and polygon clustering under Fréchet and Hausdorff distance. Finally, our technique yields also smaller coresets for $1$-median in low-dimensional Euclidean spaces, specifically of size $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.5})$ in $\mathbb{R}^2$ and $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.6})$ in $\mathbb{R}^3$.
abstract_zh: 受经典 $k$ 中值和 $k$ 均值目标的实际推广（例如具有大小约束的聚类、公平聚类和 Wasserstein 重心）的启发，我们引入了一个用于为约束聚类问题设计核心集的元定理。元定理将核心集构建任务减少为有限数量的环实例上的任务，并且具有非常宽松的加性误差。与广泛使用的重要性采样相比，这种减少使我们能够使用均匀采样构建核心集，因此我们可以轻松处理受限目标。值得注意的是，也许令人惊讶的是，这种更简单的采样方案可以产生大小与输入点数量 $n$ 无关的核心集。我们的技术针对大量约束聚类问题产生更小的核心集，有时甚至是第一个核心集，包括有能力聚类、公平聚类、欧几里德 Wasserstein 重心、次要排除图中的聚类以及 Fréchet 和 Hausdorff 距离下的多边形聚类。最后，我们的技术还为低维欧几里德空间中的 $1$ 中位数生成了更小的核心集，特别是 $\mathbb{R}^2$ 中的 $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.5})$ 大小和 $\mathbb{R}^3$ 中的 $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.6})$ 大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于均匀采样的核心集构造方法，用于解决多种约束聚类问题。
AI.motivation: 经典聚类问题的扩展（如带约束的聚类、公平性要求等）需要更高效的核心集构造方法，而传统重要性采样方法复杂且难以处理约束条件。
AI.method: 通过元定理将约束聚类问题转化为有限环实例，并利用均匀采样替代重要性采样，实现核心集构造。
AI.result: 核心集大小与输入点数无关，在多个约束聚类问题中取得更优结果，且在低维空间1-中位问题中达到~O(ε⁻¹.⁵)（R²）和~O(ε⁻¹.⁶)（R³）的大小。
AI.conclusion: 均匀采样方法在保持核心集质量的同时显著简化构造过程，适用于多种约束场景并取得理论最优或首次结果。

motivation: 经典聚类问题的扩展（如带约束的聚类、公平性要求等）需要更高效的核心集构造方法，而传统重要性采样方法复杂且难以处理约束条件。
method: 通过元定理将约束聚类问题转化为有限环实例，并利用均匀采样替代重要性采样，实现核心集构造。
result: 核心集大小与输入点数无关，在多个约束聚类问题中取得更优结果，且在低维空间1-中位问题中达到~O(ε⁻¹.⁵)（R²）和~O(ε⁻¹.⁶)（R³）的大小。
conclusion: 均匀采样方法在保持核心集质量的同时显著简化构造过程，适用于多种约束场景并取得理论最优或首次结果。
search_text: The Power of Uniform Sampling for Coresets 核心集统一采样的力量 Motivated by practical generalizations of the classic $k$-median and $k$-means objectives, such as clustering with size constraints, fair clustering, and Wasserstein barycenter, we introduce a meta-theorem for designing coresets for constrained-clustering problems. The meta-theorem reduces the task of coreset construction to one on a bounded number of ring instances with a much-relaxed additive error. This reduction enables us to construct coresets using uniform sampling, in contrast to the widely-used importance sampling, and consequently we can easily handle constrained objectives. Notably and perhaps surprisingly, this simpler sampling scheme can yield coresets whose size is independent of $n$, the number of input points. Our technique yields smaller coresets, and sometimes the first coresets, for a large number of constrained clustering problems, including capacitated clustering, fair clustering, Euclidean Wasserstein barycenter, clustering in minor-excluded graph, and polygon clustering under Fréchet and Hausdorff distance. Finally, our technique yields also smaller coresets for $1$-median in low-dimensional Euclidean spaces, specifically of size $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.5})$ in $\mathbb{R}^2$ and $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.6})$ in $\mathbb{R}^3$. 受经典 $k$ 中值和 $k$ 均值目标的实际推广（例如具有大小约束的聚类、公平聚类和 Wasserstein 重心）的启发，我们引入了一个用于为约束聚类问题设计核心集的元定理。元定理将核心集构建任务减少为有限数量的环实例上的任务，并且具有非常宽松的加性误差。与广泛使用的重要性采样相比，这种减少使我们能够使用均匀采样构建核心集，因此我们可以轻松处理受限目标。值得注意的是，也许令人惊讶的是，这种更简单的采样方案可以产生大小与输入点数量 $n$ 无关的核心集。我们的技术针对大量约束聚类问题产生更小的核心集，有时甚至是第一个核心集，包括有能力聚类、公平聚类、欧几里德 Wasserstein 重心、次要排除图中的聚类以及 Fréchet 和 Hausdorff 距离下的多边形聚类。最后，我们的技术还为低维欧几里德空间中的 $1$ 中位数生成了更小的核心集，特别是 $\mathbb{R}^2$ 中的 $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.5})$ 大小和 $\mathbb{R}^3$ 中的 $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-1.6})$ 大小。 本文提出了一种基于均匀采样的核心集构造方法，用于解决多种约束聚类问题。 Vladimir Braverman,Vincent Cohen-Addad,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Robert Krauthgamer,Chris Schwiegelshohn,Mads Bech Toftrup,Xuan Wu cs.DS

authors_text: Erbet Costa Almeida,Carine de Menezes Rebello,Marcio Fontana,Leizer Schnitman,Idelfonso Bessa dos Reis Nogueira
title: A Robust Learning Methodology for Uncertainty-aware Scientific Machine Learning models
title_zh: 用于不确定性感知科学机器学习模型的稳健学习方法
abstract: Robust learning is an important issue in Scientific Machine Learning (SciML). There are several works in the literature addressing this topic. However, there is an increasing demand for methods that can simultaneously consider all the different uncertainty components involved in SciML model identification. Hence, this work proposes a comprehensive methodology for uncertainty evaluation of the SciML that also considers several possible sources of uncertainties involved in the identification process. The uncertainties considered in the proposed method are the absence of theory and causal models, the sensitiveness to data corruption or imperfection, and the computational effort. Therefore, it was possible to provide an overall strategy for the uncertainty-aware models in the SciML field. The methodology is validated through a case study, developing a Soft Sensor for a polymerization reactor. The results demonstrated that the identified Soft Sensor are robust for uncertainties, corroborating with the consistency of the proposed approach.
summary: Robust learning is an important issue in Scientific Machine Learning (SciML). There are several works in the literature addressing this topic. However, there is an increasing demand for methods that can simultaneously consider all the different uncertainty components involved in SciML model identification. Hence, this work proposes a comprehensive methodology for uncertainty evaluation of the SciML that also considers several possible sources of uncertainties involved in the identification process. The uncertainties considered in the proposed method are the absence of theory and causal models, the sensitiveness to data corruption or imperfection, and the computational effort. Therefore, it was possible to provide an overall strategy for the uncertainty-aware models in the SciML field. The methodology is validated through a case study, developing a Soft Sensor for a polymerization reactor. The results demonstrated that the identified Soft Sensor are robust for uncertainties, corroborating with the consistency of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒学习是科学机器学习（SciML）中的一个重要问题。文献中有几部著作讨论了这个主题。然而，对能够同时考虑 SciML 模型识别中涉及的所有不同不确定性成分的方法的需求不断增加。因此，这项工作提出了一种用于 SciML 不确定性评估的综合方法，该方法还考虑了识别过程中涉及的几种可能的不确定性来源。该方法考虑的不确定性是缺乏理论和因果模型、对数据损坏或不完善的敏感性以及计算量。因此，可以为SciML领域的不确定性感知模型提供总体策略。该方法通过案例研究得到验证，为聚合反应器开发软传感器。结果表明，所识别的软传感器对于不确定性具有鲁棒性，证实了所提出方法的一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于科学机器学习（SciML）的鲁棒学习方法，旨在全面评估模型识别过程中涉及的多种不确定性因素。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能同时考虑SciML模型识别中的多种不确定性来源，如理论缺失、数据缺陷和计算成本，需更全面的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出综合不确定性评估方法，涵盖理论缺失、数据敏感性及计算成本，并通过聚合反应器软传感器案例验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 案例研究表明，所开发的软传感器在应对不确定性时表现稳健，验证了方法的可行性与一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为SciML领域提供了不确定性感知模型的整体策略，有效提升了模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yundi Shi,Piji Li,Changchun Yin,Zhaoyang Han,Lu Zhou,Zhe Liu
title: PromptAttack: Prompt-based Attack for Language Models via Gradient Search
title_zh: PromptAttack：通过梯度搜索对语言模型进行基于提示的攻击
abstract: As the pre-trained language models (PLMs) continue to grow, so do the hardware and data requirements for fine-tuning PLMs. Therefore, the researchers have come up with a lighter method called \textit{Prompt Learning}. However, during the investigations, we observe that the prompt learning methods are vulnerable and can easily be attacked by some illegally constructed prompts, resulting in classification errors, and serious security problems for PLMs. Most of the current research ignores the security issue of prompt-based methods. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a malicious prompt template construction method (\textbf{PromptAttack}) to probe the security performance of PLMs. Several unfriendly template construction approaches are investigated to guide the model to misclassify the task. Extensive experiments on three datasets and three PLMs prove the effectiveness of our proposed approach PromptAttack. We also conduct experiments to verify that our method is applicable in few-shot scenarios.
summary: As the pre-trained language models (PLMs) continue to grow, so do the hardware and data requirements for fine-tuning PLMs. Therefore, the researchers have come up with a lighter method called \textit{Prompt Learning}. However, during the investigations, we observe that the prompt learning methods are vulnerable and can easily be attacked by some illegally constructed prompts, resulting in classification errors, and serious security problems for PLMs. Most of the current research ignores the security issue of prompt-based methods. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a malicious prompt template construction method (\textbf{PromptAttack}) to probe the security performance of PLMs. Several unfriendly template construction approaches are investigated to guide the model to misclassify the task. Extensive experiments on three datasets and three PLMs prove the effectiveness of our proposed approach PromptAttack. We also conduct experiments to verify that our method is applicable in few-shot scenarios.
abstract_zh: 随着预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的不断增长，微调 PLM 的硬件和数据要求也在不断增加。因此，研究人员提出了一种更简单的方法，称为 \textit{Prompt Learning}。然而，在调查过程中，我们发现提示学习方法存在漏洞，很容易受到一些非法构造的提示的攻击，导致分类错误，给PLM带来严重的安全问题。目前大多数研究都忽略了基于提示的方法的安全问题。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种恶意提示模板构造方法（\textbf{PromptAttack}）来探测PLM的安全性能。研究了几种不友好的模板构建方法来引导模型对任务进行错误分类。对三个数据集和三个 PLM 的广泛实验证明了我们提出的方法 PromptAttack 的有效性。我们还进行了实验来验证我们的方法适用于少镜头场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于梯度搜索的恶意提示模板构建方法PromptAttack，用于探测预训练语言模型（PLMs）在提示学习中的安全性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管提示学习方法在微调PLMs时更轻量，但现有研究忽视了其安全风险。作者发现此类方法易受恶意提示攻击，导致分类错误和安全隐患。
AI.method: 通过梯度搜索构造恶意提示模板，引导模型产生错误分类结果，并在三个数据集和三个PLMs上验证方法有效性，同时测试其在少样本场景下的适用性。
AI.result: 实验表明PromptAttack能有效攻击PLMs，导致显著分类错误，且在少样本情况下仍保持攻击效果。
AI.conclusion: PromptAttack揭示了提示学习方法的安全缺陷，强调需加强PLMs在提示攻击场景下的防御机制研究。

title: Semi-Supervised Domain Adaptation by Similarity based Pseudo-label Injection
title_zh: 基于相似性的伪标签注入的半监督域适应
abstract: One of the primary challenges in Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation (SSDA) is the skewed ratio between the number of labeled source and target samples, causing the model to be biased towards the source domain. Recent works in SSDA show that aligning only the labeled target samples with the source samples potentially leads to incomplete domain alignment of the target domain to the source domain. In our approach, to align the two domains, we leverage contrastive losses to learn a semantically meaningful and a domain agnostic feature space using the supervised samples from both domains. To mitigate challenges caused by the skewed label ratio, we pseudo-label the unlabeled target samples by comparing their feature representation to those of the labeled samples from both the source and target domains. Furthermore, to increase the support of the target domain, these potentially noisy pseudo-labels are gradually injected into the labeled target dataset over the course of training. Specifically, we use a temperature scaled cosine similarity measure to assign a soft pseudo-label to the unlabeled target samples. Additionally, we compute an exponential moving average of the soft pseudo-labels for each unlabeled sample. These pseudo-labels are progressively injected or removed) into the (from) the labeled target dataset based on a confidence threshold to supplement the alignment of the source and target distributions. Finally, we use a supervised contrastive loss on the labeled and pseudo-labeled datasets to align the source and target distributions. Using our proposed approach, we showcase state-of-the-art performance on SSDA benchmarks - Office-Home, DomainNet and Office-31.
summary: One of the primary challenges in Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation (SSDA) is the skewed ratio between the number of labeled source and target samples, causing the model to be biased towards the source domain. Recent works in SSDA show that aligning only the labeled target samples with the source samples potentially leads to incomplete domain alignment of the target domain to the source domain. In our approach, to align the two domains, we leverage contrastive losses to learn a semantically meaningful and a domain agnostic feature space using the supervised samples from both domains. To mitigate challenges caused by the skewed label ratio, we pseudo-label the unlabeled target samples by comparing their feature representation to those of the labeled samples from both the source and target domains. Furthermore, to increase the support of the target domain, these potentially noisy pseudo-labels are gradually injected into the labeled target dataset over the course of training. Specifically, we use a temperature scaled cosine similarity measure to assign a soft pseudo-label to the unlabeled target samples. Additionally, we compute an exponential moving average of the soft pseudo-labels for each unlabeled sample. These pseudo-labels are progressively injected or removed) into the (from) the labeled target dataset based on a confidence threshold to supplement the alignment of the source and target distributions. Finally, we use a supervised contrastive loss on the labeled and pseudo-labeled datasets to align the source and target distributions. Using our proposed approach, we showcase state-of-the-art performance on SSDA benchmarks - Office-Home, DomainNet and Office-31.
abstract_zh: 半监督域适应（SSDA）的主要挑战之一是标记的源样本和目标样本数量之间的偏差比率，导致模型偏向源域。 SSDA 最近的工作表明，仅将标记的目标样本与源样本对齐可能会导致目标域与源域的域对齐不完整。在我们的方法中，为了对齐两个域，我们利用对比损失来使用来自两个域的监督样本来学习语义上有意义且与域无关的特征空间。为了减轻由倾斜的标签比率带来的挑战，我们通过将未标记的目标样本的特征表示与来自源域和目标域的标记样本的特征表示进行比较来对未标记的目标样本进行伪标记。此外，为了增加对目标域的支持，这些潜在的噪声伪标签在训练过程中逐渐注入到带标签的目标数据集中。具体来说，我们使用温度缩放的余弦相似性度量来为未标记的目标样本分配软伪标签。此外，我们计算每个未标记样本的软伪标签的指数移动平均值。这些伪标签根据置信度阈值逐步注入或删除到标记的目标数据集中，以补充源分布和目标分布的对齐。最后，我们在标记和伪标记数据集上使用监督对比损失来对齐源分布和目标分布。使用我们提出的方法，我们在 SSDA 基准测试（Office-Home、DomainNet 和 Office-31）上展示了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相似度伪标签注入的半监督领域自适应方法，解决源域和目标域标签比例失衡导致的模型偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SSDA方法因仅对齐有标签目标样本，导致目标域分布对齐不完整，且标签比例失衡会使模型偏向源域。
AI.method: 利用对比损失构建语义特征空间，通过温度缩放余弦相似度为无标签目标样本生成软伪标签，并计算指数移动平均。根据置信度阈值逐步注入伪标签至目标数据集，最终使用监督对比损失对齐源目标分布。
AI.result: 在Office-Home、DomainNet和Office-31基准上达到SSDA最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 伪标签渐进注入机制有效缓解标签比例失衡问题，结合特征对齐策略显著提升领域自适应效果。

search_text: Semi-Supervised Domain Adaptation by Similarity based Pseudo-label Injection 基于相似性的伪标签注入的半监督域适应 One of the primary challenges in Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation (SSDA) is the skewed ratio between the number of labeled source and target samples, causing the model to be biased towards the source domain. Recent works in SSDA show that aligning only the labeled target samples with the source samples potentially leads to incomplete domain alignment of the target domain to the source domain. In our approach, to align the two domains, we leverage contrastive losses to learn a semantically meaningful and a domain agnostic feature space using the supervised samples from both domains. To mitigate challenges caused by the skewed label ratio, we pseudo-label the unlabeled target samples by comparing their feature representation to those of the labeled samples from both the source and target domains. Furthermore, to increase the support of the target domain, these potentially noisy pseudo-labels are gradually injected into the labeled target dataset over the course of training. Specifically, we use a temperature scaled cosine similarity measure to assign a soft pseudo-label to the unlabeled target samples. Additionally, we compute an exponential moving average of the soft pseudo-labels for each unlabeled sample. These pseudo-labels are progressively injected or removed) into the (from) the labeled target dataset based on a confidence threshold to supplement the alignment of the source and target distributions. Finally, we use a supervised contrastive loss on the labeled and pseudo-labeled datasets to align the source and target distributions. Using our proposed approach, we showcase state-of-the-art performance on SSDA benchmarks - Office-Home, DomainNet and Office-31. 半监督域适应（SSDA）的主要挑战之一是标记的源样本和目标样本数量之间的偏差比率，导致模型偏向源域。 SSDA 最近的工作表明，仅将标记的目标样本与源样本对齐可能会导致目标域与源域的域对齐不完整。在我们的方法中，为了对齐两个域，我们利用对比损失来使用来自两个域的监督样本来学习语义上有意义且与域无关的特征空间。为了减轻由倾斜的标签比率带来的挑战，我们通过将未标记的目标样本的特征表示与来自源域和目标域的标记样本的特征表示进行比较来对未标记的目标样本进行伪标记。此外，为了增加对目标域的支持，这些潜在的噪声伪标签在训练过程中逐渐注入到带标签的目标数据集中。具体来说，我们使用温度缩放的余弦相似性度量来为未标记的目标样本分配软伪标签。此外，我们计算每个未标记样本的软伪标签的指数移动平均值。这些伪标签根据置信度阈值逐步注入或删除到标记的目标数据集中，以补充源分布和目标分布的对齐。最后，我们在标记和伪标记数据集上使用监督对比损失来对齐源分布和目标分布。使用我们提出的方法，我们在 SSDA 基准测试（Office-Home、DomainNet 和 Office-31）上展示了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于相似度伪标签注入的半监督领域自适应方法，解决源域和目标域标签比例失衡导致的模型偏差问题。 Abhay Rawat,Isha Dua,Saurav Gupta,Rahul Tallamraju cs.CV

authors_text: Roman Kail,Kirill Fedyanin,Nikita Muravev,Alexey Zaytsev,Maxim Panov
title: ScaleFace: Uncertainty-aware Deep Metric Learning
title_zh: ScaleFace：不确定性感知深度度量学习
abstract: The performance of modern deep learning-based systems dramatically depends on the quality of input objects. For example, face recognition quality would be lower for blurry or corrupted inputs. However, it is hard to predict the influence of input quality on the resulting accuracy in more complex scenarios. We propose an approach for deep metric learning that allows direct estimation of the uncertainty with almost no additional computational cost. The developed \textit{ScaleFace} algorithm uses trainable scale values that modify similarities in the space of embeddings. These input-dependent scale values represent a measure of confidence in the recognition result, thus allowing uncertainty estimation. We provide comprehensive experiments on face recognition tasks that show the superior performance of ScaleFace compared to other uncertainty-aware face recognition approaches. We also extend the results to the task of text-to-image retrieval showing that the proposed approach beats the competitors with significant margin.
summary: The performance of modern deep learning-based systems dramatically depends on the quality of input objects. For example, face recognition quality would be lower for blurry or corrupted inputs. However, it is hard to predict the influence of input quality on the resulting accuracy in more complex scenarios. We propose an approach for deep metric learning that allows direct estimation of the uncertainty with almost no additional computational cost. The developed \textit{ScaleFace} algorithm uses trainable scale values that modify similarities in the space of embeddings. These input-dependent scale values represent a measure of confidence in the recognition result, thus allowing uncertainty estimation. We provide comprehensive experiments on face recognition tasks that show the superior performance of ScaleFace compared to other uncertainty-aware face recognition approaches. We also extend the results to the task of text-to-image retrieval showing that the proposed approach beats the competitors with significant margin.
abstract_zh: 现代基于深度学习的系统的性能很大程度上取决于输入对象的质量。例如，对于模糊或损坏的输入，人脸识别质量会较低。然而，在更复杂的场景中，很难预测输入质量对最终准确性的影响。我们提出了一种深度度量学习的方法，可以直接估计不确定性，几乎不需要额外的计算成本。开发的 \textit{ScaleFace} 算法使用可训练的比例值来修改嵌入空间中的相似性。这些依赖于输入的尺度值代表了识别结果的置信度度量，从而允许不确定性估计。我们提供了有关人脸识别任务的全面实验，这些实验表明 ScaleFace 与其他不确定性感知人脸识别方法相比具有优越的性能。我们还将结果扩展到文本到图像检索的任务，表明所提出的方法以显着的优势击败了竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ScaleFace的不确定性感知深度度量学习方法，用于提升人脸识别和文本到图像检索任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习系统性能高度依赖输入质量，但难以预测输入质量对模型准确率的影响，尤其在复杂场景中缺乏有效的不确定性估计方法。
AI.method: 通过引入可训练的输入相关尺度值，动态调整嵌入空间中的相似度计算，利用这些尺度值直接量化识别结果的置信度，实现不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在人脸识别任务中ScaleFace优于现有不确定性感知方法，在文本到图像检索任务中也取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ScaleFace通过低成本的不确定性估计机制，在多个视觉任务中展现了优越的性能，为模型可靠性评估提供了新思路。

title: SlateFree: a Model-Free Decomposition for Reinforcement Learning with Slate Actions
title_zh: SlateFree：使用 Slate 操作进行强化学习的无模型分解
abstract: We consider the problem of sequential recommendations, where at each step an agent proposes some slate of $N$ distinct items to a user from a much larger catalog of size $K>>N$. The user has unknown preferences towards the recommendations and the agent takes sequential actions that optimise (in our case minimise) some user-related cost, with the help of Reinforcement Learning. The possible item combinations for a slate is $\binom{K}{N}$, an enormous number rendering value iteration methods intractable. We prove that the slate-MDP can actually be decomposed using just $K$ item-related $Q$ functions per state, which describe the problem in a more compact and efficient way. Based on this, we propose a novel model-free SARSA and Q-learning algorithm that performs $N$ parallel iterations per step, without any prior user knowledge. We call this method \texttt{SlateFree}, i.e. free-of-slates, and we show numerically that it converges very fast to the exact optimum for arbitrary user profiles, and that it outperforms alternatives from the literature.
summary: We consider the problem of sequential recommendations, where at each step an agent proposes some slate of $N$ distinct items to a user from a much larger catalog of size $K>>N$. The user has unknown preferences towards the recommendations and the agent takes sequential actions that optimise (in our case minimise) some user-related cost, with the help of Reinforcement Learning. The possible item combinations for a slate is $\binom{K}{N}$, an enormous number rendering value iteration methods intractable. We prove that the slate-MDP can actually be decomposed using just $K$ item-related $Q$ functions per state, which describe the problem in a more compact and efficient way. Based on this, we propose a novel model-free SARSA and Q-learning algorithm that performs $N$ parallel iterations per step, without any prior user knowledge. We call this method \texttt{SlateFree}, i.e. free-of-slates, and we show numerically that it converges very fast to the exact optimum for arbitrary user profiles, and that it outperforms alternatives from the literature.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑顺序推荐的问题，其中每一步代理都会从大小为 $K>>N$ 的更大目录中向用户推荐一些 $N$ 不同项目。用户对推荐的偏好未知，代理在强化学习的帮助下采取顺序操作来优化（在我们的例子中最小化）一些与用户相关的成本。板岩可能的项目组合为 $\binom{K}{N}$，数量巨大，渲染值迭代方法很棘手。我们证明，slate-MDP 实际上可以使用每个状态仅使用 $K$ 个项目相关的 $Q$ 函数来分解，从而以更紧凑和有效的方式描述问题。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的无模型 SARSA 和 Q 学习算法，该算法每步执行 $N$ 并行迭代，无需任何用户先验知识。我们将这种方法称为 \texttt{SlateFree}，即 free-of-slates，并且我们以数字方式表明，它非常快地收敛到任意用户配置文件的精确最优值，并且它优于文献中的替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SlateFree的无模型强化学习方法，用于解决序列推荐中大规模物品组合（slate）的优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统价值迭代方法因物品组合数量巨大（C(K,N)）而难以处理，且需依赖用户先验知识，亟需更高效且无需先验信息的算法。
AI.method: 通过将slate-MDP分解为每个状态下的K个物品相关Q函数，提出并行迭代的SARSA和Q-learning算法，无需用户偏好信息。
AI.result: 实验表明SlateFree能快速收敛至任意用户画像的最优解，且性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SlateFree通过分解Q函数有效解决了大规模slate动作的强化学习问题，具有广泛适用性和优越性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SlateFree的无模型强化学习方法，用于解决序列推荐中大规模物品组合（slate）的优化问题。
motivation: 传统价值迭代方法因物品组合数量巨大（C(K,N)）而难以处理，且需依赖用户先验知识，亟需更高效且无需先验信息的算法。
method: 通过将slate-MDP分解为每个状态下的K个物品相关Q函数，提出并行迭代的SARSA和Q-learning算法，无需用户偏好信息。
result: 实验表明SlateFree能快速收敛至任意用户画像的最优解，且性能优于现有方法。
conclusion: SlateFree通过分解Q函数有效解决了大规模slate动作的强化学习问题，具有广泛适用性和优越性。
search_text: SlateFree: a Model-Free Decomposition for Reinforcement Learning with Slate Actions SlateFree：使用 Slate 操作进行强化学习的无模型分解 We consider the problem of sequential recommendations, where at each step an agent proposes some slate of $N$ distinct items to a user from a much larger catalog of size $K>>N$. The user has unknown preferences towards the recommendations and the agent takes sequential actions that optimise (in our case minimise) some user-related cost, with the help of Reinforcement Learning. The possible item combinations for a slate is $\binom{K}{N}$, an enormous number rendering value iteration methods intractable. We prove that the slate-MDP can actually be decomposed using just $K$ item-related $Q$ functions per state, which describe the problem in a more compact and efficient way. Based on this, we propose a novel model-free SARSA and Q-learning algorithm that performs $N$ parallel iterations per step, without any prior user knowledge. We call this method \texttt{SlateFree}, i.e. free-of-slates, and we show numerically that it converges very fast to the exact optimum for arbitrary user profiles, and that it outperforms alternatives from the literature. 我们考虑顺序推荐的问题，其中每一步代理都会从大小为 $K>>N$ 的更大目录中向用户推荐一些 $N$ 不同项目。用户对推荐的偏好未知，代理在强化学习的帮助下采取顺序操作来优化（在我们的例子中最小化）一些与用户相关的成本。板岩可能的项目组合为 $\binom{K}{N}$，数量巨大，渲染值迭代方法很棘手。我们证明，slate-MDP 实际上可以使用每个状态仅使用 $K$ 个项目相关的 $Q$ 函数来分解，从而以更紧凑和有效的方式描述问题。基于此，我们提出了一种新颖的无模型 SARSA 和 Q 学习算法，该算法每步执行 $N$ 并行迭代，无需任何用户先验知识。我们将这种方法称为 \texttt{SlateFree}，即 free-of-slates，并且我们以数字方式表明，它非常快地收敛到任意用户配置文件的精确最优值，并且它优于文献中的替代方法。 本文提出了一种名为SlateFree的无模型强化学习方法，用于解决序列推荐中大规模物品组合（slate）的优化问题。 Anastasios Giovanidis cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.NI,cs.SI

title: The Best Decisions Are Not the Best Advice: Making Adherence-Aware Recommendations
title_zh: 最好的决定不是最好的建议：提出遵守意识的建议
abstract: Many high-stake decisions follow an expert-in-loop structure in that a human operator receives recommendations from an algorithm but is the ultimate decision maker. Hence, the algorithm's recommendation may differ from the actual decision implemented in practice. However, most algorithmic recommendations are obtained by solving an optimization problem that assumes recommendations will be perfectly implemented. We propose an adherence-aware optimization framework to capture the dichotomy between the recommended and the implemented policy and analyze the impact of partial adherence on the optimal recommendation. We show that overlooking the partial adherence phenomenon, as is currently being done by most recommendation engines, can lead to arbitrarily severe performance deterioration, compared with both the current human baseline performance and what is expected by the recommendation algorithm. Our framework also provides useful tools to analyze the structure and to compute optimal recommendation policies that are naturally immune against such human deviations, and are guaranteed to improve upon the baseline policy.
summary: Many high-stake decisions follow an expert-in-loop structure in that a human operator receives recommendations from an algorithm but is the ultimate decision maker. Hence, the algorithm's recommendation may differ from the actual decision implemented in practice. However, most algorithmic recommendations are obtained by solving an optimization problem that assumes recommendations will be perfectly implemented. We propose an adherence-aware optimization framework to capture the dichotomy between the recommended and the implemented policy and analyze the impact of partial adherence on the optimal recommendation. We show that overlooking the partial adherence phenomenon, as is currently being done by most recommendation engines, can lead to arbitrarily severe performance deterioration, compared with both the current human baseline performance and what is expected by the recommendation algorithm. Our framework also provides useful tools to analyze the structure and to compute optimal recommendation policies that are naturally immune against such human deviations, and are guaranteed to improve upon the baseline policy.
abstract_zh: 许多高风险决策都遵循专家循环结构，其中人类操作员接收算法的建议，但他是最终的决策者。因此，算法的建议可能与实践中实施的实际决策不同。然而，大多数算法推荐都是通过解决假设推荐将得到完美实现的优化问题来获得的。我们提出了一个遵守感知的优化框架，以捕获推荐和实施的策略之间的二分法，并分析部分遵守对最佳推荐的影响。我们表明，与当前的人类基线性能和推荐算法的预期相比，忽视部分遵守现象（正如大多数推荐引擎目前所做的那样）可能会导致任意严重的性能恶化。我们的框架还提供了有用的工具来分析结构并计算最佳推荐策略，这些策略自然不受此类人为偏差的影响，并保证在基线策略的基础上进行改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种考虑人类遵循度的优化框架，改进推荐系统在高风险决策场景下的实际效果。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统假设人类会完全遵循算法建议，但实际决策中人类可能偏离推荐，导致性能显著下降。
AI.method: 构建包含推荐策略与实际执行策略差异的优化模型，分析部分遵循对最优解的影响并设计抗偏差推荐策略。
AI.result: 证明忽视遵循度会导致性能任意恶化，提出可计算的免疫人类偏差的推荐策略，优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 需在推荐系统中纳入人类行为偏差建模，以确保算法建议在实际决策中的有效性与鲁棒性。

title: Induced Cycles and Paths Are Harder Than You Think
title_zh: 诱导循环和路径比你想象的更难
abstract: The goal of the paper is to give fine-grained hardness results for the Subgraph Isomorphism (SI) problem for fixed size induced patterns $H$, based on the $k$-Clique hypothesis that the current best algorithms for Clique are optimal. Our first main result is that for any pattern graph $H$ that is a {\em core}, the SI problem for $H$ is at least as hard as $t$-Clique, where $t$ is the size of the largest clique minor of $H$. This improves (for cores) the previous known results [Dalirrooyfard-Vassilevska W. STOC'20] that the SI for $H$ is at least as hard as $k$-clique where $k$ is the size of the largest clique {\em subgraph} in $H$, or the chromatic number of $H$ (under the Hadwiger conjecture). For detecting \emph{any} graph pattern $H$, we further remove the dependency of the result of [Dalirrooyfard-Vassilevska W. STOC'20] on the Hadwiger conjecture at the cost of a sub-polynomial decrease in the lower bound. The result for cores allows us to prove that the SI problem for induced $k$-Path and $k$-Cycle is harder than previously known. Previously [Floderus et al. Theor. CS 2015] had shown that $k$-Path and $k$-Cycle are at least as hard to detect as a $\lfloor k/2\rfloor$-Clique. We show that they are in fact at least as hard as $3k/4-O(1)$-Clique, improving the conditional lower bound exponent by a factor of $3/2$. Finally, we provide a new conditional lower bound for detecting induced $4$-cycles: $n^{2-o(1)}$ time is necessary even in graphs with $n$ nodes and $O(n^{1.5})$ edges.

Our first main result is that for any pattern graph $H$ that is a {\em core}, the SI problem for $H$ is at least as hard as $t$-Clique, where $t$ is the size of the largest clique minor of $H$. This improves (for cores) the previous known results [Dalirrooyfard-Vassilevska W. STOC'20] that the SI for $H$ is at least as hard as $k$-clique where $k$ is the size of the largest clique {\em subgraph} in $H$, or the chromatic number of $H$ (under the Hadwiger conjecture). For detecting \emph{any} graph pattern $H$, we further remove the dependency of the result of [Dalirrooyfard-Vassilevska W. STOC'20] on the Hadwiger conjecture at the cost of a sub-polynomial decrease in the lower bound. The result for cores allows us to prove that the SI problem for induced $k$-Path and $k$-Cycle is harder than previously known. Previously [Floderus et al. Theor. CS 2015] had shown that $k$-Path and $k$-Cycle are at least as hard to detect as a $\lfloor k/2\rfloor$-Clique. We show that they are in fact at least as hard as $3k/4-O(1)$-Clique, improving the conditional lower bound exponent by a factor of $3/2$. Finally, we provide a new conditional lower bound for detecting induced $4$-cycles: $n^{2-o(1)}$ time is necessary even in graphs with $n$ nodes and $O(n^{1.5})$ edges.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是基于 $k$-Clique 假设（即当前最好的 Clique 算法是最优的），为固定大小诱导模式 $H$ 的子图同构 (SI) 问题提供细粒度的硬度结果。我们的第一个主要结果是，对于任何作为 {\em core} 的模式图 $H$，$H$ 的 SI 问题至少与 $t$-Clique 一样困难，其中 $t$ 是 $H$ 的最大小派系的大小。这改进了（对于核心）先前已知的结果 [Dalirrooyfard-Vassilevska W. STOC'20]，即 $H$ 的 SI 至少与 $k$-clique 一样难，其中 $k$ 是 $H$ 中最大 clique {\em subgraph} 的大小，或 $H$ 的色数（根据 Hadwiger 猜想）。为了检测 \emph{any} 图模式 $H$，我们进一步消除了 [Dalirrooyfard-Vassilevska W. STOC'20] 结果对 Hadwiger 猜想的依赖性，代价是下界的次多项式减小。核心的结果使我们能够证明诱导 $k$-Path 和 $k$-Cycle 的 SI 问题比之前已知的更难。以前[Floderus 等人。理论。 CS 2015] 表明 $k$-Path 和 $k$-Cycle 至少与 $\lfloor k/2\rfloor$-Clique 一样难以检测。我们证明它们实际上至少与 $3k/4-O(1)$-Clique 一样困难，将条件下限指数提高了 $3/2$。最后，我们提供了一个新的条件下界来检测诱导的 $4$ 循环：即使在具有 $n$ 个节点和 $O(n^{1.5})$ 边的图中，$n^{2-o(1)}$ 时间也是必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在k-Clique假设下，固定大小诱导子图同构问题的精细难度界限，特别针对诱导路径和环的检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有结果依赖于图的团子图或色数，但本文旨在通过团小图的更优分析，去除对哈迪格猜想的依赖并提升下界。
AI.method: 基于k-Clique假设，利用图H的最大团小图大小t，证明其诱导子图同构问题难度不低于t-Clique，并改进对诱导路径/环的下界分析。
AI.result: 对于核心图H，诱导SI问题难度不低于t-Clique（t为H的最大团小图大小）；诱导k-Path/Cycle难度提升至3k/4-Clique；诱导4-环检测需n^{2-o(1)}时间。
AI.conclusion: 诱导子图问题比此前认知更难，且在稀疏图中诱导4-环检测存在显著时间下界，深化了对子图同构问题复杂性的理解。

Finally, we provide a new conditional lower bound for detecting induced $4$-cycles: $n^{2-o(1)}$ time is necessary even in graphs with $n$ nodes and $O(n^{1.5})$ edges. 本文的目标是基于 $k$-Clique 假设（即当前最好的 Clique 算法是最优的），为固定大小诱导模式 $H$ 的子图同构 (SI) 问题提供细粒度的硬度结果。我们的第一个主要结果是，对于任何作为 {\em core} 的模式图 $H$，$H$ 的 SI 问题至少与 $t$-Clique 一样困难，其中 $t$ 是 $H$ 的最大小派系的大小。这改进了（对于核心）先前已知的结果 [Dalirrooyfard-Vassilevska W. STOC'20]，即 $H$ 的 SI 至少与 $k$-clique 一样难，其中 $k$ 是 $H$ 中最大 clique {\em subgraph} 的大小，或 $H$ 的色数（根据 Hadwiger 猜想）。为了检测 \emph{any} 图模式 $H$，我们进一步消除了 [Dalirrooyfard-Vassilevska W. STOC'20] 结果对 Hadwiger 猜想的依赖性，代价是下界的次多项式减小。核心的结果使我们能够证明诱导 $k$-Path 和 $k$-Cycle 的 SI 问题比之前已知的更难。以前[Floderus 等人。理论。 CS 2015] 表明 $k$-Path 和 $k$-Cycle 至少与 $\lfloor k/2\rfloor$-Clique 一样难以检测。我们证明它们实际上至少与 $3k/4-O(1)$-Clique 一样困难，将条件下限指数提高了 $3/2$。最后，我们提供了一个新的条件下界来检测诱导的 $4$ 循环：即使在具有 $n$ 个节点和 $O(n^{1.5})$ 边的图中，$n^{2-o(1)}$ 时间也是必要的。 本文研究了在k-Clique假设下，固定大小诱导子图同构问题的精细难度界限，特别针对诱导路径和环的检测问题。 Mina Dalirrooyfard,Virginia Vassilevska Williams cs.CC,cs.DS

title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation via Style-Aware Self-intermediate Domain
title_zh: 通过风格感知自我中间域进行无监督域适应
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has attracted considerable attention, which transfers knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a related but unlabeled target domain. Reducing inter-domain differences has always been a crucial factor to improve performance in UDA, especially for tasks where there is a large gap between source and target domains. To this end, we propose a novel style-aware feature fusion method (SAFF) to bridge the large domain gap and transfer knowledge while alleviating the loss of class-discriminative information. Inspired by the human transitive inference and learning ability, a novel style-aware self-intermediate domain (SSID) is investigated to link two seemingly unrelated concepts through a series of intermediate auxiliary synthesized concepts. Specifically, we propose a novel learning strategy of SSID, which selects samples from both source and target domains as anchors, and then randomly fuses the object and style features of these anchors to generate labeled and style-rich intermediate auxiliary features for knowledge transfer. Moreover, we design an external memory bank to store and update specified labeled features to obtain stable class features and class-wise style features. Based on the proposed memory bank, the intra- and inter-domain loss functions are designed to improve the class recognition ability and feature compatibility, respectively. Meanwhile, we simulate the rich latent feature space of SSID by infinite sampling and the convergence of the loss function by mathematical theory. Finally, we conduct comprehensive experiments on commonly used domain adaptive benchmarks to evaluate the proposed SAFF, and the experimental results show that the proposed SAFF can be easily combined with different backbone networks and obtain better performance as a plug-in-plug-out module.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has attracted considerable attention, which transfers knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a related but unlabeled target domain. Reducing inter-domain differences has always been a crucial factor to improve performance in UDA, especially for tasks where there is a large gap between source and target domains. To this end, we propose a novel style-aware feature fusion method (SAFF) to bridge the large domain gap and transfer knowledge while alleviating the loss of class-discriminative information. Inspired by the human transitive inference and learning ability, a novel style-aware self-intermediate domain (SSID) is investigated to link two seemingly unrelated concepts through a series of intermediate auxiliary synthesized concepts. Specifically, we propose a novel learning strategy of SSID, which selects samples from both source and target domains as anchors, and then randomly fuses the object and style features of these anchors to generate labeled and style-rich intermediate auxiliary features for knowledge transfer. Moreover, we design an external memory bank to store and update specified labeled features to obtain stable class features and class-wise style features. Based on the proposed memory bank, the intra- and inter-domain loss functions are designed to improve the class recognition ability and feature compatibility, respectively. Meanwhile, we simulate the rich latent feature space of SSID by infinite sampling and the convergence of the loss function by mathematical theory. Finally, we conduct comprehensive experiments on commonly used domain adaptive benchmarks to evaluate the proposed SAFF, and the experimental results show that the proposed SAFF can be easily combined with different backbone networks and obtain better performance as a plug-in-plug-out module.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）引起了相当大的关注，它将知识从标签丰富的源域转移到相关但未标记的目标域。减少域间差异一直是提高 UDA 性能的关键因素，特别是对于源域和目标域之间存在较大差距的任务。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的风格感知特征融合方法（SAFF）来弥合巨大的领域差距并转移知识，同时减少类别辨别信息的丢失。受人类传递推理和学习能力的启发，研究了一种新颖的风格感知自中间域（SSID），通过一系列中间辅助合成概念来链接两个看似不相关的概念。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的 SSID 学习策略，从源域和目标域中选择样本作为锚点，然后随机融合这些锚点的对象和风格特征，生成带标签且风格丰富的中间辅助特征，用于知识迁移。此外，我们设计了一个外部存储库来存储和更新指定的标记特征，以获得稳定的类特征和逐类风格特征。基于所提出的存储库，设计了域内和域间损失函数，分别提高类识别能力和特征兼容性。同时，我们通过无限采样模拟SSID丰富的潜在特征空间，并通过数学理论模拟损失函数的收敛。最后，我们对常用的领域自适应基准进行了全面的实验来评估所提出的SAFF，实验结果表明所提出的SAFF可以轻松地与不同的骨干网络相结合，并作为插件模块获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于风格感知的自中间域（SSID）的无监督领域自适应方法（SAFF），旨在通过减少源域与目标域间的差异提升领域自适应性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法在源域与目标域存在显著差异时易丢失类别判别信息，需设计新型策略以增强跨领域知识迁移能力并保持特征稳定性。
AI.method: 提出风格感知特征融合方法（SAFF）与自中间域（SSID）框架，通过合成中间辅助特征连接源域与目标域，并设计外部记忆库存储类别特征，结合域内/域间损失函数优化特征兼容性。
AI.result: 在常用领域自适应基准数据集上验证，SAFF模块可无缝集成至不同主干网络，显著提升跨领域任务性能。
AI.conclusion: SAFF通过风格感知的自中间域建模有效缩小领域差异，为无监督领域自适应提供了可扩展且高效的解决方案。

title: Texture image analysis based on joint of multi directions GLCM and local ternary patterns
title_zh: 基于多方向GLCM和局部三元图案联合的纹理图像分析
abstract: Human visual brain use three main component such as color, texture and shape to detect or identify environment and objects. Hence, texture analysis has been paid much attention by scientific researchers in last two decades. Texture features can be used in many different applications in commuter vision or machine learning problems. Since now, many different approaches have been proposed to classify textures. Most of them consider the classification accuracy as the main challenge that should be improved. In this article, a new approach is proposed based on combination of two efficient texture descriptor, co-occurrence matrix and local ternary patterns (LTP). First of all, basic local binary pattern and LTP are performed to extract local textural information. Next, a subset of statistical features is extracted from gray-level co-occurrence matrixes. Finally, concatenated features are used to train classifiers. The performance is evaluated on Brodatz benchmark dataset in terms of accuracy. Experimental results show that proposed approach provide higher classification rate in comparison with some state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Human visual brain use three main component such as color, texture and shape to detect or identify environment and objects. Hence, texture analysis has been paid much attention by scientific researchers in last two decades. Texture features can be used in many different applications in commuter vision or machine learning problems. Since now, many different approaches have been proposed to classify textures. Most of them consider the classification accuracy as the main challenge that should be improved. In this article, a new approach is proposed based on combination of two efficient texture descriptor, co-occurrence matrix and local ternary patterns (LTP). First of all, basic local binary pattern and LTP are performed to extract local textural information. Next, a subset of statistical features is extracted from gray-level co-occurrence matrixes. Finally, concatenated features are used to train classifiers. The performance is evaluated on Brodatz benchmark dataset in terms of accuracy. Experimental results show that proposed approach provide higher classification rate in comparison with some state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 人类视觉大脑使用颜色、纹理和形状等三个主要组成部分来检测或识别环境和物体。因此，近二十年来，纹理分析受到了科学研究人员的广泛关注。纹理特征可用于通勤视觉或机器学习问题中的许多不同应用。从现在起，人们提出了许多不同的方法来对纹理进行分类。他们中的大多数人认为分类精度是应该提高的主要挑战。在本文中，提出了一种基于两种有效纹理描述符、共生矩阵和局部三元模式（LTP）的组合的新方法。首先，执行基本的局部二进制模式和LTP来提取局部纹理信息。接下来，从灰度共生矩阵中提取统计特征的子集。最后，使用串联特征来训练分类器。性能是在 Brodatz 基准数据集上根据准确性进行评估的。实验结果表明，与一些最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法提供了更高的分类率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多方向灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）和局部三元模式（LTP）的纹理图像分析方法，以提高纹理分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 纹理分析在计算机视觉和机器学习中具有广泛应用，但现有方法在分类精度上仍有提升空间。通过结合多种纹理描述子可进一步优化性能。
AI.method: 首先利用局部二值模式（LBP）和局部三元模式（LTP）提取局部纹理信息，再从灰度共生矩阵中提取统计特征，最后将特征拼接用于分类器训练。
AI.result: 在Brodatz基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有先进方法实现了更高的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合GLCM与LTP的纹理描述方法能有效提升图像分类性能，为纹理分析提供新思路。

Experimental results show that proposed approach provide higher classification rate in comparison with some state-of-the-art approaches. 人类视觉大脑使用颜色、纹理和形状等三个主要组成部分来检测或识别环境和物体。因此，近二十年来，纹理分析受到了科学研究人员的广泛关注。纹理特征可用于通勤视觉或机器学习问题中的许多不同应用。从现在起，人们提出了许多不同的方法来对纹理进行分类。他们中的大多数人认为分类精度是应该提高的主要挑战。在本文中，提出了一种基于两种有效纹理描述符、共生矩阵和局部三元模式（LTP）的组合的新方法。首先，执行基本的局部二进制模式和LTP来提取局部纹理信息。接下来，从灰度共生矩阵中提取统计特征的子集。最后，使用串联特征来训练分类器。性能是在 Brodatz 基准数据集上根据准确性进行评估的。实验结果表明，与一些最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法提供了更高的分类率。 本文提出一种结合多方向灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）和局部三元模式（LTP）的纹理图像分析方法，以提高纹理分类的准确性。 Akshakhi Kumar Pritoonka,Faeze Kiani cs.CV

title: Optimizing Reconfigurable Optical Datacenters: The Power of Randomization
title_zh: 优化可重构光学数据中心：随机化的力量
abstract: Reconfigurable optical topologies are a promising new technology to improve datacenter network performance and cope with the explosive growth of traffic. In particular, these networks allow to directly and adaptively connect racks between which there is currently much traffic, hence making an optimal use of the bandwidth capacity by avoiding multi-hop forwarding. This paper studies the dynamic optimization of such reconfigurable topologies, by adapting the network to the traffic in an online manner. The underlying algorithmic problem can be described as an online maximum weight $b$-matching problem, a~generalization of maximum weight matching where each node has at most $b \geq 1$ incident matching edges. We make the case for a randomized approach for matching optimization. Our main contribution is a $O(\log b)$-competitive algorithm and we show that it is asymptotically optimal. This algorithm is hence exponentially better than the best possible deterministic online algorithm. We complement our theoretical results with extensive trace-driven simulations, based on real-world datacenter workloads.
summary: Reconfigurable optical topologies are a promising new technology to improve datacenter network performance and cope with the explosive growth of traffic. In particular, these networks allow to directly and adaptively connect racks between which there is currently much traffic, hence making an optimal use of the bandwidth capacity by avoiding multi-hop forwarding. This paper studies the dynamic optimization of such reconfigurable topologies, by adapting the network to the traffic in an online manner. The underlying algorithmic problem can be described as an online maximum weight $b$-matching problem, a~generalization of maximum weight matching where each node has at most $b \geq 1$ incident matching edges. We make the case for a randomized approach for matching optimization. Our main contribution is a $O(\log b)$-competitive algorithm and we show that it is asymptotically optimal. This algorithm is hence exponentially better than the best possible deterministic online algorithm. We complement our theoretical results with extensive trace-driven simulations, based on real-world datacenter workloads.
abstract_zh: 可重构光拓扑是一项有前途的新技术，可提高数据中心网络性能并应对流量的爆炸性增长。特别是，这些网络允许直接且自适应地连接当前存在大量流量的机架，从而通过避免多跳转发来最佳利用带宽容量。本文研究了这种可重构拓扑的动态优化，通过在线方式使网络适应流量。底层算法问题可以描述为在线最大权重 $b$ 匹配问题，最大权重匹配的概括，其中每个节点最多有 $b \geq 1$ 事件匹配边。我们采用随机方法进行匹配优化。我们的主要贡献是 $O(\log b)$ 竞争算法，并且我们证明它是渐近最优的。因此，该算法比最好的确定性在线算法要好得多。我们通过基于真实数据中心工作负载的广泛跟踪驱动模拟来补充我们的理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了可重构光数据中心网络的动态优化问题，提出了一种基于随机化的在线算法以解决最大权重b-匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数据网络难以应对流量爆炸式增长，可重构光拓扑可通过直接连接高流量机架优化带宽利用率，但其动态优化面临算法效率挑战。
AI.method: 将网络优化建模为在线最大权重b-匹配问题，设计随机化算法并证明其竞争比为O(log b)，通过真实数据中心流量数据进行仿真验证。
AI.result: 提出的随机化算法在理论上限上达到渐近最优，相较于最佳确定性算法性能提升指数级，仿真结果验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 随机化方法在动态网络优化中具有显著优势，为可重构光数据中心的高效运营提供了理论支持与实践方案。

authors_text: Shafa Balaram,Cuong M. Nguyen,Ashraf Kassim,Pavitra Krishnaswamy
title: Consistency-Based Semi-supervised Evidential Active Learning for Diagnostic Radiograph Classification
title_zh: 用于放射诊断分类的基于一致性的半监督证据主动学习
comment: Preprint submitted to MICCAI. Accepted in May 2022
comments: Preprint submitted to MICCAI. Accepted in May 2022
abstract: Deep learning approaches achieve state-of-the-art performance for classifying radiology images, but rely on large labelled datasets that require resource-intensive annotation by specialists. Both semi-supervised learning and active learning can be utilised to mitigate this annotation burden. However, there is limited work on combining the advantages of semi-supervised and active learning approaches for multi-label medical image classification. Here, we introduce a novel Consistency-based Semi-supervised Evidential Active Learning framework (CSEAL). Specifically, we leverage predictive uncertainty based on theories of evidence and subjective logic to develop an end-to-end integrated approach that combines consistency-based semi-supervised learning with uncertainty-based active learning. We apply our approach to enhance four leading consistency-based semi-supervised learning methods: Pseudo-labelling, Virtual Adversarial Training, Mean Teacher and NoTeacher. Extensive evaluations on multi-label Chest X-Ray classification tasks demonstrate that CSEAL achieves substantive performance improvements over two leading semi-supervised active learning baselines. Further, a class-wise breakdown of results shows that our approach can substantially improve accuracy on rarer abnormalities with fewer labelled samples.
summary: Deep learning approaches achieve state-of-the-art performance for classifying radiology images, but rely on large labelled datasets that require resource-intensive annotation by specialists. Both semi-supervised learning and active learning can be utilised to mitigate this annotation burden. However, there is limited work on combining the advantages of semi-supervised and active learning approaches for multi-label medical image classification. Here, we introduce a novel Consistency-based Semi-supervised Evidential Active Learning framework (CSEAL). Specifically, we leverage predictive uncertainty based on theories of evidence and subjective logic to develop an end-to-end integrated approach that combines consistency-based semi-supervised learning with uncertainty-based active learning. We apply our approach to enhance four leading consistency-based semi-supervised learning methods: Pseudo-labelling, Virtual Adversarial Training, Mean Teacher and NoTeacher. Extensive evaluations on multi-label Chest X-Ray classification tasks demonstrate that CSEAL achieves substantive performance improvements over two leading semi-supervised active learning baselines. Further, a class-wise breakdown of results shows that our approach can substantially improve accuracy on rarer abnormalities with fewer labelled samples.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法在放射图像分类方面实现了最先进的性能，但依赖于需要专家进行资源密集型注释的大型标记数据集。半监督学习和主动学习都可以用来减轻这种注释负担。然而，将半监督和主动学习方法的优点结合起来进行多标签医学图像分类的工作还很有限。在这里，我们介绍一种新颖的基于一致性的半监督证据主动学习框架（CSEAL）。具体来说，我们利用基于证据理论和主观逻辑的预测不确定性来开发一种端到端的集成方法，将基于一致性的半监督学习与基于不确定性的主动学习结合起来。我们应用我们的方法来增强四种领先的基于一致性的半监督学习方法：伪标签、虚拟对抗训练、Mean Teacher 和 NoTeacher。对多标签胸部 X 射线分类任务的广泛评估表明，CSEAL 比两个领先的半监督主动学习基线实现了实质性的性能改进。此外，结果的类别细分表明，我们的方法可以通过更少的标记样本显着提高罕见异常的准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于一致性的半监督证据主动学习框架（CSEAL），用于减少多标签诊断X光分类中对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在结合半监督学习与主动学习时效果有限，且难以有效提升多标签医学图像中罕见异常的分类准确性。
AI.method: 基于证据理论和主观逻辑的预测不确定性，构建整合一致性半监督学习与不确定性驱动主动学习的端到端框架，并应用于四种主流半监督方法。
AI.result: 在多标签胸部X光分类任务中，CSEAL较现有基线提升显著，尤其在标注样本较少时罕见异常的分类准确率提升明显。
AI.conclusion: CSEAL通过有效融合两种学习范式，在标注数据受限场景下可显著提升多标签医学图像分类性能，尤其对罕见病灶检测具有实际价值。

title: Recognizing Geometric Intersection Graphs Stabbed by a Line
title_zh: 识别由直线刺破的几何交集图
abstract: In this paper, we determine the computational complexity of recognizing two graph classes, \emph{grounded L}-graphs and \emph{stabbable grid intersection} graphs. An L-shape is made by joining the bottom end-point of a vertical ($\vert$) segment to the left end-point of a horizontal ($-$) segment. The top end-point of the vertical segment is known as the {\em anchor} of the L-shape. Grounded L-graphs are the intersection graphs of L-shapes such that all the L-shapes' anchors lie on the same horizontal line. We show that recognizing grounded L-graphs is NP-complete. This answers an open question asked by Jel{\'ı}nek \& T{ö}pfer (Electron. J. Comb., 2019). Grid intersection graphs are the intersection graphs of axis-parallel line segments in which two vertical (similarly, two horizontal) segments cannot intersect. We say that a (not necessarily axis-parallel) straight line $\ell$ stabs a segment $s$, if $s$ intersects $\ell$. A graph $G$ is a stabbable grid intersection graph ($StabGIG$) if there is a grid intersection representation of $G$ in which the same line stabs all its segments. We show that recognizing $StabGIG$ graphs is $NP$-complete, even on a restricted class of graphs. This answers an open question asked by Chaplick \etal (\textsc{O}rder, 2018).
summary: In this paper, we determine the computational complexity of recognizing two graph classes, \emph{grounded L}-graphs and \emph{stabbable grid intersection} graphs. An L-shape is made by joining the bottom end-point of a vertical ($\vert$) segment to the left end-point of a horizontal ($-$) segment. The top end-point of the vertical segment is known as the {\em anchor} of the L-shape. Grounded L-graphs are the intersection graphs of L-shapes such that all the L-shapes' anchors lie on the same horizontal line. We show that recognizing grounded L-graphs is NP-complete. This answers an open question asked by Jel{\'ı}nek \& T{ö}pfer (Electron. J. Comb., 2019). Grid intersection graphs are the intersection graphs of axis-parallel line segments in which two vertical (similarly, two horizontal) segments cannot intersect. We say that a (not necessarily axis-parallel) straight line $\ell$ stabs a segment $s$, if $s$ intersects $\ell$. A graph $G$ is a stabbable grid intersection graph ($StabGIG$) if there is a grid intersection representation of $G$ in which the same line stabs all its segments. We show that recognizing $StabGIG$ graphs is $NP$-complete, even on a restricted class of graphs. This answers an open question asked by Chaplick \etal (\textsc{O}rder, 2018).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们确定了识别两个图类的计算复杂度：\emph{接地 L} 图和 \emph{稳定网格交集} 图。通过将垂直 ($\vert$) 线段的底部端点连接到水平 ($-$) 线段的左端点来形成 L 形。垂直线段的顶部端点称为 L 形的锚点。接地 L 形图是 L 形的交集图，使得所有 L 形的锚点位于同一水平线上。我们证明了识别接地 L 图是 NP 完全的。这回答了 Jel{\'ı}nek \& T{ö}pfer 提出的一个开放性问题（Electron. J. Comb.，2019）。网格交集图是与轴平行的线段的交集图，其中两个垂直（同样，两个水平）线段不能相交。如果 $s$ 与 $\ell$ 相交，我们说一条（不一定与轴平行）直线 $\ell$ 刺穿线段 $s$。如果存在 $G$ 的网格交集表示，其中同一条线刺破其所有线段，则图 $G$ 是可刺破的网格交集图 ($StabGIG$)。我们证明，识别 $StabGIG$ 图是 $NP$ 完全的，即使是在受限类别的图上也是如此。这回答了 Chaplick \etal 提出的一个悬而未决的问题（\textsc{O}rder，2018）。

AI.method: 通过将问题归约到已知的NP完全问题，证明两类图的识别问题均为NP完全。
AI.result: 证明grounded L图的识别是NP完全的，且可被直线穿刺的网格交图的识别在受限图类中仍为NP完全。
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了两个长期未决的复杂度问题，为几何图论的计算复杂性研究提供了新进展。

search_text: Recognizing Geometric Intersection Graphs Stabbed by a Line 识别由直线刺破的几何交集图 In this paper, we determine the computational complexity of recognizing two graph classes, \emph{grounded L}-graphs and \emph{stabbable grid intersection} graphs. An L-shape is made by joining the bottom end-point of a vertical ($\vert$) segment to the left end-point of a horizontal ($-$) segment. The top end-point of the vertical segment is known as the {\em anchor} of the L-shape. Grounded L-graphs are the intersection graphs of L-shapes such that all the L-shapes' anchors lie on the same horizontal line. We show that recognizing grounded L-graphs is NP-complete. This answers an open question asked by Jel{\'ı}nek \& T{ö}pfer (Electron. J. Comb., 2019). Grid intersection graphs are the intersection graphs of axis-parallel line segments in which two vertical (similarly, two horizontal) segments cannot intersect. We say that a (not necessarily axis-parallel) straight line $\ell$ stabs a segment $s$, if $s$ intersects $\ell$. A graph $G$ is a stabbable grid intersection graph ($StabGIG$) if there is a grid intersection representation of $G$ in which the same line stabs all its segments. We show that recognizing $StabGIG$ graphs is $NP$-complete, even on a restricted class of graphs. This answers an open question asked by Chaplick \etal (\textsc{O}rder, 2018). 在本文中，我们确定了识别两个图类的计算复杂度：\emph{接地 L} 图和 \emph{稳定网格交集} 图。通过将垂直 ($\vert$) 线段的底部端点连接到水平 ($-$) 线段的左端点来形成 L 形。垂直线段的顶部端点称为 L 形的锚点。接地 L 形图是 L 形的交集图，使得所有 L 形的锚点位于同一水平线上。我们证明了识别接地 L 图是 NP 完全的。这回答了 Jel{\'ı}nek \& T{ö}pfer 提出的一个开放性问题（Electron. J. Comb.，2019）。网格交集图是与轴平行的线段的交集图，其中两个垂直（同样，两个水平）线段不能相交。如果 $s$ 与 $\ell$ 相交，我们说一条（不一定与轴平行）直线 $\ell$ 刺穿线段 $s$。如果存在 $G$ 的网格交集表示，其中同一条线刺破其所有线段，则图 $G$ 是可刺破的网格交集图 ($StabGIG$)。我们证明，识别 $StabGIG$ 图是 $NP$ 完全的，即使是在受限类别的图上也是如此。这回答了 Chaplick \etal 提出的一个悬而未决的问题（\textsc{O}rder，2018）。 本文确定了两种图类（grounded L图和可被直线穿刺的网格交图）的识别计算复杂度。 Dibyayan Chakraborty,Kshitij Gajjar,Irena Rusu cs.DM,cs.CC,cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Esla Timothy Anzaku,Haohan Wang,Arnout Van Messem,Wesley De Neve
title: A Principled Evaluation Protocol for Comparative Investigation of the Effectiveness of DNN Classification Models on Similar-but-non-identical Datasets
title_zh: 用于比较研究 DNN 分类模型在相似但不相同数据集上的有效性的原则评估协议
abstract: Deep Neural Network (DNN) models are increasingly evaluated using new replication test datasets, which have been carefully created to be similar to older and popular benchmark datasets. However, running counter to expectations, DNN classification models show significant, consistent, and largely unexplained degradation in accuracy on these replication test datasets. While the popular evaluation approach is to assess the accuracy of a model by making use of all the datapoints available in the respective test datasets, we argue that doing so hinders us from adequately capturing the behavior of DNN models and from having realistic expectations about their accuracy. Therefore, we propose a principled evaluation protocol that is suitable for performing comparative investigations of the accuracy of a DNN model on multiple test datasets, leveraging subsets of datapoints that can be selected using different criteria, including uncertainty-related information. By making use of this new evaluation protocol, we determined the accuracy of $564$ DNN models on both (1) the CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets and (2) their replication datasets. Our experimental results indicate that the observed accuracy degradation between established benchmark datasets and their replications is consistently lower (that is, models do perform better on the replication test datasets) than the accuracy degradation reported in published works, with these published works relying on conventional evaluation approaches that do not utilize uncertainty-related information.
summary: Deep Neural Network (DNN) models are increasingly evaluated using new replication test datasets, which have been carefully created to be similar to older and popular benchmark datasets. However, running counter to expectations, DNN classification models show significant, consistent, and largely unexplained degradation in accuracy on these replication test datasets. While the popular evaluation approach is to assess the accuracy of a model by making use of all the datapoints available in the respective test datasets, we argue that doing so hinders us from adequately capturing the behavior of DNN models and from having realistic expectations about their accuracy. Therefore, we propose a principled evaluation protocol that is suitable for performing comparative investigations of the accuracy of a DNN model on multiple test datasets, leveraging subsets of datapoints that can be selected using different criteria, including uncertainty-related information. By making use of this new evaluation protocol, we determined the accuracy of $564$ DNN models on both (1) the CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets and (2) their replication datasets. Our experimental results indicate that the observed accuracy degradation between established benchmark datasets and their replications is consistently lower (that is, models do perform better on the replication test datasets) than the accuracy degradation reported in published works, with these published works relying on conventional evaluation approaches that do not utilize uncertainty-related information.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型越来越多地使用新的复制测试数据集进行评估，这些数据集经过精心创建，与较旧且流行的基准数据集相似。然而，与预期相反，DNN 分类模型在这些复制测试数据集上显示出显着、一致且很大程度上无法解释的准确性下降。虽然流行的评估方法是通过利用各个测试数据集中可用的所有数据点来评估模型的准确性，但我们认为这样做会阻碍我们充分捕获 DNN 模型的行为，也无法对其准确性产生现实的期望。因此，我们提出了一种原则性的评估协议，适用于在多个测试数据集上对 DNN 模型的准确性进行比较研究，利用可以使用不同标准（包括不确定性相关信息）选择的数据点子集。通过利用这一新的评估协议，我们确定了 564 美元 DNN 模型在 (1) CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集以及 (2) 它们的复制数据集上的准确性。我们的实验结果表明，所观察到的已建立的基准数据集及其复制之间的准确性下降始终低于已发表的作品中报告的准确性下降（即模型在复制测试数据集上的表现更好），这些已发表的作品依赖于不利用不确定性相关信息的传统评估方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于比较深度神经网络（DNN）分类模型在相似但非相同数据集上有效性的原则性评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法通过使用全部测试数据点来评估模型准确性，但无法充分捕捉DNN的行为，导致对模型准确性的预期不现实。
AI.method: 通过利用不确定性相关信息选择数据子集，设计新的评估协议，对564个DNN模型在CIFAR-10、ImageNet及其复制数据集上的准确性进行比较分析。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基准数据集与复制数据集之间的准确性下降幅度比以往研究中报告的要小，且模型在复制数据集上的表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 新协议能更准确地评估DNN模型在不同数据集上的表现，传统方法因未利用不确定性信息导致结果偏差。

title: Conflict-Aware Pseudo Labeling via Optimal Transport for Entity Alignment
title_zh: 通过实体对齐的最佳传输实现冲突感知伪标签
abstract: Entity alignment aims to discover unique equivalent entity pairs with the same meaning across different knowledge graphs (KGs). Existing models have focused on projecting KGs into a latent embedding space so that inherent semantics between entities can be captured for entity alignment. However, the adverse impacts of alignment conflicts have been largely overlooked during training, thereby limiting the entity alignment performance. To address this issue, we propose a novel Conflict-aware Pseudo Labeling via Optimal Transport model (CPL-OT) for entity alignment. The key idea is to iteratively pseudo-label alignment pairs empowered with conflict-aware optimal transport (OT) modeling to boost the precision of entity alignment. CPL-OT is composed of two key components -- entity embedding learning with global-local aggregation and iterative conflict-aware pseudo labeling -- that mutually reinforce each other. To mitigate alignment conflicts during pseudo labeling, we propose to use optimal transport as an effective means to warrant one-to-one entity alignment between two KGs with the minimal overall transport cost. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate the superiority of CPL-OT over state-of-the-art baselines under both settings with and without prior alignment seeds.
summary: Entity alignment aims to discover unique equivalent entity pairs with the same meaning across different knowledge graphs (KGs). Existing models have focused on projecting KGs into a latent embedding space so that inherent semantics between entities can be captured for entity alignment. However, the adverse impacts of alignment conflicts have been largely overlooked during training, thereby limiting the entity alignment performance. To address this issue, we propose a novel Conflict-aware Pseudo Labeling via Optimal Transport model (CPL-OT) for entity alignment. The key idea is to iteratively pseudo-label alignment pairs empowered with conflict-aware optimal transport (OT) modeling to boost the precision of entity alignment. CPL-OT is composed of two key components -- entity embedding learning with global-local aggregation and iterative conflict-aware pseudo labeling -- that mutually reinforce each other. To mitigate alignment conflicts during pseudo labeling, we propose to use optimal transport as an effective means to warrant one-to-one entity alignment between two KGs with the minimal overall transport cost. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate the superiority of CPL-OT over state-of-the-art baselines under both settings with and without prior alignment seeds.
abstract_zh: 实体对齐旨在发现不同知识图谱（KG）中具有相同含义的唯一等效实体对。现有模型侧重于将知识图谱投影到潜在嵌入空间中，以便可以捕获实体之间的固有语义以进行实体对齐。然而，在训练过程中，对齐冲突的不利影响在很大程度上被忽视，从而限制了实体对齐性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的通过最佳传输模型（CPL-OT）进行冲突感知伪标签的实体对齐。关键思想是迭代伪标签对齐对，并通过冲突感知最优传输 (OT) 建模来提高实体对齐的精度。 CPL-OT 由两个关键组件组成：具有全局局部聚合的实体嵌入学习和迭代冲突感知伪标记，这两个组件相辅相成。为了减轻伪标签期间的对齐冲突，我们建议使用最佳传输作为一种有效手段，以最小的总体传输成本保证两个 KG 之间的一对一实体对齐。对基准数据集的大量实验验证了 CPL-OT 在有或没有事先比对种子的设置下相对于最先进的基线的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优传输的冲突感知伪标签方法（CPL-OT），用于解决知识图谱实体对齐中的对齐冲突问题，提升实体对齐性能。
AI.motivation: 现有实体对齐模型在训练过程中忽视了对齐冲突的负面影响，导致对齐精度受限，需通过冲突感知机制优化伪标签生成过程。
AI.method: CPL-OT包含两个核心组件：基于全局-局部聚合的实体嵌入学习，以及通过最优传输建模的迭代冲突感知伪标签生成，二者相互强化以减少对齐冲突。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，CPL-OT在有无先验对齐种子的设置下均优于现有先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过最优传输实现冲突感知的伪标签生成，CPL-OT有效缓解了实体对齐中的冲突问题，为跨知识图谱对齐提供了新思路。
