search_text: Conflict-Aware Pseudo Labeling via Optimal Transport for Entity Alignment 通过实体对齐的最佳传输实现冲突感知伪标签 Entity alignment aims to discover unique equivalent entity pairs with the same meaning across different knowledge graphs (KGs). Existing models have focused on projecting KGs into a latent embedding space so that inherent semantics between entities can be captured for entity alignment. However, the adverse impacts of alignment conflicts have been largely overlooked during training, thereby limiting the entity alignment performance. To address this issue, we propose a novel Conflict-aware Pseudo Labeling via Optimal Transport model (CPL-OT) for entity alignment. The key idea is to iteratively pseudo-label alignment pairs empowered with conflict-aware optimal transport (OT) modeling to boost the precision of entity alignment. CPL-OT is composed of two key components -- entity embedding learning with global-local aggregation and iterative conflict-aware pseudo labeling -- that mutually reinforce each other. To mitigate alignment conflicts during pseudo labeling, we propose to use optimal transport as an effective means to warrant one-to-one entity alignment between two KGs with the minimal overall transport cost. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate the superiority of CPL-OT over state-of-the-art baselines under both settings with and without prior alignment seeds. 实体对齐旨在发现不同知识图谱（KG）中具有相同含义的唯一等效实体对。现有模型侧重于将知识图谱投影到潜在嵌入空间中，以便可以捕获实体之间的固有语义以进行实体对齐。然而，在训练过程中，对齐冲突的不利影响在很大程度上被忽视，从而限制了实体对齐性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的通过最佳传输模型（CPL-OT）进行冲突感知伪标签的实体对齐。关键思想是迭代伪标签对齐对，并通过冲突感知最优传输 (OT) 建模来提高实体对齐的精度。 CPL-OT 由两个关键组件组成：具有全局局部聚合的实体嵌入学习和迭代冲突感知伪标记，这两个组件相辅相成。为了减轻伪标签期间的对齐冲突，我们建议使用最佳传输作为一种有效手段，以最小的总体传输成本保证两个 KG 之间的一对一实体对齐。对基准数据集的大量实验验证了 CPL-OT 在有或没有事先比对种子的设置下相对于最先进的基线的优越性。 本文提出一种基于最优传输的冲突感知伪标签方法（CPL-OT），用于解决知识图谱实体对齐中的对齐冲突问题，提升实体对齐性能。 Qijie Ding,Daokun Zhang,Jie Yin cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Evaluating Situated Visualization in AR with Eye Tracking
title_zh: 使用眼动追踪评估 AR 中的情景可视化
abstract: Augmented reality (AR) technology provides means for embedding visualization in a real-world context. Such techniques allow situated analyses of live data in their spatial domain. However, as existing techniques have to be adapted for this context and new approaches will be developed, the evaluation thereof poses new challenges for researchers. Apart from established performance measures, eye tracking has proven to be a valuable means to assess visualizations qualitatively and quantitatively. We discuss the challenges and opportunities of eye tracking for the evaluation of situated visualizations. We envision that an extension of gaze-based evaluation methodology into this field will provide new insights on how people perceive and interact with visualizations in augmented reality.
summary: Augmented reality (AR) technology provides means for embedding visualization in a real-world context. Such techniques allow situated analyses of live data in their spatial domain. However, as existing techniques have to be adapted for this context and new approaches will be developed, the evaluation thereof poses new challenges for researchers. Apart from established performance measures, eye tracking has proven to be a valuable means to assess visualizations qualitatively and quantitatively. We discuss the challenges and opportunities of eye tracking for the evaluation of situated visualizations. We envision that an extension of gaze-based evaluation methodology into this field will provide new insights on how people perceive and interact with visualizations in augmented reality.
abstract_zh: 增强现实 (AR) 技术提供了将可视化嵌入现实世界的方法。此类技术允许在其空间域中对实时数据进行定位分析。然而，由于现有技术必须适应这种情况，并且将开发新方法，其评估给研究人员带来了新的挑战。除了既定的绩效衡量标准之外，眼动追踪已被证明是定性和定量评估可视化的一种有价值的手段。我们讨论了眼动追踪在评估情景可视化方面的挑战和机遇。我们设想，将基于凝视的评估方法扩展到该领域将为人们如何感知增强现实中的可视化以及如何与可视化交互提供新的见解。

AI.tldr: 探讨眼动追踪在增强现实情境可视化评估中的应用与挑战
AI.motivation: 现有AR情境可视化评估方法不足，需探索更有效的评估手段
AI.method: 通过分析眼动追踪技术在AR情境可视化评估中的应用，探讨其方法论扩展
AI.result: 眼动追踪能有效评估AR可视化，但需解决数据收集和分析的挑战
AI.conclusion: 扩展基于注视的评估方法可提升AR情境可视化的评估效果，为未来研究提供方向

authors_text: Julian Wiederer,Julian Schmidt,Ulrich Kressel,Klaus Dietmayer,Vasileios Belagiannis
title: A Benchmark for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Multi-Agent Trajectories
title_zh: 多智能体轨迹中无监督异常检测的基准
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, accepted by IEEE ITSC 2022
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, accepted by IEEE ITSC 2022
abstract: Human intuition allows to detect abnormal driving scenarios in situations they never experienced before. Like humans detect those abnormal situations and take countermeasures to prevent collisions, self-driving cars need anomaly detection mechanisms. However, the literature lacks a standard benchmark for the comparison of anomaly detection algorithms. We fill the gap and propose the R-U-MAAD benchmark for unsupervised anomaly detection in multi-agent trajectories. The goal is to learn a representation of the normal driving from the training sequences without labels, and afterwards detect anomalies. We use the Argoverse Motion Forecasting dataset for the training and propose a test dataset of 160 sequences with human-annotated anomalies in urban environments. To this end we combine a replay of real-world trajectories and scene-dependent abnormal driving in the simulation. In our experiments we compare 11 baselines including linear models, deep auto-encoders and one-class classification models using standard anomaly detection metrics. The deep reconstruction and end-to-end one-class methods show promising results. The benchmark and the baseline models will be publicly available.
summary: Human intuition allows to detect abnormal driving scenarios in situations they never experienced before. Like humans detect those abnormal situations and take countermeasures to prevent collisions, self-driving cars need anomaly detection mechanisms. However, the literature lacks a standard benchmark for the comparison of anomaly detection algorithms. We fill the gap and propose the R-U-MAAD benchmark for unsupervised anomaly detection in multi-agent trajectories. The goal is to learn a representation of the normal driving from the training sequences without labels, and afterwards detect anomalies. We use the Argoverse Motion Forecasting dataset for the training and propose a test dataset of 160 sequences with human-annotated anomalies in urban environments. To this end we combine a replay of real-world trajectories and scene-dependent abnormal driving in the simulation. In our experiments we compare 11 baselines including linear models, deep auto-encoders and one-class classification models using standard anomaly detection metrics. The deep reconstruction and end-to-end one-class methods show promising results. The benchmark and the baseline models will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 人类的直觉可以检测到他们以前从未经历过的异常驾驶场景。就像人类检测异常情况并采取对策防止碰撞一样，自动驾驶汽车也需要异常检测机制。然而，文献缺乏用于比较异常检测算法的标准基准。我们填补了这一空白，并提出了用于多智能体轨迹中无监督异常检测的 R-U-MAAD 基准。目标是从没有标签的训练序列中学习正常驾驶的表示，然后检测异常情况。我们使用 Argoverse 运动预测数据集进行训练，并提出了一个包含 160 个序列的测试数据集，其中包含城市环境中人工注释的异常情况。为此，我们在模拟中结合了现实世界轨迹的重播和与场景相关的异常驾驶。在我们的实验中，我们使用标准异常检测指标比较了 11 个基线，包括线性模型、深度自动编码器和一类分类模型。深度重建和端到端一类方法显示出有希望的结果。基准和基线模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出R-U-MAAD基准，用于多智能体轨迹的无监督异常检测，填补了现有研究缺乏标准评估框架的空白。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要异常检测机制，但现有文献缺少统一基准，难以比较不同算法性能。
AI.method: 基于Argoverse数据集构建训练集，融合真实轨迹回放与模拟场景生成160个标注异常序列的测试集，对比11种无监督方法（含线性模型、自编码器等）。
AI.result: 深度重建模型与端到端单类分类方法在异常检测指标上表现优异，基准及代码将公开共享。
AI.conclusion: R-U-MAAD基准为多智能体轨迹异常检测提供标准化评估框架，未来可拓展至更多场景与算法优化。

title: Lattice-based shape tracking and servoing of elastic objects
title_zh: 基于晶格的弹性物体形状跟踪和伺服
comment: This is the arXiv version of an article published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics. Please cite the accepted version: M. Shetab-Bushehri, M. Aranda, Y. Mezouar and E. Özgür, "Lattice-based Shape Tracking and Servoing of Elastic Objects," in IEEE Transactions on Robotics, doi: 10.1109/TRO.2023.3331596
comments: This is the arXiv version of an article published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics. Please cite the accepted version: M. Shetab-Bushehri, M. Aranda, Y. Mezouar and E. Özgür, "Lattice-based Shape Tracking and Servoing of Elastic Objects," in IEEE Transactions on Robotics, doi: 10.1109/TRO.2023.3331596
abstract: In this paper, we propose a general unified tracking-servoing approach for controlling the shape of elastic deformable objects using robotic arms. Our approach works by forming a lattice around the object, binding the object to the lattice, and tracking and servoing the lattice instead of the object. This makes our approach have full 3D control over deformable objects of any general form (linear, thin-shell, volumetric). Furthermore, it decouples the runtime complexity of the approach from the objects' geometric complexity. Our approach is based on the As-Rigid-As-Possible (ARAP) deformation model. It requires no mechanical parameter of the object to be known and can drive the object toward desired shapes through large deformations. The inputs to our approach are the point cloud of the object's surface in its rest shape and the point cloud captured by a 3D camera in each frame. Overall, our approach is more broadly applicable than existing approaches. We validate the efficiency of our approach through numerous experiments with deformable objects of various shapes and materials (paper, rubber, plastic, foam). Experiment videos are available on the project website: https://sites.google.com/view/tracking-servoing-approach.
summary: In this paper, we propose a general unified tracking-servoing approach for controlling the shape of elastic deformable objects using robotic arms. Our approach works by forming a lattice around the object, binding the object to the lattice, and tracking and servoing the lattice instead of the object. This makes our approach have full 3D control over deformable objects of any general form (linear, thin-shell, volumetric). Furthermore, it decouples the runtime complexity of the approach from the objects' geometric complexity. Our approach is based on the As-Rigid-As-Possible (ARAP) deformation model. It requires no mechanical parameter of the object to be known and can drive the object toward desired shapes through large deformations. The inputs to our approach are the point cloud of the object's surface in its rest shape and the point cloud captured by a 3D camera in each frame. Overall, our approach is more broadly applicable than existing approaches. We validate the efficiency of our approach through numerous experiments with deformable objects of various shapes and materials (paper, rubber, plastic, foam). Experiment videos are available on the project website: https://sites.google.com/view/tracking-servoing-approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的统一跟踪伺服方法，用于使用机械臂控制弹性可变形物体的形状。我们的方法的工作原理是在物体周围形成一个晶格，将物体绑定到晶格上，然后跟踪和伺服晶格而不是物体。这使得我们的方法能够对任何一般形式（线性、薄壳、体积）的可变形物体进行完全的 3D 控制。此外，它将方法的运行时复杂性与对象的几何复杂性解耦。我们的方法基于尽可能刚性 (ARAP) 变形模型。它不需要知道物体的机械参数，并且可以通过大变形驱动物体达到所需的形状。我们方法的输入是处于静止形状的物体表面的点云以及每帧中 3D 相机捕获的点云。总的来说，我们的方法比现有方法更广泛适用。我们通过对各种形状和材料（纸张、橡胶、塑料、泡沫）的可变形物体进行大量实验来验证我们方法的效率。实验视频可在项目网站上找到：https://sites.google.com/view/tracking-servoing-approach。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于晶格的弹性物体形状跟踪与伺服控制方法，通过构建晶格结构实现对任意形态弹性物体的三维控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理复杂几何形变或需要物体机械参数，而本文方法通过解耦运行时复杂度与几何复杂度，无需先验参数即可实现大形变控制。
AI.method: 采用As-Rigid-As-Possible（ARAP）变形模型，围绕物体构建晶格结构并绑定，通过跟踪晶格而非直接操作物体实现控制，输入为物体静止状态点云和实时3D相机捕获的点云。
AI.result: 在多种材质（纸张、橡胶、塑料、泡沫）和形状的变形体上进行了大量实验，验证了方法的效率与广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法相比现有技术更具通用性，能够高效控制任意形态弹性物体的形状，且无需物体机械参数。

search_text: Lattice-based shape tracking and servoing of elastic objects 基于晶格的弹性物体形状跟踪和伺服 In this paper, we propose a general unified tracking-servoing approach for controlling the shape of elastic deformable objects using robotic arms. Our approach works by forming a lattice around the object, binding the object to the lattice, and tracking and servoing the lattice instead of the object. This makes our approach have full 3D control over deformable objects of any general form (linear, thin-shell, volumetric). Furthermore, it decouples the runtime complexity of the approach from the objects' geometric complexity. Our approach is based on the As-Rigid-As-Possible (ARAP) deformation model. It requires no mechanical parameter of the object to be known and can drive the object toward desired shapes through large deformations. The inputs to our approach are the point cloud of the object's surface in its rest shape and the point cloud captured by a 3D camera in each frame. Overall, our approach is more broadly applicable than existing approaches. We validate the efficiency of our approach through numerous experiments with deformable objects of various shapes and materials (paper, rubber, plastic, foam). Experiment videos are available on the project website: https://sites.google.com/view/tracking-servoing-approach. 在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的统一跟踪伺服方法，用于使用机械臂控制弹性可变形物体的形状。我们的方法的工作原理是在物体周围形成一个晶格，将物体绑定到晶格上，然后跟踪和伺服晶格而不是物体。这使得我们的方法能够对任何一般形式（线性、薄壳、体积）的可变形物体进行完全的 3D 控制。此外，它将方法的运行时复杂性与对象的几何复杂性解耦。我们的方法基于尽可能刚性 (ARAP) 变形模型。它不需要知道物体的机械参数，并且可以通过大变形驱动物体达到所需的形状。我们方法的输入是处于静止形状的物体表面的点云以及每帧中 3D 相机捕获的点云。总的来说，我们的方法比现有方法更广泛适用。我们通过对各种形状和材料（纸张、橡胶、塑料、泡沫）的可变形物体进行大量实验来验证我们方法的效率。实验视频可在项目网站上找到：https://sites.google.com/view/tracking-servoing-approach。 本文提出了一种基于晶格的弹性物体形状跟踪与伺服控制方法，通过构建晶格结构实现对任意形态弹性物体的三维控制。 Mohammadreza Shetab-Bushehri,Miguel Aranda,Youcef Mezouar,Erol Ozgur cs.RO

authors_text: Md Mahfuzur Rahman Siddiquee,Jay Shah,Teresa Wu,Catherine Chong,Todd Schwedt,Baoxin Li
title: HealthyGAN: Learning from Unannotated Medical Images to Detect Anomalies Associated with Human Disease
title_zh: HealthyGAN：从未注释的医学图像中学习以检测与人类疾病相关的异常
comment: International Workshop on Simulation and Synthesis in Medical Imaging, MICCAI, 2022
comments: International Workshop on Simulation and Synthesis in Medical Imaging, MICCAI, 2022
abstract: Automated anomaly detection from medical images, such as MRIs and X-rays, can significantly reduce human effort in disease diagnosis. Owing to the complexity of modeling anomalies and the high cost of manual annotation by domain experts (e.g., radiologists), a typical technique in the current medical imaging literature has focused on deriving diagnostic models from healthy subjects only, assuming the model will detect the images from patients as outliers. However, in many real-world scenarios, unannotated datasets with a mix of both healthy and diseased individuals are abundant. Therefore, this paper poses the research question of how to improve unsupervised anomaly detection by utilizing (1) an unannotated set of mixed images, in addition to (2) the set of healthy images as being used in the literature. To answer the question, we propose HealthyGAN, a novel one-directional image-to-image translation method, which learns to translate the images from the mixed dataset to only healthy images. Being one-directional, HealthyGAN relaxes the requirement of cycle consistency of existing unpaired image-to-image translation methods, which is unattainable with mixed unannotated data. Once the translation is learned, we generate a difference map for any given image by subtracting its translated output. Regions of significant responses in the difference map correspond to potential anomalies (if any). Our HealthyGAN outperforms the conventional state-of-the-art methods by significant margins on two publicly available datasets: COVID-19 and NIH ChestX-ray14, and one institutional dataset collected from Mayo Clinic. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/mahfuzmohammad/HealthyGAN.
summary: Automated anomaly detection from medical images, such as MRIs and X-rays, can significantly reduce human effort in disease diagnosis. Owing to the complexity of modeling anomalies and the high cost of manual annotation by domain experts (e.g., radiologists), a typical technique in the current medical imaging literature has focused on deriving diagnostic models from healthy subjects only, assuming the model will detect the images from patients as outliers. However, in many real-world scenarios, unannotated datasets with a mix of both healthy and diseased individuals are abundant. Therefore, this paper poses the research question of how to improve unsupervised anomaly detection by utilizing (1) an unannotated set of mixed images, in addition to (2) the set of healthy images as being used in the literature. To answer the question, we propose HealthyGAN, a novel one-directional image-to-image translation method, which learns to translate the images from the mixed dataset to only healthy images. Being one-directional, HealthyGAN relaxes the requirement of cycle consistency of existing unpaired image-to-image translation methods, which is unattainable with mixed unannotated data. Once the translation is learned, we generate a difference map for any given image by subtracting its translated output. Regions of significant responses in the difference map correspond to potential anomalies (if any). Our HealthyGAN outperforms the conventional state-of-the-art methods by significant margins on two publicly available datasets: COVID-19 and NIH ChestX-ray14, and one institutional dataset collected from Mayo Clinic. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/mahfuzmohammad/HealthyGAN.
abstract_zh: 从 MRI 和 X 射线等医学图像中自动检测异常可以显着减少人类在疾病诊断方面的工作量。由于异常建模的复杂性以及领域专家（例如放射科医生）手动注释的高成本，当前医学成像文献中的典型技术集中于仅从健康受试者中导出诊断模型，假设该模型将患者的图像检测为异常值。然而，在许多现实场景中，包含健康个体和患病个体的未注释数据集非常丰富。因此，本文提出了如何利用（1）一组未注释的混合图像以及（2）文献中使用的健康图像集来改进无监督异常检测的研究问题。为了回答这个问题，我们提出了 HealthyGAN，一种新颖的单向图像到图像转换方法，它学习将混合数据集中的图像转换为健康图像。由于是单向的，HealthyGAN 放宽了现有不配对图像到图像转换方法的循环一致性要求，而这是混合未注释数据无法实现的。一旦学习了翻译，我们就可以通过减去翻译后的输出来生成任何给定图像的差异图。差异图中显着响应的区域对应于潜在的异常（如果有）。我们的 HealthyGAN 在两个公开可用的数据集上显着优于传统的最先进方法：COVID-19 和 NIH ChestX-ray14，以及从 Mayo Clinic 收集的一个机构数据集。该实现可在 https://github.com/mahfuzmohammad/HealthyGAN 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HealthyGAN方法，利用未标注的混合医学图像（含健康与患病样本）进行无监督异常检测，通过图像翻译生成差异图定位病变区域。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像异常检测依赖标注的健康样本，但实际场景中未标注的混合数据更常见。现有方法难以处理此类数据且需高昂标注成本。
AI.method: 设计单向图像翻译网络HealthyGAN，将混合数据映射到健康图像空间，通过生成差异图（原图与翻译结果差值）识别异常区域，无需循环一致性约束。
AI.result: 在COVID-19、NIH ChestX-ray14及梅奥诊所数据集上，HealthyGAN显著优于现有最先进方法，开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: HealthyGAN通过有效利用混合未标注数据，为医学图像异常检测提供了无需专家标注的可行解决方案。

authors_text: Zhiyuan You,Kai Yang,Wenhan Luo,Lei Cui,Yu Zheng,Xinyi Le
title: ADTR: Anomaly Detection Transformer with Feature Reconstruction
title_zh: ADTR：具有特征重建功能的异常检测变压器
abstract: Anomaly detection with only prior knowledge from normal samples attracts more attention because of the lack of anomaly samples. Existing CNN-based pixel reconstruction approaches suffer from two concerns. First, the reconstruction source and target are raw pixel values that contain indistinguishable semantic information. Second, CNN tends to reconstruct both normal samples and anomalies well, making them still hard to distinguish. In this paper, we propose Anomaly Detection TRansformer (ADTR) to apply a transformer to reconstruct pre-trained features. The pre-trained features contain distinguishable semantic information. Also, the adoption of transformer limits to reconstruct anomalies well such that anomalies could be detected easily once the reconstruction fails. Moreover, we propose novel loss functions to make our approach compatible with the normal-sample-only case and the anomaly-available case with both image-level and pixel-level labeled anomalies. The performance could be further improved by adding simple synthetic or external irrelevant anomalies. Extensive experiments are conducted on anomaly detection datasets including MVTec-AD and CIFAR-10. Our method achieves superior performance compared with all baselines.
summary: Anomaly detection with only prior knowledge from normal samples attracts more attention because of the lack of anomaly samples. Existing CNN-based pixel reconstruction approaches suffer from two concerns. First, the reconstruction source and target are raw pixel values that contain indistinguishable semantic information. Second, CNN tends to reconstruct both normal samples and anomalies well, making them still hard to distinguish. In this paper, we propose Anomaly Detection TRansformer (ADTR) to apply a transformer to reconstruct pre-trained features. The pre-trained features contain distinguishable semantic information. Also, the adoption of transformer limits to reconstruct anomalies well such that anomalies could be detected easily once the reconstruction fails. Moreover, we propose novel loss functions to make our approach compatible with the normal-sample-only case and the anomaly-available case with both image-level and pixel-level labeled anomalies. The performance could be further improved by adding simple synthetic or external irrelevant anomalies. Extensive experiments are conducted on anomaly detection datasets including MVTec-AD and CIFAR-10. Our method achieves superior performance compared with all baselines.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏异常样本，仅利用正常样本的先验知识进行异常检测引起了更多关注。现有的基于 CNN 的像素重建方法存在两个问题。首先，重建源和目标是包含无法区分的语义信息的原始像素值。其次，CNN 往往能够很好地重建正常样本和异常样本，这使得它们仍然难以区分。在本文中，我们提出了异常检测变换器（ADTR）来应用变换器来重建预训练的特征。预训练的特征包含可区分的语义信息。此外，变压器的采用限制了重建异常的效果，一旦重建失败，异常可以很容易地被检测到。此外，我们提出了新颖的损失函数，使我们的方法与仅正常样本的情况和具有图像级和像素级标记异常的异常可用情况兼容。通过添加简单的合成或外部不相关的异常可以进一步提高性能。在包括 MVTec-AD 和 CIFAR-10 在内的异常检测数据集上进行了广泛的实验。与所有基线相比，我们的方法实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADTR方法，利用Transformer进行预训练特征重建以实现异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的像素重建方法因语义信息混淆和异常重建效果良好而难以区分正常与异常样本。
AI.method: 采用Transformer模型重建预训练特征，设计新型损失函数兼容仅有正常样本和含标注异常样本的场景，并引入合成异常提升性能。
AI.result: 在MVTec-AD和CIFAR-10数据集上，ADTR方法性能优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ADTR通过特征重建和损失函数设计有效提升异常检测能力，验证了Transformer在该任务中的优势。

search_text: ADTR: Anomaly Detection Transformer with Feature Reconstruction ADTR：具有特征重建功能的异常检测变压器 Anomaly detection with only prior knowledge from normal samples attracts more attention because of the lack of anomaly samples. Existing CNN-based pixel reconstruction approaches suffer from two concerns. First, the reconstruction source and target are raw pixel values that contain indistinguishable semantic information. Second, CNN tends to reconstruct both normal samples and anomalies well, making them still hard to distinguish. In this paper, we propose Anomaly Detection TRansformer (ADTR) to apply a transformer to reconstruct pre-trained features. The pre-trained features contain distinguishable semantic information. Also, the adoption of transformer limits to reconstruct anomalies well such that anomalies could be detected easily once the reconstruction fails. Moreover, we propose novel loss functions to make our approach compatible with the normal-sample-only case and the anomaly-available case with both image-level and pixel-level labeled anomalies. The performance could be further improved by adding simple synthetic or external irrelevant anomalies. Extensive experiments are conducted on anomaly detection datasets including MVTec-AD and CIFAR-10. Our method achieves superior performance compared with all baselines. 由于缺乏异常样本，仅利用正常样本的先验知识进行异常检测引起了更多关注。现有的基于 CNN 的像素重建方法存在两个问题。首先，重建源和目标是包含无法区分的语义信息的原始像素值。其次，CNN 往往能够很好地重建正常样本和异常样本，这使得它们仍然难以区分。在本文中，我们提出了异常检测变换器（ADTR）来应用变换器来重建预训练的特征。预训练的特征包含可区分的语义信息。此外，变压器的采用限制了重建异常的效果，一旦重建失败，异常可以很容易地被检测到。此外，我们提出了新颖的损失函数，使我们的方法与仅正常样本的情况和具有图像级和像素级标记异常的异常可用情况兼容。通过添加简单的合成或外部不相关的异常可以进一步提高性能。在包括 MVTec-AD 和 CIFAR-10 在内的异常检测数据集上进行了广泛的实验。与所有基线相比，我们的方法实现了卓越的性能。 本文提出ADTR方法，利用Transformer进行预训练特征重建以实现异常检测。 Zhiyuan You,Kai Yang,Wenhan Luo,Lei Cui,Yu Zheng,Xinyi Le cs.CV

authors_text: Hangjie Yuan,Jianwen Jiang,Samuel Albanie,Tao Feng,Ziyuan Huang,Dong Ni,Mingqian Tang
title: RLIP: Relational Language-Image Pre-training for Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: RLIP：用于人与物体交互检测的关系语言-图像预训练
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022 as a Spotlight paper
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022 as a Spotlight paper
abstract: The task of Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection targets fine-grained visual parsing of humans interacting with their environment, enabling a broad range of applications. Prior work has demonstrated the benefits of effective architecture design and integration of relevant cues for more accurate HOI detection. However, the design of an appropriate pre-training strategy for this task remains underexplored by existing approaches. To address this gap, we propose Relational Language-Image Pre-training (RLIP), a strategy for contrastive pre-training that leverages both entity and relation descriptions. To make effective use of such pre-training, we make three technical contributions: (1) a new Parallel entity detection and Sequential relation inference (ParSe) architecture that enables the use of both entity and relation descriptions during holistically optimized pre-training; (2) a synthetic data generation framework, Label Sequence Extension, that expands the scale of language data available within each minibatch; (3) mechanisms to account for ambiguity, Relation Quality Labels and Relation Pseudo-Labels, to mitigate the influence of ambiguous/noisy samples in the pre-training data. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the benefits of these contributions, collectively termed RLIP-ParSe, for improved zero-shot, few-shot and fine-tuning HOI detection performance as well as increased robustness to learning from noisy annotations. Code will be available at https://github.com/JacobYuan7/RLIP.
summary: The task of Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection targets fine-grained visual parsing of humans interacting with their environment, enabling a broad range of applications. Prior work has demonstrated the benefits of effective architecture design and integration of relevant cues for more accurate HOI detection. However, the design of an appropriate pre-training strategy for this task remains underexplored by existing approaches. To address this gap, we propose Relational Language-Image Pre-training (RLIP), a strategy for contrastive pre-training that leverages both entity and relation descriptions. To make effective use of such pre-training, we make three technical contributions: (1) a new Parallel entity detection and Sequential relation inference (ParSe) architecture that enables the use of both entity and relation descriptions during holistically optimized pre-training; (2) a synthetic data generation framework, Label Sequence Extension, that expands the scale of language data available within each minibatch; (3) mechanisms to account for ambiguity, Relation Quality Labels and Relation Pseudo-Labels, to mitigate the influence of ambiguous/noisy samples in the pre-training data. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate the benefits of these contributions, collectively termed RLIP-ParSe, for improved zero-shot, few-shot and fine-tuning HOI detection performance as well as increased robustness to learning from noisy annotations. Code will be available at https://github.com/JacobYuan7/RLIP.
abstract_zh: 人与物体交互（HOI）检测的任务针对人类与其环境交互的细粒度视觉解析，从而实现广泛的应用。之前的工作已经证明了有效的架构设计和相关线索集成对于更准确的 HOI 检测的好处。然而，现有方法仍未充分探索针对该任务设计适当的预训练策略。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了关系语言图像预训练（RLIP），这是一种利用实体和关系描述的对比预训练策略。为了有效利用这种预训练，我们做出了三项技术贡献：（1）一种新的并行实体检测和顺序关系推理（ParSe）架构，可以在整体优化的预训练期间使用实体和关系描述； (2) 合成数据生成框架，标签序列扩展，扩展了每个小批量中可用的语言数据的规模； (3) 考虑模糊性、关系质量标签和关系伪标签的机制，以减轻预训练数据中模糊/噪声样本的影响。通过大量的实验，我们展示了这些贡献（统称为 RLIP-ParSe）的好处，可提高零样本、少样本和微调 HOI 检测性能，并提高从噪声注释中学习的鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/JacobYuan7/RLIP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RLIP的预训练策略，用于提升人类-物体交互（HOI）检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究在架构设计和特征融合方面取得进展，但针对HOI检测任务的预训练策略仍缺乏有效探索。
AI.method: 提出RLIP-ParSe方法，包含并行实体检测与序列关系推理架构、合成数据生成框架Label Sequence Extension，以及关系质量标签和伪标签机制以处理噪声数据。
AI.result: 实验表明RLIP在零样本、少样本及微调场景下均优于现有方法，并提升了对噪声标注的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言-图像联合预训练与关系建模创新，RLIP为HOI检测提供了更有效的预训练范式。

authors_text: Benjamin Szczapa,Mohamed Daoudi,Stefano Berretti,Pietro Pala,Alberto Del Bimbo,Zakia Hammal
title: Automatic Estimation of Self-Reported Pain by Trajectory Analysis in the Manifold of Fixed Rank Positive Semi-Definite Matrices
title_zh: 通过固定秩正半定矩阵流形中的轨迹分析自动估计自我报告的疼痛
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions On Affective Computing, it is an extension of our paper arXiv:2006.13882
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions On Affective Computing, it is an extension of our paper arXiv:2006.13882
abstract: We propose an automatic method to estimate self-reported pain based on facial landmarks extracted from videos. For each video sequence, we decompose the face into four different regions and the pain intensity is measured by modeling the dynamics of facial movement using the landmarks of these regions. A formulation based on Gram matrices is used for representing the trajectory of landmarks on the Riemannian manifold of symmetric positive semi-definite matrices of fixed rank. A curve fitting algorithm is used to smooth the trajectories and temporal alignment is performed to compute the similarity between the trajectories on the manifold. A Support Vector Regression classifier is then trained to encode extracted trajectories into pain intensity levels consistent with self-reported pain intensity measurement. Finally, a late fusion of the estimation for each region is performed to obtain the final predicted pain level. The proposed approach is evaluated on two publicly available datasets, the UNBCMcMaster Shoulder Pain Archive and the Biovid Heat Pain dataset. We compared our method to the state-of-the-art on both datasets using different testing protocols, showing the competitiveness of the proposed approach.
summary: We propose an automatic method to estimate self-reported pain based on facial landmarks extracted from videos. For each video sequence, we decompose the face into four different regions and the pain intensity is measured by modeling the dynamics of facial movement using the landmarks of these regions. A formulation based on Gram matrices is used for representing the trajectory of landmarks on the Riemannian manifold of symmetric positive semi-definite matrices of fixed rank. A curve fitting algorithm is used to smooth the trajectories and temporal alignment is performed to compute the similarity between the trajectories on the manifold. A Support Vector Regression classifier is then trained to encode extracted trajectories into pain intensity levels consistent with self-reported pain intensity measurement. Finally, a late fusion of the estimation for each region is performed to obtain the final predicted pain level. The proposed approach is evaluated on two publicly available datasets, the UNBCMcMaster Shoulder Pain Archive and the Biovid Heat Pain dataset. We compared our method to the state-of-the-art on both datasets using different testing protocols, showing the competitiveness of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于从视频中提取的面部标志来估计自我报告疼痛的自动方法。对于每个视频序列，我们将面部分解为四个不同的区域，并通过使用这些区域的地标对面部运动的动态进行建模来测量疼痛强度。基于格拉姆矩阵的公式用于表示固定秩对称正半定矩阵黎曼流形上的地标轨迹。使用曲线拟合算法来平滑轨迹，并执行时间对齐来计算流形上轨迹之间的相似性。然后训练支持向量回归分类器将提取的轨迹编码为与自我报告的疼痛强度测量一致的疼痛强度水平。最后，对每个区域的估计进行后期融合以获得最终的预测疼痛水平。所提出的方法在两个公开可用的数据集（UNBCMcMaster 肩痛档案和 Biovid 热痛数据集）上进行了评估。我们使用不同的测试协议将我们的方法与两个数据集上的最新方法进行了比较，显示了所提出方法的竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于流形轨迹分析的自动估计自述疼痛的方法，通过视频中的人脸关键点进行建模。
AI.motivation: 传统疼痛评估依赖主观报告，存在效率低和主观性强的问题，需开发自动化的客观评估方法。
AI.method: 将人脸分解为四个区域，利用固定秩正定矩阵流形上的轨迹分析建模面部运动动态，结合曲线拟合、时间对齐和支撑向量回归进行疼痛强度估计。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上验证了方法的有效性，结果表明该方法在疼痛强度估计任务中具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过流形上的轨迹建模有效捕捉面部动态特征，为自动化疼痛评估提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过流形上的轨迹建模有效捕捉面部动态特征，为自动化疼痛评估提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于流形轨迹分析的自动估计自述疼痛的方法，通过视频中的人脸关键点进行建模。
motivation: 传统疼痛评估依赖主观报告，存在效率低和主观性强的问题，需开发自动化的客观评估方法。
method: 将人脸分解为四个区域，利用固定秩正定矩阵流形上的轨迹分析建模面部运动动态，结合曲线拟合、时间对齐和支撑向量回归进行疼痛强度估计。
result: 在两个公开数据集上验证了方法的有效性，结果表明该方法在疼痛强度估计任务中具有竞争力。
conclusion: 该方法通过流形上的轨迹建模有效捕捉面部动态特征，为自动化疼痛评估提供了新思路。
search_text: Automatic Estimation of Self-Reported Pain by Trajectory Analysis in the Manifold of Fixed Rank Positive Semi-Definite Matrices 通过固定秩正半定矩阵流形中的轨迹分析自动估计自我报告的疼痛 We propose an automatic method to estimate self-reported pain based on facial landmarks extracted from videos. For each video sequence, we decompose the face into four different regions and the pain intensity is measured by modeling the dynamics of facial movement using the landmarks of these regions. A formulation based on Gram matrices is used for representing the trajectory of landmarks on the Riemannian manifold of symmetric positive semi-definite matrices of fixed rank. A curve fitting algorithm is used to smooth the trajectories and temporal alignment is performed to compute the similarity between the trajectories on the manifold. A Support Vector Regression classifier is then trained to encode extracted trajectories into pain intensity levels consistent with self-reported pain intensity measurement. Finally, a late fusion of the estimation for each region is performed to obtain the final predicted pain level. The proposed approach is evaluated on two publicly available datasets, the UNBCMcMaster Shoulder Pain Archive and the Biovid Heat Pain dataset. We compared our method to the state-of-the-art on both datasets using different testing protocols, showing the competitiveness of the proposed approach. 我们提出了一种基于从视频中提取的面部标志来估计自我报告疼痛的自动方法。对于每个视频序列，我们将面部分解为四个不同的区域，并通过使用这些区域的地标对面部运动的动态进行建模来测量疼痛强度。基于格拉姆矩阵的公式用于表示固定秩对称正半定矩阵黎曼流形上的地标轨迹。使用曲线拟合算法来平滑轨迹，并执行时间对齐来计算流形上轨迹之间的相似性。然后训练支持向量回归分类器将提取的轨迹编码为与自我报告的疼痛强度测量一致的疼痛强度水平。最后，对每个区域的估计进行后期融合以获得最终的预测疼痛水平。所提出的方法在两个公开可用的数据集（UNBCMcMaster 肩痛档案和 Biovid 热痛数据集）上进行了评估。我们使用不同的测试协议将我们的方法与两个数据集上的最新方法进行了比较，显示了所提出方法的竞争力。 本文提出了一种基于流形轨迹分析的自动估计自述疼痛的方法，通过视频中的人脸关键点进行建模。 Benjamin Szczapa,Mohamed Daoudi,Stefano Berretti,Pietro Pala,Alberto Del Bimbo,Zakia Hammal cs.CV

title: The Proxy Step-size Technique for Regularized Optimization on the Sphere Manifold
title_zh: 球流形正则优化的代理步长技术
abstract: We give an effective solution to the regularized optimization problem $g (\boldsymbol{x}) + h (\boldsymbol{x})$, where $\boldsymbol{x}$ is constrained on the unit sphere $\Vert \boldsymbol{x} \Vert_2 = 1$. Here $g (\cdot)$ is a smooth cost with Lipschitz continuous gradient within the unit ball $\{\boldsymbol{x} : \Vert \boldsymbol{x} \Vert_2 \le 1 \}$ whereas $h (\cdot)$ is typically non-smooth but convex and absolutely homogeneous, \textit{e.g.,}~norm regularizers and their combinations. Our solution is based on the Riemannian proximal gradient, using an idea we call \textit{proxy step-size} -- a scalar variable which we prove is monotone with respect to the actual step-size within an interval. The proxy step-size exists ubiquitously for convex and absolutely homogeneous $h(\cdot)$, and decides the actual step-size and the tangent update in closed-form, thus the complete proximal gradient iteration. Based on these insights, we design a Riemannian proximal gradient method using the proxy step-size. We prove that our method converges to a critical point, guided by a line-search technique based on the $g(\cdot)$ cost only. The proposed method can be implemented in a couple of lines of code. We show its usefulness by applying nuclear norm, $\ell_1$ norm, and nuclear-spectral norm regularization to three classical computer vision problems. The improvements are consistent and backed by numerical experiments.
summary: We give an effective solution to the regularized optimization problem $g (\boldsymbol{x}) + h (\boldsymbol{x})$, where $\boldsymbol{x}$ is constrained on the unit sphere $\Vert \boldsymbol{x} \Vert_2 = 1$. Here $g (\cdot)$ is a smooth cost with Lipschitz continuous gradient within the unit ball $\{\boldsymbol{x} : \Vert \boldsymbol{x} \Vert_2 \le 1 \}$ whereas $h (\cdot)$ is typically non-smooth but convex and absolutely homogeneous, \textit{e.g.,}~norm regularizers and their combinations. Our solution is based on the Riemannian proximal gradient, using an idea we call \textit{proxy step-size} -- a scalar variable which we prove is monotone with respect to the actual step-size within an interval. The proxy step-size exists ubiquitously for convex and absolutely homogeneous $h(\cdot)$, and decides the actual step-size and the tangent update in closed-form, thus the complete proximal gradient iteration. Based on these insights, we design a Riemannian proximal gradient method using the proxy step-size. We prove that our method converges to a critical point, guided by a line-search technique based on the $g(\cdot)$ cost only. The proposed method can be implemented in a couple of lines of code. We show its usefulness by applying nuclear norm, $\ell_1$ norm, and nuclear-spectral norm regularization to three classical computer vision problems. The improvements are consistent and backed by numerical experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了正则化优化问题 $g (\boldsymbol{x}) + h (\boldsymbol{x})$ 的有效解决方案，其中 $\boldsymbol{x}$ 被约束在单位球体 $\Vert \boldsymbol{x} \Vert_2 = 1$ 上。这里 $g (\cdot)$ 是单位球 $\{\boldsymbol{x} 内 Lipschitz 连续梯度的平滑成本： \Vert \boldsymbol{x} \Vert_2 \le 1 \}$ 而 $h (\cdot)$ 通常是非平滑但凸且绝对同质的，\textit{例如}~范数正则化器及其组合。我们的解决方案基于黎曼近端梯度，使用我们称为 \textit{代理步长} 的想法——一个标量变量，我们证明它相对于区间内的实际步长是单调的。对于凸且绝对齐次的 $h(\cdot)$ 来说，代理步长普遍存在，并决定封闭形式的实际步长和切线更新，从而完成近端梯度迭代。基于这些见解，我们设计了一种使用代理步长的黎曼近端梯度方法。我们证明我们的方法收敛到一个临界点，仅由基于 $g(\cdot)$ 成本的线搜索技术引导。所提出的方法可以通过几行代码来实现。我们通过将核范数、$\ell_1$范数和核谱范数正则化应用于三个经典计算机视觉问题来展示其有用性。这些改进是一致的并得到数值实验的支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于代理步长的黎曼近端梯度方法，用于解决单位球面上的正则化优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法在处理球面流形上的非光滑凸正则化问题时存在效率低、实现复杂的问题，需设计更高效的算法。
AI.method: 通过引入代理步长（proxy step-size）技术，将黎曼近端梯度法中的步长选择转化为闭式求解问题，并结合仅依赖平滑目标函数的线搜索策略。
AI.result: 算法收敛至临界点，代码实现简洁，应用于核范数、ℓ₁范数等正则化问题，在计算机视觉任务中取得一致改进效果。
AI.conclusion: 代理步长技术为球面流形上的正则化优化提供了高效且通用的解决方案，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

title: UDC-UNet: Under-Display Camera Image Restoration via U-Shape Dynamic Network
title_zh: UDC-UNet：通过U型动态网络进行屏下摄像头图像恢复
abstract: Under-Display Camera (UDC) has been widely exploited to help smartphones realize full screen display. However, as the screen could inevitably affect the light propagation process, the images captured by the UDC system usually contain flare, haze, blur, and noise. Particularly, flare and blur in UDC images could severely deteriorate the user experience in high dynamic range (HDR) scenes. In this paper, we propose a new deep model, namely UDC-UNet, to address the UDC image restoration problem with the known Point Spread Function (PSF) in HDR scenes. On the premise that Point Spread Function (PSF) of the UDC system is known, we treat UDC image restoration as a non-blind image restoration problem and propose a novel learning-based approach. Our network consists of three parts, including a U-shape base network to utilize multi-scale information, a condition branch to perform spatially variant modulation, and a kernel branch to provide the prior knowledge of the given PSF. According to the characteristics of HDR data, we additionally design a tone mapping loss to stabilize network optimization and achieve better visual quality. Experimental results show that the proposed UDC-UNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in quantitative and qualitative comparisons. Our approach won the second place in the UDC image restoration track of MIPI challenge. Codes will be publicly available.
summary: Under-Display Camera (UDC) has been widely exploited to help smartphones realize full screen display. However, as the screen could inevitably affect the light propagation process, the images captured by the UDC system usually contain flare, haze, blur, and noise. Particularly, flare and blur in UDC images could severely deteriorate the user experience in high dynamic range (HDR) scenes. In this paper, we propose a new deep model, namely UDC-UNet, to address the UDC image restoration problem with the known Point Spread Function (PSF) in HDR scenes. On the premise that Point Spread Function (PSF) of the UDC system is known, we treat UDC image restoration as a non-blind image restoration problem and propose a novel learning-based approach. Our network consists of three parts, including a U-shape base network to utilize multi-scale information, a condition branch to perform spatially variant modulation, and a kernel branch to provide the prior knowledge of the given PSF. According to the characteristics of HDR data, we additionally design a tone mapping loss to stabilize network optimization and achieve better visual quality. Experimental results show that the proposed UDC-UNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in quantitative and qualitative comparisons. Our approach won the second place in the UDC image restoration track of MIPI challenge. Codes will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 屏下摄像头（UDC）已被广泛用于帮助智能手机实现全面屏显示。然而，由于屏幕不可避免地会影响光的传播过程，UDC系统捕获的图像通常包含耀斑、雾霾、模糊和噪声。特别是，UDC 图像中的眩光和模糊可能会严重恶化高动态范围 (HDR) 场景中的用户体验。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的深度模型，即 UDC-UNet，以解决 HDR 场景中已知的点扩散函数（PSF）的 UDC 图像恢复问题。在已知UDC系统的点扩散函数（PSF）的前提下，我们将UDC图像恢复视为非盲图像恢复问题，并提出了一种新颖的基于学习的方法。我们的网络由三部分组成，包括利用多尺度信息的 U 形基础网络、执行空间变异调制的条件分支以及提供给定 PSF 的先验知识的内核分支。根据HDR数据的特点，我们额外设计了色调映射损失来稳定网络优化并获得更好的视觉质量。实验结果表明，所提出的 UDC-UNet 在定量和定性比较中优于最先进的方法。我们的方法在 MIPI 挑战赛的 UDC 图像恢复赛道中获得了第二名。代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UDC-UNet模型，解决显示屏下摄像头（UDC）在高动态范围（HDR）场景中的图像退化问题，如光晕、模糊等。
AI.motivation: UDC图像因屏幕影响易出现光晕、模糊等问题，尤其在HDR场景下严重影响用户体验，需基于已知点扩散函数（PSF）设计有效修复方法。
AI.method: 构建包含U型主网络（多尺度特征提取）、条件分支（空间可变调制）和核分支（PSF先验知识）的动态网络，并设计色调映射损失函数优化HDR图像质量。
AI.result: 在定量和定性对比中优于现有方法，获得MIPI挑战赛UDC图像修复赛道亚军，代码将开源。
AI.conclusion: UDC-UNet通过结合PSF先验与动态网络结构，有效提升了UDC图像在HDR场景下的修复效果，验证了方法的有效性。

In this paper, we propose a new deep model, namely UDC-UNet, to address the UDC image restoration problem with the known Point Spread Function (PSF) in HDR scenes. On the premise that Point Spread Function (PSF) of the UDC system is known, we treat UDC image restoration as a non-blind image restoration problem and propose a novel learning-based approach. Our network consists of three parts, including a U-shape base network to utilize multi-scale information, a condition branch to perform spatially variant modulation, and a kernel branch to provide the prior knowledge of the given PSF. According to the characteristics of HDR data, we additionally design a tone mapping loss to stabilize network optimization and achieve better visual quality. Experimental results show that the proposed UDC-UNet outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in quantitative and qualitative comparisons. Our approach won the second place in the UDC image restoration track of MIPI challenge. Codes will be publicly available. 屏下摄像头（UDC）已被广泛用于帮助智能手机实现全面屏显示。然而，由于屏幕不可避免地会影响光的传播过程，UDC系统捕获的图像通常包含耀斑、雾霾、模糊和噪声。特别是，UDC 图像中的眩光和模糊可能会严重恶化高动态范围 (HDR) 场景中的用户体验。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的深度模型，即 UDC-UNet，以解决 HDR 场景中已知的点扩散函数（PSF）的 UDC 图像恢复问题。在已知UDC系统的点扩散函数（PSF）的前提下，我们将UDC图像恢复视为非盲图像恢复问题，并提出了一种新颖的基于学习的方法。我们的网络由三部分组成，包括利用多尺度信息的 U 形基础网络、执行空间变异调制的条件分支以及提供给定 PSF 的先验知识的内核分支。根据HDR数据的特点，我们额外设计了色调映射损失来稳定网络优化并获得更好的视觉质量。实验结果表明，所提出的 UDC-UNet 在定量和定性比较中优于最先进的方法。我们的方法在 MIPI 挑战赛的 UDC 图像恢复赛道中获得了第二名。代码将公开。 本文提出UDC-UNet模型，解决显示屏下摄像头（UDC）在高动态范围（HDR）场景中的图像退化问题，如光晕、模糊等。 Xina Liu,Jinfan Hu,Xiangyu Chen,Chao Dong eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jinbo Hu,Yin Cao,Ming Wu,Qiuqiang Kong,Feiran Yang,Mark D. Plumbley,Jun Yang
title: Sound Event Localization and Detection for Real Spatial Sound Scenes: Event-Independent Network and Data Augmentation Chains
title_zh: 真实空间声音场景的声音事件定位和检测：事件无关的网络和数据增强链
comment: Submitted to DCASE 2022 Workshop. Code is available at https://github.com/Jinbo-Hu/DCASE2022-TASK3
comments: Submitted to DCASE 2022 Workshop. Code is available at https://github.com/Jinbo-Hu/DCASE2022-TASK3
abstract: Sound event localization and detection (SELD) is a joint task of sound event detection and direction-of-arrival estimation. In DCASE 2022 Task 3, types of data transform from computationally generated spatial recordings to recordings of real-sound scenes. Our system submitted to the DCASE 2022 Task 3 is based on our previous proposed Event-Independent Network V2 (EINV2) with a novel data augmentation method. Our method employs EINV2 with a track-wise output format, permutation-invariant training, and a soft parameter-sharing strategy, to detect different sound events of the same class but in different locations. The Conformer structure is used for extending EINV2 to learn local and global features. A data augmentation method, which contains several data augmentation chains composed of stochastic combinations of several different data augmentation operations, is utilized to generalize the model. To mitigate the lack of real-scene recordings in the development dataset and the presence of sound events being unbalanced, we exploit FSD50K, AudioSet, and TAU Spatial Room Impulse Response Database (TAU-SRIR DB) to generate simulated datasets for training. We present results on the validation set of Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2022 (STARSS22) in detail. Experimental results indicate that the ability to generalize to different environments and unbalanced performance among different classes are two main challenges. We evaluate our proposed method in Task 3 of the DCASE 2022 challenge and obtain the second rank in the teams ranking. Source code is released.

In DCASE 2022 Task 3, types of data transform from computationally generated spatial recordings to recordings of real-sound scenes. Our system submitted to the DCASE 2022 Task 3 is based on our previous proposed Event-Independent Network V2 (EINV2) with a novel data augmentation method. Our method employs EINV2 with a track-wise output format, permutation-invariant training, and a soft parameter-sharing strategy, to detect different sound events of the same class but in different locations. The Conformer structure is used for extending EINV2 to learn local and global features. A data augmentation method, which contains several data augmentation chains composed of stochastic combinations of several different data augmentation operations, is utilized to generalize the model. To mitigate the lack of real-scene recordings in the development dataset and the presence of sound events being unbalanced, we exploit FSD50K, AudioSet, and TAU Spatial Room Impulse Response Database (TAU-SRIR DB) to generate simulated datasets for training. We present results on the validation set of Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2022 (STARSS22) in detail. Experimental results indicate that the ability to generalize to different environments and unbalanced performance among different classes are two main challenges. We evaluate our proposed method in Task 3 of the DCASE 2022 challenge and obtain the second rank in the teams ranking. Source code is released.
abstract_zh: 声音事件定位和检测（SELD）是声音事件检测和到达方向估计的联合任务。在 DCASE 2022 任务 3 中，数据类型从计算生成的空间录音转变为真实声音场景的录音。我们提交给 DCASE 2022 任务 3 的系统基于我们之前提出的事件独立网络 V2 (EINV2)，并采用了新颖的数据增强方法。我们的方法采用具有轨道输出格式、排列不变训练和软参数共享策略的 EINV2 来检测同一类但在不同位置的不同声音事件。 Conformer 结构用于扩展 EINV2 以学习局部和全局特征。利用数据增强方法来概括模型，该方法包含由几种不同数据增强操作的随机组合组成的多个数据增强链。为了缓解开发数据集中缺乏真实场景录音以及声音事件不平衡的问题，我们利用 FSD50K、AudioSet 和 TAU 空间房间脉冲响应数据库 (TAU-SRIR DB) 来生成用于训练的模拟数据集。我们详细介绍了 Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2022 (STARSS22) 验证集的结果。实验结果表明，泛化到不同环境的能力和不同类别之间的性能不平衡是两个主要挑战。我们在 DCASE 2022 挑战赛的任务 3 中评估了我们提出的方法，并在团队排名中获得了第二名。源代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件无关网络和数据增强链的声学事件定位与检测方法，用于处理真实空间声景中的挑战。
AI.motivation: DCASE 2022任务3要求从合成数据转向真实场景录音，但真实场景数据不足且类别不平衡，需提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 改进EINV2网络结构，采用轨道输出格式、排列不变训练和软参数共享策略，结合Conformer提取特征，并通过多数据增强链生成模拟数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在STARSS22验证集上验证方法有效性，在DCASE 2022任务3中获得团队排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强和模拟数据可缓解真实场景数据不足问题，但环境泛化能力和类别不平衡仍是主要挑战。

authors_text: Enrico Blanzieri,Davide Pastorello,Valter Cavecchia,Alexander Rumyantsev,Mariia Maltseva
title: Evaluating the Convergence of Tabu Enhanced Hybrid Quantum Optimization
title_zh: 评估 Tabu 增强混合量子优化的收敛性
abstract: In this paper we introduce the Tabu Enhanced Hybrid Quantum Optimization metaheuristic approach useful for optimization problem solving on a quantum hardware. We address the theoretical convergence of the proposed scheme from the viewpoint of the collisions in the object which stores the tabu states, based on the Ising model. The results of numerical evaluation of the algorithm on quantum hardware as well as on a classical semiconductor hardware model are also demonstrated.
summary: In this paper we introduce the Tabu Enhanced Hybrid Quantum Optimization metaheuristic approach useful for optimization problem solving on a quantum hardware. We address the theoretical convergence of the proposed scheme from the viewpoint of the collisions in the object which stores the tabu states, based on the Ising model. The results of numerical evaluation of the algorithm on quantum hardware as well as on a classical semiconductor hardware model are also demonstrated.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Tabu 增强型混合量子优化元启发式方法，可用于在量子硬件上解决优化问题。我们基于伊辛模型，从存储禁忌状态的对象中的碰撞角度解决了所提出方案的理论收敛性。还展示了该算法在量子硬件以及经典半导体硬件模型上的数值评估结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合禁忌搜索的混合量子优化方法，并评估其在量子硬件上的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 现有量子优化算法在收敛性和避障能力上存在不足，需引入经典禁忌搜索机制提升性能。
AI.method: 基于Ising模型构建禁忌状态碰撞理论框架，通过量子硬件与经典半导体模型的数值实验验证算法收敛性。
AI.result: 实验表明该混合算法在量子与经典硬件上均能有效收敛，且优于传统量子优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 禁忌增强机制有效提升了量子优化算法的收敛可靠性，为混合量子计算优化提供理论支持。

title: LKD-Net: Large Kernel Convolution Network for Single Image Dehazing
title_zh: LKD-Net：用于单图像去雾的大核卷积网络
abstract: The deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs)-based single image dehazing methods have achieved significant success. The previous methods are devoted to improving the network's performance by increasing the network's depth and width. The current methods focus on increasing the convolutional kernel size to enhance its performance by benefiting from the larger receptive field. However, directly increasing the size of the convolutional kernel introduces a massive amount of computational overhead and parameters. Thus, a novel Large Kernel Convolution Dehaze Block (LKD Block) consisting of the Decomposition deep-wise Large Kernel Convolution Block (DLKCB) and the Channel Enhanced Feed-forward Network (CEFN) is devised in this paper. The designed DLKCB can split the deep-wise large kernel convolution into a smaller depth-wise convolution and a depth-wise dilated convolution without introducing massive parameters and computational overhead. Meanwhile, the designed CEFN incorporates a channel attention mechanism into Feed-forward Network to exploit significant channels and enhance robustness. By combining multiple LKD Blocks and Up-Down sampling modules, the Large Kernel Convolution Dehaze Network (LKD-Net) is conducted. The evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the designed DLKCB and CEFN, and our LKD-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art. On the SOTS indoor dataset, our LKD-Net dramatically outperforms the Transformer-based method Dehamer with only 1.79% #Param and 48.9% FLOPs. The source code of our LKD-Net is available at https://github.com/SWU-CS-MediaLab/LKD-Net.
summary: The deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs)-based single image dehazing methods have achieved significant success. The previous methods are devoted to improving the network's performance by increasing the network's depth and width. The current methods focus on increasing the convolutional kernel size to enhance its performance by benefiting from the larger receptive field. However, directly increasing the size of the convolutional kernel introduces a massive amount of computational overhead and parameters. Thus, a novel Large Kernel Convolution Dehaze Block (LKD Block) consisting of the Decomposition deep-wise Large Kernel Convolution Block (DLKCB) and the Channel Enhanced Feed-forward Network (CEFN) is devised in this paper. The designed DLKCB can split the deep-wise large kernel convolution into a smaller depth-wise convolution and a depth-wise dilated convolution without introducing massive parameters and computational overhead. Meanwhile, the designed CEFN incorporates a channel attention mechanism into Feed-forward Network to exploit significant channels and enhance robustness. By combining multiple LKD Blocks and Up-Down sampling modules, the Large Kernel Convolution Dehaze Network (LKD-Net) is conducted. The evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the designed DLKCB and CEFN, and our LKD-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art. On the SOTS indoor dataset, our LKD-Net dramatically outperforms the Transformer-based method Dehamer with only 1.79% #Param and 48.9% FLOPs. The source code of our LKD-Net is available at https://github.com/SWU-CS-MediaLab/LKD-Net.
abstract_zh: 基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的单图像去雾方法取得了显着的成功。以前的方法致力于通过增加网络的深度和宽度来提高网络的性能。当前的方法侧重于增加卷积核的大小，以受益于更大的感受野来增强其性能。然而，直接增加卷积核的大小会引入大量的计算开销和参数。因此，本文设计了一种由深度分解大核卷积块（DLKCB）和通道增强前馈网络（CEFN）组成的新型大核卷积去雾块（LKD Block）。设计的DLKCB可以将深度大核卷积拆分为更小的深度卷积和深度扩张卷积，而无需引入大量参数和计算开销。同时，设计的 CEFN 将通道注意力机制纳入前馈网络中，以利用重要通道并增强鲁棒性。通过组合多个LKD块和上下采样模块，进行大核卷积去雾网络（LKD-Net）。评估结果证明了设计的 DLKCB 和 CEFN 的有效性，并且我们的 LKD-Net 优于最新技术。在 SOTS 室内数据集上，我们的 LKD-Net 显着优于基于 Transformer 的方法 Dehamer，仅 1.79% #Param 和 48.9% FLOPs。我们的 LKD-Net 的源代码可在 https://github.com/SWU-CS-MediaLab/LKD-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大核卷积的单幅图像去雾网络LKD-Net，通过设计高效的模块降低计算量并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾方法通过增加网络深度/宽度或扩大卷积核提升性能，但大核卷积带来高昂的计算成本，需在效率与效果间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 设计包含分解大核卷积块（DLKCB）和通道增强前馈网络（CEFN）的LKD模块，通过分解大核卷积降低参数量，并结合通道注意力机制增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在SOTS室内数据集上，LKD-Net以仅1.79%参数量和48.9%计算量显著优于Transformer基方法Dehamer，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LKD-Net通过创新模块设计有效解决了大核卷积的计算瓶颈，在保持高性能的同时实现了高效推理。

search_text: LKD-Net: Large Kernel Convolution Network for Single Image Dehazing LKD-Net：用于单图像去雾的大核卷积网络 The deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs)-based single image dehazing methods have achieved significant success. The previous methods are devoted to improving the network's performance by increasing the network's depth and width. The current methods focus on increasing the convolutional kernel size to enhance its performance by benefiting from the larger receptive field. However, directly increasing the size of the convolutional kernel introduces a massive amount of computational overhead and parameters. Thus, a novel Large Kernel Convolution Dehaze Block (LKD Block) consisting of the Decomposition deep-wise Large Kernel Convolution Block (DLKCB) and the Channel Enhanced Feed-forward Network (CEFN) is devised in this paper. The designed DLKCB can split the deep-wise large kernel convolution into a smaller depth-wise convolution and a depth-wise dilated convolution without introducing massive parameters and computational overhead. Meanwhile, the designed CEFN incorporates a channel attention mechanism into Feed-forward Network to exploit significant channels and enhance robustness. By combining multiple LKD Blocks and Up-Down sampling modules, the Large Kernel Convolution Dehaze Network (LKD-Net) is conducted. The evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the designed DLKCB and CEFN, and our LKD-Net outperforms the state-of-the-art. On the SOTS indoor dataset, our LKD-Net dramatically outperforms the Transformer-based method Dehamer with only 1.79% #Param and 48.9% FLOPs. The source code of our LKD-Net is available at https://github.com/SWU-CS-MediaLab/LKD-Net. 基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的单图像去雾方法取得了显着的成功。以前的方法致力于通过增加网络的深度和宽度来提高网络的性能。当前的方法侧重于增加卷积核的大小，以受益于更大的感受野来增强其性能。然而，直接增加卷积核的大小会引入大量的计算开销和参数。因此，本文设计了一种由深度分解大核卷积块（DLKCB）和通道增强前馈网络（CEFN）组成的新型大核卷积去雾块（LKD Block）。设计的DLKCB可以将深度大核卷积拆分为更小的深度卷积和深度扩张卷积，而无需引入大量参数和计算开销。同时，设计的 CEFN 将通道注意力机制纳入前馈网络中，以利用重要通道并增强鲁棒性。通过组合多个LKD块和上下采样模块，进行大核卷积去雾网络（LKD-Net）。评估结果证明了设计的 DLKCB 和 CEFN 的有效性，并且我们的 LKD-Net 优于最新技术。在 SOTS 室内数据集上，我们的 LKD-Net 显着优于基于 Transformer 的方法 Dehamer，仅 1.79% #Param 和 48.9% FLOPs。我们的 LKD-Net 的源代码可在 https://github.com/SWU-CS-MediaLab/LKD-Net 上获取。 本文提出了一种基于大核卷积的单幅图像去雾网络LKD-Net，通过设计高效的模块降低计算量并提升性能。 Pinjun Luo,Guoqiang Xiao,Xinbo Gao,Song Wu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuyou Gan,Yuhao Mao,Xuhong Zhang,Shouling Ji,Yuwen Pu,Meng Han,Jianwei Yin,Ting Wang
title: "Is your explanation stable?": A Robustness Evaluation Framework for Feature Attribution
title_zh: “你的解释稳定吗？”：特征归因的鲁棒性评估框架
abstract: Understanding the decision process of neural networks is hard. One vital method for explanation is to attribute its decision to pivotal features. Although many algorithms are proposed, most of them solely improve the faithfulness to the model. However, the real environment contains many random noises, which may leads to great fluctuations in the explanations. More seriously, recent works show that explanation algorithms are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. All of these make the explanation hard to trust in real scenarios. To bridge this gap, we propose a model-agnostic method \emph{Median Test for Feature Attribution} (MeTFA) to quantify the uncertainty and increase the stability of explanation algorithms with theoretical guarantees. MeTFA has the following two functions: (1) examine whether one feature is significantly important or unimportant and generate a MeTFA-significant map to visualize the results; (2) compute the confidence interval of a feature attribution score and generate a MeTFA-smoothed map to increase the stability of the explanation. Experiments show that MeTFA improves the visual quality of explanations and significantly reduces the instability while maintaining the faithfulness. To quantitatively evaluate the faithfulness of an explanation under different noise settings, we further propose several robust faithfulness metrics. Experiment results show that the MeTFA-smoothed explanation can significantly increase the robust faithfulness. In addition, we use two scenarios to show MeTFA's potential in the applications. First, when applied to the SOTA explanation method to locate context bias for semantic segmentation models, MeTFA-significant explanations use far smaller regions to maintain 99\%+ faithfulness. Second, when tested with different explanation-oriented attacks, MeTFA can help defend vanilla, as well as adaptive, adversarial attacks against explanations.
summary: Understanding the decision process of neural networks is hard. One vital method for explanation is to attribute its decision to pivotal features. Although many algorithms are proposed, most of them solely improve the faithfulness to the model. However, the real environment contains many random noises, which may leads to great fluctuations in the explanations. More seriously, recent works show that explanation algorithms are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. All of these make the explanation hard to trust in real scenarios. To bridge this gap, we propose a model-agnostic method \emph{Median Test for Feature Attribution} (MeTFA) to quantify the uncertainty and increase the stability of explanation algorithms with theoretical guarantees. MeTFA has the following two functions: (1) examine whether one feature is significantly important or unimportant and generate a MeTFA-significant map to visualize the results; (2) compute the confidence interval of a feature attribution score and generate a MeTFA-smoothed map to increase the stability of the explanation. Experiments show that MeTFA improves the visual quality of explanations and significantly reduces the instability while maintaining the faithfulness. To quantitatively evaluate the faithfulness of an explanation under different noise settings, we further propose several robust faithfulness metrics. Experiment results show that the MeTFA-smoothed explanation can significantly increase the robust faithfulness. In addition, we use two scenarios to show MeTFA's potential in the applications. First, when applied to the SOTA explanation method to locate context bias for semantic segmentation models, MeTFA-significant explanations use far smaller regions to maintain 99\%+ faithfulness. Second, when tested with different explanation-oriented attacks, MeTFA can help defend vanilla, as well as adaptive, adversarial attacks against explanations.
abstract_zh: 理解神经网络的决策过程很困难。一种重要的解释方法是将其决定归因于关键特征。尽管提出了许多算法，但大多数算法只是提高了对模型的忠实度。然而，真实环境中包含许多随机噪声，这可能会导致解释出现很大波动。更严重的是，最近的研究表明解释算法很容易受到对抗性攻击。所有这些都使得这种解释在真实场景中很难令人相信。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种与模型无关的方法\emph{特征归因中值测试}（MeTFA）来量化不确定性并在理论保证的情况下提高解释算法的稳定性。 MeTFA具有以下两个功能：（1）检查一个特征是否显着重要或不重要，并生成MeTFA显着图以可视化结果； (2) 计算特征归因得分的置信区间并生成 MeTFA 平滑图以增加解释的稳定性。实验表明，MeTFA 提高了解释的视觉质量，并在保持忠实度的同时显着降低了不稳定性。为了定量评估不同噪声设置下解释的可​​信度，我们进一步提出了几种稳健的可信度指标。实验结果表明，MeTFA 平滑解释可以显着提高鲁棒可信度。此外，我们还使用两个场景来展示MeTFA在应用中的潜力。首先，当应用于 SOTA 解释方法来定位语义分割模型的上下文偏差时，MeTFA 显着解释使用小得多的区域来保持 99\%+ 的忠实度。其次，当使用不同的面向解释的攻击进行测试时，MeTFA 可以帮助防御普通攻击以及针对解释的自适应对抗性攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MeTFA的模型无关框架，用于评估和提升特征归因解释的鲁棒性与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有特征归因方法在真实环境中易受噪声和对抗攻击影响，导致解释结果不稳定且难以信任。
AI.method: 通过中位数检验量化不确定性，生成显著性图与置信区间，提出MeTFA-significant和MeTFA-smoothed两种地图以增强稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明MeTFA显著提升解释的视觉质量与鲁棒性，在对抗攻击和噪声环境下保持高保真度。
AI.conclusion: MeTFA为特征归因提供了理论保证，有效防御对抗攻击并提升实际应用场景中的可靠性。

title: Representation Learning for Non-Melanoma Skin Cancer using a Latent Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用潜在自动编码器进行非黑色素瘤皮肤癌的表示学习
abstract: Generative learning is a powerful tool for representation learning, and shows particular promise for problems in biomedical imaging. However, in this context, sampling from the distribution is secondary to finding representations of real images, which often come with labels and explicitly represent the content and quality of the target distribution. It remains difficult to faithfully reconstruct images from generative models, particularly those as complex as histological images. In this work, two existing methods (autoencoders and adversarial latent autoencoders) are combined in attempt to improve our ability to encode and decode real images of non-melanoma skin cancer, specifically intra-epidermal carcinoma (IEC). Utilising a dataset of high-quality images of IEC (256 x 256), this work assesses the result of both image reconstruction quality and representation learning. It is shown that adversarial training can improve baseline FID scores from 76 to 50, and that benchmarks on representation learning can be improved by up to 3%. Smooth and realistic interpolations of the variation in the morphological structure are also presented for the first time, positioning representation learning as a promising direction in the context of computational pathology.
summary: Generative learning is a powerful tool for representation learning, and shows particular promise for problems in biomedical imaging. However, in this context, sampling from the distribution is secondary to finding representations of real images, which often come with labels and explicitly represent the content and quality of the target distribution. It remains difficult to faithfully reconstruct images from generative models, particularly those as complex as histological images. In this work, two existing methods (autoencoders and adversarial latent autoencoders) are combined in attempt to improve our ability to encode and decode real images of non-melanoma skin cancer, specifically intra-epidermal carcinoma (IEC). Utilising a dataset of high-quality images of IEC (256 x 256), this work assesses the result of both image reconstruction quality and representation learning. It is shown that adversarial training can improve baseline FID scores from 76 to 50, and that benchmarks on representation learning can be improved by up to 3%. Smooth and realistic interpolations of the variation in the morphological structure are also presented for the first time, positioning representation learning as a promising direction in the context of computational pathology.
abstract_zh: 生成学习是表示学习的强大工具，并且在解决生物医学成像问题方面表现出特别的前景。然而，在这种情况下，从分布中采样对于寻找真实图像的表示来说是次要的，真实图像通常带有标签并明确表示目标分布的内容和质量。从生成模型忠实地重建图像仍然很困难，特别是像组织学图像这样复杂的图像。在这项工作中，结合了两种现有的方法（自动编码器和对抗性潜在自动编码器），试图提高我们对非黑色素瘤皮肤癌，特别是表皮内癌（IEC）的真实图像进行编码和解码的能力。这项工作利用 IEC 高质量图像数据集 (256 x 256) 评估图像重建质量和表示学习的结果。结果表明，对抗性训练可以将基线 FID 分数从 76 提高到 50，并且表示学习的基准可以提高高达 3%。还首次提出了形态结构变化的平滑且真实的插值，将表示学习定位为计算病理学背景下的一个有前途的方向。

AI.motivation: 生成模型在生物医学图像中的表示学习具有潜力，但图像重建和表示学习在复杂组织学图像中仍面临挑战，因此需要改进现有方法。
AI.method: 本文结合了自编码器和对抗性潜在自编码器，利用高质量的IEC图像数据集（256 x 256）评估图像重建质量和表示学习效果。
AI.result: 对抗训练将基线FID分数从76提高到50，表示学习基准提高了最多3%。首次展示了形态结构变化的平滑且逼真的插值。
AI.conclusion: 表示学习在计算病理学中展现出前景，特别是在非黑色素瘤皮肤癌图像的重建和分析中。

search_text: Representation Learning for Non-Melanoma Skin Cancer using a Latent Autoencoder 使用潜在自动编码器进行非黑色素瘤皮肤癌的表示学习 Generative learning is a powerful tool for representation learning, and shows particular promise for problems in biomedical imaging. However, in this context, sampling from the distribution is secondary to finding representations of real images, which often come with labels and explicitly represent the content and quality of the target distribution. It remains difficult to faithfully reconstruct images from generative models, particularly those as complex as histological images. In this work, two existing methods (autoencoders and adversarial latent autoencoders) are combined in attempt to improve our ability to encode and decode real images of non-melanoma skin cancer, specifically intra-epidermal carcinoma (IEC). Utilising a dataset of high-quality images of IEC (256 x 256), this work assesses the result of both image reconstruction quality and representation learning. It is shown that adversarial training can improve baseline FID scores from 76 to 50, and that benchmarks on representation learning can be improved by up to 3%. Smooth and realistic interpolations of the variation in the morphological structure are also presented for the first time, positioning representation learning as a promising direction in the context of computational pathology. 生成学习是表示学习的强大工具，并且在解决生物医学成像问题方面表现出特别的前景。然而，在这种情况下，从分布中采样对于寻找真实图像的表示来说是次要的，真实图像通常带有标签并明确表示目标分布的内容和质量。从生成模型忠实地重建图像仍然很困难，特别是像组织学图像这样复杂的图像。在这项工作中，结合了两种现有的方法（自动编码器和对抗性潜在自动编码器），试图提高我们对非黑色素瘤皮肤癌，特别是表皮内癌（IEC）的真实图像进行编码和解码的能力。这项工作利用 IEC 高质量图像数据集 (256 x 256) 评估图像重建质量和表示学习的结果。结果表明，对抗性训练可以将基线 FID 分数从 76 提高到 50，并且表示学习的基准可以提高高达 3%。还首次提出了形态结构变化的平滑且真实的插值，将表示学习定位为计算病理学背景下的一个有前途的方向。 本文旨在通过结合自编码器和对抗性潜在自编码器的方法，提高非黑色素瘤皮肤癌（特别是原位癌）图像的表示学习和重建质量。 Simon Myles Thomas eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Indoor Path Planning for Multiple Unmanned Aerial Vehicles via Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 通过课程学习进行多无人机室内路径规划
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning was performed in this study for indoor path planning of two unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). Each UAV performed the task of moving as fast as possible from a randomly paired initial position to a goal position in an environment with obstacles. To minimize training time and prevent the damage of UAVs, learning was performed by simulation. Considering the non-stationary characteristics of the multi-agent environment wherein the optimal behavior varies based on the actions of other agents, the action of the other UAV was also included in the state space of each UAV. Curriculum learning was performed in two stages to increase learning efficiency. A goal rate of 89.0% was obtained compared with other learning strategies that obtained goal rates of 73.6% and 79.9%.
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning was performed in this study for indoor path planning of two unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). Each UAV performed the task of moving as fast as possible from a randomly paired initial position to a goal position in an environment with obstacles. To minimize training time and prevent the damage of UAVs, learning was performed by simulation. Considering the non-stationary characteristics of the multi-agent environment wherein the optimal behavior varies based on the actions of other agents, the action of the other UAV was also included in the state space of each UAV. Curriculum learning was performed in two stages to increase learning efficiency. A goal rate of 89.0% was obtained compared with other learning strategies that obtained goal rates of 73.6% and 79.9%.
abstract_zh: 本研究采用多智能体强化学习来进行两架无人机 (UAV) 的室内路径规划。每架无人机执行的任务是在有障碍物的环境中尽可能快地从随机配对的初始位置移动到目标位置。为了最大限度地减少训练时间并防止无人机损坏，通过模拟进行学习。考虑到多智能体环境的非平稳特性，其中最佳行为根据其他智能体的动作而变化，其他无人机的动作也包含在每个无人机的状态空间中。课程学习分两个阶段进行，提高学习效率。与获得目标率73.6%和79.9%的其他学习策略相比，获得了89.0%的目标率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于课程学习的多无人机室内路径规划问题，通过多智能体强化学习实现快速避障导航。
AI.motivation: 传统多无人机路径规划面临训练时间长、碰撞风险高及非平稳环境适应性差等挑战，需提升学习效率与成功率。
AI.method: 构建模拟环境将对手无人机动作纳入状态空间，采用两阶段课程学习策略优化训练过程。
AI.result: 相较其他算法（73.6%、79.9%），所提方法达到89.0%的目标达成率，验证了课程学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习框架显著提升多无人机协同路径规划性能，为复杂室内环境下的自主导航提供可行方案。

title: ElasticROS: An Elastically Collaborative Robot Operation System for Fog and Cloud Robotics
title_zh: ElasticROS：用于雾和云机器人的弹性协作机器人操作系统
abstract: Robots are integrating more huge-size models to enrich functions and improve accuracy, which leads to out-of-control computing pressure. And thus robots are encountering bottlenecks in computing power and battery capacity. Fog or cloud robotics is one of the most anticipated theories to address these issues. Approaches of cloud robotics have developed from system-level to node-level. However, the present node-level systems are not flexible enough to dynamically adapt to changing conditions. To address this, we present ElasticROS, which evolves the present node-level systems into an algorithm-level one. ElasticROS is based on ROS and ROS2. For fog and cloud robotics, it is the first robot operating system with algorithm-level collaborative computing. ElasticROS develops elastic collaborative computing to achieve adaptability to dynamic conditions. The collaborative computing algorithm is the core and challenge of ElasticROS. We abstract the problem and then propose an algorithm named ElasAction to address. It is a dynamic action decision algorithm based on online learning, which determines how robots and servers cooperate. The algorithm dynamically updates parameters to adapt to changes of conditions where the robot is currently in. It achieves elastically distributing of computing tasks to robots and servers according to configurations. In addition, we prove that the regret upper bound of the ElasAction is sublinear, which guarantees its convergence and thus enables ElasticROS to be stable in its elasticity. Finally, we conducted experiments with ElasticROS on common tasks of robotics, including SLAM, grasping and human-robot dialogue, and then measured its performances in latency, CPU usage and power consumption. The algorithm-level ElasticROS performs significantly better than the present node-level system.
summary: Robots are integrating more huge-size models to enrich functions and improve accuracy, which leads to out-of-control computing pressure. And thus robots are encountering bottlenecks in computing power and battery capacity. Fog or cloud robotics is one of the most anticipated theories to address these issues. Approaches of cloud robotics have developed from system-level to node-level. However, the present node-level systems are not flexible enough to dynamically adapt to changing conditions. To address this, we present ElasticROS, which evolves the present node-level systems into an algorithm-level one. ElasticROS is based on ROS and ROS2. For fog and cloud robotics, it is the first robot operating system with algorithm-level collaborative computing. ElasticROS develops elastic collaborative computing to achieve adaptability to dynamic conditions. The collaborative computing algorithm is the core and challenge of ElasticROS. We abstract the problem and then propose an algorithm named ElasAction to address. It is a dynamic action decision algorithm based on online learning, which determines how robots and servers cooperate. The algorithm dynamically updates parameters to adapt to changes of conditions where the robot is currently in. It achieves elastically distributing of computing tasks to robots and servers according to configurations. In addition, we prove that the regret upper bound of the ElasAction is sublinear, which guarantees its convergence and thus enables ElasticROS to be stable in its elasticity. Finally, we conducted experiments with ElasticROS on common tasks of robotics, including SLAM, grasping and human-robot dialogue, and then measured its performances in latency, CPU usage and power consumption. The algorithm-level ElasticROS performs significantly better than the present node-level system.
abstract_zh: 机器人正在集成更多的巨型模型来丰富功能并提高精度，这导致计算压力失控。因此，机器人在计算能力和电池容量方面遇到了瓶颈。雾或云机器人是解决这些问题最受期待的理论之一。云机器人的方法已经从系统级发展到节点级。然而，当前的节点级系统不够灵活，无法动态适应不断变化的条件。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ElasticROS，它将现有的节点级系统演变成算法级系统。 ElasticROS 基于 ROS 和 ROS2。对于雾和云机器人来说，它是第一个具有算法级协同计算的机器人操作系统。 ElasticROS开发弹性协作计算以实现对动态条件的适应。协同计算算法是ElasticROS的核心和挑战。我们对问题进行抽象，然后提出一种名为 ElasAction 的算法来解决。它是一种基于在线学习的动态动作决策算法，决定机器人和服务器如何协作。该算法动态更新参数以适应机器人当前所处条件的变化，实现计算任务根据配置弹性分配给机器人和服务器。此外，我们证明了ElasAction的后悔上限是次线性的，这保证了其收敛性，从而使ElasticROS的弹性保持稳定。最后，我们使用 ElasticROS 对机器人的常见任务进行了实验，包括 SLAM、抓取和人机对话，然后测量其在延迟、CPU 使用率和功耗方面的性能。算法级 ElasticROS 的性能明显优于现有的节点级系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ElasticROS，一种基于算法级协作计算的机器人操作系统，解决雾计算和云机器人中的计算压力与电池瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 机器人集成大型模型导致计算压力和电池容量瓶颈，现有节点级系统无法动态适应变化条件，需更灵活的算法级协作方案。
AI.method: 基于ROS/ROS2开发ElasticROS，提出动态动作决策算法ElasAction，通过在线学习实现机器人与服务器的弹性任务分配，并证明其遗憾上界为次线性以保证收敛性。
AI.result: 在SLAM、抓取和人机对话任务中，ElasticROS在延迟、CPU使用率和功耗指标上显著优于现有节点级系统。
AI.conclusion: 算法级协作计算有效提升系统适应性，ElasticROS验证了其在动态环境下的稳定性与性能优势。

motivation: 机器人集成大型模型导致计算压力和电池容量瓶颈，现有节点级系统无法动态适应变化条件，需更灵活的算法级协作方案。
method: 基于ROS/ROS2开发ElasticROS，提出动态动作决策算法ElasAction，通过在线学习实现机器人与服务器的弹性任务分配，并证明其遗憾上界为次线性以保证收敛性。
result: 在SLAM、抓取和人机对话任务中，ElasticROS在延迟、CPU使用率和功耗指标上显著优于现有节点级系统。
conclusion: 算法级协作计算有效提升系统适应性，ElasticROS验证了其在动态环境下的稳定性与性能优势。
search_text: ElasticROS: An Elastically Collaborative Robot Operation System for Fog and Cloud Robotics ElasticROS：用于雾和云机器人的弹性协作机器人操作系统 Robots are integrating more huge-size models to enrich functions and improve accuracy, which leads to out-of-control computing pressure. And thus robots are encountering bottlenecks in computing power and battery capacity. Fog or cloud robotics is one of the most anticipated theories to address these issues. Approaches of cloud robotics have developed from system-level to node-level. However, the present node-level systems are not flexible enough to dynamically adapt to changing conditions. To address this, we present ElasticROS, which evolves the present node-level systems into an algorithm-level one. ElasticROS is based on ROS and ROS2. For fog and cloud robotics, it is the first robot operating system with algorithm-level collaborative computing. ElasticROS develops elastic collaborative computing to achieve adaptability to dynamic conditions. The collaborative computing algorithm is the core and challenge of ElasticROS. We abstract the problem and then propose an algorithm named ElasAction to address. It is a dynamic action decision algorithm based on online learning, which determines how robots and servers cooperate. The algorithm dynamically updates parameters to adapt to changes of conditions where the robot is currently in. It achieves elastically distributing of computing tasks to robots and servers according to configurations. In addition, we prove that the regret upper bound of the ElasAction is sublinear, which guarantees its convergence and thus enables ElasticROS to be stable in its elasticity. Finally, we conducted experiments with ElasticROS on common tasks of robotics, including SLAM, grasping and human-robot dialogue, and then measured its performances in latency, CPU usage and power consumption. The algorithm-level ElasticROS performs significantly better than the present node-level system. 机器人正在集成更多的巨型模型来丰富功能并提高精度，这导致计算压力失控。因此，机器人在计算能力和电池容量方面遇到了瓶颈。雾或云机器人是解决这些问题最受期待的理论之一。云机器人的方法已经从系统级发展到节点级。然而，当前的节点级系统不够灵活，无法动态适应不断变化的条件。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ElasticROS，它将现有的节点级系统演变成算法级系统。 ElasticROS 基于 ROS 和 ROS2。对于雾和云机器人来说，它是第一个具有算法级协同计算的机器人操作系统。 ElasticROS开发弹性协作计算以实现对动态条件的适应。协同计算算法是ElasticROS的核心和挑战。我们对问题进行抽象，然后提出一种名为 ElasAction 的算法来解决。它是一种基于在线学习的动态动作决策算法，决定机器人和服务器如何协作。该算法动态更新参数以适应机器人当前所处条件的变化，实现计算任务根据配置弹性分配给机器人和服务器。此外，我们证明了ElasAction的后悔上限是次线性的，这保证了其收敛性，从而使ElasticROS的弹性保持稳定。最后，我们使用 ElasticROS 对机器人的常见任务进行了实验，包括 SLAM、抓取和人机对话，然后测量其在延迟、CPU 使用率和功耗方面的性能。算法级 ElasticROS 的性能明显优于现有的节点级系统。 本文提出ElasticROS，一种基于算法级协作计算的机器人操作系统，解决雾计算和云机器人中的计算压力与电池瓶颈问题。 Boyi Liu cs.RO

title: B-CANF: Adaptive B-frame Coding with Conditional Augmented Normalizing Flows
title_zh: B-CANF：具有条件增强归一化流的自适应 B 帧编码
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)
abstract: Over the past few years, learning-based video compression has become an active research area. However, most works focus on P-frame coding. Learned B-frame coding is under-explored and more challenging. This work introduces a novel B-frame coding framework, termed B-CANF, that exploits conditional augmented normalizing flows for B-frame coding. B-CANF additionally features two novel elements: frame-type adaptive coding and B*-frames. Our frame-type adaptive coding learns better bit allocation for hierarchical B-frame coding by dynamically adapting the feature distributions according to the B-frame type. Our B*-frames allow greater flexibility in specifying the group-of-pictures (GOP) structure by reusing the B-frame codec to mimic P-frame coding, without the need for an additional, separate P-frame codec. On commonly used datasets, B-CANF achieves the state-of-the-art compression performance as compared to the other learned B-frame codecs and shows comparable BD-rate results to HM-16.23 under the random access configuration in terms of PSNR. When evaluated on different GOP structures, our B*-frames achieve similar performance to the additional use of a separate P-frame codec.
summary: Over the past few years, learning-based video compression has become an active research area. However, most works focus on P-frame coding. Learned B-frame coding is under-explored and more challenging. This work introduces a novel B-frame coding framework, termed B-CANF, that exploits conditional augmented normalizing flows for B-frame coding. B-CANF additionally features two novel elements: frame-type adaptive coding and B*-frames. Our frame-type adaptive coding learns better bit allocation for hierarchical B-frame coding by dynamically adapting the feature distributions according to the B-frame type. Our B*-frames allow greater flexibility in specifying the group-of-pictures (GOP) structure by reusing the B-frame codec to mimic P-frame coding, without the need for an additional, separate P-frame codec. On commonly used datasets, B-CANF achieves the state-of-the-art compression performance as compared to the other learned B-frame codecs and shows comparable BD-rate results to HM-16.23 under the random access configuration in terms of PSNR. When evaluated on different GOP structures, our B*-frames achieve similar performance to the additional use of a separate P-frame codec.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，基于学习的视频压缩已成为一个活跃的研究领域。然而，大多数工作都集中在 P 帧编码上。学习的 B 帧编码尚未得到充分探索，并且更具挑战性。这项工作引入了一种新颖的 B 帧编码框架，称为 B-CANF，它利用条件增强归一化流进行 B 帧编码。 B-CANF 还具有两个新颖的元素：帧类型自适应编码和 B* 帧。我们的帧类型自适应编码通过根据 B 帧类型动态调整特征分布，为分层 B 帧编码学习更好的比特分配。我们的 B* 帧通过重用 B 帧编解码器来模拟 P 帧编码，从而在指定图像组 (GOP) 结构方面提供更大的灵活性，而无需额外的单独 P 帧编解码器。在常用数据集上，与其他学习的 B 帧编解码器相比，B-CANF 实现了最先进的压缩性能，并在随机接入配置下的 PSNR 方面显示了与 HM-16.23 相当的 BD 速率结果。当在不同的 GOP 结构上进行评估时，我们的 B* 帧实现了与额外使用单独的 P 帧编解码器类似的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件增强归一化流的自适应B帧编码框架B-CANF，通过引入帧类型自适应编码和B*-帧技术，提升视频压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要聚焦于P帧编码，而B帧编码因双向预测特性更具挑战性且研究不足，需探索更高效的编码方法。
AI.method: 采用条件增强归一化流建模B帧分布，结合帧类型自适应编码动态调整位分配，并通过B*-帧复用B帧编解码器模拟P帧编码，避免额外P帧编解码器需求。
AI.result: 在常用数据集上，B-CANF达到最先进的压缩性能，BD-rate指标与HM-16.23相当；B*-帧在不同GOP结构下表现与独立P帧编解码器相近。
AI.conclusion: B-CANF通过创新框架设计有效提升了B帧编码效率，为学习型视频压缩提供了新思路，具有实际应用潜力。
