title: Predict-and-Update Network: Audio-Visual Speech Recognition Inspired by Human Speech Perception
title_zh: 预测和更新网络：受人类语音感知启发的视听语音识别
abstract: Audio and visual signals complement each other in human speech perception, so do they in speech recognition. The visual hint is less evident than the acoustic hint, but more robust in a complex acoustic environment, as far as speech perception is concerned. It remains a challenge how we effectively exploit the interaction between audio and visual signals for automatic speech recognition. There have been studies to exploit visual signals as redundant or complementary information to audio input in a synchronous manner. Human studies suggest that visual signal primes the listener in advance as to when and on which frequency to attend to. We propose a Predict-and-Update Network (P&U net), to simulate such a visual cueing mechanism for Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (AVSR). In particular, we first predict the character posteriors of the spoken words, i.e. the visual embedding, based on the visual signals. The audio signal is then conditioned on the visual embedding via a novel cross-modal Conformer, that updates the character posteriors. We validate the effectiveness of the visual cueing mechanism through extensive experiments. The proposed P&U net outperforms the state-of-the-art AVSR methods on both LRS2-BBC and LRS3-BBC datasets, with the relative reduced Word Error Rate (WER)s exceeding 10% and 40% under clean and noisy conditions, respectively.
summary: Audio and visual signals complement each other in human speech perception, so do they in speech recognition. The visual hint is less evident than the acoustic hint, but more robust in a complex acoustic environment, as far as speech perception is concerned. It remains a challenge how we effectively exploit the interaction between audio and visual signals for automatic speech recognition. There have been studies to exploit visual signals as redundant or complementary information to audio input in a synchronous manner. Human studies suggest that visual signal primes the listener in advance as to when and on which frequency to attend to. We propose a Predict-and-Update Network (P&U net), to simulate such a visual cueing mechanism for Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (AVSR). In particular, we first predict the character posteriors of the spoken words, i.e. the visual embedding, based on the visual signals. The audio signal is then conditioned on the visual embedding via a novel cross-modal Conformer, that updates the character posteriors. We validate the effectiveness of the visual cueing mechanism through extensive experiments. The proposed P&U net outperforms the state-of-the-art AVSR methods on both LRS2-BBC and LRS3-BBC datasets, with the relative reduced Word Error Rate (WER)s exceeding 10% and 40% under clean and noisy conditions, respectively.
abstract_zh: 音频和视觉信号在人类语音感知中相互补充，在语音识别中也是如此。就语音感知而言，视觉提示不如听觉提示那么明显，但在复杂的声学环境中更加稳健。如何有效地利用音频和视觉信号之间的交互来进行自动语音识别仍然是一个挑战。已经有研究利用视觉信号作为同步方式音频输入的冗余或补充信息。人类研究表明，视觉信号可以提前让听众知道何时何地关注哪个频率。我们提出了一个预测和更新网络（P&U net），来模拟视听语音识别（AVSR）的这种视觉提示机制。特别是，我们首先根据视觉信号预测口语单词的字符后验，即视觉嵌入。然后，音频信号通过一种新颖的跨模态 Conformer 以视觉嵌入为条件，从而更新字符后验。我们通过大量的实验验证了视觉提示机制的有效性。所提出的 P&U 网络在 LRS2-BBC 和 LRS3-BBC 数据集上均优于最先进的 AVSR 方法，在干净和噪声条件下相对降低的字错误率 (WER) 分别超过 10% 和 40%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受人类语音感知启发的音频-视觉语音识别方法，通过预测-更新网络有效利用视觉提示机制提升识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-视觉语音识别方法未能有效模拟人类利用视觉信号提前引导注意力的机制，而人类研究表明视觉提示在复杂环境中具有更强的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计Predict-and-Update网络（P&U net），首先基于视觉信号预测字符后验（视觉嵌入），再通过跨模态Conformer网络利用音频信号更新预测结果。
AI.result: 在LRS2-BBC和LRS3-BBC数据集上，清洁环境下相对降低词错误率（WER）超10%，嘈杂环境下降低超40%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的视觉提示机制有效提升了音频-视觉语音识别性能，验证了模拟人类注意力引导机制的可行性与优势。

conclusion: 提出的视觉提示机制有效提升了音频-视觉语音识别性能，验证了模拟人类注意力引导机制的可行性与优势。
search_text: Predict-and-Update Network: Audio-Visual Speech Recognition Inspired by Human Speech Perception 预测和更新网络：受人类语音感知启发的视听语音识别 Audio and visual signals complement each other in human speech perception, so do they in speech recognition. The visual hint is less evident than the acoustic hint, but more robust in a complex acoustic environment, as far as speech perception is concerned. It remains a challenge how we effectively exploit the interaction between audio and visual signals for automatic speech recognition. There have been studies to exploit visual signals as redundant or complementary information to audio input in a synchronous manner. Human studies suggest that visual signal primes the listener in advance as to when and on which frequency to attend to. We propose a Predict-and-Update Network (P&U net), to simulate such a visual cueing mechanism for Audio-Visual Speech Recognition (AVSR). In particular, we first predict the character posteriors of the spoken words, i.e. the visual embedding, based on the visual signals. The audio signal is then conditioned on the visual embedding via a novel cross-modal Conformer, that updates the character posteriors. We validate the effectiveness of the visual cueing mechanism through extensive experiments. The proposed P&U net outperforms the state-of-the-art AVSR methods on both LRS2-BBC and LRS3-BBC datasets, with the relative reduced Word Error Rate (WER)s exceeding 10% and 40% under clean and noisy conditions, respectively. 音频和视觉信号在人类语音感知中相互补充，在语音识别中也是如此。就语音感知而言，视觉提示不如听觉提示那么明显，但在复杂的声学环境中更加稳健。如何有效地利用音频和视觉信号之间的交互来进行自动语音识别仍然是一个挑战。已经有研究利用视觉信号作为同步方式音频输入的冗余或补充信息。人类研究表明，视觉信号可以提前让听众知道何时何地关注哪个频率。我们提出了一个预测和更新网络（P&U net），来模拟视听语音识别（AVSR）的这种视觉提示机制。特别是，我们首先根据视觉信号预测口语单词的字符后验，即视觉嵌入。然后，音频信号通过一种新颖的跨模态 Conformer 以视觉嵌入为条件，从而更新字符后验。我们通过大量的实验验证了视觉提示机制的有效性。所提出的 P&U 网络在 LRS2-BBC 和 LRS3-BBC 数据集上均优于最先进的 AVSR 方法，在干净和噪声条件下相对降低的字错误率 (WER) 分别超过 10% 和 40%。 本文提出一种受人类语音感知启发的音频-视觉语音识别方法，通过预测-更新网络有效利用视觉提示机制提升识别效果。 Jiadong Wang,Xinyuan Qian,Haizhou Li cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Kuiyuan Zhang,Zhongyun Hua,Yuanman Li,Yushu Zhang,Yicong Zhou
title: Uformer-ICS: A U-Shaped Transformer for Image Compressive Sensing Service
title_zh: Uformer-ICS：用于图像压缩传感服务的U型变压器
abstract: Many service computing applications require real-time dataset collection from multiple devices, necessitating efficient sampling techniques to reduce bandwidth and storage pressure. Compressive sensing (CS) has found wide-ranging applications in image acquisition and reconstruction. Recently, numerous deep-learning methods have been introduced for CS tasks. However, the accurate reconstruction of images from measurements remains a significant challenge, especially at low sampling rates. In this paper, we propose Uformer-ICS as a novel U-shaped transformer for image CS tasks by introducing inner characteristics of CS into transformer architecture. To utilize the uneven sparsity distribution of image blocks, we design an adaptive sampling architecture that allocates measurement resources based on the estimated block sparsity, allowing the compressed results to retain maximum information from the original image. Additionally, we introduce a multi-channel projection (MCP) module inspired by traditional CS optimization methods. By integrating the MCP module into the transformer blocks, we construct projection-based transformer blocks, and then form a symmetrical reconstruction model using these blocks and residual convolutional blocks. Therefore, our reconstruction model can simultaneously utilize the local features and long-range dependencies of image, and the prior projection knowledge of CS theory. Experimental results demonstrate its significantly better reconstruction performance than state-of-the-art deep learning-based CS methods.
summary: Many service computing applications require real-time dataset collection from multiple devices, necessitating efficient sampling techniques to reduce bandwidth and storage pressure. Compressive sensing (CS) has found wide-ranging applications in image acquisition and reconstruction. Recently, numerous deep-learning methods have been introduced for CS tasks. However, the accurate reconstruction of images from measurements remains a significant challenge, especially at low sampling rates. In this paper, we propose Uformer-ICS as a novel U-shaped transformer for image CS tasks by introducing inner characteristics of CS into transformer architecture. To utilize the uneven sparsity distribution of image blocks, we design an adaptive sampling architecture that allocates measurement resources based on the estimated block sparsity, allowing the compressed results to retain maximum information from the original image. Additionally, we introduce a multi-channel projection (MCP) module inspired by traditional CS optimization methods. By integrating the MCP module into the transformer blocks, we construct projection-based transformer blocks, and then form a symmetrical reconstruction model using these blocks and residual convolutional blocks. Therefore, our reconstruction model can simultaneously utilize the local features and long-range dependencies of image, and the prior projection knowledge of CS theory. Experimental results demonstrate its significantly better reconstruction performance than state-of-the-art deep learning-based CS methods.
abstract_zh: 许多服务计算应用程序需要从多个设备收集实时数据集，因此需要高效的采样技术来减少带宽和存储压力。压缩感知（CS）在图像采集和重建方面有着广泛的应用。最近，针对 CS 任务引入了许多深度学习方法。然而，根据测量准确重建图像仍然是一个重大挑战，特别是在低采样率的情况下。在本文中，我们通过将 CS 的内部特性引入到 Transformer 架构中，提出了 Uformer-ICS 作为一种用于图像 CS 任务的新型 U 形 Transformer。为了利用图像块的不均匀稀疏度分布，我们设计了一种自适应采样架构，该架构根据估计的块稀疏度分配测量资源，允许压缩结果保留原始图像的最大信息。此外，我们还引入了受传统 CS 优化方法启发的多通道投影 (MCP) 模块。通过将MCP模块集成到变压器块中，我们构造了基于投影的变压器块，然后使用这些块和残差卷积块形成对称重建模型。因此，我们的重建模型可以同时利用图像的局部特征和远程依赖性，以及CS理论的先验投影知识。实验结果表明，其重建性能明显优于最先进的基于深度学习的 CS 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Uformer-ICS的U型Transformer模型，用于图像压缩感知任务。
AI.motivation: 由于服务计算应用需要从多个设备实时收集数据，因此需要高效的采样技术以减轻带宽和存储压力。然而，从低采样率测量中准确重建图像仍然是一个重大挑战。
AI.method: 本文引入了压缩感知的内在特性到Transformer架构中，设计了一种自适应采样架构，并引入了多通道投影模块，构建了基于投影的Transformer块和对称重建模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在图像重建性能上显著优于现有的基于深度学习的压缩感知方法。
AI.conclusion: Uformer-ICS模型能够同时利用图像的局部特征、长距离依赖关系和压缩感知理论的先验投影知识，从而有效提升图像重建质量。

Therefore, our reconstruction model can simultaneously utilize the local features and long-range dependencies of image, and the prior projection knowledge of CS theory. title: REQA: Coarse-to-fine Assessment of Image Quality to Alleviate the Range Effect
title_zh: REQA：从粗到细评估图像质量以减轻范围效应
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) of user generated content (UGC) suffers from the range effect which indicates that on the overall quality range, mean opinion score (MOS) and predicted MOS (pMOS) are well correlated; focusing on a particular range, the correlation is lower. The reason for the range effect is that the predicted deviations both in a wide range and in a narrow range destroy the uniformity between MOS and pMOS. To tackle this problem, a novel method is proposed from coarse-grained metric to fine-grained prediction. Firstly, we design a rank-and-gradient loss for coarse-grained metric. The loss keeps the order and grad consistency between pMOS and MOS, thereby reducing the predicted deviation in a wide range. Secondly, we propose multi-level tolerance loss to make fine-grained prediction. The loss is constrained by a decreasing threshold to limite the predicted deviation in narrower and narrower ranges. Finally, we design a feedback network to conduct the coarse-to-fine assessment. On the one hand, the network adopts feedback blocks to process multi-scale distortion features iteratively and on the other hand, it fuses non-local context feature to the output of each iteration to acquire more quality-aware feature representation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can alleviate the range effect compared to the state-of-the-art methods effectively.
summary: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) of user generated content (UGC) suffers from the range effect which indicates that on the overall quality range, mean opinion score (MOS) and predicted MOS (pMOS) are well correlated; focusing on a particular range, the correlation is lower. The reason for the range effect is that the predicted deviations both in a wide range and in a narrow range destroy the uniformity between MOS and pMOS. To tackle this problem, a novel method is proposed from coarse-grained metric to fine-grained prediction. Firstly, we design a rank-and-gradient loss for coarse-grained metric. The loss keeps the order and grad consistency between pMOS and MOS, thereby reducing the predicted deviation in a wide range. Secondly, we propose multi-level tolerance loss to make fine-grained prediction. The loss is constrained by a decreasing threshold to limite the predicted deviation in narrower and narrower ranges. Finally, we design a feedback network to conduct the coarse-to-fine assessment. On the one hand, the network adopts feedback blocks to process multi-scale distortion features iteratively and on the other hand, it fuses non-local context feature to the output of each iteration to acquire more quality-aware feature representation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can alleviate the range effect compared to the state-of-the-art methods effectively.
abstract_zh: 用户生成内容（UGC）的盲图像质量评估（BIQA）受到范围效应的影响，这表明在整体质量范围上，平均意见得分（MOS）和预测MOS（pMOS）具有良好的相关性；关注特定范围，相关性较低。范围效应的原因是大范围和窄范围的预测偏差破坏了MOS和pMOS之间的均匀性。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种从粗粒度度量到细粒度预测的新方法。首先，我们为粗粒度指标设计了排名和梯度损失。该损失保持了pMOS和MOS之间的顺序和梯度一致性，从而在大范围内减少了预测偏差。其次，我们提出多级容差损失来进行细粒度预测。损失受到减小阈值的限制，以将预测偏差限制在越来越窄的范围内。最后，我们设计了一个反馈网络来进行从粗到细的评估。一方面，网络采用反馈块迭代处理多尺度失真特征，另一方面，将非局部上下文特征融合到每次迭代的输出中，以获得更多质量感知的特征表示。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法可以有效减轻范围效应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出REQA方法，通过粗到细的评估策略缓解图像质量评估中的范围效应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有盲图像质量评估（BIQA）方法在特定质量区间内预测值与真实值相关性较低，导致范围效应，需设计新的评估框架提升预测一致性。
AI.method: 设计秩-梯度损失实现粗粒度质量排序，结合多级容忍度损失细化预测范围，并构建反馈网络迭代处理多尺度失真特征与非局部上下文信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法较现有技术更有效缓解范围效应，提升预测精度与区间一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过分层损失函数与反馈网络结构，REQA方法成功解决了BIQA中的范围效应问题，为图像质量评估提供新思路。

Finally, we design a feedback network to conduct the coarse-to-fine assessment. On the one hand, the network adopts feedback blocks to process multi-scale distortion features iteratively and on the other hand, it fuses non-local context feature to the output of each iteration to acquire more quality-aware feature representation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can alleviate the range effect compared to the state-of-the-art methods effectively. 用户生成内容（UGC）的盲图像质量评估（BIQA）受到范围效应的影响，这表明在整体质量范围上，平均意见得分（MOS）和预测MOS（pMOS）具有良好的相关性；关注特定范围，相关性较低。范围效应的原因是大范围和窄范围的预测偏差破坏了MOS和pMOS之间的均匀性。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种从粗粒度度量到细粒度预测的新方法。首先，我们为粗粒度指标设计了排名和梯度损失。该损失保持了pMOS和MOS之间的顺序和梯度一致性，从而在大范围内减少了预测偏差。其次，我们提出多级容差损失来进行细粒度预测。损失受到减小阈值的限制，以将预测偏差限制在越来越窄的范围内。最后，我们设计了一个反馈网络来进行从粗到细的评估。一方面，网络采用反馈块迭代处理多尺度失真特征，另一方面，将非局部上下文特征融合到每次迭代的输出中，以获得更多质量感知的特征表示。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法可以有效减轻范围效应。 本文提出REQA方法，通过粗到细的评估策略缓解图像质量评估中的范围效应问题。 Bingheng Li,Fushuo Huo eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Exploiting Pre-trained Feature Networks for Generative Adversarial Networks in Audio-domain Loop Generation
title_zh: 在音频域循环生成中利用生成对抗网络的预训练特征网络
abstract: While generative adversarial networks (GANs) have been widely used in research on audio generation, the training of a GAN model is known to be unstable, time consuming, and data inefficient. Among the attempts to ameliorate the training process of GANs, the idea of Projected GAN emerges as an effective solution for GAN-based image generation, establishing the state-of-the-art in different image applications. The core idea is to use a pre-trained classifier to constrain the feature space of the discriminator to stabilize and improve GAN training. This paper investigates whether Projected GAN can similarly improve audio generation, by evaluating the performance of a StyleGAN2-based audio-domain loop generation model with and without using a pre-trained feature space in the discriminator. Moreover, we compare the performance of using a general versus domain-specific classifier as the pre-trained audio classifier. With experiments on both drum loop and synth loop generation, we show that a general audio classifier works better, and that with Projected GAN our loop generation models can converge around 5 times faster without performance degradation.
summary: While generative adversarial networks (GANs) have been widely used in research on audio generation, the training of a GAN model is known to be unstable, time consuming, and data inefficient. Among the attempts to ameliorate the training process of GANs, the idea of Projected GAN emerges as an effective solution for GAN-based image generation, establishing the state-of-the-art in different image applications. The core idea is to use a pre-trained classifier to constrain the feature space of the discriminator to stabilize and improve GAN training. This paper investigates whether Projected GAN can similarly improve audio generation, by evaluating the performance of a StyleGAN2-based audio-domain loop generation model with and without using a pre-trained feature space in the discriminator. Moreover, we compare the performance of using a general versus domain-specific classifier as the pre-trained audio classifier. With experiments on both drum loop and synth loop generation, we show that a general audio classifier works better, and that with Projected GAN our loop generation models can converge around 5 times faster without performance degradation.
abstract_zh: 虽然生成对抗网络 (GAN) 已广泛应用于音频生成研究中，但众所周知，GAN 模型的训练不稳定、耗时且数据效率低下。在改进 GAN 训练过程的尝试中，投影 GAN 的想法成为基于 GAN 的图像生成的有效解决方案，在不同的图像应用中建立了最先进的技术。核心思想是使用预训练的分类器来约束判别器的特征空间，以稳定和改进 GAN 训练。本文通过评估基于 StyleGAN2 的音频域循环生成模型（在判别器中使用或不使用预训练特征空间）的性能，研究了 Projected GAN 是否可以类似地改进音频生成。此外，我们还比较了使用通用分类器与特定领域分类器作为预训练音频分类器的性能。通过对鼓循环和合成器循环生成的实验，我们表明通用音频分类器效果更好，并且使用 Projected GAN，我们的循环生成模型可以以大约 5 倍的速度收敛，而不会降低性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将Projected GAN方法应用于音频领域循环生成，通过预训练特征网络提升生成对抗网络的训练效率和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN在音频生成中存在训练不稳定、耗时且数据效率低的问题，而Projected GAN在图像生成中已被证明有效，因此探索其在音频领域的适用性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 基于StyleGAN2构建音频循环生成模型，对比使用预训练特征空间与不使用的情况，并比较通用音频分类器与领域专用分类器的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明通用音频分类器效果更优，采用Projected GAN后模型收敛速度提升5倍且性能无下降。
AI.conclusion: Projected GAN能有效提升音频循环生成的训练效率，通用分类器在该任务中表现优于领域专用分类器。

title: 4D LUT: Learnable Context-Aware 4D Lookup Table for Image Enhancement
title_zh: 4D LUT：用于图像增强的可学习上下文感知 4D 查找表
abstract: Image enhancement aims at improving the aesthetic visual quality of photos by retouching the color and tone, and is an essential technology for professional digital photography. Recent years deep learning-based image enhancement algorithms have achieved promising performance and attracted increasing popularity. However, typical efforts attempt to construct a uniform enhancer for all pixels' color transformation. It ignores the pixel differences between different content (e.g., sky, ocean, etc.) that are significant for photographs, causing unsatisfactory results. In this paper, we propose a novel learnable context-aware 4-dimensional lookup table (4D LUT), which achieves content-dependent enhancement of different contents in each image via adaptively learning of photo context. In particular, we first introduce a lightweight context encoder and a parameter encoder to learn a context map for the pixel-level category and a group of image-adaptive coefficients, respectively. Then, the context-aware 4D LUT is generated by integrating multiple basis 4D LUTs via the coefficients. Finally, the enhanced image can be obtained by feeding the source image and context map into fused context-aware 4D~LUT via quadrilinear interpolation. Compared with traditional 3D LUT, i.e., RGB mapping to RGB, which is usually used in camera imaging pipeline systems or tools, 4D LUT, i.e., RGBC(RGB+Context) mapping to RGB, enables finer control of color transformations for pixels with different content in each image, even though they have the same RGB values. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in widely-used benchmarks.
summary: Image enhancement aims at improving the aesthetic visual quality of photos by retouching the color and tone, and is an essential technology for professional digital photography. Recent years deep learning-based image enhancement algorithms have achieved promising performance and attracted increasing popularity. However, typical efforts attempt to construct a uniform enhancer for all pixels' color transformation. It ignores the pixel differences between different content (e.g., sky, ocean, etc.) that are significant for photographs, causing unsatisfactory results. In this paper, we propose a novel learnable context-aware 4-dimensional lookup table (4D LUT), which achieves content-dependent enhancement of different contents in each image via adaptively learning of photo context. In particular, we first introduce a lightweight context encoder and a parameter encoder to learn a context map for the pixel-level category and a group of image-adaptive coefficients, respectively. Then, the context-aware 4D LUT is generated by integrating multiple basis 4D LUTs via the coefficients. Finally, the enhanced image can be obtained by feeding the source image and context map into fused context-aware 4D~LUT via quadrilinear interpolation. Compared with traditional 3D LUT, i.e., RGB mapping to RGB, which is usually used in camera imaging pipeline systems or tools, 4D LUT, i.e., RGBC(RGB+Context) mapping to RGB, enables finer control of color transformations for pixels with different content in each image, even though they have the same RGB values. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in widely-used benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 图像增强旨在通过修饰色彩和色调来提高照片的审美视觉质量，是专业数码摄影的必备技术。近年来，基于深度学习的图像增强算法取得了可喜的性能并越来越受欢迎。然而，典型的努力尝试为所有像素的颜色变换构建统一的增强器。它忽略了对照片来说很重要的不同内容（例如天空、海洋等）之间的像素差异，导致结果不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可学习上下文感知4维查找表（4D LUT），它通过自适应学习照片上下文来实现每个图像中不同内容的内容相关增强。特别是，我们首先引入一个轻量级上下文编码器和一个参数编码器来分别学习像素级类别的上下文图和一组图像自适应系数。然后，通过系数整合多个基础4D LUT来生成上下文感知4D LUT。最后，通过四线性插值将源图像和上下文映射输入融合上下文感知的 4D~LUT 中，即可获得增强图像。与相机成像管道系统或工具中通常使用的传统3D LUT（即RGB映射到RGB）相比，4D LUT（即RGBC（RGB+Context）映射到RGB）可以更精细地控制每个图像中具有不同内容的像素的颜色变换，即使它们具有相同的RGB值。实验结果表明，我们的方法在广泛使用的基准测试中优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的上下文感知4D查找表（4D LUT），用于实现基于图像内容差异的自适应图像增强。
AI.motivation: 传统图像增强方法采用统一的颜色转换策略，忽略不同内容区域（如天空、海洋）的像素差异，导致增强效果不理想。
AI.method: 设计轻量上下文编码器学习像素级内容特征，参数编码器生成图像自适应系数，通过多组基础4D LUT与系数融合生成上下文感知4D LUT，结合四次线性插值实现增强。
AI.result: 在常用基准测试中优于现有先进方法，尤其在处理相同RGB值但不同内容区域时展现更精细的颜色控制能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入上下文感知机制，4D LUT能针对图像不同内容区域实现差异化的颜色增强，显著提升图像美学质量。
